text.en: Saturday Rites.
4th Imam dua
Sy Fatima(sa)dua
Imam Ali(as)dua
Ziyarats
Tasbih
Salats
Night
Saturday Dua of Imam Zainul Abideen (peace be upon him)

translation.en: In the Name of Allah, the All-beneficent, the All-merciful.
"In the name of Allah," the word of those who hold fast to Him,
the speech of those who seek His protection

segments.arabic: وَ أَعُوذُ بِٱللَّهِ تَعَالَىٰ مِنْ جَوْرِ ٱلْجَائِرِينَ
segments.transliteration: wa aʿudhu billahi taʿala min jawri alja'irina

translation.en: I seek refuge in Allah, high exalted is He, from the injustice of the unjust,
the trickery of the enviers,
and the oppression of the wrongdoers,
and I praise Him beyond the praise of the praisers!
O Allah, You are the One without partner,
and the King without having been made sovereign;
no one opposes You in Your decree
and no one contests You in Your kingdom.
I beseech You to bless Muhammad
Your servant and Your messenger,

segments.transliteration: wa an tuziʿani min shukri naʿmaka

translation.en: inspire me with a thanksgiving for Your favors
that You take to the utmost limit of Your good pleasure,
help me to obey You,
hold fast to worshiping You,
and deserve Your reward,
through the gentleness of Your solicitude

segments.arabic: وَتَرْحَمَنِي وَتَصُدَّنِي عَنْ مَعَاصِيكَ مَا أَحْيَيْتَنِي
segments.transliteration: wa tarhamani wa tasuddani ʿan maʿasika ma ahyaytani

translation.en: have mercy upon me, bar me from acts of disobedience to You as long as You keep me alive,

segments.transliteration: wa tuwaffiqani lima yanfaʿuni ma abqaytani

translation.en: give me success in what profits me as long as You spare me,
expand my breast through Your Book,
lessen my burden through its recitation,

segments.transliteration: wa tamnahani alssalamata fi dini wa nafsi

translation.en: bestow upon me health in my religion and my soul,

segments.transliteration: wa la tuhisha bi ahla unsi

translation.en: estrange not my intimates from me,

segments.arabic: وَتُتِمَّ إِحْسَانَكَ فِيمَا بَقِيَ مِنْ عُمُرِي
segments.transliteration: wa tutimma ihsanaka fima baqiya min ʿumri

translation.en: and complete Your beneficence in what is left of my lifetime,
just as You have shown beneficence in that of it which has passed!
O Most Merciful of all those who show mercy!
O God, open for us the treasures of mercy

segments.arabic: وَ هَبْ لَنَا اللّٰهُمَّ رَحْمَةً لَا تُعَذِّبُنَا بَعْدَهَا فِيْ الدُّنْيَا وَ الْاٰخِرَةِ،
segments.transliteration: wa hab lanal laahumma rahmatan laa to-a’zzebonaa ba’dahaa fid dunyaa wal aakherate,

translation.en: and bestow upon us that mercy, after which there is no chastisement whether in the world or the hereafter

segments.arabic: وَ ارْزُقْنَا مِنْ فَضْلِكَ الْوَاسِعِ رِزْقًا حَلَالًا طَيِّبًا،
segments.transliteration: war zuqnaa min fazlekal waase-e’ rizqan halaalan tayyeban

translation.en: Through your vast favors bestow upon us lawful and pure sustenance

segments.arabic: وَ لَا تُحْوِجْنَا، وَ لَا تُفْقِرْنَا اِلٰى اَحَدٍ سِوَاكَ،
segments.transliteration: wa laa tohwijnaa, wa laa tufqirnaa elaa ahadin sewaaka

translation.en: and other than Yourself, do not make us needful of anyone.

segments.arabic: وَ زِدْنَا بِذٰلِكَ شُكْرًا وَ اِلَيْكَ فَقْرًا وَ فَاقَةً
segments.transliteration: wa zidnaa be-zaaleka shukran wa elayka faqran wa faaqatan

translation.en: Increase our thankfulness and keep us in need of You and Poor in front of You

segments.arabic: وَ بِكَ عَمَّنْ سِوَاكَ غِنًى وَ تَعَفُّفًا.
segments.transliteration: wa beka a’mman sewaaka ghenan wa ta-a’ffofan

translation.en: and make us needless and respectable to everyone other than You.
O God, bestow us wideness in the world

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ اِنَّا نَعُوْذُ بِكَ اَنْ تَزْوِيَ وَجْهَكَ عَنَّا فِيْ حَالٍ،
segments.transliteration: allaahumma innaa na-o’ozo beka an tazweya wajhaka a’nnaa fee haalin

translation.en: . O master, we seek your refuge from that You should turn away from us at any time,
while we address You.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلٰى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ اٰلِ مُحَمَّدٍ،
segments.transliteration: allaahumma salle a’laa mohammadin wa aale mohammadin,

translation.en: O God, bless Muhammad and the progeny of Muhammad,
, and bestow on us all that You like,

segments.arabic: وَ اجْعَلْهُ لَنَا قُوَّةً فِيْمَا تُحِبُّ، يَا اَرْحَمَ الرَّاحِمِيْنَ.
segments.transliteration: waj a’lho lanaa quwwatan feemaa tohibbo, yaa arhamar raahemeen.

translation.en: and make it for us strength in what You like, O the most merciful of the merciful ones.
In the name of Allah the Beneficent the Merciful.

segments.arabic: َالْحَمْدُ لِلّٰهِ الَّذِيْ قَرَنَ رَجَآئِيْ بِعَفْوِهٖ وَ فَسَحَ اَمَلِيْ بِحُسْنِ تَجَاوُزِهٖ وَ صَفْحِهٖ وَ قُوَّيٰ مَتْنِيِ وَ ظَهْرِيْ وَ سَاعِدِيْ وَ يَدِيْ بِمَا عَرَّفَنِيْ مِنْ جُوْدِهٖ وَ کَرَمِهٖ

translation.en: Praise is for Allah Who has connected my wishes with His forgiveness. And has spread my desires with His mercy. Has strengthened my back and the shoulders by His Generosity and Recognitions.

segments.arabic: وَلَمْ يُخْلِنِيْ مَعَ مَقَامِيْ عَلٰي مَعْصِيَتِهٖ وَ تَقْصِيْرِيْ فِيْ طَاعَتِهٖ وَمَا يُحِقُّ عَلَيَّ مِنْ اِعْتِقَادِ خَشْيَتِهٖ وَ اِسْتِشْعَارِ خِيْفَتِهٖ مِنْ تَوَاتُرِ مِنَنِهٖ وَ تَظَاهُرِ نِعَمِهٖ

translation.en: He has not left me without obligation and favours when I am involved in sins and disobedience. And was negligent in His obedience, and have not fulfilled the right of His fear and His chastisement.

segments.arabic: وَ سُبْحَانَ اﷲِ الَّذِيْ يَتَوَکَّلُ کُلُّ مُؤْمِنٍ عَلَيْهِ وَ يَضْطَرُّ کُلُّ حَاجَۃٍ اِلَيْهِ وَلاَ يَسْتَغْنِيْ اَحَدٌ اِلاَّ بِفَضْلِ مَا لَدَيْهِ وَلَآ اِلٰهَ اِلاَّ اﷲُ الْمُقِيْلُ عَلٰي مَنْ اَعْرَضَ عَنْ ذِکْرِهِ

translation.en: Allah is Pure on whom the believers rely and are devoted to Him in all the condition. No one is independent of His grace. There is no god except Allah who is attentive to the one who is negligent about Him.

segments.arabic: التَّوَّابُ عَلٰي مَنْ تَابَ اِلَيْهِ مِنْ عَظِيْمِ ذَنْبِهٖ

translation.en: Who accepts the repentance of the one who does sins excessively.

segments.arabic: السَّاخِطُ عَلٰي مَنْ قَنَطَ مِنْ وَاسِعِ رَحْمَتِهٖ وَ يَئِسَ مِنْ عَاجِلِ رَوْحِهٖ

translation.en: And He is displeased on the one who has lost hopes of His Vast Blessings and Mercy,

segments.arabic: وَاﷲُ اَکْبَرُ خَالِقُ کُلِّ شَيْءٍ وَمَالِکُهُ وَ مُبِيْدُ کُلِّ شَيْءٍ وَمُهْلِکُهٗ وَاﷲُ اَکْبَرُ کَبِيْرًا کَمَا هُوَ اَهْلُهٗ وَ مُسْتَحِقَّهٗ

translation.en: and Allah is above all the things, Creator and Lord of all the things, the eradicator and destroyer of all the things and Allah is Great, the greatness which He deserves and it befits Him.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلٰي مُحَمَّدٍ عَبْدِکَ وَ نَبِيِّکَ وَ رَسُوْلِکَ وَ اَمِيْنِکَ وَ شَاهِدِکَ التَّقِيِّ النَّقِيِّ وَ عَلٰي اٰلِ مُحَمَّدٍ الطَّيِّبِيْنَ الطَّاهِرِيْنَ

translation.en: O Allah send blessings on Mohammad Your servant, Your prophet, Your messenger, Your trustworthy, Your witness, Pure and noble and on his progeny the Purified.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ اِنِّيْ اَسْئَلُکَ سُؤَالَ مُعْتَرِفٍ بِذَنْبِهٖ نَادِمٍ عَلٰي اِقْتِرَافِ تَبِعَتِهٖ وَ اَنْتَ اَوْلٰي مَنِ اعْتُمِدَ وَ عَفِيَ وَ جَادَ بِالْمَغْفِرَۃِ مَنْ ظَلَمَ وَ اَسَآءَ فَقَدْ اَوْ بَقَتْنِيْ الذُّنُوْبُ فِيْ مَهَادِيْ الْهَلَکَۃِ وَ اَحَاطَتْ بِهِ الْاٰثَامُ وَ بَقَيْتُ غَيْرَ مُسْتَقِلٍّ بِهَا

translation.en: O Allah! I ask You like the one who has confessed his sins and like the one who has followed the evil desires and is now ashamed of it, and You are the one who can be depended upon for forgiveness, and the best for the sinners and evil doers because the sins have pushed in the dark valley of destruction, and is surrounded by errors and mistakes now the position is such that I cannot consider the sins as insignificant.

segments.arabic: وَ اَنْتَ الْمُرْتَجٰي وَ عَلَيْکَ مُعَوَّلُ فِي الشِّدَۃِ وَ الرَّخَآءِ وَ اَنْتَ مَلْجَأَ الْخَآئِفِ الْغَرِيْقِ وَ اَرْئَفُ مِنْ کُلِّ شَفِيْقٍ وَ اِلَيْکَ قَصَدْتُ

translation.en: Now You are the only place of hope and in hardships and ease You are the one on whom I rely. You are the refuge for the fearful who are drowning, and the Merciful of all other merciful.

segments.arabic: سَيِّدِيْ وَ اَنْتَ مُنْتَهَي الْقَصْدِ لِلْقَاصِدِيْنَ وَ اَرْحَمُ مَنِ اسْتُرْحِمَ فِيْ تَجَاوُزِکَ عَنِ الْمُذْنِبِيْنَ

translation.en: O my Lord! I am presenting myself to You attentively, because You are the climax for those who seek and the most Merciful to accept the prayers of the sinners.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ اَنْتَ الَّذِيْ لاَ يَتَعَاظَمُکَ غُفْرَانُ الذُّنُوْبِ وَ کَشْفُ الْکُرُوْبِ وَ اَنْتَ عَلاَّمُ الْغُيُوْبِ وَ سَتَّارُ الْعُيُوْبِ وَ کَشَّافُ الْکُرُوْبِ لِاَنَّکَ الْبَاقِيْ الرَّحِيْمُ

translation.en: O Allah! It is not difficult for You to forgive the sins and cure the sorrow, although You are well aware of the hidden things, You are the concealer of defects, and the one to ward off the difficulties, because You are powerful, Everlasting and Merciful
and Who has worn the dress of Godhood and has accepted the divinity of oneness.

segments.arabic: وَ تَوَحَّدْتَ بِالْاِلٰهِيَّۃِ وَ تَنَزَّهْتَ بِالْحَيْثُوْثِيَّۃِ فَلَمْ يَجِدْکَ وَاصِفٌ مَحْدُوْدَا بِالْکَيْفُوْفِيَّۃِ وَلاَ تَقَعْ فِيْ الْاَوْهَامِ بِالْمَآئِيَّۃِ وَالْحَيْنُوْنِيَّۃِ فَلَکَ الْحَمْدُ عَدَدَ نَعْمَآئِکَ عَلَي الْاَنَامِ وَ لَکَ الشُّکْرُ عَلٰي کُرُوْرِ اللَّيَالِيْ وَالْاَيَّام

translation.en: Now You are the pure from the status of nature, so nobody can explain You by Your attributes and the imagination of a man cannot comprehend You and the praise of people equal to the number of Your Bounties and Your thankfulness equal to the number of rotation of day and night.

segments.arabic: اِلٰهِيْ بِيَدِکَ وَالْخَيْرُ وَ اَنْتَ وَلِيُّهٗ مُنِيْحُ الرَّغَآئِبِ وَ غَايَۃُ الْمَطَالَبِ اَتَقَرَّبُ اِلَيْکَ بِسَعَۃِ رَحْمَتِکَ الَّتِيْ وَ سِعَتْ کُلَّ شَيْءٍ فَقَدْ تَرٰي

translation.en: O Allah all the goodness are in Your Power, and You are their Lord, the bestower of the cherished bounties. You are the climax of aims, for the sake of Your vast Mercy I seek nearness to You in which there is a place for everything.

segments.arabic: يَا رَبِّ مَکَانِيْ وَ تَطَّلِعُ عَلٰي ضَمِيْرِيْ وَ تَعْلَمُ سِرِّيْ وَلاَ يَخْفٰي عَلَيْکَ اَمْرِيْ وَ اَنْتَ اَقْرَبُ اِلَيَّ مِنْ حَبْلِ الْوَرِيْدِ فَتُبْ عَلَيَّ لاَ اَعُوْذُ بَعْدَهَا فِيْمَا يُسْخِطُکَ وَاغْفِرِلِيْ مَغْفِرَۃً لاَ اَرْجِعُ مَعَهَا اِلٰي مَعْصِيَتِکَ يَا اَکْرَمَ الْاَکْرَمِيْنَ

translation.en: O Allah! You are witnessing my status, aware of my heart, my affairs are not concealed from You, and You are more nearer to me than my jugular vein, so please accept my repentance by which I cannot repeat those actions again which displeases You, and grant me such a pardon after which I don't indulge in sins O the most Honourable of all the Honourables.

segments.arabic: اِلٰهِيْ اَنْتَ الَّذِيْ اَصْلَحْتَ قُلُوْبَ الْمُفْسِدِيْنَ فَصَلَحَتْ بِاِصْلاَحِکَ اِيَّاهَا فَاَصْلِحِنِيْ بِاِصْلاَحِکَ وَ اَنْتَ الَّذِيْ مَنَنْتَ عَلَي الضَّآلِّيْنَ فَهَدَيْتَهُمْ بِرُشْدِکَ عَنِ الضَّلاَلَۃِ وَ عَلَي الْجَاحِدِيْنَ عَنْ قَصْدِکَ فَسَدَدْتَهُمْ وَ قَوَّمْتَ مِنْهُمْ عَثْرَالزَّلَلِ فَمَنَحْتَهُمْ مُحَبَّتَکَ وَ جَنَّبْتَهُمْ مَعْصِيَتَکَ وَ اَدْرَجْتَهُمْ دَرَجَ الْمَغْفُوْرِ لَهُمْ وَ اَحْلَلْتَهُمْ مَحَلَّ الْفَآئِزِيْنَ فَاَسْئَلُکَيَا مَوْلاَيَ اَنْ تُلْحِقَنِيْ بِهِمْ يَا اَرْحَمَ الرَّاحِمِيْنَ

translation.en: O my Lord, You have reformed the corrupted hearts and they have changed and You are the one to oblige the deviated ones and guide them by Your Guidance, and reinstate those deviated from the right path and change their wrong deeds and laxity, granted them Your love, saved them from Your disobedience, bestowed on them the status of good doers, put them among the successful people,O Lord, O the most merciful of all the merciful, attach me together with those people.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ اِنِّيْ اَسْئَلُکَ اَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلٰي مُحَمَّدٍ وَّ اٰلِ مُحَمَّدٍ وَ اَنْ تَرْزُقْنِيْ رِزْقًا وَاسِعًا حَلٰلاً طَيِّبًا فِيْ عَافِيَۃٍ وَ عَمَلاً يُقِرِّبُ اِلَيْکَ يَا خَيْرَ مَسْئُوْلٍ

translation.en: O Allah I seek of You to send Blessings on Mohammad and the progeny of Mohammad and increase my sustenance the clean, pure and safe and grant me the initiative to do those actions which makes me nearer to You,

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ وَ اَتَضَرَّعُ اَلِيْکَ ضَرَاعَۃً مُقِرٍّ عَلٰي نَفْسِهٖ بِالْهَفَوَاتِ

translation.en: O Allah I present my helplessness as the one who is helpless and has accepted his deviation.

segments.arabic: اَتُوْبُ اِلَيْکَ يَا تَوَّابُ فَلاَ تَرُدُّنِيْ خَآئِبًا جَزِيْلِ عَطَآئِکَ يَا وَهَّابُ فَقَدِيْمًا جَدْتَ عَلٰي الْمُذْنِبِيْنَ بِالْمَغْفِرَۃِ وَ سَتَرْتَ عَلٰي عَبِيْدِکَ قَبِيْحَاتِ الْفِعَالِ۔

translation.en: O the one who forgives, I repent to You, O the bestower of abundance bounties, do not make me unsuccessful due to my low deeds,

segments.arabic: يَا جَلِيْلُ يَا مُتَعَالُ۔ اَتَوَجَّهُ اِلَيْکَ بِمَنْ اَوْجَبْتَ حَقَّهُ عَلَيَّ اِذْلَمْ

translation.en: O the most High and Majestic, You have always dealt with the sinners by forgiveness, please conceal the evil deeds of this despised soul.

segments.arabic: يَکُنْ لِيْ مِنَ الْخَيْرِ مَا اَتَوَجَّهُ بِهٖ اِلَيْکَ

translation.en: O Lord, I have directed my attention towards You, by the right which You have made obligatory on me, because I don't have any good deed with which I can present myself,

segments.arabic: وَ حَالَتِ الذُّنُوْبُ بَيْنِيْ وَ بَيْنَ الْمُحْسِنِيْنَ وَ اِذْ لَمْ يُوْجِبَ لِيْ عَمَلِيْ مُرَافَقَۃَ النَّبِيّٖنَ فَلاَ تُرَدَّ

translation.en: the evils deeds are a barrier between me and the pious people, and as my deeds are not such that can make me the companions of Your Prophets so by the names which I have beseeched You, You make me turn towards them,

segments.arabic: سَيِّدِيْ تَوَجُّهِيْ بِمَنْ تَوَجَّهْتُ اَتَخْذُلُنِيْ رِبِّيْ وَ اَنْتَ اَمَلِيْ؟اَمْ تُرَدُ يَدِيْ صِفْرًا مِنَ الْعَفْوِ وَ اَنْتَ مُنْتَهٰي رَغْبَتِيْ!

translation.en: O my Lord, will You turn me unsuccessful whereas You are my hope and will You return me back empty handed? In fact You are my initial hope.

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ مَوْجُوْدٌ مَوْصُوْفٌ مَعْرُوْفٌ بِالْجُوْدِ وَالْخَلْقُ لَهٗ عَبِيْدٌ وَاِلَيْهِ مَرَدُّ  الْاُمُوْرِ

translation.en: O He Who is present and famous for Generosity, the affairs of entire creation will ultimately return in Your presence.

segments.arabic: فَصَلِّ عَلٰي مُحَمَّدٍ وَ اٰلِ مُحَمَّدٍ وَ جُدْ عَلَيَّ بِاِحْسَانِکَ الَّذِيْ فِيْهِ الْغِنٰي عَنِ الْقَرِيْبِ وَالْبَعِيْدِ وَالْاَعْدَآءِ وَالْاِخْوَانِ وَالْاَخَوَاتِ وَالْحِقْنِيْ بِالَّذِيْنَ غَمَّرْتَهُمْ

translation.en: Send blessings on Mohammad and his progeny and oblige me by making me self sufficient from those who are near, far, rivals, brothers, sisters, and include me among those whom Your mercy covers.

segments.arabic: بِسَعَۃِ تَطَوُّلِکَ وَ کَرَامَتِکَ لَهُمْ وَ تَطَوُّلِکَ عَلَيْهِمْ وَ جَعَلْتَهُمْ اَطَآئِبَ اَبْرَارًا

translation.en: Your signs are reserved for them, and Your favours are exclusively for them, You have created them pure, doers of good, pious and great.

segments.arabic: اَتْقِيَآئً اَخْيَارًا وَ لِنَبِيِّکَ مُحَمَّدٍ صَلَّي اﷲ عَلَيْهِ وَ اٰلِهٖ وَ سَلَّمَ فِيْ دَارِکَ جِيْرَانًا وَاغْفِرِلِيْ وَ لِلْمُؤْمِنِيْنَ وَ الْمُؤْمِنٰتِ مَعَ الْاٰبَآءِ وَالْاُمَّهَاتِ وَالْاِخْوَانِ وَ الْاَخَوَاتِ يَا اَرْحَمَ الرَّاحِمِيْنَ۔

translation.en: Make me reach Your prophet Mohammad Mustafa peace be on him and his progeny because he is on a station which is very nearer to You and O the Beneficent and the Merciful forgive me and the believers and their parents and their brothers and sisters.

segments.arabic: أَشْهَدُ أَنْ لاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ ٱللَّهُ
segments.transliteration: ash-hadu an la ilaha illa allahu

translation.en: I bear witness that there is no god save Allah;
alone without having any partner;
and I bear witness that you are His messenger
and you are Muhammad, the son of `Abdullah.

segments.arabic: وَأَشْهَدُ أَنّكَ قَدْ بَلَّغْتَ رِسَالاتِ رَبِّكَ
segments.transliteration: wa ash-hadu annaka qad ballaghta risalati rabbika

translation.en: And I bear witness that you have truly conveyed the missions of your Lord,
well-wished for your nation,
striven hard in the way of Allah
by means of wisdom and excellent preaching,

segments.transliteration: wa addayta alladhi ʿalayka mina alhaqqi

translation.en: and fulfilled the duty that is incumbent upon you;
and you have been sympathetic with the believers
and unyielding to the unbelievers;
and you have worshipped Allah sincerely
until death came upon you.

segments.arabic: فَبَلَغَ ٱللَّهُ بِكَ أَشْرَفَ مَحَلِّ ٱلْمُكَرَّمِينَ
segments.transliteration: fabalagha allahu bika ashrafa mahalli almukarramina

translation.en: Allah therefore has lifted you up to the most honorable place of the honored ones.
All praise be to Allah Who has saved us, through you,
from polytheism and deviation.

segments.transliteration: allahumma salli ʿala muhammadin wa alihi

translation.en: O Allah, (please) send blessings to Muhammad and his Household,
and make Your blessings, the blessings of Your angels,
Your prophets, the Messengers,
Your righteous servants,
the inhabitants of the heavens and the [layers of the] earth,

segments.arabic: وَمَنْ سَبَّحَ لَكَ يَا رَبَّ ٱلعَالَمِينَ
segments.transliteration: wa man sabbaha laka ya rabba alʿalamina

translation.en: and ever one who glorifies You, O Lord of the worlds,
from the past and the late generations,
be on Muhammad, Your servant, messenger,
prophet, trustee,
elite, most-beloved,
elect, choice,
dignitary, select,
and the best of Your creatures.
And grant him preference, virtue,
[right of] mediation, and sublime rank;
and send him a praiseworthy status
which all the past and the late generations wish to have.
O Allah, You have said:

segments.transliteration: wa law annahum idh zalamu anfusahum

translation.en: "And had they, when they were unjust to themselves,
come to you and asked forgiveness of Allah,
and the Messenger had also asked forgiveness for them,
they would have found Allah Oft-returning to mercy, Merciful."
O my God, I have come to Your Prophet, seeking forgiveness of You
and repenting before You from my sins;
so, (please) send blessings to Muhammad and his Household
and forgive them for me.
O our master,
I turn by you and by your Household

segments.transliteration: ila allahi taʿala rabbika wa rabbi

translation.en: towards Allah, the Exalted, your and my Lord,
so that He may forgive me.

text.en: Then repeat the following three times:

segments.transliteration: inna lillahi wa inna ilayhi rajiʿuna

translation.en: Verily, we are Allah's and verily unto Him shall we return.

text.en: Then say the following:

translation.en: We are stricken by losing you, O beloved of our hearts!
Too shocking is our misfortune of losing you!
Because the Revelation has been interrupted
and because we have missed you.

segments.transliteration: fa inna lillahi wa inna ilayhi rajiʿuna

translation.en: Nevertheless, we are Allah's and to Him shall we return.
O our master, O Allah's Messenger!

segments.arabic: صَلَوَاتُ ٱللَّهِ عَلَيْكَ وَعَلَىٰ آلِ بَيْتِكَ ٱلطَّاهِرِينَ
segments.transliteration: salawatu allahi ʿalayka wa ʿala ali baytika alttahirina

translation.en: May Allah's blessings be upon you and upon your Household, the immaculate.

segments.transliteration: hadha yawmu alssabti wa huwa yawmuka

translation.en: This day is Saturday, which is your day,

segments.transliteration: wa ana fihi dayfuka wa jaruka

translation.en: and on this day I am your guest and in your vicinity;
so, receive me as your guest and as your neighbor.
Indeed, you are generous and hospitable
and you are commanded [by Allah] to host your neighbors.
So, receive me as your guest and treat me hospitably;
and accept us as your neighbors and treat us in due hospitability;

segments.arabic: بِمَنْزِلَةِ ٱللَّهِ عِنْدَكَ وَعِنْدَ آلِ بَيْتِكَ
segments.transliteration: bimanzilati allahi ʿindaka wa ʿinda ali baytika

translation.en: [I ask you] in the name of Allah's standing with you and with your Household
and in the name of their standing with Him
and in the name of the knowledge that He has entrusted with you all.
Verily, He is the most generous of all those who show generosity.
In the Name of Allah, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful.
translation.fa: به نام خداى بخشاینده مهربان

translation.en: Glory be to the God of truth.
Glory be to The Constrictor and the Outspreader.
Glory be to Him Who can expose anyone to loss or gain.
Glory be to the Judge with the truth.
Glory be to Him and to glorify Him is one of His graces.
Glory be to the Highest, the All-high.
Glory be to who has exalted in the air;
Glory be to Him, and most Exalted He be.
Glory be to The magnificent and beautiful.
Glory be to The All-Merciful and The Ever-Compassionate.
Glory be to The Creator and the Maker.
Glory be to The all Sufficient and the Praised.
Glory be to The highest and elevated.
Glory be to The Great and The Greatest.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ مَنْ هُوَ هَكَذَا وَ لَا يَكُونُ هَكَذَا غَيْرُهُ

translation.en: Glory be to Him Who is in this state, and nothing else can be ever in his state.
Glorified (is He), Holy (is He), for Him the Living and the Forbearing.
Glory be to Allah, the Supreme!

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ مَنْ هُوَ دَائِمٌ لَا يَسْهُو

translation.en: Praise be to He! Glory be to him Who is alert and steady; never forgets one thing over another.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ مَنْ هُوَ قَائِمٌ لَا يَلْهُو

translation.en: Glory be to him Who is vigilant; never is engrossed with a thing to overlook another.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ مَنْ هُوَ غَنِيٌّ لَا يَفْتَقِرُ

translation.en: Glory be to Him, Who is Independent that doesn't need.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ مَنْ تَوَاضَعَ كُلُّ شَيْءٍ لِعَظَمَتِهِ

translation.en: Glory be to He who before his greatness everything bows.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ مَنْ ذَلَّ كُلُّ شَيْءٍ لِعِزَّتِهِ

translation.en: Glory be to He who before his might everything overshadows.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ مَنْ أَسْلَمَ (اسْتَسْلَمَ) كُلُّ شَيْءٍ لِقُدْرَتِهِ

translation.en: Glory be to him who everything surrenders for his power.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ مَنْ خَضَعَ كُلُّ شَيْءٍ لِمُلْكِهِ

translation.en: Glory be to him who everything obeyed to his kingdom.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ مَنِ انْقَادَتْ لَهُ الْأُمُورُ بِأَزِمَّتِهَا

translation.en: Glory be to him who all things follow His charge.
In the Name of Allah, the Merciful, the Compassionate,

segments.arabic: أُعِيذُ نَفْسِي بِاللهِ الَّذِي لا إِلهَ إِلَّا هُوَ الْحَيُّ الْقَيُّومُ

translation.en: I seek protection for myself in Allah, whom There is no god except Him, the living, the Everlasting.
Neither slumber overtakes Him nor sleep.

segments.arabic: لَّهُ مَا فِي السَّمَاوَاتِ وَمَا فِي الأَرْضِ

translation.en: To Him belongs everything in the heavens and everything on earth.

segments.arabic: مَن ذَا الَّذِي يَشْفَعُ عِنْدَهُ إِلاَّ بِإِذْنِهِ

translation.en: Who is he that can intercede with Him except with His permission?

segments.arabic: يَعْلَمُ مَا بَيْنَ أَيْدِيهِمْ وَمَا خَلْفَهُمْ

translation.en: He knows what is before them and what is behind them,

segments.arabic: وَلاَ يُحِيطُونَ بِشَيْءٍ مِّنْ عِلْمِهِ إِلاَّ بِمَا شَاء

translation.en: and they cannot grasp any of His knowledge except as He wills.
His Throne extends over the heavens and the earth,

segments.arabic: وَلاَ يَؤُودُهُ حِفْظُهُمَا وَهُوَ الْعَلِيُّ الْعَظِيمُ

translation.en: and their preservation does not burden Him. He is the Highest, the Great.

segments.arabic: كَذَلِكَ اللهُ رَبُّنَا وَ سَيِّدُنَا وَ مَوْلَانَا

translation.en: Allah, the One, the Refuge, has not begotten and has not been begotten,

segments.arabic: لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا هُوَ نُورُ النُّورِ وَ مُدَبِّرُ الْأُمُورِ

translation.en: and equal to Him is not anyone, Light of the Light and the Regulator of affairs,
the Light of the heavens and the earth.

segments.arabic: مَثَلُ نُورِهِ كَمِشْكاةٍ فِيها مِصْباحٌ الْمِصْباحُ

translation.en: The likeness of His Light is as a niche wherein is a lamp,

segments.arabic: فِي زُجاجَةٍ الزُّجاجَةُ كَأَنَّها كَوْكَبٌ دُرِّيٌّ

translation.en: the lamp in a glass, the glass as it were a glittering star

segments.transliteration: kindled from a Blessed Tree, an olive

translation.en: that is neither of the East nor of the West,

segments.arabic: يَكادُ زَيْتُها يُضِيءُ وَ لَوْ لَمْ تَمْسَسْهُ نارٌ

translation.en: whose oil well nigh would shine, even if no fire touched it.

segments.arabic: نُورٌ عَلى نُورٍ يَهْدِي اللهُ لِنُورِهِ مَنْ يَشاءُ

translation.en: Light upon Light God guides to His Light whom He will.
And God strikes similitudes for men,
and God has knowledge of everything.
He created the heavens and the earth

segments.arabic: بِالْحَقِّ وَ يَوْمَ يَقُولُ كُنْ فَيَكُونُ

translation.en: by truth and the day, He says, Be, and it is

segments.arabic: قَوْلُهُ الْحَقُّ وَ لَهُ الْمُلْكُ يَوْمَ يُنْفَخُ فِي الصُّورِ

translation.en: His saying is the truth, and to Him belongs the kingdom on the day when the trumpet are blown

segments.arabic: عالِمُ الْغَيْبِ وَ الشَّهادَةِ وَ هُوَ الْحَكِيمُ الْخَبِيرُ

translation.en: He is the Knower of the unseen and the witnessed, and He is the All-wise, the All-Aware.

segments.arabic: الَّذِي خَلَقَ سَبْعَ سَماواتٍ طِباقاً وَ مِنَ الْأَرْضِ

translation.en: He created seven heavens, and they are like the earth.
Therefore, the Command descends through them so;

segments.arabic: لِتَعْلَمُوا أَنَّ اللهَ عَلى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ

translation.en: that you may know that God is capable of everything.

segments.arabic: وَ أَنَّ اللهَ قَدْ أَحاطَ بِكُلِّ شَيْءٍ عِلْماً

translation.en: And that God Encompasses everything in knowledge

segments.transliteration: and has numbered everything in numbers.

segments.arabic: (وَ مِنْ شَرِّ كُلِّ ذِي شَرِّ مُعْلِنٍ بِهِ أَوْ مُسِرٍّ (مُسْتَتِرٍ

translation.en: (I seek protection) from; the evil of everything possessed of evil, whether openly or secretly,

segments.arabic: وَ مِنْ شَرِّ الْجِنَّةِ وَ الْبَشَرِ
segments.transliteration: the evil of jinn and man,

segments.arabic: وَ مِنْ شَرِّ مَا يَظْهَرُ بِاللَّيْلِ وَ يَكْمُنُ بِالنَّهَارِ

translation.en: and the evil of what flies at night and rests during the day,

segments.arabic: وَ مِنْ شَرِّ طَوَارِقِ اللَّيْلِ وَ النَّهَارِ

translation.en: and from the evils of the night and day

segments.arabic: وَ مِنْ شَرِّ مَا يَنْزِلُ الْحَمَّامَاتِ وَ الْحُشُوشَ

translation.en: and from the evils of that which descends into the bathrooms and the lawn

segments.arabic: وَ الْخَرَابَاتِ وَ الْأَوْدِيَةَ وَ الصَّحَارِيَ

translation.en: and the evil which lives in; ruins, valleys, desserts,

segments.arabic: وَ الغِيَاضَ وَ الشَّجَرَ وَ يَكُونُ فِي الْأَنْهَارِ

translation.en: jungles and trees, and from that which is in rivers.

segments.arabic: وَ أُعِيذُ نَفْسِي وَ مَنْ يَعْنِينِي أَمْرُهُ بِالله

translation.en: I seek the protection of Allah,

segments.arabic: ِ مالِكَ الْمُلْكِ تُؤْتِي الْمُلْكَ مَنْ تَشاءُ

translation.en: Master of the Kingdom, You give the Kingdom to whom Your wilt
and seizest the Kingdom from whom You wilt.

segments.arabic: وَ تُعِزُّ مَنْ تَشاءُ وَ تُذِلُّ مَنْ تَشاءُ

translation.en: You honor whomever you will and humiliate whomever you will

segments.arabic: بِيَدِكَ الْخَيْرُ إِنَّكَ عَلى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ

translation.en: In Your hand is the good. You are influential over everything.

segments.arabic: تُولِجُ اللَّيْلَ فِي النَّهارِ وَ تُولِجُ النَّهارَ فِي اللَّيْلِ

translation.en: You make the night to enter into the day, and You make the day to enter into the night.

segments.arabic: وَ تُخْرِجُ الْحَيَّ مِنَ الْمَيِّتِ وَ تُخْرِجُ الْمَيِّتَ مِنَ الْحَيِّ

translation.en: You bring forth the living from the dead and the dead from the living

segments.arabic: وَ تَرْزُقُ مَنْ تَشاءُ بِغَيْرِ حِسابٍ
segments.transliteration: and provide whomsoever wilt without reckoning.

translation.en: To Him belong the keys of the heavens and the earth.
He stretches out His provision to whom He will.

segments.arabic: وَ يَقْدِرُ إِنَّهُ بِكُلِّ شَيْءٍ عَلِيمٌ

translation.en: Indeed He has knowledge of everything.
(I seek protection) from the One Who created the earth and the high heavens.
The All-compassionate seated himself upon the Throne.

segments.arabic: لَهُ ما فِي السَّماواتِ وَ ما فِي الْأَرْضِ

translation.en: To Him belongs all that is in the heavens, earth,

segments.arabic: وَ ما بَيْنَهُما وَ ما تَحْتَ الثَّرى

translation.en: all that is between them, and all that is underneath the soil.

segments.arabic: وَ إِنْ تَجْهَرْ بِالْقَوْلِ فَإِنَّهُ يَعْلَمُ السِّرَّ وَ أَخْفى اللهُ

translation.en: You be loud in Your speech, yet surely He knows the secret and that still more hidden.

segments.arabic: لا إِلهَ إِلَّا هُوَ لَهُ الْأَسْماءُ الْحُسْنى لَهُ الْخَلْقُ وَ الْأَمْرُ

translation.en: Allah-there is no god save He. To Him belong the Most New Beautiful Names, creation, and the Command.

segments.arabic: مُنْزِلُ التَّوْرَاةِ وَ الْإِنْجِيلِ وَ الزَّبُورِ وَ الْفُرْقَانِ الْعَظِيمُ

translation.en: The revealer of the Torah, the Gospels (al-Injil), the Zabur, and the Mighty Furqan,

segments.arabic: مِنْ شَرِّ كُلِّ طَاغٍ وَ بَاغٍ وَ نَافِثٍ وَ شَيْطَانٍ

translation.en: from the evil of every tyrant and oppressor, demon,

segments.arabic: وَ سُلْطَانٍ وَ سَاحِرٍ وَ كَاهِنٍ وَ نَاظِرٍ وَ طَارِقٍ
segments.transliteration: ruler, enchanter, soothsayer, watcher, nocturnal visitor,

segments.arabic: وَ مُتَحَرِّكٍ وَ سَاكِنٍ وَ مُتَكَلِّمٍ وَ سَاكِتٍ

translation.en: everything moving or still, and speaking and silent,

segments.arabic: وَ نَاطِقٍ وَ صَامِتٍ وَ مُتَخَيِّلٍ وَ مُتَمَثِّلٍ

translation.en: and speaking, and silent, and imaginary and assimilated

segments.arabic: وَ مُتَلَوِّنٍ) وَ مُحْتَقِرٍ (وَ مُتَجَبِّرٍ) وَ نَسْتَجِيرُ )
بِاللهِ حِرْزِنَا وَ نَاصِرِنَا وَ مُونِسِنَا وَ هُوَ يَدْفَعُ عَنَّا

translation.en: Glory be to Allah, your Protector and Helper, and Solace. He will defend you.

segments.arabic: لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ وَ لَا مُعِزَّ لِمَنْ أَذَلَّ

translation.en: He has no partner. There is no one to elevate the one.

segments.arabic: وَ لَا مُذِلَّ لِمَنْ أَعَزَّ وَ هُوَ الْواحِدُ الْقَهَّارُ

translation.en: He abases nor anyone to abase the one He elevates. He is the One, the Subduer,

segments.arabic: وَ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَى سَيِّدِنَا مُحَمَّدٍ

translation.en: and may Allah's peace be upon our master Muhammad

SALAATSPrayer for Saturday 1Sayyid Ibne Tawoos has related from Hazrat Imam Hasan al-Askari (a.s.) that he quoted his forefathers that one who prays four rakats prayer on Saturday and in each rakat he recites Surah Hamd, Surah Tawheed and Ayatul Kursi, the Almighty writes for him the grade of the prophets, the martyrs and the righteous. That is he shall be with them in Paradise and they shall be his best friends. - Baqiyatus slaehat english version page 91Prayer for Saturday 2The Messenger of Allah (s.a.w.a.) said:
One who recites four rakat prayers on Saturday and in each rakat after Surah Hamd recites Surah Kafiroon thrice and after the prayer recites Ayatul Kursi once, then in exchange for each letter the Almighty rewards him with the reward of a martyr.Prayer for Saturday eve 1 ( Night preceeding Sunday)The Messenger of Allah (s.a.w.a.) said:
One who recites four rakat prayers on Saturday eve and in each rakat after Surah Hamd recites Surah Tawheed seven times, each rakat of this prayer has the reward of 700 Hasana and the Almighty shall give him a city in Paradise.
In the name of Allah, the Beneficent, the Merciful.
translation.fa: به نام خداى بخشاینده مهربان

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ رَبَّنَا لَكَ الْحَمْدُ وَ لَكَ الْمُلْكُ

translation.en: O, Allah, for You the praise and the kingdom.

segments.arabic: وَ بِيَدِكَ الْخَيْرُ وَ أَنْتَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ

translation.en: In Your Hand is all good, and You have the power over all things.
Glory be to You, for You the praise

segments.arabic: وَ التَّهْلِيلُ وَ التَّكْبِيرُ وَ التَّمْجِيدُ وَ التَّحْمِيدُ

translation.en: and Tahlil, magnification, glorification, gratitude,

segments.arabic: وَ الْكِبْرِيَاءُ وَ الْجَبَرُوتُ وَ الْمَلَكُوتُ وَ الْعَظَمَةُ
وَ الْعُلُوُّ وَ الْوَقَارُ وَ الْجَمَالُ وَ الْعِزَّةُ وَ الْجَلَالُ
وَ الْغَايَةُ وَ السُّلْطَانُ وَ الْمَنَعَةُ وَ الْعِزَّةُ وَ الْحَوْلُ

translation.en: the aim, control, strength, Glory, solidity,

segments.arabic: وَ الْقُوَّةُ وَ الدُّنْيَا وَ الْآخِرَةُ وَ الْخَلْقُ وَ الْأَمْرُ

translation.en: power, the world, hereafter, the creation and the command
blessed and exalted be You, Lord of the worlds.

segments.arabic: وَ تَعَالَيْتَ سُبْحَانَكَ لَكَ الْحَمْدُ وَ لَكَ الْبَهْجَةُ

translation.en: Glory be to You, for You, the praise and; pleasantness,

segments.arabic: وَ الْجَمَالُ وَ الْبَهَاءُ وَ النُّورُ وَ الْوَقَارُ
وَ الْكَمَالُ وَ الْعِزَّةُ وَ الْجَلَالُ وَ الْفَضْلُ
وَ الْإِحْسَانُ وَ الْكِبْرِيَاءُ وَ الْجَبَرُوتُ
وَ وُلِّيتَ الْحَمْدَ (وَحْدَكَ) لَا شَرِيكَ لَكَ

translation.en: You fulfilled (only you) for the praise;
You alone, who has no associate, You are Allah, nothing is like You.

segments.arabic: فَسُبْحَانَكَ مَا أَعْظَمَ شَأْنَكَ وَ أَعَزَّ سُلْطَانَكَ

translation.en: Therefore Glory be to you, how mighty is Your station, how treasured is Your authority,
how great is Your force.
Therefore, Glory be to You,

segments.arabic: الْخَلْقُ كُلُّهُمْ لَكَ وَ قَامَ الْخَلْقُ كُلُّهُمْ بِكَ

translation.en: all the creation glorifies You, stood up by You,

segments.arabic: وَ أَشْفَقَ الْخَلْقُ كُلُّهُمْ مِنْكَ وَ ضَرَعَ الْخَلْقُ

translation.en: frightened by You, and supplicated by you.

segments.arabic: كُلُّهُمْ إِلَيْكَ وَ سُبْحَانَكَ تَسْبِيحاً يَنْبَغِي لَكَ

translation.en: Glory be to you, with a glorification indeed to You

segments.arabic: وَ لِوَجْهِكَ وَ يَبْلُغُ مُنْتَهَى عِلْمِكَ

translation.en: and Your Being; reaches your knowledge's end,

segments.arabic: وَ لَا يَقْصُرُ دُونَ أَفْضَلِ رِضَاكَ
وَ لَا يَفْضُلُهُ شَيْءٌ مِنْ مَحَامِدِ خَلْقِكَ

translation.en: and not preferred by your laudation creation.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ خَلَقْتَ كُلَّ شَيْءٍ وَ إِلَيْكَ مَعَادُهُ

translation.en: Glory be to you, You created everything that; for you will be returned,

segments.arabic: وَ بَدَأْتَ كُلَّ شَيْءٍ وَ إِلَيْكَ مُنْتَهَاهُ

translation.en: started everything that; to you will end,

segments.arabic: وَ أَنْشَأْتَ كُلَّ شَيْءٍ وَ إِلَيْكَ مَصِيرُهُ

translation.en: originated everything that; will be destined to you,
and you are the most merciful of the merciful ones.

segments.arabic: بِأَمْرِكَ ارْتَفَعَتِ السَّمَاءُ وَ وُضِعَتِ الْأَرَضُونَ

translation.en: In your order, the heavens rose, the earth delivered,

segments.arabic: وَ أُرْسِيَتِ الْجِبَالُ وَ سُجِّرَتِ الْبُحُورُ

translation.en: firmed the mountains, made the seas overflow;
therefore, your authority is above every kingdom.
Therefore, blessed you are by your mercy, exalted you are by your clemency,
glorified You are in your solemnity place.
Praising are for Your clemency,

segments.arabic: وَ لَكَ الْحَوْلُ بِقُوَّتِكَ وَ لَكَ الْكِبْرِيَاءُ

translation.en: solidity for your strength, pride in your greatness.

segments.arabic: بِعَظَمَتِكَ وَ لَكَ الْحَمْدُ وَ الْجَبَرُوتُ بِسُلْطَانِكَ

translation.en: For your authority the praise and strength,

segments.arabic: وَ لَكَ الْمَلَكُوتُ بِعِزَّتِكَ وَ لَكَ الْقُدْرَةُ بِمُلْكِكَ

translation.en: Your might for your kingdom, the ability in your authority,

segments.arabic: وَ لَكَ الرِّضَا بِأَمْرِكَ وَ لَكَ الطَّاعَةُ عَلَى خَلْقِكَ

translation.en: the satisfaction by your command, and obedience upon your creation;

segments.arabic: أَحْصَيْتَ كُلَّ شَيْءٍ عَدَداً وَ أَحَطْتَ بِكُلِّ شَيْءٍ عِلْماً

translation.en: counted everything in numbers, encompass all things with knowledge,

segments.arabic: وَ وَسِعْتَ كُلَّ شَيْءٍ رَحْمَةً وَ أَنْتَ أَرْحَمُ الرَّاحِمِينَ

translation.en: embracest everything in mercy, and are the most merciful of the merciful ones;
Mightiness is great; authority is well-beloved,

segments.arabic: قَوِيُّ الْبَطْشِ مَلِكُ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَ الْأَرْضِ

translation.en: punishment is severe; the king of the heavens and earth,
the Lord of all the worlds; The Lord of the great Throne,

segments.transliteration: night and day; without showing sluggishness.

segments.arabic: فَسُبْحَانَ الَّذِي لَا يَمُوتُ أَبَدَ الْآبِدِ

translation.en: Therefore, Glory be to Him who never dies,

segments.arabic: وَ سُبْحَانَ رَبِّ الْعِزَّةِ أَبَدَ الْآبِدِ

translation.en: Glory be to the ever Lord of Majesty,

segments.arabic: وَ سُبْحَانَ الْقُدُّوسِ رَبِّ الْعِزَّةِ أَبَدَ الْآبِدِ

translation.en: Glory be to the ever holy majesty,

segments.arabic: وَ سُبْحَانَ رَبِّ الْمَلَائِكَةِ وَ الرُّوحِ

translation.en: Lord, Glory be to the Lord of the Angles and heavenly spirits.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ رَبِّيَ الْأَعْلَى سُبْحَانَ رَبِّي وَ تَعَالَى

translation.en: Glory be to my Lord, the Highest. Glory be to my Lord, the exalted.
Glory be to Him, who is His throne in the heavens

segments.arabic: وَ سُبْحَانَ الَّذِي فِي الْقُبُورِ قَضَاؤُهُ

translation.en: Glory be to Allah Whose decree is in the graves.

segments.arabic: وَ سُبْحَانَ الَّذِي فِي الْجَنَّةِ رِضَاهُ

translation.en: Glory be to Allah, Whose pleasure is in paradise.

segments.arabic: وَ سُبْحَانَ الَّذِي فِي الْبَحْرِ سَبِيلُهُ

translation.en: Glory be to Allah, Who surfaced a path over the ocean!

segments.arabic: وَ سُبْحَانَ الَّذِي فِي جَهَنَّمَ سُلْطَانُهُ

translation.en: Glory be to Allah, Who has the mightiness in hell!
Glory be to Allah Whose mercy overtakes His Wrath.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ مَنْ لَهُ مَلَكُوتُ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ

translation.en: Glory be to Allah in Whose hand is the kingdom of all things.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ اللهِ بِالْعَشِيِّ وَ سُبْحَانَ اللهِ بِالْإِبْكَارِ

translation.en: Glory be to Allah when ye enter evening, Glory be to Allah when ye enter the morning.

segments.arabic: وَ سُبْحَانَهُ وَ بِحَمْدِهِ عَزَّ وَجْهُهُ وَ نَصَرَ عَبْدَهُ

translation.en: Glory and Praise for His almightiness being; who granted His servant victory,

segments.arabic: وَ عَلَا اسْمُهُ وَ تَبَارَكَ وَ تَقَدَّسَ فِي مَجْلِسِ وَقَارِهِ وَ كُرْسِيِّ عَرْشِهِ

translation.en: exalted and blessed His name, hallowed You are in your solemnity place and throne chair.

segments.arabic: يَرَى كُلَّ عَيْنٍ وَ لَا تَرَاهُ كُلُّ عَيْنٍ

translation.en: Sees every eye; neither eye can see Him!

segments.arabic: وَ يُدْرِكُ كُلَّ شَيْءٍ وَ لا تُدْرِكُهُ الْأَبْصارُ

translation.en: He is Comprehending everything while visions cannot comprehend Him,

segments.arabic: وَ هُوَ يُدْرِكُ الْأَبْصارَ وَ هُوَ اللَّطِيفُ الْخَبِيرُ

translation.en: yet He comprehends all visions! He is the Knower of subtleties, the Aware.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ عَبْدِكَ وَ رَسُولِكَ وَ نَبِيِّكَ

translation.en: O Allah, (please) bless Muhammad, Your servant, messenger, and prophet;

segments.arabic: أَمْراً اخْتَصَصْتَنَا بِهِ دُونَ مَنْ عَبَدَ غَيْرَكَ وَ تَوَلَّى سِوَاكَ

translation.en: a matter you distinguished us, excluding them who worships and embraces other than You.

segments.arabic: وَ صَلِّ اللَّهُمَّ عَلَيْهِ بِمَا انْتَجَبْتَ لَهُ مِنْ

translation.en: Therefore, Allah's blessings upon him with what you;

segments.arabic: رِسَالَتِكَ وَ أَكْرَمْتَهُ بِهِ مِنْ نُبُوَّتِكَ

translation.en: distinguished him from your message and dignified him from your prophecy.

segments.arabic: وَ لَا تَحْرِمْنَا النَّظَرَ إِلَى وَجْهِهِ

translation.en: Do not deprive us of; looking to his face,

segments.arabic: وَ الْكَوْنَ مَعَهُ فِي دَارِكَ وَ مُسْتَقَرٍّ مِنْ جِوَارِكَ

translation.en: being with him in Your home, residing at your safeguard.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ كَمَا أَرْسَلْتَهُ فَبَلَّغَ وَ حَمَّلْتَهُ

translation.en: O, Allah, as you sent him, he informed and charged him with he delivered;

segments.transliteration: until your authority has been shown

segments.arabic: وَ آمَنَ بِكَ لَا شَرِيكَ لَكَ

translation.en: and believed in you, no partner with you.

segments.arabic: فَضَاعِفِ اللَّهُمَّ ثَوَابَهُ وَ كَرَمَهُ بِقُرْبِهِ

translation.en: Therefore, O, Allah duplicates his reward and salutes him by your closeness,

segments.arabic: مِنْكَ كَرَامَةً يُفَضَّلُ بِهَا عَلَى جَمِيعِ خَلْقِكَ

translation.en: a preferred dignity above all Your creation,

segments.arabic: وَ يَغْبِطُهُ بِهِ الْأَوَّلُونَ وَ الْآخَرُونَ مِنْ عِبَادِكَ

translation.en: which the past and last generations of your worshippers will wish to have.

segments.arabic: وَ اجْعَلْ مَثْوَانَا مَعَهُ فِيمَا لَا ظَعْنَ لَهُ مِنْهُ

translation.en: Make our abode with him, where there is no leave from it,
O, Most Merciful of the merciful!
translation.fa: اى مهربانترین مهربانان

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ

translation.en: O Allah: send blessings upon Muhammad and His Household,
translation.fa: خدایا درود فرست بر محمد و آل محمد

segments.arabic: وَ أَسْأَلُكَ بِحَوْلِكَ وَ قُوَّتِكَ وَ طَوْلِكَ وَ مَنِّكَ

translation.en: and I ask You by your; might, power, graciousness, generosity,

segments.arabic: وَ عَظِيمِ مُلْكِكَ وَ جَلَالِ ذِكْرِكَ وَ كِبَرِ مَجْدِكَ
segments.transliteration: great kingdom, majestic reputation, splendid glorious,

segments.arabic: وَ عِظَمِ سُلْطَانِكَ وَ لُطْفِ جَبَرُوتِكَ
وَ تَجَبُّرِ عَظَمَتِكَ وَ حِلْمِ عَفْوِكَ وَ تَحَنُّنِ رَحْمَتِكَ
segments.transliteration: displays Your overwhelming power greatness, clemency pardon, tender mercy,

segments.arabic: وَ تَمَامِ كَلِمَاتِكَ وَ نَفَاذِ أَمْرِكَ

translation.en: complete words, and execution of Your command;

segments.arabic: وَ رُبُوبِيَّتِكَ الَّتِي دَانَ لَكَ بِهَا كُلُّ ذِي رُبُوبِيَّةٍ

translation.en: Your Lordship, which each believer embraces,

segments.arabic: وَ أَطَاعَكَ بِهَا كُلُّ ذِي طَاعَةٍ
وَ تَقَرُّبٍ بِهَا إِلَيْكَ كُلُّ ذِي رَغْبَةٍ فِي مَرْضَاتِكَ

translation.en: each of desire your pleasure will seek its nearness

segments.arabic: وَ يَلُوذُ بِهَا كُلُّ ذِي رَهْبَةٍ مِنْ سَخَطِكَ

translation.en: and each of fear your displeasure will resort to it.

segments.arabic: أَنْ تَرْزُقَنِي فَوَاتِحَ الْخَيْرِ وَ خَوَاتِمَهُ وَ ذَخَائِرَهُ

translation.en: So do bless me with goodness beginning, finale, supply,

segments.arabic: وَ جَوَائِزَهُ (وَ فَوَاضِلَهُ) وَ فَضَائِلَهُ وَ خَيْرَهُ وَ نَوَافِلَهُ
اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ

translation.en: O Allah: send blessings upon Muhammad and His Household,
translation.fa: خدایا درود فرست بر محمد و آل محمد

segments.arabic: وَ اهْدِ بِالْيَقِينِ مُعْلَنَنَا وَ أَصْلِحْ بِالْيَقِينِ

translation.en: guide our declared one by certainty, reform our secrets thought by certainty,

segments.arabic: سَرَائِرَنَا وَ اجْعَلْ قُلُوبَنَا مُطْمَئِنَّةً إِلَى ذِكْرِكَ

translation.en: make our hearts entirely tranquil to your mention
and our deeds sincerely intended for You.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ

translation.en: O Allah: send blessings upon Muhammad and His Household,
translation.fa: خدایا درود فرست بر محمد و آل محمد

segments.arabic: وَ أَسْأَلُكَ الرِّبْحَ مِنَ التِّجَارَةِ الَّتِي لَا تَبُورُ

translation.en: I ask You for; commerce that comes not to naught,

segments.arabic: وَ الْغَنِيمَةَ مِنَ الْأَعْمَالِ الْخَالِصَةِ الْفَاضِلَةِ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَ الْآخِرَةِ

translation.en: benefit in this worldly existence and hereafter from the immaculate gracefully deeds,

segments.arabic: وَ الذِّكْرَ الْكَثِيرَ لَكَ وَ الْعَفَافَ وَ السَّلَامَةَ مِنَ الذُّنُوبِ وَ الْخَطَايَا

translation.en: the heavy mention of You, chasteness and safety from the vices and sins.
O, Allah, bless me with blameless accepted works

segments.arabic: تَرْضَى بِهَا عَنَّا وَ تُسَهِّلَ لَنَا سَكْرَةَ الْمَوْتِ

translation.en: that make You pleased upon us with and ease the agony of death
and the intense horror of the Resurrection Day.
O, Allah, we ask You for the special goodness

segments.arabic: وَ عَامَّتَهُ لِخَاصِّنَا وَ عَامِّنَا وَ الزِّيَادَةَ مِنْ فَضْلِكَ

translation.en: and the general for both of us, unique and regular, increasing your sustenance;

segments.arabic: فِي كُلِّ يَوْمٍ وَ لَيْلَةٍ وَ النَّجَاةَ مِنْ عَذَابِكَ

translation.en: every day and night and deliverance from Your torture

segments.transliteration: O, Allah makes us love meeting You,

segments.arabic: وَ اجْعَلْ لَنَا فِي لِقَائِكَ نَضْرَةً وَ سُرُوراً

translation.en: and make us meet You with ease and happiness.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ

translation.en: O Allah: send blessings upon Muhammad and His Household,
translation.fa: خدایا درود فرست بر محمد و آل محمد

segments.arabic: وَ أَحْضِرْنَا ذِكْرَكَ عِنْدَ كُلِّ غَفْلَةٍ

translation.en: gain us your mention in every distraction time,

segments.arabic: وَ شُكْرَكَ عِنْدَ كُلِّ نِعْمَةٍ وَ الصَّبْرَ عِنْدَ كُلِّ بَلَاءٍ

translation.en: thank you in every blessing, patience on every misfortune,

segments.arabic: وَ ارْزُقْنَا قُلُوباً وَجِلَةً مِنْ خَشْيَتِكَ خَاشِعَةً

translation.en: and bless us with quake hearts in your dread;
devoted to Your mention and repentant to You!

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ

translation.en: O Allah: send blessings upon Muhammad and His Household,
translation.fa: خدایا درود فرست بر محمد و آل محمد

segments.arabic: وَ اجْعَلْنَا مِمَّنْ يُوفِي بِعَهْدِكَ وَ يُؤْمِنُ بِوَعْدِكَ

translation.en: make us among them who fulfill your promises, believe in your words,

segments.arabic: وَ يَعْمَلُ بِطَاعَتِكَ وَ يَسْعَى فِي مَرْضَاتِكَ

translation.en: work on Your obeying, aim at your excellent pleasure,

segments.arabic: وَ يَرْغَبُ فِيمَا عِنْدَكَ وَ يَفِرُّ إِلَيْكَ مِنْكَ

translation.en: wants what You have, escape from You to You,

segments.arabic: وَ يَرْجُو أَيَّامَكَ (أَمَانَكَ) وَ يَخَافُ سُؤ َ حِسَابِكَ

translation.en: anticipate your days, fear Your Day of Reckoning,

segments.arabic: وَ يَخْشَاكَ حَقَّ خَشْيَتِكَ وَ اجْعَلْ ثَوَابَ أَعْمَالِنَا

translation.en: fear You with dread, make our deeds reward

segments.arabic: جَنَّتَّكَ بِرَحْمَتِكَ وَ تَجَاوَزْ عَنْ ذُنُوبِنَا بِرَأْفَتِكَ

translation.en: Your heaven with Your mercy, overlook our sins with your mercifulness,

segments.arabic: وَ أَعِذْنَا مِنْ ظُلْمَةِ خَطَايَانَا بِنُورِ وَجْهِكَ

translation.en: we seek refuge in Allah from the darkness of our sins with Your illuminance face,

segments.arabic: وَ تَغَمَّدْنَا بِفَضْلِكَ وَ أَلْبِسْنَا عَافِيَتَكَ

translation.en: encompass us with your benefits, veil us with your wellness,

segments.arabic: وَ هَنِّئْنَا كَرَامَتَكَ وَ أَتْمِمْ عَلَيْنَا نِعْمَتَكَ

translation.en: felicitate us with Your miracles, complete for us Your favors,
and give as due share on praising Your mercy.
May it be so Allah of Truth, Lord of the worlds.

segments.arabic: وَ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَى سَيِّدِنَا مُحَمَّدٍ خَاتَمِ النَّبِيِّينَ

translation.en: Allah's blessings upon our Master Muhammad are the seal of the prophets

4th Imam dua

Sunday Dua of Imam Zainul Abideen (peace be upon him)

translation.en: In the Name of Allah, the All-compassionate, the All-merciful.

segments.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ الَّذِي لاَ أَرْجُو إِلاَّ فَضْلَهُ
segments.transliteration: bismillahi alladhi la arju illa fadlahu

translation.en: In the name of Allah, from whom I hope for nothing but bounty,
I fear nothing but justice,
I rely upon nothing but His word,
and I cling to nothing but His Rope.

segments.arabic: بِكَ أَسْتَجِيـرُ يَا ذَا ٱلْعَفْوِ وَٱلرِّضْوَانِ

translation.en: In You do I seek sanctuary— O Possessor of pardon and good pleasure—
from wrong and enmity,
from the vicissitudes of time
from recurrence of sorrows,
from the striking of mishaps,

segments.arabic: وَمِنِ ٱنْقِضَاءِ ٱلْمُدَّةِ قَبْلَ ٱلتَّأَهُّبِ وَٱلْعُدَّةِ
segments.transliteration: wa min inqida'i almuddati qabla altta'ahhubi walʿuddati

translation.en: and from the expiration of the term before preparation and readiness.

segments.arabic: وَإِيَّاكَ أَسْتَرْشِدُ لِمَا فيهِ ٱلصَّلاَحُ وَٱلإِصْلاَحُ
segments.transliteration: wa iyyaka astarshidu lima fihi alssalahu wal-islahu

translation.en: From You do I seek guidance to that wherein is righteousness and setting aright.

segments.arabic: وَبِكَ أَسْتَعينُ فيمَا يَقْتَرِنُ بِهِ ٱلنَّجَاحُ وَٱلإِنْجَاحُ
segments.transliteration: wa bika astaʿinu fima yaqtarinu bihi alnnajahu wal-injahu

translation.en: From You do I seek help in that which is linked to success and favorable response.

segments.arabic: وَإِيَّاكَ أَرْغَبُ فِي لِبَاسِ ٱلْعَافِيَةِ وَتَمَامِهَا
segments.transliteration: wa iyyaka arghabu fi libasi alʿafiyati wa tamamiha

translation.en: From You do I desire for the garment of wellbeing and its completion,
and the covering of health and its permanence.

segments.arabic: وَ أَعُوذُ بِكَ يَا رَبِّ مِنْ هَمَزَاتِ ٱلشَّيَاطينِ
segments.transliteration: wa aʿudhu bika ya rabbi min hamazati alshshayatini

translation.en: I seek refuge in You, O my Lord, from the evil suggestions of the devils.

segments.arabic: وَ أَحْتَرِزُ بِسُلْطَانِكَ مِنْ جَوْرِ ٱلسَّلاَطِينِ
segments.transliteration: wa ahtarizu bisultanika min jawri alssalatini

translation.en: I seek protection in Your sovereignty from the injustice of the sovereigns.

segments.arabic: فَتَقَبَّلْ مَا كَانَ مِنْ صَلاَتِي وَصَوْمِي
segments.transliteration: fataqabbal ma kana min salati wa sawmi

translation.en: So, (please) accept my past prayers and fasting,

segments.arabic: وَٱجْعَلْ غَدِي وَمَا بَعْدَهُ أَفْضَلَ مِنْ سَاعَتِي وَيَوْمِي
segments.transliteration: wajʿal ghadi wa ma baʿdahu afdala min saʿati wa yawmi

translation.en: make my morrow and what is after it better than my present hour and my day,

segments.transliteration: wa aʿizzani fi ʿashirati wa qawmi

translation.en: exalt me in my clan and people,
and protect me in my waking and sleep,
for You are Allah, the Best Guardian,
and You are the most Merciful of all those who show mercy.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَبْرَأُ إِلَيْكَ فِي يَوْمِي هٰذَا
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni abra'u ilayka fi yawmi hadha

translation.en: O Allah, I repudiate, before You on this day of mine
and on all Sundays that follow it,
polytheism and atheism.
I devote my supplication sincerely to You,
addressing myself to Your response.
I observe the acts of obedience to You
for hope of gaining Your rewards.
So, (please) bless Muhammad, the best of Your creation
and the caller to Your truth,

segments.arabic: وَ أَعِزَّنِي بِعِزِّكَ ٱلَّذِي لاَ يُضَامُ
segments.transliteration: wa aʿizzani biʿizzika alladhi la yudamu

translation.en: and fortify me with Your almightiness, which is invulnerable,
protect me with Your Eye, which never sleeps,
and seal my affair by acting devoutly to You
and my life with forgiveness!
Surely, You are the All-forgiving, the All-compassionate!

text.en: Dua of Syeda Fatima (peace be upon her) for Sunday

segments.arabic:
ا
َللّٰهُمَّ اجْعَلْ اَوَّلَ يَوْمِيْ هٰذَا فَلَاحًا،
segments.transliteration: allaahummaj a’l awwala yawmee haazaa falaahan,

translation.en: O God, make the beginning of this day as welfare
its end success
and its middle reformation.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلٰى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ اٰلِ مُحَمَّدٍ،
segments.transliteration: allaahumma salle a’laa mohammadin wa aale mohammadin

translation.en: O Allah bless Muhammad and the progeny of Muhammad

segments.arabic: وَ اجْعَلْنَا مِمَّنْ اَنَابَ اِلَيْكَ فَقَبِلْتَهٗ،
segments.transliteration: waj a’lnaa mimman anaaba elayka faqabiltahu,ʿ

translation.en: and make us among those, when they turn to You, You accept them;
and if they rely on You, You are sufficient for them
and if they beseech to You, You have mercy on them.
In the name of Allah, the Beneficent, the Merciful
translation.fa: به نام خداى بخشاینده مهربان

segments.arabic: اَلْحَمْدُ لِلهِ عَلٰي حِلْمِهٖ وَ اَنَاتِهٖ
segments.transliteration: Alhamdu lillahi ala hilmihi wa anaatihi

translation.en: Praise is for Allah for His tolerance and His giving respite

segments.arabic: وَ الْحَمْدُ لِلهِ عَلٰي عِلْمِيْ بِاَنَّ ذَنْبِيْ
segments.transliteration: Walhamdu lillahi ala ilmi bi anna dhanbi

translation.en: Praise is for Allah and I am certain that my sins

segments.arabic: وَ اِنْ کَبُرَ - صَغِيْرٌ فِيْ جَنْبِ عَفْوِهٖ
segments.transliteration: Wa in kabura - sagheerun fi janbi afwihi

translation.en: - and even if they are great - are insignificant in front of His forgiveness

segments.arabic: وَ جُرْمِيْ - وَ اِنْ عَظُمَ - حَقِيْرٌ عِنْدَ رَحْمَتِهٖ
segments.transliteration: Wa jurmi - wa in azuma - haqeerun inda rahmatihi

translation.en: And my crime - even if it is great - is insignificant in front of His mercy

segments.arabic: وَ سُبْحَانَ اللهِ الَّذِيْ رَفَعَ السَّمٰوٰتِ بِغَيْرِ عَمَدٍ
segments.transliteration: Wa subhanallahi alladhi rafa'a as-samawat bi ghayri amad

translation.en: And glorification is for Allah who has raised the skies without any pillars

segments.arabic: وَ اَنْشَاَ جَنَّاتِ الْمَاْوٰي بِلَا اَمَدٍ
segments.transliteration: Wa ansha'a jannat al-mawa bila amad

translation.en: And created heavens without any passage of time

segments.arabic: وَ خَلَقَ الْخَلَائِقِ بِلَا ظَهْرٍ وَ سَنَدٍ
segments.transliteration: Wa khalaq al-khala'iq bila zahr wa sanad

translation.en: And created the creatures without any support

segments.arabic: وَ لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ الْمُنْذِرُ مَنْ عَنَدَ عَنْ طَاعَتِهٖ
segments.transliteration: Wa la ilaha illa Allah al-mundhir man anada an ta'atihi

translation.en: And there is no Lord except Allah who warns those who disobey Him

segments.arabic: وَ عَتٰي عَنْ اَمْرِهٖ، وَ الْمُحَذِّرُ مَنْ لَجَّ فِيْ مَعْصِيَتِهٖ
segments.transliteration: Wa ata an amrihi, wal-muhadhir man lajj fi ma'siyatihi

translation.en: And exceed the limits, and scares those who persist in disobedience

segments.arabic: وَ اسْتَکْبَرَ عَنْ عِبَادَتِهِ، الْمُعْذِرُ اِلٰي مَنْ تَمَادٰي فِيْ غَيِّهٖ
segments.transliteration: Wa istakbara an ibadatihi, al-mu'adhir ila man tamada fi ghayyi

translation.en: And are arrogant in worship, and He accepts the excuses of those who stray in their ignorance
And deviation to establish His proof against them

segments.arabic: وَ عِلْمِهٖ بِسُوْءِ عَاقِبَتِهٖ، وَ اللهُ اَکْبَرُ
segments.transliteration: Wa ilmihi bisu'i aqibatihi, wa Allahu Akbar

translation.en: And His knowledge of their evil consequences, and Allah is Great

segments.arabic: الْجَوَادُ الْکَرِيْمُ الَّذِيْ لَيْسَ لِقَدِيْمِ اِحْسَانِهٖ اِمْتِنَانِهٖ
segments.transliteration: Al-jawad al-karim alladhi laysa liqadim ihsanihi imtinanihi

translation.en: The Generous and Merciful whose unlimited favours have no end

segments.arabic: عَلٰي جَمِيْعِ خَلْقِهٖ نِهَايَۃٌ، وَ لَا لِقُدْرَتِهٖ وَ سُلْطَانِهٖ
segments.transliteration: Ala jami' khalqihi nihayah, wa la liqudratihi wa sultanihi

translation.en: Upon all His creation, nor is there any boundary for His power and authority

segments.arabic: عَلٰي بَرِيَّتِهٖ غَايَۃٌ، اَللّٰهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلٰي مُحَمَّدٍ وَ عَلٰي اَهْلِ بَيْتِهٖ
segments.transliteration: Ala bariyyatihi ghayah, Allahumma salli ala Muhammad wa ala ahli baytihi

translation.en: Upon His creatures, O Allah, bestow blessings on Muhammad and his family

segments.arabic: وَ بَارِکْ عَلٰي مُحَمَّدٍ وَ عَلٰي اَهْلِ بَيْتِهٖ، کَاَفْضَلِ مَا صَلَّيْتَ
segments.transliteration: Wa barik ala Muhammad wa ala ahli baytihi, ka-afdal ma sallayta

translation.en: And bless Muhammad and his family, as You have blessed

segments.arabic: وَ بَارَكْتَ عَلٰي اِبْرَاهِيْمَ وَ اٰلِ اِبْرَاهِيْمَ اِنَّکَ حَمِيْدٌ مَجِيْدٌ
segments.transliteration: Wa barakta ala Ibrahim wa ala ali Ibrahim innaka Hamidun Majid

translation.en: Ibrahim and the family of Ibrahim, indeed You are Praiseworthy, Glorious

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ اِنِّيْ اَسْئَلُکَ سُؤَالَ مُذْنِبٍ اَوْ بَقَتْهُ مَعَاصِيْهِ فِيْ ضِيْقِ الْمَسَالِکِ
segments.transliteration: Allahumma inni as'aluka su'ala mudhnib aw baqat-hu ma'asi fi diq al-masalik

translation.en: O Allah, I call upon You like a sinner whose sins have destroyed him by narrowing his path

segments.arabic: وَ لَيْسَ لَهٗ مُجِيْرٌ سِوَاکَ، وَ لَا اَمَلٌ غَيْرُکَ
segments.transliteration: Wa laysa lahu mujeer siwak, wa la amal ghayruk

translation.en: And there is no hope and respite except You

segments.arabic: وَ لَا مُغِيْثٌ اَرْاَفُ بِهٖ مِنْکَ، وَ لَا مُعْتَمِدٌ يَعْتَمِدُ عَلَيْهِ غَيْرُکَ
segments.transliteration: Wa la mugheeth ar'af bihi mink, wa la mu'tamid ya'tamid alayh ghayruk

translation.en: Nor anyone more merciful than You to listen to his complaints, nor a support better than You

segments.arabic: اَنْتَ مَوْلَايَ الَّذِيْ جُدْتَ بِالنِّعَمِ قَبْلَ اسْتِحْقَاقِهَا
segments.transliteration: Anta mawlaya alladhi judta bin-ni'am qabl istihqaqiha

translation.en: You send the bounties even before the commencement of merit
And have bestowed favours on those who were not entitled for it

segments.arabic: وَ لَمْ يَعُزُّکَ مَنْعٌ، وَ لَا اَکْدَاکَ اِعْطَاءٌ
segments.transliteration: Wa lam ya'uzzuka man', wa la akdaka i'ta'

translation.en: Neither miserliness makes You rich or strong nor the question of those who beseech You decreases Your Munificence

segments.arabic: وَ لَا اَنْفَدَ سَعَتَکَ سُؤَالُ مُلِحٍّ
segments.transliteration: Wa la anfa sa'atak su'al mulih

translation.en: You have taken the responsibility of sustaining the creatures

segments.arabic: بَلْ اَرَدْتَ اَرْزَاقَ عِبَادِکَ تَطَوُّلًا مِنْکَ عَلَيْهِمْ
segments.transliteration: Bal aradta arzaq ibadik tatawwulan mink alayhim

translation.en: So that You can bestow Your Grace and Mercy upon them
O Allah! Prayers fall short in praising You

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ کَلَّتِ الْعِبَارَۃُ عَنْ بُلُوْغِ مِدْحَتِکَ
segments.transliteration: Allahumma kallat al-ibara an bulugh midhatik

translation.en: And tongues become dumb while enumerating Your favours

segments.arabic: وَ هَفَتِ الْاَلْسُنُ عَنْ نَشْرِ مَحَامِدِکَ وَ تَفَضُّلِکَ
segments.transliteration: Wa hafat al-alsun an nashr mahamidik wa tafaddulik

translation.en: O Lord! I have come in Your presence with a firm determination

segments.arabic: وَ قَدْ تَعَمَّدْتُکَ بِقَصْدِيْ اِلَيْکَ وَ اِنْ اَحَاطَتْ بِيَ الذُّنُوْبُ
segments.transliteration: Wa qad ta'ammad-tuka bi-qasdi ilayk wa in ahatat biya adh-dhunub

translation.en: Although my sins have engulfed me but You are the most Benevolent

segments.arabic: وَ اَنْتَ اَرْحَمُ الرَّاحِمِيْنَ، وَ اَکْرَمُ الْاَکْرَمِيْنَ
segments.transliteration: Wa anta arham ar-rahimin, wa akram al-akramin

translation.en: The most Honoured, the most Generous among all

segments.arabic: وَ اَجْوَدُ الْاَجْوَدِيْنَ، وَ اَنْعَمُ الرَّازِقِيْنَ
segments.transliteration: Wa ajwad al-ajwadin, wa an'am ar-raziqin

translation.en: The best sustainer, the greatest Creator
The First, the Last
The Apparent, the Concealed, the Most Honourable

segments.arabic: وَ اَرْاَفُ وَ اَکْرَمُ مِنْ اَنْ تَرُدَّ مَنْ اَمَّلَکَ وَ رَجَاکَ
segments.transliteration: Wa ar'af wa akram min an tarudd man ammalak wa rajak

translation.en: You are too great to refuse those whose hopes are pinned on You
O the One Who deserves the praise, all the praise is for You
O my Lord, if I have been negligent in being attentive to my soul

segments.arabic: اِلٰهِيْ اِنِّيْ جُرْتُ عَلٰي نَفْسِيْ فِي النَّظَرِ لَهَا
segments.transliteration: Ilahi inni jurtu ala nafsi fi an-nazar laha

translation.en: And have spent the days of my life in disobedience
Still You are the Lord of Bestowals, Possessor of Majesty, and Grandeur

segments.arabic: وَ اَنْتَ وَلِيُّ الْاَنْعَامِ ذُو الْجَلَالِ وَ الْاِکْرَامِ
segments.transliteration: Wa anta wali al-an'am dhu al-jalal wa al-ikram

translation.en: Still Your attention remains on this soul

segments.arabic: فَمَا بَقِيَ اِلَّا نَظَرُکَ لَهَا فَاجْعَلْ مَرَدَّهَا مِنْکَ بِالنَّجَاحِ
segments.transliteration: Fama baqiya illa nazaruka laha faj'al mardaha mink bin-najah

translation.en: Now make this soul successful in Your Presence

segments.arabic: وَ اَجْمِلِ النَّظَرَ مِنْکَ لَهَا بِالْفَلَاحِ
segments.transliteration: Wa ajmil an-nazar mink laha bil-falah

translation.en: Because You are the only Bestower, the Benefactor

segments.arabic: فَاَنْتَ الْمُعْطِيْ النَّفَّاحُ ذُو الْاٰلَاءِ وَ النِّعَمِ وَ السَّمَاحِ
segments.transliteration: Fa anta al-mu'ti an-naffah dhu al-ala'i wa an-ni'am wa as-samah

translation.en: Possessor of Generosity, O the One to illuminate the dawn

segments.arabic: يَا فَالِقَ الْاِصْبَاحِ، امْنَحْهَا سُؤْلَهَا وَ اِنْ لَمْ تَسْتَحِقَّ يَا غَفَّارُ
segments.transliteration: Ya faliq al-isbah, amnah su'laha wa in lam tastahiq ya ghaffar

translation.en: Grant the favours of this heart although it does not deserve

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ اِنِّيْ اَسْئَلُکَ بِاسْمِکَ الَّذِيْ تُمْضِيْ بِهِ الْمَقَادِيْرَ
segments.transliteration: Allahumma inni as'aluka bismik alladhi tumdi bihi al-maqadir

translation.en: O the excessive forgiver, O Allah I beseech You by those names which moulds the destiny

segments.arabic: وَ بِعِزَّتِکَ الَّتِيْ تَتِمُّ بِهِ التَّدَابِيْرَ
segments.transliteration: Wa bi-izzatik allati tatimmu bihi at-tadabir

translation.en: By Your Honour which complete the actions

segments.arabic: اَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلٰي مُحَمَّدٍ وَ اٰلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: An tusalli ala Muhammad wa ali Muhammad

translation.en: Bless Muhammad and his progeny

segments.arabic: وَ تَرْزُقَنِيْ رِزْقًا وَاسِعًا حَلَالًا طَيِّبًا مِنْ فَضْلِکَ
segments.transliteration: Wa tarzuqani rizqan wasi'an halalan tayyiban min fadlik

translation.en: And grant me pure and vast sustenance from Your bounty

segments.arabic: وَ اَنْ لَا تَحُوْلَ بَيْنِيْ وَ بَيْنَ مَا يُقَرِّبُنِيْ مِنْکَ
segments.transliteration: Wa an la tahool bayni wa bayna ma yuqarribuni mink

translation.en: And do not let any barrier come between me and what brings me closer to You
O the Most Compassionate, O the Most Beneficent
translation.fa: اى پرعطا اى پرنعمت

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ وَ اَدْرِجْنِيْ فِيْمَنْ اَبَحْتَ لَهُمْ مِنْ غُفْرَانِکَ
segments.transliteration: Allahumma wa adrijni fiman abahta lahum min ghufranik

translation.en: O Allah, include me among those whom You have granted Your forgiveness

segments.arabic: وَ عَفْوَکَ وَ رِضَاکَ وَ اَسْکَنْتَهٗ جِنَانَکَ
segments.transliteration: Wa afwak wa ridhak wa askantahu jinanak

translation.en: And Your pardon and pleasure, and have settled them in Your gardens
By Your kindness, generosity, and grace

segments.arabic: يَا اِلٰهِيْ اَنْتَ اَکْرَمْتَ اَوْلِيَائَکَ بِکَرَامَاتِکَ
segments.transliteration: Ya Ilahi anta akramta awliya'aka bi-karamatika

translation.en: O my Lord, You have honored Your friends with Your signs (miracles)
And have made Your protection necessary for them

segments.arabic: وَ اَظْلَلْتَهُمْ بِرِعَايَتِکَ مِنَ التَّتَابُعِ فِيْ الْمَهَالِکِ
segments.transliteration: Wa azlaltahum bi-ri'ayatik min at-tatabu' fi al-mahalik

translation.en: And have put them under Your care to save them from destruction

segments.arabic: وَ اَنَا عَبْدُکَ، فَانْقِذْنِيْ وَ الْبِسْنِيْ الْعَافِيَۃَ
segments.transliteration: Wa ana abduk, fa-anqidhni wa albisni al-afiyah

translation.en: I am also Your servant, so grant me salvation and protection

segments.arabic: وَ اِلٰي طَاعَتِکَ فَمِلْ بِيْ، وَ عَنْ طُغْيَانِکَ وَ مَعْصِيَتِکَ فَرُدَّنِيْ
segments.transliteration: Wa ila ta'atik fa-mil bi, wa an tughyanik wa ma'siyatak faruddni

translation.en: And make me attentive towards Your obedience, and turn me away from disobedience

segments.arabic: فَقَدْ عَجَّتْ اِلَيْکَ الْاَصْوَاتُ بِضُرُوْبِ اللُّغَاتِ
segments.transliteration: Faqad ajjat ilayk al-aswat bi-dhurub al-lughat

translation.en: Voices have been raised to You in various languages
Asking You for their needs, hoping for the erasure of their defects

segments.arabic: وَ غُفْرَانِ الذُّنُوْبِ يَا عَلَّامَ الْغُيُوْبِ
segments.transliteration: Wa ghufran adh-dhunub ya Allam al-ghuyub

translation.en: And forgiveness of sins, O Knower of all unseen
O Allah, I seek guidance from You, so guide me
And I seek protection from You, so protect me
And fulfill Your rights upon me

segments.arabic: اِنَّکَ اَهْلُ التَّقْوٰي وَ اَهْلُ الْمَغْفِرَۃِ
segments.transliteration: Innaka ahlu at-taqwa wa ahlu al-maghfirah

translation.en: Surely You are worthy to be feared and worthy to forgive

segments.arabic: وَ اصْرِفْ عَنِّيْ شَرَّ کُلِّ ذِيْ شَرٍّ اِلٰي خَيْرٍ مَا لَا يَمْلِکُهٗ اَحَدٌ سِوَاکَ
segments.transliteration: Wa asrif anni sharr kulli dhi sharr ila khayr ma la yamlikuhu ahad siwak

translation.en: And repel from me the evil of every evil person to the good that nobody except You owns

segments.arabic: وَ احْتَمِلْ عَنِّيْ مُفْتَرَضَاتِ حُقُوْقِ الْاٰبَاءِ وَ الْاُمَّهَاتِ
segments.transliteration: Wa ahtamil anni muftaradat huquq al-aba' wa al-ummahat

translation.en: And help me to bear the obligatory rights of the fathers and the mothers

segments.arabic: وَ اغْفِرْ لِيْ وَ لَهُمَا وَ لِلْمُؤْمِنِيْنَ وَ الْمُؤْمِنَاتِ
segments.transliteration: Wa aghfir li wa lahuma wa lil-mu'minin wa al-mu'minat

translation.en: And forgive me and both of them and the believing men and the believing women

segments.arabic: وَ الْاِخْوَۃِ وَ الْاَخَوَاتِ وَ الْقَرَابَاتِ
segments.transliteration: Wa al-ikhwa wa al-akhawat wa al-qarabat

translation.en: And the brothers and the sisters and the near ones

segments.arabic: يَا وَلِيَّ الْبَرَکَاتِ وَ عَالِمُ الْخَفِيَّاتِ
segments.transliteration: Ya wali al-barakat wa alim al-khafiyat

translation.en: O the Owner of the blessings and Knower of the concealed

text.en: Ziyarat Imam Ali(as)and Syeda Fatma(sa) for Sunday

translation.en: Peace be upon the Prophetic Tree
and the Hashemite plant that is luminous,
fruitful of Prophethood,
and elegant with Imamate.

segments.transliteration: wa ʿala dajiʿayka adama wa nuhin

translation.en: And [peace be] upon your two grave-fellows; Adam and Noah,
peace be upon both of them.

segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿalayka wa ʿala ahli baytika

translation.en: Peace be upon you and upon your Household,
the pure and immaculate.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ وَعَلَىٰ ٱلْمَلاَئِكَةِ ٱلْمُحْدِقِينَ بِكَ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿalayka wa ʿala almala'ikati almuhdiqina bika

translation.en: Peace be upon you and upon the angels surrounding you
and encompassing your tomb.
O my master, O Commander of the Believers!
Today is Sunday,
which is your day and carrying your name,

segments.transliteration: wa ana dayfuka fihi wa jaruka

translation.en: and, on this day, I am your guest and in your vicinity;
therefore, my master, receive me as your guest and neighbor.
Surely, you are generous and hospitable
and you are commanded to treat your neighbors hospitably.
So, (please) do to me that which I desire from you
and I hope you to do,

segments.transliteration: bimanzilatika wa ali baytika ʿinda allahi

translation.en: [I ask you] in the name of your and your Household's standing with Allah
and His standing with you all,

segments.transliteration: wa bihaqqi ibni ʿammika rasuli allahi

translation.en: and in the name of your cousin, Allah's Messenger,

segments.transliteration: salla allahu ʿalayhi wa alihi wa sallama

translation.en: may Allah's peace and blessings be upon him
and upon them all.

text.en: Ziyarat Syeda Fatima(sa)

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O examined lady.
He Who created you has examined you
and found that you have passed the examination patiently.

segments.arabic: أَنَا لَكِ مُصَدِّقٌ صَابِرٌ عَلَىٰ مَا أَتَىٰ بِهِ أَبُوكِ وَوَصِيُّهُ صَلَوَاتُ ٱللَّهِ عَلَيْهِمَا
segments.transliteration: ana laki musaddiqun sabirun ʿala ma ata bihi abuki wa wasiyyuhu salawatu allahi ʿalayhima

translation.en: I verify that you were patient about what came upon your father and his his successor peace be upon both of

segments.transliteration: wa ana as'aluki in kuntu saddaqtuki

translation.en: I now beseech you by my belief in you
to attach & associate me with my belief in both of them
so that I will be delighted.
So, testify for me that I am totally loyal to you
and to your Household;
peace of Allah be upon them all.

text.en: Ziarat second Version

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكِ يَا مُمْتَحَنَةُ امْتَحَنَكِ الَّذِي خَلَقَكِ قَبْلَ أَنْ يَخْلُقَكِ وَ كُنْتِ لِمَا امْتَحَنَكِ بِهِ صَابِرَةً

translation.en: Peace be on you, O the carefully examined, tried and measured by Him who created you, and found you, in your test, cool and compact, steady and stable.

segments.arabic: وَ نَحْنُ لَكِ أَوْلِيَاءُ مُصَدِّقُونَ وَ لِكُلِّ مَا أَتَى بِهِ أَبُوكِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ وَ سَلَّمَ

translation.en: We tell the truth about you; calm and quiet, with self control and composure (you) put up with all that which your father blessings of Allah be on him and on his family

segments.arabic: وَ أَتَى بِهِ وَصِيُّهُ عَلَيْهِ السَّلاَمُ مُسَلِّمُونَ

translation.en: and his "Wasi" (successor) peace be on him came across.

segments.arabic: وَ نَحْنُ نَسْأَلُكَ اللَّهُمَّ إِذْ كُنَّا مُصَدِّقِينَ لَهُمْ أَنْ تُلْحِقَنَا بِتَصْدِيقِنَا بِالدَّرَجَةِ الْعَالِيَةِ

translation.en: We beseech you, (If I have stated the truth), to bind us together with the testimony, concerning both of them, in order to give joy and satisfaction to my heart and soul.

segments.arabic: لِنُبَشِّرَ أَنْفُسَنَا بِأَنَّا قَدْ طَهُرْنَا بِوِلاَيَتِهِمْ (بِوَلاَيَتِهِمْ) عَلَيْهِمُ السَّلاَمُ
segments.transliteration: So bear witness that truly I, by heart, made evident your, and your children's "wilayat" (superintendent guardianship), blessings of Allah be on them all

translation.en: So bear witness that truly I, by heart, made evident your, and your children's "wilayat" (superintendent guardianship), blessings of Allah be on them all
In the Name of Allah, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful
translation.fa: به نام خداى بخشاینده مهربان

translation.en: Glory be to him, who fulfilled the time with his holiness.
Glory be to him, who his light covers the unlimited times.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ مَنْ أَشْرَقَ كُلَّ شَيْءٍ ضَوْؤُهُ

translation.en: Glory be to you who his light shines upon everything.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ مَنْ يُدَانُ بِدِينِهِ كُلُّ دِينٍ وَ لَا يُدَانُ بِغَيْرِ دِينِهِ

translation.en: Glory be to him who every religion has admitted to his religion and do not admit to others.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ مَنْ قَدَرَ بِقُدْرَتِهِ كُلَّ قَدَرٍ وَ لَا يَقْدِرُ أَحَدٌ قَدْرَهُ

translation.en: Glory be to him who decreed with his power every fate, and no one can decree his fate.
Glory be to him who; His knowledge can not be described.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ مَنْ لَا يَعْتَدِي عَلَى أَهْلِ مَمْلَكَتِهِ

translation.en: Glory be to Him Who does not transgress against the inhabitants of his Kingdom!

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ مَنْ لَا يَأْخُذُ أَهْلَ الْأَرْضِ بِأَلْوَانِ الْعَذَابِ

translation.en: Glory be to him who does not chastise the people of the earth with various punishments.
Glory be to Him who is kind and Merciful.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ مَنْ هُوَ مُطَّلِعٌ عَلَى خَزَائِنِ الْقُلُوبِ

translation.en: Glory be to him who is aware of the hearts' treasuries.
Glory be to Him Who knows the exact count of the sins!

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ مَنْ لَا تَخْفَى عَلَيْهِ خَافِيَةٌ فِي الْأَرْضِ وَ لَا فِي السَّمَاءِ

translation.en: Glory be to him who does not deceive those who do everything in secret, in earth or heavens.
Glory be to the Loving Lord!
Glory be to the Unique Single!
Glory be to the Greatest Great!
In the Name of Allah, the Merciful, the Compassionate
translation.fa: به نام خداى بخشاینده مهربان

segments.arabic: اللهُ أَ كْبَرُ اللهُ أَ كْبَرُ اسْتَوَى الرَّبُّ عَلَى الْعَرْشِ

translation.en: Allah is the Most Great, Allah is the Most great, The Lord sat on the Throne,

segments.arabic: وَ قَامَتِ السَّمَاوَاتُ وَ الْأَرْضُ بِحِكْمَتِهِ

translation.en: and His Command established the heavens and the earth.

segments.arabic: وَ زَهَرَتِ النُّجُومُ بِأَمْرِهِ وَ رَسَتِ الْجِبَالُ بِإِذْنِهِ

translation.en: The stars were stilled, and the mountains were fixed firmly by His permission.

segments.arabic: لَا يُجَاوِزُ اسْمُهُ مَنْ فِي السَّمَاوَاتِ وَ الْأَرْضِ

translation.en: His name does not pass by those in the heavens and the earth.

segments.arabic: الَّذِي دَانَتْ لَهُ الْجِبَالُ وَ هِيَ طَائِعَةٌ

translation.en: The mountains draw near Him, obedient,

segments.arabic: وَ انْبَعَثَتْ لَهُ الْأَجْسَادُ وَ هِيَ بَالِيَةٌ

translation.en: and the bodies are resurrected for Him when they are rotten.

segments.arabic: وَ بِهِ أَحْتَجِبُ [احْتَجَبْتُ] بِاللهِ الَّذِي عَنْ كُلِّ غَاوٍ وَ بَاغٍ وَ طَاغٍ وَ جَبَّارٍ وَ حَاسِدٍ

translation.en: Veil every harmful thing and envious One by the Might of Allah from so-and-so, son of so-and-so,

segments.arabic: وَ بِاسْمِ اللهِ الَّذِي جَعَلَ بِهِ بَيْنَ الْبَحْرَيْنِ

translation.en: by the One who placed a partition between the two seas;

segments.arabic: [حاجِزاً وَ أَحْتَجِبُ [احْتَجَبْتُ بِاللهِ الَّذِي جَعَلَ فِي السَّماءِ بُرُوجاً
وَ جَعَلَ فِيها سِراجاً وَ قَمَراً مُنِيراً

translation.en: and set a lamp and an illuminating moon among them.

segments.arabic: وَ زَيَّنَهَا لِلنَّاظِرِينَ وَ حَفِظَهَا مِنْ كُلِّ شَيْطانٍ رَجِيمٍ

translation.en: I seek protection for him in the One who decked them out fair to the beholders and guarded them against every accursed demon.

segments.arabic: وَ جَعَلَ فِي الْأَرْضِ رَوَاسِيَ جِبِالًا أَوْتَاداً

translation.en: I seek protection for him in the One who set firm mountains and pegs in the earth,

segments.arabic: أَنْ يُوصَلَ إِلَيَّ سُوءٌ أَوْ فَاحِشَةٌ أَوْ بَلِيَّةٌ

translation.en: lest evil, indecency, or affliction should get to him.
'Ha Mim' a revelation from the Merciful, the Compassionate

segments.arabic: عسق كَذلِكَ يُوحِي إِلَيْكَ وَ إِلَى الَّذِينَ مِنْ قَبْلِكَ

translation.en: So reveals to You, and those before You,
God, the All-mighty, the All-wise.

segments.arabic: وَ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ وَ سَلَّمَ تَسْلِيماً
segments.transliteration: Blessings of Allah upon Muhammad, the Prophet, and his family.

translation.en: SALAATSPrayer for Sunday 1It is mentioned in traditions that on Sunday when sun has reached some height (late morning) one should pray two rakat prayers. In the first rakat after Surah Hamd recite Surah Kauther thrice and in the second rakat after Surah Hamd recite Surah Tawheed thrice. If one recites this prayer he is free from hellfire and purified of hypocrisy. There is great reward for this prayer.Prayer for Sunday 2It is narrated from the Messenger of Allah (s.a.w.a.) that one who offers four rakats prayer on Sunday, and in each rakat after Surah Hamd recites Surah Mulk once the Almighty will give him a place of his choice in Paradise.Prayer for Sunday Evening ( night preceeding monday)It has come in traditions that one should recite six rakats prayers on Sunday eve and in each rakat after Surah Hamd he should recite Surah Tawheed seven times. There is inestimable reward for this prayer.

text.en: SALAATSPrayer for Sunday 1

translation.en: In the name of Allah, the Beneficent, the Merciful.
translation.fa: به نام خداى بخشاینده مهربان

translation.en: All praise be to You, our Lord; to You belong the praise.
You are Allah, the bearer of Your Throne forever.
You have encompassed the perceptiveness of every creature.
And all creatures are upon annihilation;

segments.arabic: وَ أَنْتَ الْبَاقِي الْكَرِيمُ الْقَائِمُ الدَّائِمُ بَعْدَ فَنَاءِ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ

translation.en: You are the Eternal, the All generous, the Existing, and the Everlasting, which subsists after annihilating all things.

segments.arabic: الْحَيُّ الَّذِي لَا يَمُوتُ بِيَدِكَ مَلَكُوتُ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَ الْأَرْضِ وَ دَهْرُ الدَّاهِرِينَ

translation.en: The Everlasting Whom shall not perish; The One in Whose control is the kingdom of the heavens and earth eternally.
You are the one who demolished the unjust ones by Your voice!
Added the earth in Your grasp
and covered with Your illumination light beholders' eyes.
You fulfilled by Your favor; livelihood the eaters
and elevated Your throne upon worlds.
You made the heavens inhabited by The nearest angels

segments.arabic: وَ عَلَّمْتَ تَسْبِيحَكَ الْأَوَّلِينَ وَ الْآخِرِينَ

translation.en: and teach Your glorifying; for the early generations and last.

segments.arabic: وَ انْقَادَتْ لَكَ الدُّنْيَا وَ الْآخِرَةُ بِأِزمَّتِهَا

translation.en: The here and hereafter submitted its leashes for You,

segments.transliteration: kept the heavens and earth keys,

segments.arabic: وَ الْأَرَضِينَ بِمَقَالِيدِهَا وَ أَذْعَنَتْ لَكَ بِالطَّاعَةِ

translation.en: and submitted to You with obeying with things above it too!

segments.arabic: وَ مِنْ فَوْقِهَا وَ أَبَتْ حَمْلَ الْأَمَانَةِ مِنْ شَفَقَتِهَا

translation.en: And refused to bear the Trust out of the compassion,
and stood solid with Your words
and the seas sat straight on its places.

segments.arabic: وَ اخْتَلَفَ اللَّيْلُ وَ النَّهَارُ كَمَا أَمَرْتَهُمَا

translation.en: The night and day opposed each other as You commanded them

segments.arabic: وَ أَحْصَيْتَ كُلَّ شَيْءٍ فِيهِمَا عَدَداً

translation.en: and You who has counted in it everything in numbers.

segments.arabic: وَ أَحَطْتَ بِهِمَا عِلْماً خَالِقَ الْخَلْقِ

translation.en: And You encompassed it with knowledge, the Creator of creatures;

segments.arabic: وَ مُصْطَفِيَهُ وَ مُهَيْمِنَهُ وَ مُنْشِيَهً [وَ بَارِيَهُ] وَ ذَارِيَهُ

translation.en: who are chosen one, ruling upon, thems Creator and strew,

segments.arabic: كُنْتَ وَحْدَكَ لَا شَرِيكَ لَكَ إِلَهاً

translation.en: You were and only You without a partner.

segments.arabic: وَاحِداً وَ كَانَ عَرْشُكَ عَلَى الْمَاءِ

translation.en: One God and Your throne were above the water

segments.arabic: مِنْ قَبْلِ أَنْ تَكُونَ أَرْضٌ وَ لَا سَمَاءٌ

translation.en: before the being of the earth, heavens,

segments.transliteration: or anything out of your creation!

segments.arabic: بِعِزَّتِكَ كُنْتَ قَدِيماً بَدِيعاً مُبْتَدِعاً كَيْنُوناً

translation.en: By Your might, You were the sempiternal, splendid, creative entity,

segments.arabic: كَائِناً مُكَوِّناً كَمَا سَمَّيْتَ نَفْسَكَ ابْتَدَعْتَ

translation.en: exists and Creator as You named Yourself!

segments.arabic: الْخَلْقَ بِعَظَمَتِكَ وَ دَبَّرْتَ أُمُورَهُمْ بِعِلْمِكَ

translation.en: You originated the creation with Your mightiness and governed their matters with Your knowledge.

segments.arabic: فَكَانَ عَظِيمُ مَا ابْتَدَعْتَ مِنْ خَلْقِكَ

translation.en: Therefore the greatness of Your creation

segments.arabic: وَ قَدَرْتَ عَلَيْهِ مِنْ أَمْرِكَ عَلَيْكَ

translation.en: and Your ability is from Your command upon them;

segments.arabic: هَيِّناً يَسِيراً لَمْ يَكُنْ لَكَ ظَهِيرٌ عَلَى خَلْقِكَ

translation.en: easy and gradual! You didn't need an aid upon Your creation,

segments.arabic: وَ لَا مُعِينٌ عَلَى حِفْظِكَ وَ لَا شَرِيكَ لَكَ فِي مُلْكِكَ

translation.en: no help on Your custody, no partner in Your kingdom,
and You were our God; glorified are your names

segments.arabic: وَ جَلَّ ثَنَاؤُكَ عَلَى ذَلِكَ عَلِيّاً غَنِيّاً

translation.en: and splendid be the praising of You upon this the highest and free of need!
Indeed; so Your order to something you want
is only that You say to it, "Be," and it is;

segments.arabic: لَا يُخَالِفُ شَيْءٌ مِنْهُ مَحَبَّتَكَ فَسُبْحَانَكَ

translation.en: none of would contradict your love! So; Glory be to You

segments.arabic: وَ بِحَمْدِكَ وَ تَبَارَكْتَ رَبَّنَا وَ جَلَّ ثَنَاؤُكَ

translation.en: and praise, blessed You are our God, splendid be the praising of You

segments.arabic: وَ تَعَالَيْتَ عَلَى ذَلِكَ عُلُوّاً كَبِيراً

translation.en: and exalted high indeed above all that!

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ عَبْدِكَ وَ رَسُولِكَ

translation.en: O Allah, (please do) send blessings upon Muhammad, Your servant

segments.arabic: وَ نَبِيِّكَ وَ عَلَى أَهْلِ بَيْتِهِ
