translation.en: and Messenger, Your Prophet and His Household.
As; You surpassed to us by him Your mercy,

segments.arabic: وَ قَرُبَ إِلَيْنَا بِهِ هُدَاكَ وَ أَوْرَثْتَنَا بِهِ كِتَابَكَ

translation.en: lead on us by him Your guidance, inherited us by him Your Book
and directed us by him on Your obeying!

segments.arabic: فَأَصْبَحْنَا مُبْصِرِينَ بِنُورِ الْهُدَى الَّذِي جَاءَ بِهِ

translation.en: So we become subtle upon the light of guidance that he bought to us,

segments.arabic: ظَاهِرِين بِعِزِّ الدِّينِ الَّذِي دَعَا إِلَيْهِ

translation.en: standing by the superiority of the religion that he invited to

segments.arabic: نَاجِينَ بِحُجَجِ الْكِتَابِ الَّذِي نَزَلَ عَلَيْهِ

translation.en: and rescued by The Book (Quran) proofs revealed upon him.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ فَآثَرَهُ بِقُرْبِ الْمَجْلِسِ مِنْكَ يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ

translation.en: O, Lord, so favor him with the nearest place beside You on the Day of Resurrection!
Dignify him with the accepted enablement intercession to You;
excellence from You upon the righteousness

segments.arabic: وَ تَشْرِيفاً مِنْكَ لَهُ عَلَى الْمُتَّقِينَ

translation.en: and solemnity from You upon the god-fearing!

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ وَ امْنَحْنَا مِنْ شَفَاعَتِهِ نَصِيباً نَرِدُ بِهِ

translation.en: O, Lord, grant us from his intercession a share that; will acquaint us

segments.arabic: مَعَ الصَّادِقِينَ جِنَانَهُ وَ نَنْزِلُ بِهِ مَعَ الْآمِنِينَ

translation.en: with the sincere to His heavens and with the secure in His spacious gardens;

segments.arabic: فُسْحَةَ رِيَاضِهِ غَيْرَ مَرْفُوضِينَ عَنْ دَعْوَتِهِ

translation.en: Not dismissed from his invite,

segments.arabic: وَ لَا مَرْدُودِينَ عَنْ سَبِيلِ مَا بَعَثْتَهُ بِهِ

translation.en: apostate from the way that You sent him with,

segments.arabic: وَ لَا مَحْجُوبَةٍ عَنَّا مُرَافَقَتُهُ وَ لَا مَحْظُورَةٍ عَنَّا دَارُهُ

translation.en: his company is veiled nor forbidden his home on us,
may it be so, O, Allah of Truth; Lord of the worlds!

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ

translation.en: O, Allah, (please do) send blessings upon Muhammad and His Household,
translation.fa: خدایا درود فرست بر محمد و آل محمد

translation.en: O, Allah! I beseech You through Your great Name;
that is not known to anybody except you,

segments.arabic: وَ الَّذِي سَخَّرْتَ بِهِ اللَّيْلَ وَ النَّهَارَ

translation.en: which subdued with the night and day,

segments.arabic: وَ أَجْرَيْتَ بِهِ الشَّمْسَ وَ الْقَمَرَ وَ النُّجُومَ

translation.en: which moved smoothly by it the sun, moon, and stars,

segments.arabic: وَ بِهِ أَنْشَأْتَ السَّحَابَ وَ الْمَطَرَ وَ الرِّيَاحَ

translation.en: by which the clouds, rain, and the wind is done,

segments.arabic: وَ الَّذِي بِهِ تُنَزْلُ الْغَيْثَ وَ تَذْرَأُ الْمَرْعَى

translation.en: by that which You make the rainfall and multiply the pasture;

segments.arabic: وَ تُحْيِي الْعِظامَ وَ هِيَ رَمِيمٌ

translation.en: enliven the bones when they are decayed,

segments.arabic: وَ الَّذِي بِهِ تَرْزُقُ مَنْ فِي الْبَرِّ وَ الْبَحْرِ

translation.en: by that which You endow who are in lands and seas;

segments.arabic: وَ الَّذِي هُوَ فِي التَّوْرَاةِ وَ الْإِنْجِيلِ وَ الزَّبُورِ

translation.en: by the Taurat, Injeel, Zabur,

segments.arabic: وَ الْقُرْآنِ الْعَظِيمِ وَ الَّذِي فَلَقْتَ بِهِ الْبَحْرَ لِمُوسَى

translation.en: and the Holy Quran where it is in, You caused the sea to cleave asunder for Moses

segments.arabic: وَ أَسْرَيْتَ بِمُحَمَّدٍ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ

translation.en: and the midnight journey to the seven heavens by Muhammed; God bless him and his Household.

segments.arabic: وَ بِكُلِّ اسْمٍ لَكَ مَخْزُونٍ وَ مَكْنُونٍ

translation.en: And by every name that is saved and well protected,

segments.arabic: وَ بِكُلِّ اسْمٍ دَعَاكَ بِهِ مَلَكٌ مُقَرَّبٌ

translation.en: by everyone who did beseech You by your name; every brought near angels

segments.arabic: أَوْ نَبِيٌّ مُرْسَلٌ أَوْ عَبْدٌ مُصْطَفًى
segments.transliteration: or sent Prophet or chosen servant.

segments.arabic: أَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ

translation.en: Do send Your blessings upon Mohammad and His Household,

segments.arabic: وَ أَنْ تَجْعَلَ رَاحَتِي فِي لِقَائِكَ

translation.en: make my relief in Your meeting,

segments.arabic: وَ خَاتِمَ عَمَلِي فِي سَبِيلِكَ وَ حَجَّ بَيْتِكَ الْحَرَامِ

translation.en: the seal for my deeds is toward You, the grace of pilgrimage to Your Holy House,

segments.arabic: وَ اخْتِلَافٍ إِلَى مَسَاجِدِكَ وَ مَجَالِسِ الذِّكْرِ

translation.en: follow Your mosques and gatherings in which Allah's name is being invoked,

segments.arabic: وَ اجْعَلْ خَيْرَ أَيَّامِي يَوْمَ أَلْقَاكَ

translation.en: and make my best day is Your meeting day!

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ

translation.en: O Allah, send Your blessings upon Muhammad, and His Household
translation.fa: خدایا درود فرست بر محمد و آل محمد

segments.arabic: وَ احْفَظْنِي مِنْ بَيْنِ يَدَيَّ وَ مِنْ خَلْفِي
segments.transliteration: protects me; before and behind me,

segments.arabic: وَ عَنْ يَمِينِي وَ عَنْ شِمَالِي وَ مِنْ فَوْقِي وَ مِنْ تَحْتِي

translation.en: my right and left, above and below;

segments.arabic: أَسْفَلَ مِنِّي وَ احْفَظْنِي مِنَ السَّيِّئَاتِ

translation.en: beneath me! Protect me from the sins,

segments.arabic: وَ مَكِّنْ لِي فِي دِينِي الَّذِي ارْتَضَيْتَ لِي

translation.en: And strength in my religion what You; accepted for me,

segments.arabic: [ وَ فَهِّمْنِي فِيهِ وَ اجْعَلْهُ لِي نُوراً [وَ بِشْراً

translation.en: apprehend me in it, make it a light (good omen)

segments.arabic: وَ يَسِّرْ لِيَ الْيُسْرَ وَ الْعَافِيَةَ وَ اعْزِمْ عَلَى رُشْدِي

translation.en: and ease for me the solvency and well-being.

segments.arabic: كَمَا عَزَمْتَ عَلَى خَلْقِي وَ أَعِنِّي عَلَى نَفْسِي بِبِرٍّ

translation.en: Determine my consciousness; as You determined my creation. Help me against myself with;

segments.arabic: وَ تَقْوَى وَ عَمَلٍ رَاجِحٍ وَ بَيْعٍ رَابِحٍ
segments.transliteration: God-fearing, faithfulness, accepted deed, gainer selling,

translation.en: and commerce that comes not to naught.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ الْجَنَّةَ وَ مَا قَرُبَ إِلَيْهَا مِنْ قَوْلٍ أَوْ عَمَلٍ

translation.en: O, Allah, I beseech You for heaven, and what a saying or work can make me near to it.

segments.arabic: وَ أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ خَوْنِ الْأَمَانَةِ

translation.en: I seek refuge in You from; betraying the Trust,

segments.arabic: وَ مِنَ التَّزَيُّنِ بِمَا لَيْسَ فِيَّ

translation.en: refinding myself with what I don't own,

segments.arabic: وَ مِنَ الْآثَامِ وَ الْبَغْيِ بِغَيْرِ الْحَقِّ وَ أَنْ أُشْرِكَ بِكَ

translation.en: sins and tyranny without righteousness, and associate with You;
whom You didn't consider a dominion!

segments.arabic: وَ أَجِرْنِي مِنْ مَضَلَّاتِ الْفِتَنِ ما ظَهَرَ مِنْها

translation.en: Please take me away from mischief and deviations,

segments.arabic: وَ ما بَطَنَ وَ مِنْ مُحِيطَاتِ الْخَطَايَا

translation.en: whether open or secret, and the enormous sins!

segments.arabic: وَ نَجِّنِي مِنَ الظُّلُمَاتِ إِلَى النُّورِ

translation.en: Rescue me from the darkness to the light.

segments.arabic: وَ اهْدِنِي سَبِيلَ الْإِسْلَامِ وَ اكْسُنِي حُلَلَ الْإِيمَانِ

translation.en: Guide me to the Islam path, drape us with robes of faithfulness,

segments.transliteration: veil us with apparel of piety,
shield me with the righteous shield,
beautify me with the believers' ornament,
load the balance with my deeds,

segments.arabic: وَ أَلْقِنِي مِنْكَ بِرَوْحٍ وَ رَيْحَانٍ

translation.en: and meet me with Thy spirit and pleasant.
May it be so, O Lord of the worlds,
translation.fa: اجابت فرما اى پروردگار جهانیان

segments.arabic: وَ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِهِ وَ سَلَّمَ تَسْلِيماً
segments.transliteration: and blessings of Allah upon Muhammed and His Household and give them abundant peace!

translation.en: Full Pdf lblPdf 3 colSunday night arabicPpt explantion1 Pg JpgSy Fatima(sa) Ziarat pdf

text.en: Monday Rites.
4th Imam dua
Sy Fatima(sa)dua
Imam Ali(as)dua
Ziyarats
Tasbih
Salats
Night
Monday Dua of Imam Zainul Abideen (peace be upon him)

translation.en: In the Name of Allah, the All-beneficent, the All-merciful

segments.arabic: اَلْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ ٱلَّذِي لَمْ يُشْهِدْ أَحَداً
segments.transliteration: alhamdu lillahi alladhi lam yushhid ahadan

translation.en: Praise be to Allah Who allowed none to witness
when He created the heavens and the earth,

segments.arabic: وَلاَ ٱتَّخَذَ مُعِيناً حِيـنَ بَرَأَ ٱلنَّسَمَاتِ
segments.transliteration: wa lattakhadha muʿinan hina baraʿa annasamati

translation.en: and Who took no helper when He authored the spirits!
He has no associate in Divinity
and no support in Unity.
Tongues fall silent before the limit of describing Him,
intellects fail before the core of knowing Him,
tyrants fall low in awe of Him,
faces are humbled in fear of Him,
and everything mighty yields to His mightiness!
So, to You belongs praise, again and again, well-measured,
continually, methodically!
And may His blessings be upon His Messenger endlessly,
and His salutation (be upon him) everlastingly, eternally!

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ ٱجْعَلْ أَوَّلَ يَوْمِي هٰذَا صَلاَحاً
segments.transliteration: allahumma ijʿal awwala yawmi hadha salahan

translation.en: O Allah, (please) make the beginning of this day of mine righteousness,
its middle prosperity,
and its end success!

segments.arabic: وَ أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ يَوْمٍ اَوَّلُهُ فَزَعٌ
segments.transliteration: wa aʿudhu bika min yawmin awwaluhu fazaʿun

translation.en: I seek refuge in You from a day whose beginning is fright,
whose middle is anxiety,
and whose end is pain!

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْتَغْفِرُكَ لِكُلِّ نَذْرٍ نَذَرْتُهُ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni astaghfiruka likulli nadhrin nadhartuhu

translation.en: O Allah, I pray forgiveness from You for every vow I have vowed,
every promise I have made,
and every pledge I have pledged
and then I failed to keep for You.

segments.arabic: وَ أَسْأَلُكَ فِي مَظَالِمِ عِبَادِكَ عِنْدِي
segments.transliteration: wa as'aluka fi mazalimi ʿibadika ʿindi

translation.en: I ask You concerning the complaints of Your servants against me:
If there is a servant from among Your servants
or a bondmaid from among Your bondmaids,

segments.arabic: كَانَتْ لَهُ قِبَلِي مَظْلَمَةٌ ظَلَمْتُهَا إِيَّاهُ
segments.transliteration: kanat lahu qibali mazlamatun zalamtuha iyyahu

translation.en: who has against me a complaint
because I have wronged him in respect to himself, his reputation,

segments.arabic: أَوْ فِي مَالِهِ أَوْ فِي أَهْلِهِ وَوَلَدِهِ
segments.transliteration: aw fi malihi aw fi ahlihi wa waladihi

translation.en: his property, his wife or his child,
or because evil words I have spoken about him in his absence,

segments.arabic: أَوْ تَحَامُلٌ عَلَيهِ بِمَيْلٍ أَوْ هَوًىٰ
segments.transliteration: aw tahamulun ʿalayhi bimaylin aw hawan

translation.en: an imposition upon him through inclination, caprice,
scorn, zeal,
false show, bigotry,
whether he be absent or present,
alive or dead,
such that my hand has fallen short

segments.transliteration: wa daqa wusʿi ʿan raddiha ilayhi

translation.en: and my capacity has been too narrow to make restitution to him
or to annul my obligation to him,

segments.transliteration: fa as'alika ya man yamliku alhajati

translation.en: I ask You, O He who owns all objects of need,
which are granted by His will
and hasten to His desire

segments.arabic: أَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: an tusalliya ʿala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: that You bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,

segments.transliteration: wa an turdiyahu ʿanni bima shi'ta

translation.en: and make [the one I have wronged] satisfied with me in the manner that You will,

segments.transliteration: wa tahaba li min ʿindika rahmatan

translation.en: and gift me mercy from You,
because, indeed, forgiveness decreases You not
and giving injures You not.
O Most Merciful of all those who show mercy!

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ أَوْلِنِي فِي كُلِّ يَومِ ٱثْنَيْنِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma awlini fi kulli yawmi ithnayni

translation.en: O Allah, bestow upon me on every Monday
with two favors from You:
the felicity to obey You at its beginning
and the favor of Your forgiveness at its end!
O He who is the God
and none other than Whom grants forgiveness for sins!

text.en: Dua of Sayyeda Fatima (peace be upon her) for Monday

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ اِنِّيْ اَسْاَلُكَ قُوَّةً فِيْ عِبَادَتِكَ،
segments.transliteration: allaahumma innee as-aloka quwwatan fee e’baadateka

translation.en: O God, I ask You for the strength to worship (You),
insight of book (Quran),
cognizance of religious laws

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلٰى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ اٰلِ مُحَمَّدٍ،
segments.transliteration: allaahumma salle a’laa mohammadin wa aale mohammadin,

translation.en: O Allah, bless Muhammad and the progeny of Muhammad

segments.arabic: وَ لَا تَجْعَلِ الْقُرْاٰنَ بِنَا مَاحِلًا وَ الصِّرَاطَ زَائِلًا،
segments.transliteration: wa laa taj-a’lil quraana benaa maahelan was seraata zaaelan,

translation.en: and do not make the Quran distant from us and the Siraat as downfall for us

segments.transliteration: wa mohammadan sallal laaho a’layhe wa aalehi a’nnaa mowalleyan.

translation.en: and His Eminence, Muhammad as one, who turns away from us.

segments.arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلّٰهِ الَّذِيْ هُدَانِيْ لِلْاِسْلاَمِ وَ اَکْرَمَنِيْ بِالْاِيْمَانِ وَ بَصَّرَنِيْ بِالدِّيْنِ وَ شَرَّفَنِيْ بِالْيَقِيْنِ وَ عَرَّفَنِيْ الْحَقَّ الَّذِيْ عَنْهُ يُؤْفَکُوْنَ وَالنَّبَائِ الْعَظِيْمَ الَّذِيْ هُمْ فِيْهِ مُخْتَلِفُوْنَ

translation.en: Praise is for Allah Who guided me towards Islam, enlightened me in religion and granted me insight about those things in which people look for allegations and accusation.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ اﷲِ الَّذِيْ يَرْزُقُ الْقَاسِطَ الْعَادِلَ وَالْعَاقِلَ وَالْجَاهِلَ وَ يَرْحَمُ السَّاهِيَ وَالْغَافِلَ فَکَيْفَ الدَّاعِيَ السَّآئِلَ

translation.en: Pure is Allah Who sustains the great and the unjust, the intelligent and the fools, when He is Merciful towards the negligent and careless, why will He not be Merciful on those who invoke and beseech Him.

segments.arabic: َوَ لاَ اِلٰهَ اِلاَّ اﷲُ اللَّطِيْفُ بِمَنْ شَرَدَ عَنْهُ مِنْ مُسْرِفِيْ عِبَادِهٖ لِيَرْجِعَ عَنْ عَتُوِّهٖ وَ عِنَادِنهٖ الرَّاضِيْ مِنَ الْمُنِيْبِ الْمُخْلِصِ بِدُوْنِ الْوُسْعِ وَالطَّاقَۃِ
segments.transliteration: There is no Lord except Allah and He bestows His grace and Mercy on those who run away from His obedience so that they may refrain from their tyranny and oppression and are prepared to do good deeds with sincere people.

translation.en: And Allah is Great. He is tolerant and knowledgeable who has such amazing and marvelous proofs in the universe which proves His Godhood, without a doubt.

segments.arabic: اوَ عَلٰي کُلِّ نَوْعٍ مِنْ غَوَامِضِ تَقْدِيْرِه وَ حُسْنِ تَدْبِيْرِهٖ دَلِيْلٌ وَاضِحٌ وَ شَاهِدُ عَدْلٍ يَقْضِيَانِ لَهٗ بِالْوَحْدَانِيَّۃِ

translation.en: His recognition of destinies and the excellent policies are adequate evidences and the just witnesses are sufficient proof of His Oneness.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ اِنِّيْ اَسْئَلُکَ يَا مَنْ يَصْرِفُ الْبَلاَيَا وَ يَعْلَمُ الْخَفَايَا وَ يُجْزِلُ الْعَطَايَا سُؤَالَ نَادِمٍ عَلٰي اِقْتِرَافِ الْاٰثَامِ وَ سَالِمٍ عَلَي الْمَعَاصِيْ مِنَ اللَّيَالِيْ

translation.en: O my Creator! O He who wards off the misfortune, aware of the secrets, gives abundance in bestowal of rewards, I ask You, as the one who is ashamed of his sins and is persistently absorbed in disobedience.

segments.arabic: وَالْاَيَّامِ اِذْلَمْ يَجِدْ مُجِيْرًا سِوَاکَ لِغُفْرَانِهَا وَلاَ مَوْئِلاً يَفْزَعُ اِلَيْهِ لِاِرْتِجَآءِ کَشْفِ فَاقَتِهٖ اِلاَّاِيَّاکَ

translation.en: I don't find anyone other than You who can grant me refuge in it.And there is none other than You, with whom I can get my helplessness dispelled and can put forth my grievances.

segments.arabic: يَا جَلِيْلُ اَنْتَ الَّذِيْ عَمَّ الْخَلآئِقَ مَنُّکَ وَ غَمَرَتْهُمْ سَعَۃُ رَحْمَتُکَ وَ سَوَّغَتْهُمْ سَوَابِغُ نِعْمَتِکَ

translation.en: O the Lord of Majestic Your obligations have spread over the entire creation and our vast bounties have covered them up, and Your complete bestowals are a source of happiness

segments.arabic: ا کَرِيْمُ الْمَاٰبِ وَالْجَوَادُ الْوَهَّابِ وَالْمُنْتَقِمُ مِمَّنْ عَصَاهُ بِاَلِيْمِ الْعَذَابِ دَعَوْتُکَ مُقِرًّا بِالْاِسَائَۃِ عَلٰي نَفْسِيْ اِذْلَمْ اَجِدُ مَلْجَأ اَلْجَاَهُ اِلَيْهِ فِيْ اِغْتِفَادِ مَا اکْتَسَبْتَ مِنَ الْاٰثَامِ

translation.en: O the Honorable and the Generous and the abundant forgiver, and the one to deal strictly with the disobedient. I confess the errors of my soul and I plead to You because I don't find a better place to seek pardon for my evil deeds, other than You.

segments.arabic: يَا خَيْرَ مَنِ اسْتُدْعٰي لِبَذْلِ الرَّغَآئِبِ وَ اَنْجَحَ مَامُوْلٍ لِکَشْفِ الْکَوَارِبِ لَکَ عَنَتِ الْوُجُوْهُ فَلاَ تَرُدَّنِيْ مِنْکَ بِالْحِرْمَانِ

translation.en: O the bestower of the favorite bounties, and the warder of calamities and the foremost in making the wishes come true. The foreheads are bowed before You, don't send them dejected.

segments.arabic: اِنَّکَ تَفْعَلُ مَا تَشَآءُ وَ تَحْکُمُ مَا تُرِيْدُ اِلٰهِيْ وَ سَيِّدِيْ وَ مَوْلاَيَ اَيَّ رَبٍّ اِرْتَجِيْهِ اَمْ اَيَّ اِلٰهٍ اَقْصُدُهٗ اِذَا اَلَمَّ بِيَ النَّدَمُ وَ اَحَاطَتْ بِيَ الْمَعَاصِيْ وَ نَکَائِبُ خَوْفِ النِّقَمِ وَ اَنْتَ وَلِيَّ الصَّفْحِ وَ ميَاوَي الْکَرَمِ

translation.en: Indeed You do what pleases You and command what You like. O My Lord! O my Master! When sorrow and shame is open and the feeling of fear and chastisement has fallen down, then who is the lord from whom I can have hopes, who is He to whom I can have hopes, who is He to whom I can turn and You are the Lord of forgiveness and the peak of Mercy.

segments.arabic: َ اِلٰهِيْ اَتُقِيْمُنِيْ مَقَامَ الْهَلَکَۃِ وَ اَنْتَ جَمِيْلُ السِّتْرِ وَ تَسَأَلُنِيْ عَنْ اِقْتِرَافِيْ عَلٰي رُئُوْسِ الْاَشْهَادِ وَ قَدْ مَخَبَّاتِ السِّتْرِ

translation.en: O My Lord! Will you put me among those who will be destroyed, whereas You are the best concealer (of sins), will You question me for my sins in everybody's presence, whereas You are aware of the secrets of the hearts.

segments.arabic: فَاِنْ کُنْتُي اِلٰهِيْ مُسْرِفًا عَلٰي نَفْسِيْ مُخْطِئًا عَلَيْهَا بِاِنْتِهَاکَ الْحُرُمَاتِ نَاسِيًا لِمَا اجْتَرَمْتُ مِنَ الْهَفَوَاتِ فَاَنْتَ لَطِيْفٌ تَجُوْدُ عَلَي الْمُسْرِفِيْنَ بِرَحْمَتِکَ وَ تَتَفَضَّلْ عَلَي الْخَاطِئِيْنَ بِکَرَمِکَ فَارْحَمْنِيْ يَا اَرْحَمَ الرَّاحِمِيْنَ فَاِنَّکَ تُسَکِّنَ

translation.en: O Allah although I have been unjust on my soul, and have overlooked Your commands, and have indulged myself in sins, and have forgotten everything, but still You are the Owner of favours who is extremely kind towards the sinners and is benevolent upon the evil doers by Your Grace.

segments.arabic: َ يَا اِلٰهِيْ بِتَحَبُّنِکَ رَوْعَاتِ قُلُوْبِ الْوَجِلِيْنَ وَ تُحَقُّقِ بِتَطَوُّلِکَ اَمَلَ الْاٰمِلِيْنَ وَ تُفِيْضُ سَجَالَ عَطَايَاکَ عَلٰي غَيْرِ الْمُسْتَاهِلِيْنَ ف

translation.en: Thus O the great Merciful be kind to me, as You are the one Who can give peace to the living heart and by Your favours, make the wishes of the hopeful come true. Your mercy also showers on the undeserving.

segments.arabic: َاٰمِنِّيْ بِرَجَآئٍ لاَ يَشُوْبُهٗ قُنُوْطٌ وَ اَمَلٍ لاَ يُکَدِّرُهُ بَاْسٌي

translation.en: Give me shade in those desires, where there is the sign of despair, and such a hope which is not destined by Your Chastisement.

segments.arabic: ا مُحِيْطًا بِکُلِّ شَيْءٍ عِلْمًا وَ قَدْ اَصْبَحْتُ سَيِّدِيْ وَ اَمْسَيْتُ عَلٰي بَابٍ مِنْ اَبْوَابِ مِنَحِکَ سَآئِلاً وَ عَنِ التَّعَرُّضِ لِسِوَاکَ

translation.en: O He who has covered everything by His knowledge, O my Master, now my state is such that from dawn to dusk I am begging at the door of Your Mercy and am away from asking from anyone else other than You.

segments.arabic: بِالْمَسْأَلَۃِ عَادِلاً وَّ لَيْسَ مِنْ جَمِيْلِ اِمْتِنَانِکَ رَدُّ سَآئِلٍ مَا سُوْرٍ مَلْهُوْفٍ وَ مُضْطَرٍّ لِانْتِظَارِ خَيْرِکَ الْمَالُوْفِي

translation.en: And Your immense grace is too great to reject the plea of a beggar, of a person who is imprisoned, one who is inflicted in problems, and one who impatiently awaits Your forgiveness to turn him down

segments.arabic: الٰهِيْ اَنْتَ الَّذِيْ عَجَزَتِ الْاَوْهَامُ عَنِ الْاِحَاطَۃِ بِکَ وَ کَلَّتِ الْاَلْسُنُ عَنْ نَعْتِ ذٰلِکَ فَبِاٰلَآئِکَ وَ طَوْلِکَ

translation.en: O my Lord, the strength, intellect and thoughts are incapable to gather knowledge about You and the tongues are dumbstruck in praising You.

segments.arabic: صَلِّ عَلٰي مُحَمَّدٍ وَ اٰلِ مُحَمَّدٍ وَاغْفِرْلِيْ ذُنُوْبِيْ وَ اَوْسِعْ عَلَيَّ مِنْ فَضْلِکَ الْوَاسَعِ رِزْقًا وَاسِعًا حَلٰلاً طَيِّبًا فِيْ عَافِيَۃٍ وَ اَقِلْنِيْ الْعَثْرَۃ

translation.en: Thus send blessings on Mohammed and his progeny by Your Grace and forgive my sins and Grant me pure and excellent and honorable sustenance by Your vast Grace.

segments.arabic: َ يَا غَايَۃَ الْاٰمِلِيْنَ وَ جَبَّارَ السَّمٰوٰتِ وَالْاَرْضِيْنَ وَالْبَاقِيْ بَعْدَ فَنَآءِ الْخَلْقِ اَجْمَعِيْنَ وَ دَيَّانَ يَوْمِ الدِّيْنِ

translation.en: O the only support of hopeful, O the one having power on the Heavens and the Earth,O the one to remain after the destruction of entire creation, the Judge on the day of reward and punishment,

segments.arabic: وَ اَنْتَ يَا مَوْلاَيَ ثِقَۃُ مَنْ لَمْ يَثْقِ بِنَفْسِهٖ لِاِفْرَاطِ خَلَلِهٖ وَ اَمَلُ مَنْ لَمْ يَکُنْ لَهٗ تَاْمِيْلٌ لِکَثْرَۃِ زَلَلِهٖ وَ رَجَآءُ مَنْ لَمْ يَرْتَجِ لِنَفْسِهٖ بِوَسِيْلَۃِ عَمَلِه

translation.en: O my Lord! One who due to errors does not have trust on himself, then his trust and the hope of the one who does not find any destination and the hope of the one who does not have any hopes left due to his deeds.

segments.arabic: الٰهِيْ فَاَنْقِذْنِيْ بِرَحْمَتِکَ مِنَ الْمَهَالِکِ وَ اَحْلِلْنِيْ دَارَ الْاَخْيَارِ وَاجْعَلْنِيْ مِنْ مُرَافِقِيْ الْاَبْرَارِ وَاغْفِرْلِيْ ذُنُوْبَ اللَّيْلِ وَالنَّهَارِ

translation.en: O my Lord save me from destruction by Your Mercy, and put me among Your appointed people, count me among the pious ones, forgive my sins of the night and days,

segments.arabic: َِيَا مُطَّلِعًا عَلَي الْاَسْرَارِ اِحْتَمِلْ عَنِّيْ مَوْلاَيَ اَدَآءَ مَا افْتَرَضْتَ عَلَيَّ لِلْاٰبَآءِ وَالْاُمَّهَاتِ وَالْاِخْوَانِ وَالْاَخْوَاتِ بِلُطْفِکَ وَ کَرِمَکَ يَا ذَاالْجَلاَلِ وَالْاِکْرَامِ وَ اَشْرِکْنَا فِيْ دُعَآءِ مَنِ اسْتَجَبْتَ لَهٗ مِنَ الْمُؤْمِنِيْنَ وَالْمُؤْمِنٰتِ

translation.en: O the Knower of the secrets of the hearts, O the possessor of grandeur and Majestic, the rights of my parents, brothers, and sisters which are obligatory upon me, You fulfill it and relieve me of it with Your Mercy and include me among those believers, whose supplication You have accepted.

segments.arabic: اِنَّکَ جَوَادٌ کَرِيْمٌ وَهَّابٌ صَلَّي اﷲُ عَلٰي مُحَمَّدٍ وَّ اٰلِهٖ وَ سَلَّمَ تَسْلِيْمًا
segments.transliteration: Indeed You are Generous and on excessive forgiver. O Allah send blessings on Mohammad and his progeny and bestow Your best protection

translation.en: Ziyarat of Imam Hassan (as) and Imam Hussain(as)

text.en: Ziyarat Imam Hassan(as)

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ رَسُولِ رَبِّ ٱلْعَالَمِينَ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿalayka ya ibna rasuli rabbi alʿalamina

translation.en: Peace be on you, O son of the Messenger of the Lord of the Worlds!

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ أَمِيرِ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿalayka ya ibna amiri almu'minina

translation.en: Peace be on you, O son of the Commander of the Believers!

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ فَاطِمَةَ ٱلزَّهْرَاءِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿalayka ya ibna fatimata alzzahra’i

translation.en: Peace be on you, O son of Fatimah, the luminous lady!
Peace be on you, O beloved of Allah!
Peace be on you, O choice of Allah!
Peace be on you, O trustee of Allah!
Peace be on you, O Argument of Allah!
Peace be on you, O Light of Allah!
Peace be on you, O Path of Allah!

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بَيَانَ حُكْمِ ٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿalayka ya bayana hukmi allahi

translation.en: Peace be on you, O elucidation of the rule of Allah!

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا نَاصِرَ دِينِ ٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿalayka ya nasira dini allahi

translation.en: Peace be on you, O supporter of the religion of Allah!
Peace be on you, O pure master!
Peace be on you, O self-righteous and truthful!
Peace be on you, O practiser (of God's commands) and trustee!
Peace be on you, O well-experienced in the interpretation (of the Qur'an)!
Peace be on you, O guide and well-guided!
Peace be on you, O immaculate and pure!
Peace be on you, O pious and infallible!
Peace be on you, O veritable truth!
Peace be on you, O martyr and veracious!

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا أَبَا مُحَمَّدٍ ٱلْحَسَنَ بْنَ عَلِيٍّ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿalayka ya aba muhammadin alhasana ibna ʿaliyyin

translation.en: Peace be on you, O Abu-Muhammad al-Hasan, the son of `Ali!
Allah's mercy and blessings be upon you!

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ رَسُولِ ٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: assalamu ʿalayka ya ibna rasuli allahi

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O son of Allah's Messenger!

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ أَمِيرِ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
segments.transliteration: assalamu ʿalayka ya ibna amiri almu'minina

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O son of the Commander of the Believers!

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ سَيِّدَةِ نِسَاءِ ٱلْعَالَمِينَ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿalayka ya ibna sayyidati nisa'i alʿalamina

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O son of the doyenne of the women of the world!
I bear witness that you performed the prayers [duly],
defrayed the poor-rate,
enjoined the right,
forbade the wrong,
worshipped Allah sincerely,

segments.transliteration: wa jahadta fi allahi haqqa jihadihi

translation.en: and strove for the sake of Allah with due striving
until death came upon you.
So, peace from me be upon you

segments.transliteration: ma baqitu wa baqiya allaylu walnnaharu

translation.en: as long as I am alive and as long as day and night remain,

segments.transliteration: wa ʿala ali baytika alttayyibina alttahirina

translation.en: and peace be upon your Household, the pure, the immaculate.

segments.arabic: أَنَا يَا مَوْلاَيَ مَوْلىٰ لَكَ وَلآِلِ بَيْتِكَ
segments.transliteration: ana ya mawlaya mawlan laka wa li-ali baytika

translation.en: O my master, I am a servant of you and of your Household,
peaceful with those who keep peace with you,
at war against those who are at war against you,
and believing in your secret and open affairs
and your inward and outward affairs.
May Allah curse your enemies
from the past and late generations.

segments.arabic: وَأَنَا أَبْرَأُ إِلَىٰ ٱللَّهِ تَعَالَىٰ مِنْهُمْ
segments.transliteration: wa ana abra'u ila allahi taʿala minhum

translation.en: And I release myself from them before Almighty Allah!
O my master, Abu-Muhammad;

segments.arabic: يَا مَوْلاَيَ يَا أَبَا عَبْدِ ٱللَّهِ

translation.en: and my master, Abu-`Abdullah!
Today is Monday,
which is the day of both of you and carrying your names.
On this day, I am your guest;
therefore, receive me as your guest and treat me hospitably.
Verily, you both are the most excellent hosts a guest may gain.

segments.transliteration: wa ana fihi min jiwarikuma fa-ajirani

translation.en: On this day too, I am in your vicinity; so, treat me as your neighbor,
since you are commanded to receive your guests and neighbors hospitably.

segments.transliteration: fasalla allahu ʿalaykuma wa alikuma alttayyibina

translation.en: May Allah's peace be upon you both and upon your immaculate household.
In the Name of Allah, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful.
translation.fa: به نام خداى بخشاینده مهربان

translation.en: Glory be to the Kind, Compassionate, and the All-magnanimous!
Glory be to the Generous and the most generous!
Glory be to the Discerning and the Wise!
Glory be to him, the all-hearing and immense!

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ اللهِ عَلَى إِقْبَالِ النَّهَارِ وَ إِقْبَالِ اللَّيْلِ

translation.en: Glory be to him upon daytime and nighttime arriving!

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ اللهِ عَلَى إِدْبَارِ النَّهَارِ وَ إِدْبَارِ اللَّيْلِ

translation.en: Glory be to Allah upon the time of sunset and the zero hours of the departing night.

segments.arabic: لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللهُ فِي آنَاءِ اللَّيْلِ وَ آنَاءِ النَّهَارِ

translation.en: There is no God except Allah in the watches of the night and day.

segments.arabic: وَ لَهُ الْحَمْدُ وَ الْمَجْدُ وَ الْعَظَمَةُ وَ الْكِبْرِيَاءُ

translation.en: For Him alone is; the praise, might, greatness and omnipotence.

segments.arabic: مَعَ كُلِّ نَفَسٍ وَ كُلِّ طَرْفَةٍ

translation.en: With every breath and twinkle of an eye

segments.arabic: وَ كُلِّ لَمْحَةٍ سَبَقَتْ فِي عِلْمِهِ

translation.en: and every moment already registered in His all-embracing awareness,
Glory be counted to you!

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ زِنَةَ ذَلِكَ وَ مَا أَحْصَى كِتَابُكَ

translation.en: Glory be to you equal to the measure and the infinite range that covers Your Book!
Glory be to You; that is equal to the measure of Your Throne!

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ [سُبْحَانَكَ] سُبْحَانَ رَبِّنَا ذِي الْجَلالِ وَ الْإِكْرامِ

translation.en: Glorified be our Allah, the Glorious and Gracious.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ رَبِّنَا تَسْبِيحاً كَمَا يَنْبَغِي لِكَرَمِ وَجْهِهِ وَ عِزِّ جَلَالِهِ

translation.en: Glory be to Allah with a proper glorification due to His distinct Munificence and His Excellent Glory!

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ رَبِّنَا تَسْبِيحاً مُقَدَّساً مُزَكًّى كَذَلِكَ فَعَلَ رَبُّنَا

translation.en: Glory be to Allah with a righteous and holy glorification.
Glory be to Allah the ever-living and clement!

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ الَّذِي كَتَبَ عَلى نَفْسِهِ الرَّحْمَةَ

translation.en: Glory be to him who has written upon himself The Mercy!

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ الَّذِي خَلَقَ آدَمَ وَ أَخْرَجَنَا مِنْ صُلْبِهِ

translation.en: Glory be to him who Created Adam and bought us from his essence.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ الَّذِي يُحْيِي الْأَمْوَاتَ وَ يُمِيتُ الْأَحْيَاءَ

translation.en: Glory be to him who revives the deceased's and causes the living to die.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ مَنْ هُوَ رَحِيمٌ [حَلِيمٌ] لَا يَعْجَلُ

translation.en: Glory be to Him Who is Merciful, never does a thing in haste.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ مَنْ هُوَ رَقِيبٌ [قَرِيبٌ] لَا يَغْفُلُ

translation.en: Glory be to you, who is watchful and never misses.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ مَنْ هُوَ جَوَادٌ لَا يَبْخَلُ

translation.en: Glory be to you, The Generous who is never a miser.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ مَنْ هُوَ حَلِيمٌ لَا يَجْهَلُ

translation.en: Glory be to you, The Forbearing who never forgets.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ مَنْ جَلَّ ثَنَاؤُهُ وَ لَهُ الْمِدْحَةُ الْبَالِغَةُ

translation.en: Glory be to you, who He-great is His praise.

segments.arabic: فِي جَمِيعِ مَا يُثْنَى عَلَيْهِ مِنَ الْمَجْدِ

translation.en: And for him is the conclusive praise in his every Glory that is praised.
Glory be to Allah, The forbearing,

segments.arabic: وَ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَى سَيِّدِنَا مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِهِ الطَّاهِرِينَ

translation.en: and God bless our chief, Muhammad; and his immaculate Household.
In the Name of Allah, the Merciful, the Compassionate.

segments.arabic: أُعِيذُ نَفْسِي بِرَبِّي الْأَكْبَرِ مِمَّا يَخْفَى وَ مَا يَظْهَرُ

translation.en: I seek protection for me, in my Lord, the Most Great from; the evil of what is hidden and apparent,

segments.arabic: وَ مِنْ شَرِّ كُلِّ أُنْثَى وَ ذَكَرٍ

translation.en: the evil of every female and male,

segments.arabic: وَ مِنْ شَرِّ مَا رَأَتِ الشَّمْسَ وَ الْقَمَرَ

translation.en: the evil of what the sun and moon behold.

segments.arabic: قُدُّوسٌ قُدُّوسٌ رَبُّ الْمَلَائِكَةِ وَ الرُّوحِ

translation.en: Most Holy, Most Holy, Lord of the angels and the Spirit.

segments.arabic: أَدْعُوكُمْ أَيُّهَا الْجِنُّ إِنْ كُنْتُمْ سَامِعِينَ مُطِيعِينَ

translation.en: I call on you, O jinn, if you are hearing, obedient,

segments.arabic: وَ أَدْعُوكُمْ أَيُّهَا الْإِنْسُ إِلَى اللَّطِيفِ الْخَبِيرِ

translation.en: and I call you, O humankind, to the Gracious, the All-knowing.

segments.arabic: وَ أَدْعُوكُمْ أَيُّهَا الْجِنُّ وَ الْإِنْسُ

translation.en: I call you, O humankind and jinn,

segments.arabic: إِلَى الَّذِي خَتَمْتُهُ بِخَاتَمِ رَبِّ الْعَالَمِينَ

translation.en: to Him Who is obeyed by all creation stamped with the seal of the Lord of the Worlds,

segments.arabic: وَ خَاتَمِ جِبْرِيلَ وَ مِيْكَالَ وَ إِسْرَافِيلَ

translation.en: and the seal of Jibrail, Mikail, and Israfil,

segments.arabic: وَ خَاتَمِ سُلَيْمَانَ بْنِ دَاوُدَ عَلَيْهِمُ السَّلَامُ

translation.en: and the seal of Sulayman b. Dawud, peace be upon them

segments.arabic: وَ خَاتَمِ مُحَمَّدٍ سَيِّدِ الْمُرْسَلِينَ وَ النَّبِيِّينَ

translation.en: and the seal of Muhammad, the chief of the Prophets,

segments.arabic: صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ وَ عَلَيْهِمْ أَجْمَعِينَ

translation.en: blessings of Allah on Muhammad and his Ahl Al-Bayt, the good and pure.

segments.arabic: وَ أَزْجُرُ [وَ آخُذُ] عَنْ فُلَانِ بْنِ فُلَانٍ كُلَّمَا يَغْدُو وَ يَرُوحُ مِنْ ذِي حَيٍّ أَوْ عَقْرَبٍ أَوْ سَاحِرٍ أَوْ شَيْطَانٍ رَجِيمٍ أَوْ سُلْطَانٍ عَنِيدٍ

translation.en: Remove from so-and-so, son of so-and-so, every female jinn with a rebellious spirit, a jinn or demon or rebellious enchanter, or obstinate ruler or an accursed devil.

segments.arabic: أَخَذْتُ عَنْهُ مَا يُرَى وَ مَا لَا يُرَى

translation.en: Remove from so-and-so, which is seen and unseen;

segments.arabic: وَ مَا رَأَتْ عَيْنُ نَائِمٍ أَوْ يَقْظَانٍ بِإِذْنِ اللهِ اللَّطِيفِ الْخَبِيرِ

translation.en: seen by an eye, sleeping or awake, by the will of Allah, the Gracious, the All-knowing.

segments.arabic: لَا سُلْطَانَ لَكُمْ عَلَى اللهِ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ وَ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَى رَسُولِهِ سَيِّدِنَا مُحَمَّدٍ النَّبِيِّ وَ آلِهِ الطَّاهِرِينَ وَ سَلَّمَ تَسْلِيماً
segments.transliteration: There is no way for you over him, nor over what is feared for him. Allah, no partner has He, and Allah bless Muhammad and his Ahl Al-Bayt.

translation.en: SALAATSPrayer for Monday 1It is four rakats. In the first rakat after Surah Hamd recite Ayatul Kursi once. In the second rakat after Surah Hamd recite Surah Tawheed once. In the third rakat after Surah Hamd recite Surah Falaq once. In the fourth rakat after Surah Hamd recite Surah Naas once. Then after completing the prayer recite Isteghfar 10 times.Prayer for Monday 2This prayer is also narrated from the Messenger of Allah (s.a.w.a.) that one who recites ten rakats prayer on Monday and in every rakat recites Surah Hamd and Surah Tawheed 10 times each the Almighty Allah will appoint for him such a light on the day of Qiyamat that it would illuminate his place till all the creatures vie him.Prayer for Monday evening ( Night preceeding Tuesday)It is of two rakats. In each rakat after Surah Hamd recite Ayatul Kursi, Surah Tawheed, Surah Falaq and Surah Naas once each and after the prayer recite Isteghfar 10 times. The reward of this prayer equals 10 Hajjs and Umrahs.
In the name of Allah, the Beneficent, the Merciful.
translation.fa: به نام خداى بخشاینده مهربان

translation.en: O, Allah, glory be to You and praise.
You are Allah; the Truth king,

segments.arabic: وَ أَنْتَ مَلِكٌ لَا مَلِكَ مَعَكَ وَ لَا شَرِيكَ لَكَ

translation.en: You are the King without a king with nor a partner

segments.arabic: وَ لَا إِلَهَ دُونَكَ اعْتَرَفَ لَكَ الْخَلَائِقُ

translation.en: and no God besides You; the creation confessed to You.

segments.arabic: رَبَّنَا لَكَ الْحَمْدُ وَ لَكَ الْمُلْكُ الْعَظِيمُ الَّذِي لَا يَزُولُ

translation.en: O, Lord to You belongs praise, and For You; is the Great Kingdom which doesn't change,

segments.arabic: وَ الْغَنِيُّ الْكَبِيرُ الَّذِي لَا يَعُولُ

translation.en: The great rich Whom doesn't wail,

segments.arabic: وَ السُّلْطَانُ الْعَزِيزُ الَّذِي لَا يُضَامُ

translation.en: The mighty King Whom is never overpowered,

segments.arabic: وَ الْعِزُّ الْمَنِيعُ الَّذِي لَا يُرَامُ

translation.en: The indomitable superiority which never leaves,

segments.arabic: وَ الْحَوْلُ الْوَاسِعُ الَّذِي لَا يَضِيقُ

translation.en: The immense might which doesn't constrain,

segments.arabic: وَ الْقُوَّةُ الْمَتِينَةُ الَّتِي لَا تَضْعُفُ

translation.en: The excellent strength which doesn't get weak,

segments.arabic: وَ الْكِبْرِيَاءُ الْعَظِيمُ الَّذِي لَا يُوصَفُ

translation.en: The great grandeur which can't be described,

segments.arabic: فَحَوْلَ أَرْكَانِ عَرْشِكَ النُّورُ وَ الْوَقَارُ

translation.en: Hence, Your Throne Pillars are surrounded with light and solemnity;

segments.arabic: مِنْ قَبْلِ أَنْ تَخْلُقَ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَ الْأَرْضَ

translation.en: before the heavens and earth were created.
And Your throne was above the water;
Your seat was glowing with the light!

segments.arabic: وَ سُرَادِقُكَ سُرَادِقُ النُّورِ وَ الْعَظَمَةِ

translation.en: Your pavilions were pavillions of light and greatness,

segments.arabic: وَ الْإِكْلِيلُ الْمُحِيطُ بِهِ هَيْكَلُ السُّلْطَانِ

translation.en: and the surrounding diadem has; the King's entity,

segments.arabic: لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ رَبُّ الْعَرْشِ الْعَظِيمِ

translation.en: There is no God save You, the Lord of the Great Throne

segments.arabic: وَ [ذُو] الْبَهَاءِ وَ النُّورِ وَ الْحُسْنِ وَ الْجَمَالِ

translation.en: (Owner of); elegance, light, comeliness, beauty,

segments.arabic: وَ الْعُلَى وَ الْعَظَمَةِ وَ الْكِبْرِيَاءِ وَ الْجَبَرُوتِ وَ السُّلْطَانِ وَ الْقُدْرَةِ
segments.transliteration: highness, greatness, grandeur, power, supremacy, and ability.

translation.en: You indeed are the generous Allmighty.
(The All-Capable) upon everything You created,
nothing can measure Your loftiness
and weak Your greatness.
You created everything with Your desire;

segments.arabic: فَنَفَذَ فِيمَا خَلَقْتَ عِلْمُكَ وَ أَحَاطَ بِهِ خُبْرُكَ

translation.en: fulfilled in Your creation Your knowledge, surrounded by Your announcement,

segments.arabic: وَ أَتَى عَلَى ذَلِكَ أَمْرُكَ وَ وَسِعَهُ حَوْلُكَ وَ قُوَّتُكَ

translation.en: completed it by Your command and extended over Your force and strength!

segments.arabic: لَكَ الْخَلْقُ وَ الْأَمْرُ وَ الْأَسْمَاءُ الْحُسْنَى

translation.en: ForYou; belong the creation and command, the Most Excellent Names,

segments.arabic: وَ الْأَمْثَالُ الْعُلْيَا وَ الْآلَاءُ وَ الْكِبْرِيَاءُ
segments.transliteration: the loftiest likenesses, bounties, and grandeur.

segments.arabic: ذُو الْجَلالِ وَ الْإِكْرامِ وَ النِّعَمُ الْعِظَامُ

translation.en: You are the possessor of; majesty and munificence, great blessings,

segments.transliteration: and the pride that doesn't leave.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ وَ بِحَمْدِكَ تَبَارَكْتَ رَبَّنَا وَ جَلَّ ثَنَاؤُكَ

translation.en: Glory and praise be to You, blessed You are, and splendid be the praising of You.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ عَبْدِكَ وَ رَسُولِكَ

translation.en: O, Allah (please) do send blessings upon Muhammed, Your servant, messenger,

segments.arabic: وَ نَبِيِّكَ خَاتَمِ النَّبِيِّينَ الْمُقَفِّي عَلَى آثَارِهِمْ

translation.en: and Prophet; the seal of prophets who trace their footsteps,

segments.arabic: وَ النَّاصِرِ لَهُمْ مِنْ ضَلَالِ مَنِ ادَّعَى مِنْ غَيْرِهِمْ دَعْوَتَهُمْ وَ سَارَ بِخِلَافِ سِيرَتِهِمْ

translation.en: and the helper for them before the error of who claims it without a right; and walked opposite their path.

segments.arabic: صَلَاةً تُعَظِّمُ بِهَا نُورَهُ عَلَى نُورِهِمْ

translation.en: A blessing that; glorifies his light upon their,

segments.arabic: وَ تَزِيدُ بِهَا شَرَفاً عَلَى شَرَفِهِمْ
وَ تُبَلِّغُهُ بِهَا أَفْضَلَ مَا بَلَّغْتَ نَبِيّاً مِنْهُمْ وَ عَلَى أَهْلِ بَيْتِهِ

translation.en: will take him with the most excellent from what other Prophet reached and upon his Household.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ فَزِدْ مُحَمَّداً صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ

translation.en: O, Allah does increase Muhammed blessings upon him and his Household;

segments.transliteration: and with every nobility another nobility;

segments.arabic: حَتَّى تُعَرِّفَ فَضِيلَتَهُ وَ كَرَامَتَهُ أَهْلَ الْكَرَامَةِ عِنْدَكَ يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ

translation.en: until The people of dignity will realize his merit and nobility for You on the Day of Resurrection.

segments.arabic: وَ هَبْ لَهُ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ

translation.en: Bless him, blessings of Allah upon him and his Household;

segments.arabic: وَ آتِهِ سُؤْلَهُ فِي الْآخِرَةِ وَ الْأُولَى

translation.en: and grant him his request in the end and the beginning.
May it be so; Allah of Truth, Lord of the worlds!

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ بِاسْمِكَ الْأَكْبَرِ الْعَظِيمِ

translation.en: O, Allah, I beseech you by Your enormous saved great name;

segments.arabic: الْمَخْزُونِ الَّذِي تُفَتَّحُ بِهِ أَبْوَابُ سَمَاوَاتِكَ وَ رَحْمَتُكَ

translation.en: that opens Your heavens door and mercy,

segments.arabic: وَ يَسْتَوْجِبُ بِهِ رِضْوَانَكَ الَّذِي تُحِبُّ

translation.en: demands by it Your satisfaction that You like,

segments.arabic: وَ تَهْوَى وَ تَرْضَى عَمَّنْ دَعَاكَ بِهِ

translation.en: desire, and accept upon whom prayed for You!

segments.arabic: وَ هُوَ حَقٌّ عَلَيْكَ أَنْ لَا تَحْرِمَ بِهِ سَائِلَكَ

translation.en: And it is the right that You do not deny the one who asks from you,

segments.arabic: وَ بِكُلِّ اسْمٍ دَعَاكَ بِهِ الرُّوحُ الْأَمِينُ

translation.en: and by every name was called on You by; the trustworthy spirit,
the close Angels,

segments.arabic: وَ أَنْبِيَاؤُكَ الْمُرْسَلُونَ وَ الْأَخْيَارُ الْمُنْتَجَبُونَ

translation.en: Your sent Prophets, the chosen good.

segments.arabic: وَ جَمِيعُ مَنْ فِي سَمَاوَاتِكَ وَ أَقْطَارِ أَرْضِكَ

translation.en: And all who are in your heavens, the quarters of the earth,

segments.arabic: وَ الصُّفُوفُ حَوْلَ عَرْشِكَ تُقَدِّسُ لَكَ

translation.en: and queues around Your throne indeed do glorify You to;

segments.arabic: أَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ

translation.en: send Your blessings upon Muhammed and his Household

segments.arabic: وَ أَنْ تَنْظُرَ فِي حَاجَتِي إِلَيْكَ

translation.en: and look into my need from You.

segments.arabic: وَ أَنْ تَرْزُقَنِي نَعِيمَ الْآخِرَةِ وَ حُسْنَ ثَوَابِ

translation.en: Bestow upon me with Your favor of blisses of the end,

segments.arabic: أَهْلِهَا فِي دَارِ الْمُقَامَةِ مِنْ فَضْلِكَ

translation.en: the splendid reward of its people in the home that is made from Your Bounties,

segments.arabic: وَ مَنَازِلَ الْأَخْيَارِ فِي ظِلٍّ أَمِينٍ

translation.en: and the high standing of the best in a safe shade!

segments.arabic: فَإِنَّكَ أَنْتَ بَرَأْتَنِي وَ أَنْتَ تُعِيدُنِي لَكَ

translation.en: You are indeed The One who created me and will send me back to You.

segments.arabic: أَسْلَمْتُ نَفْسِي وَ إِلَيْكَ فَوَّضْتُ أَمْرِي

translation.en: To You have I; submitted myself, and I entrusted my affairs with You.
To You have I; commend my cause

segments.arabic: وَ عَلَيْكَ تَوَكَّلْتُ وَ بِكَ وَثِقْتُ

translation.en: and rely and trust on You!

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَدْعُوكَ دُعَاءَ ضَعِيفٍ مُضْطَرٍّ

translation.en: O, Allah, I supplicate You with the supplication of a compelled weak one!

segments.arabic: وَ رَحْمَتُكَ يَا رَبِّ أَوْثَقُ عِنْدِي مِنْ دُعَائِي

translation.en: And Your mercy is much more trusted to me than my prayer.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ فَأْذَنِ اللَّيْلَةَ لِدُعَائِي أَنْ يَعْرُجَ إِلَيْكَ

translation.en: O, Allah, therefore; permit my prayer to rise to You,

segments.arabic: وَ أْذَنْ لِكَلَامِي أَنْ يَلِجَ إِلَيْكَ

translation.en: permit my words to reach You,
and turn away Your sight from my sins.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ

translation.en: O Allah, bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad;
translation.fa: خدایا درود فرست بر محمد و آل محمد

segments.arabic: وَ أَعُوذُ بِكَ أَنْ أَضِلَّ فِي هَذِهِ اللَّيْلَةِ

translation.en: I do seek Your refuge upon astray this night;

segments.transliteration: of disobedience or luring a believer!

translation.en: Or to do deeds in what You don't like
because You are; the God of the high heavens,

segments.arabic: وَ أَنْتَ تَرَى وَ لَا تُرَى وَ أَنْتَ بِالْمَنْظَرِ الْأَعْلَى

translation.en: Verily You see but cannot be seen while You are in the Highest Prospect;

segments.transliteration: splits the grain and the date-stone.

translation.en: O Allah, I beseech You this night;

segments.transliteration: the best praise in the ease,
the best patience in the adversity,

segments.arabic: وَ أَفْضَلَ الرُّجُوعِ إِلَى أَفْضَلِ دَارِ الْمَأْوَى

translation.en: and the best return to the best house of Permanence!

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ

translation.en: O Allah, bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,
translation.fa: خدایا درود فرست بر محمد و آل محمد

translation.en: I ask; the love for Your well-beloved,
the hindering of which You have deemed forbidden,
be apprehended from Your fear,
fearing Your chastisement,
salvation from Your punishment,
desire in a proper reward for You,

segments.arabic: وَ الْفِقْهَ فِي دِينِكَ وَ الْفَهْمَ فِي كِتَابِكَ

translation.en: knowledge in Your religion, understanding Your book,

segments.arabic: وَ الْقُنُوعَ بِرِزْقِكَ وَ الْوَرَعَ عَنْ مَحَارِمِكَ

translation.en: feeling the satisfaction in Your livelihood, God-fearing of which You have deemed forbidden,

segments.arabic: وَ الِاسْتِحْلَالَ لِحَلَالِكَ وَ التَّحْرِيمَ لِحَرَامِكَ

translation.en: deeming permissible for Your unforbidden, Forebodement of what You have deemed forbidden,

segments.arabic: وَ الِانْتِهَاءَ عَنْ مَعَاصِيكَ وَ الْحِفْظَ لِوَصِيَّتِكَ

translation.en: preventing sinful deeds, living up to Your will,

segments.arabic: وَ الصِّدْقَ بِوَعْدِكَ وَ الْوَفَاءَ بِعَهْدِكَ

translation.en: credence to Your promise, fulfillment of Your oath,

segments.arabic: وَ الِاعْتِصَامَ بِحَبْلِكَ وَ الْوُقُوفَ عِنْدَ مَوْعِظَتِكَ

translation.en: holding fast to Your bond, sticking at Your admonition,
restrain from Your prohibitions,
patience upon Your worshipping
and working on all Your commands.
O Most Merciful of the merciful!
translation.fa: اى مهربانترین مهربانان

segments.arabic: وَ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَى سَيِّدِنَا مُحَمَّدٍ خَاتَمِ النَّبِيِّينَ

translation.en: And send Your blessings upon Muhammed; the seal of prophets
and his leading Household

segments.arabic: وَ السَّلَامُ عَلَيْهِمْ وَ رَحْمَةُ اللهِ وَ بَرَكَاتُهُ
segments.transliteration: and peace be upon them with God's mercy and blessings.

translation.en: Full Pdf LBLPdf 3 colPpt explantion1 Pg JpgImam Hassan(as) /Hussain(as) ziarat pdfPpsxOther days of weekMp3 All Weekdays

text.en: Tuesday Rites.
4th Imam dua
Sy Fatima(sa)dua
Imam Ali(as)dua
Ziyarats
Tasbih
Salats
Night
Tuesday Dua of Imam Zainul Abideen (peace be upon him)

translation.en: In the Name of Allah, the All-beneficent, the All-merciful.
All praise be to Allah;
and praise is His right, since He deserves it,
abundant praise!

segments.arabic: وَ أَعُوذُ بِهِ مِنْ شَرِّ نَفْسِي:
segments.transliteration: wa aʿudhu bihi min sharri nafsi

translation.en: I seek refuge in Him from the evil of my soul,
"For surely, the soul commands to evil
except as my Lord has mercy."

segments.arabic: وَ أَعُوذُ بِهِ مِنْ شَرِّ ٱلشَّيْطَانِ
segments.transliteration: wa aʿudhu bihi min sharri ashshaytani

translation.en: I seek refuge in Him from the evil of Satan
who adds sins to my sin.

segments.arabic: وَ أَحْتَرِزُ بِهِ مِنْ كُلِّ جَبَّارٍ فَاجِرٍ
segments.transliteration: wa ahtarizu bihi min kulli jabbarin fajirin

translation.en: I seek protection with Him from every wicked tyrant,
unjust sovereign,
and conquering enemy.
O Allah, place me among Your troops,
for Your troops—they are the victors,
and place me in Your party,
for Your party—they are the ones who prosper,
and place me among Your friends,

segments.arabic: فَإِنَّ أَوْلِيَائَكَ لاَ خَوْفٌ عَلَيْهِمْ وَلاَ هُمْ يَحْزَنُونَ
segments.transliteration: fa-inna awliya'aka la khawfun ʿalayhim wala hum yahzanuna

translation.en: for Your friends—no fear shall be upon them, nor shall they experience sorrow.
O Allah, set right for me my religion,
for it is the preserving tie of my affair;
set right for me my hereafter,
for it is the abode of my permanent lodging

segments.transliteration: wa ilayha min mujawarati alli'ami mafarri

translation.en: and to it I flee from the neighborhood of the vile!

segments.arabic: وَٱجْعَلِ ٱلْحَيَاةَ زِيَادَةً لِي فِي كُلِّ خَيْرٍ
segments.transliteration: wajʿal alhayata ziyadatan li fi kulli khayrin

translation.en: Make life an increase for me in every good

segments.arabic: وَٱلْوَفَاةَ رَاحَةً لِي مِنْ كُلِّ شَرٍّ
segments.transliteration: walwafata rahatan li min kulli sharrin

translation.en: and death an ease for me from every evil!
O Allah, send blessings to Muhammad,
translation.fa: خدایا درود فرست بر محمّد

translation.en: the Seal of the Prophets
and the completion of the number of the envoys,
and upon his Household, the good, the pure,
and upon his Companions, the distinguished,

segments.transliteration: wa hab li fi alththulatha'i thalathan

translation.en: and give me on Tuesday three things:

segments.arabic: لاَ تَدَعْ لِي ذَنْباً إِلاَّ غَفَرْتَهُ
segments.transliteration: la tadaʿ li dhanban illa ghafartahu

translation.en: Leave no sin for me unless You forgive it,
no grief unless You take it away,
and no enemy unless You repel him!
In the name of "In the name of Allah," the best of the Names,
In the name of Allah, the Lord of the earth and the heaven,
I seek to repulse every hateful thing, the first of which is His anger,

segments.arabic: وَ أَسْتَجْلِبُ كُلَّ مَحْبُوبٍ أَوَّلُهُ رِضَاهُ
segments.transliteration: wa astajlibu kulla mahbubin awwaluhu ridahu

translation.en: and I seek to attract every lovable thing, the first of which is His good pleasure!
So, seal me with forgiveness from You,
O Patron of beneficence!

segments.transliteration: allaahummaj a’l ghaflatan naase lanaa zikran

translation.en: O God, make the negligence of people as means of remembrance for us
and make their remembrance the rank of thankfulness for us.

segments.arabic: وَ اجْعَلْ صَالِحَ مَا نَقُوْلُ بِاَلْسِنَتِنَا نِيَّةً فِيْ قُلُوْبِنَا،
segments.transliteration: waj a’l saaleha maa naqoolo be-alsenatenaa niyyatan fee qoloobenaa,

translation.en: Whatever good things we utter, make them rooted in the heart

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ اِنَّ مَغْفِرَتَكَ اَوْسَعُ مِنْ ذُنُوْبِنَا،
segments.transliteration: allaahumma inna maghferataka awsa-o’ min zonoobenaa

translation.en: O God, your forgiveness is wider than our sins

segments.arabic: وَ رَحْمَتَكَ اَرْجٰى عِنْدَنَا مِنْ اَعْمَالِنَا،
segments.transliteration: wa rahmataka arjaa i’ndanaa min a-a’maalenaa,

translation.en: and your mercy is more reliable than our deeds.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلٰى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ اٰلِ مُحَمَّدٍ،
segments.transliteration: allaahumma salle a’laa mohammadin wa aale mohammadin

translation.en: O Allah, bless Muhammad and the progeny of Muhammad

segments.arabic: وَ وَفِّقْنَا لِصَالِحِ الْاَعْمَالِ وَ الصَّوَابِ مِنَ الْفِعَالِ.
segments.transliteration: wa waffiqnaa le-saalehil a-a’maale was sawaabe menal fe-a’ale.

translation.en: and grant us the good sense of righteous deeds and correct acts.
In the name of Allah the Beneficent the Merciful.

segments.arabic: اَلْحَمْدُ لِلّٰهِ الَّذِيْ مَنَّ عَلَيَّ بِاِسْتِحْکَامِ الْمَعْرِفَۃِ وَالْاِخْلاَصِ بِالتَّوْحِيْدِ

translation.en: Praise is for Allah Who granted His recognition and made me firm in sincerity by the belief in His Oneness.

segments.arabic: لَهٗ وَلَمْ يَجْعَلْنِيْ مِنْ اَهْلِ الْغَوَايَۃِ وَالْغَبَاوَۃِ وَ الشِّرْکِ وَلاَ مَنِ اسْتَحْوَذَ الشَّيْطَانُ عَلَيْهِ فَاَغْوَاهُ فَاَضَلَّهٗ وَاتَّخَذَ اِلٰهَهُ هَوٰهُ

translation.en: Do not include me among the strayed ones, nor ignorant ones, nor the polytheists, nor among those whom the Satan has overpowered and deviated and has made him far away from his destination, and the one who made his desires, his lord.

segments.arabic: وَ سُبْحَانَ اﷲِ الَّذِيْ يُجِيْبُ الْمُضْطَرَّ وَ يَکْشِفُ الضُرَّ وَ يَعْلَمُ السِّرَّ وَ يَمْلِکُ الْخَيْرَ وَالشَّرَّ وَلَآ اِلٰهَ اِلاَّاﷲُ

translation.en: And pure is Allah who hears the cries of the restless and whom the harm has afflicted and He knows the secrets, the lord of the good and evil and there is no Lord except Allah

segments.arabic: الَّذِيْ يَحْلُمُ عَنْ عَبْدِهٖ اِذَا عَصَاهُ وَ يَتَلَقَّاهُ بِالْاِسْعَافِ وَالتَّلْبِيَۃِ اِذَا دَعَاهُ وَاﷲُ اَکْبَرُ الْبَسِيْطُ مُلُکُهٗ الْمَعْدُوْمُ شِرْکُهُ الْمَجِيْدُ عَرْشُهُ الشَّدِيْدُ بَطْشُهٗ

translation.en: that when His creature sins, He overlooks it, and sympathetically hastens towards the one who calls Him and Allah is Great and Exalted. His kingdom is vast, His present is not seen (visible), His throne is worth praise, and His Wrath severe.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ اِنِّيْ اَسْئَلُکَ سُؤَالَ مَنْ لَمْ يَجِدْ لِسُؤَالِهٖ مَسْئُوْلاً سِوَاکَ وَ اَعْتَمِدُ عَلَيْکَ اِعْتِمَادَ مِنْ لاَ يَجِدِ لِاِعْتِمَادِهٖ مُعْتَمِدًا غَيْرَکَ لِاَنَّکَ الْاَوَّلُ الَّذِيْ ابْتَدَأْتِ الْاِبْتِدَآءَ فَکَوَّنْتَهٗ بِاَيْدِيْ تَلَطُّفِکَ فَاسْتَکَانَ عَلٰي مَشِيَّتِکَ مُنْشَئًا کَمَا اَرَدْتَ بِاِحْکَامِ التَّقْدِيْر

translation.en: O My Lord! I invoke You as the one, who has not found anyone better than You, to grant his desires and have confidence in You as the one who has not found anyone better than Youto confide in, because You are the One who has initiated the beginning, and have brought it in existence and it came into being by Your command in the destined limit.<

segments.arabic: ِوَ اَنْتَ اَعَزَّ وَ اَجَلُّ اَنْ تُحِيْطَ الْعُقُولُ بِمَبْلَغِ وَصْفِکَ

translation.en: And You are far Great and Majestic that by looking at Your signs, the intellect can comprehend You.

segments.arabic: اَنْتَ الْعَالِمُ الَّذِيْ لاَ يَعْزُبَ عَنْکَ مِثْقَالُ ذَرَّۃٍ فِي الْاَرْضِ وَالسَّمَآءِ وَالْجَوَادُ الَّذِيْ لاَ يُبْخِلُکَ اِلْحَاحُ الْمُلِحِّيْنَ فَاِنَّمَا اَمْرُکَ لِلشَّيْئِ اِذَا اَرَدْتَهُ اَنْ تَقُوْلَ لَهٗ کُنْ فَيَکُوْنَ

translation.en: And You are so much aware that nothing from the Heavens and the earth is hidden from You, only You are Generous who does not stop the bestowals due to continuous plea of the seekers. Your order for the creatures is that You wish and it materializes.

segments.arabic: اَمْرُکَ مَاضٍ وَوَعْدُکَ حَتْمٌ وَ حُکْمُکَ عَدْلٌ لاَ يَعْزُبُ عَنْکَ شَيْئٌ وَ اِلَيْکَ مَرَدُّ کُلِّ شَيْءٍ اِحْتَجَبْتَ بِاٰلَآئِکَ

translation.en: Your order is enforced, Your promise is certain, Your decision is Just, nothing is hidden from You, everything will return to You. You are concealed in the veils of Your bounties,

segments.arabic: فَلاَ تُرٰي وَ شَهِدْتَ کُلَّ نَجْوٰي وَ تَعَالَيْتَ عَلَي الْعُلٰي وَ تَفَرَّدْتَ بِالْکِبْرِيَآءِ وَ تَعَزَّزْتَ بِالْقُدْرَۃِ وَالْبَقَآءِ فَلَکَ الْحَمْدُ فِي الْاٰخِرَۃِ وَالْاُوْلٰي وَلَکَ الشُّکْرُ فِي الْبَدْوِ وَ الْعُقْبٰي

translation.en: that You are not seen, but is present in solitude, You are the greatest of all, Unique in Magnificence and overpowering due to life and power. Your praise, in this World as wellas in the Hereafter. And Your thanks in the beginning and the end.<

segments.arabic: اَنْتَ اِلٰهِيْ حَلِيْمٌ قَادِرٌ رَئُوْفٌ غَافِرٌ وَ مَلِکٌ قَاهِرٌ وَ رَازِقٌ بَدِيْعٌ مُجِيْبٌ سَمِيْعٌ بِيَدِکَ نَوَاصِيَ الْعِبَادِ وَ قَوَاصِيَ الْبِلاَدِ

translation.en: O my Lord! You are forbearing and Powerful, Merciful and forgiving, a true master, the subduer, the sustainer, a matchless creator, the acceptor of supplications and the one who hears it, the destiny of the far off scattered people is in Your power and strength.

segments.arabic: حَيٌّ قَيُّوْمٌ جَوَادٌ مَاجِدٌ کَرِيْمٌ رَحِيْمٌ اَنْتَ اِلٰهِيْ الْمَالِکُ الَّذِيْ مَلَکْتَ الْمُلُوْکَ فَتَوَاضَعَ لِهَيْبَتِکَ الْاَعِزَّآءُ وَدَانَ لَکَ بِالطَّاعَۃِ الْاَوْلِيَآءُ فَاحْتَوَيْتَ بِاِلٰهِيَّتِکَ عَلَي الْمَجْدِ وَالثَّنَآءِ

translation.en:
The Ever living, the Self Existing, the Munificent, the Glorious, the kind, the Merciful, O my Lord You are such a creator that You are king of all the kings. The head is bowed down in front of the Great fear.

 Our Holy people are punctual in Your obedience, and due to Your Holiness, You are possessor of greatness and Praise.

segments.arabic: وَلاَ يَؤُوْدُکَ حِفْظُ خَلْقِکَ وَلاَ تُهْلِکُ عَطَايَاکَ بِمَنْ مَنَحْتَهٗ سَعَۃَ رِزْقِکَ وَ اَنْتَ عَلاَّمُ الْغُيُوْبِ سَتَرْتَ عَلَيَّ عُيُوْبِيْ وَ اَحْصِيْتَ عَلَيَّ ذُنُوْبِيْ وَ اَکْرَمَتَنِيْ بِمَعْرِفَۃِ دِيْنِکَ

translation.en: The custody of Your Creatures is not expensive for You and the bestowal of the bounties on Your creatures does not decrease it. You are knower of the Unseen, You have covered my defects and You are aware of the amount of my sins & You have blessed me with the love of Your religion.

segments.arabic: وَلَمْ تَهْتِکُ عَنِّيْ سِتْرَکَ يَاحَنَّانُ وَلَمْ تَفْضَحْنِيْ يَا مَنَّانُ

translation.en: O the merciful do not remove the cover from me (my sins) and O the bestower of favours, do not degrade me.

segments.arabic: اَسْئَلُکَ اَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلٰي مُحَمَّدٍ وَ اٰلِ مُحَمَّدٍ وَّ اَنْ تُوَسِّعَ عَلَيَّ مِنْ فَضْلِکَ الْوَاسِعِ رِزْقًا وَاسِعًا حَلٰلاً طَيِّبًا وَ اَنْ تَغْفِرَ ذُنُوْبًا حَالَتْ بَيْنِيْ وَ بَيْنَکَ بِاِقْتِرَافِيْ لَهَا فَاَنْتَ اَهْلٌ اَنْ تَجُوْدَ عَلَيَّ بِسَعَۃِ رَحْمَتِکَ وَ تُنْقِذَنِيْ مِنْ اَلِيْمِ عَقُوْبَتِکَ وَ تُدْرِجَنِيْ دَرَجَ الْمُکْرَمِيْنَ

translation.en: I pray to You to bestow blessings upon Mohammad and his progeny and by Your Grace increase my sustenance the pure and Holy, Forgive my sins which prove as a barrier between You and me, as You are only capable to be Merciful towards me by Your Mercy and save me from Your severe chastisement, and place me among Your Honorable creatures.

segments.arabic: وَ تُلْحِقْنِيْ مَوْلاَيَ بِالصَّالِحِيْنَ الَّذِيْنَ تَتَوَفّٰهُمُ الْمَلَآئِکَۃُ طَيِّبِيْنَ يَقُوْلُوْنَ سَلاَمٌ عَلَيْکُمْ اُدْخُلُوْا الْجَنَّۃَ بِمَا کُنْتُمْ تَعْمَلُوْنَ بِصَفْحِکَ وَ تَغَمُّدِکَ

translation.en: O my Lord put me among those pious souls whom the angles carry in the state of purity, and say "Peace be on You" go and enter Heaven in exchange of Your good deeds.

segments.arabic: يَا رَئُوْفُ يَا رَحِيْمُ وَ اَسْئَلُکَ الصَّلٰوۃَ عَلٰي مُحَمَّدٍ وَ اٰلِ مُحَمَّدٍ

translation.en: O the clement O the Rich for the sake of Your Beneficence and Mercy I beseech You to send blessings on Mohammad and his progeny

segments.arabic: وَ اَنْ تَحْتَمِلَ عَنِّيْ وَاجِبَ الْاٰبَآءِ وَالْاُمَّهَاتِ وَ اَدِّ حُقُوْقَهُمْ عَنِّيْ وَ اَلْحِقْنِيْ مَعَهُمْ بِالْاَبْرَارِ وَالْاِخْوَانِ وَ الْاَخْوَاتِ وَالْمُؤْمِنِيْنَ وَالْمُؤْمِنٰتِ وَاغْفِرْ لِيْ وَلَهُمْ جَمِيْعًا

translation.en: and make me handle the rights of my mother and father and fulfill their obligations on my behalf and divide me with them and my brothers and sisters and put me and the believing male and females among the doers of good. Forgive me and all those with me,

segments.arabic: اِنَّکَ حَمِيْدٌ مَّجِيْدٌ وَ صَلَّي اﷲُ عَلٰي مُحَمَّدٍ النَّبِيِّ وَ اٰلِهٖ اَجْمَعِيْنَ
segments.transliteration: indeed,You are worth the praise and deserve the greatness. Bestow Your Mercy on our prophet and on the people of the House.

translation.en: Ziyarats of Imam Zain ul Abideen (as) , Imam Mohammed Baqer (as) and Imam Jafar Sadiq (as)

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكُمْ يَا خُزَّانَ عِلْمِ ٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿalaykum ya khuzzana ʿilmi allahi

translation.en: Peace be on you, O depositories of Allah's knowledge!

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكُمْ يَا تَرَاجِمَةَ وَحْيِ ٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿalaykum ya tarajimata wahyi allahi

translation.en: Peace be on you, O interpreters of Allah's Revelation!
Peace be on you, O leaders to true guidance!
Peace be on you, O signs of piety!

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكُمْ يَا أَوْلاَدَ رَسُولِ ٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿalaykum ya awlada rasuli allahi

translation.en: Peace be on you, O descendants of Allah's Messenger!
I recognize your rights,
I discernibly acknowledge your true standing,
I incur the hostility of your enemies,
and I show loyalty to your loyalists.
May Allah accept me, my father, and mother as ransoms for you!
Blessings of Allah be upon you.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَتَوَالَىٰ آخِرَهُمْ كَمَا تَوَالَيْتُ أَوَّلَهُمْ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni atawala akhirahum kama tawalaytu awwalahum

translation.en: O Allah, I am willingly showing loyalty to the last of them just as I have shown loyalty to the first of them,

segments.transliteration: wa abra'u min kulli walijatin dunahum

translation.en: I release myself from any confidant other than them,

segments.transliteration: wa akfuru biljibti walttaghuti wallati walʿuzza

translation.en: and I reject all idols, false deities, al-Lat, and al-`Uzza.
Blessings of Allah be upon you, O my Masters!
Mercy of Allah and His benedictions be upon you, too.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا سَيِّدَ ٱلْعَابِدِينَ وَسُلاَلَةَ ٱلْوَصِيِّينَ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿalayka ya sayyida alʿabidina wa sulalata alwasiyyina

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O master of the worshippers and descendant of the Prophets' successors.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بَاقِرَ عِلْمِ ٱلنَّبِيِّينَ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿalayka ya baqira ʿilmi alnnabiyyina

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O he who split open the knowledge of the Prophets.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا صَادِقاً مُصَدِّقاً فِي ٱلْقَوْلِ وَٱلْفِعْلِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿalayka ya sadiqan musaddaqan fi alqawli walfiʿli

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O veracious and honest in all [your] words and deeds.
O my Masters! Today is your day,
which is Tuesday,
and on this day, I am your guest
and I am in your vicinity;
so, receive me as your guest and treat me as your neighbor,
[I ask you] by Allah's standing with you
and with your Household, the pure and immaculate.
In the name of Allah, the Beneficent and Merciful
translation.fa: به نام خداى بخشاینده مهربان

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ مَنْ هُوَ فِي عُلُوِّهِ دَانٍ

translation.en: Glory be to Him Who is nigh in His sublimity,

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ مَنْ هُوَ فِي دُنُوِّهِ عَالٍ

translation.en: Glory be to Him Who is Sublime in His nearness,

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ مَنْ هُوَ فِي إِشْرَاقِهِ مُنِيرٌ

translation.en: Glory be to Him who is Brilliant in His glow.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ مَنْ هُوَ فِي سُلْطَانِهِ قَوِيٌّ

translation.en: Glory be to Him who is Powerful in His (absolute) authority!
Glory be to, The forbearing and Graceful.
Glory be to, The All-Sufficient and Praised.
Glory be to, The highest and Immense.
Glory be to Him who removes the Grief.

segments.arabic: وَ هُوَ الدَّائِمُ الصَّمَدُ الْفَرْدُ الْقَدِيمُ

translation.en: And He is; The everlasting, eternal, Sempiternal and Unique.
Glory be to him who exalted in the air.
Glory be to, The eminent and Ever-living!
Glory be to the Living, the Self-Subsistent.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ الدَّائِمِ الْبَاقِي الَّذِي لَا يَزُولُ

translation.en: Glory be to the Remaining, the Perpetual; Who isn't endless!
Glory be to Him who nothing decreases His treasure!

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ مَنْ لَا يَنْفَدُ مَا عِنْدَهُ

translation.en: Glory be to Him Whose possessions never run out.
Glory be to Him Whose signs never perish.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ مَنْ لَا يُشَاوِرُ فِي أَمْرِهِ أَحَداً

translation.en: Glory be to Him Who never betakes to Himself a partner in His affairs.
Glory be to Him except Whom there is no god.
Glory be to the Highest, the Incomparably Great.
Glory be to Allah, and in praise of Him.
Glory be to the Possessor of Grandeur, High Respect.
Glory be to Allah, The Possessor of eternal, superior Manifest.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ مَنْ هُوَ فِي عُلُوِّهِ دَانٍَ

translation.en: Glory be to Allah, Who is; nigh in His sublimity,

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ مَنْ هُوَ] وَ فِي دُنُوِّهِ عَالٍ]

translation.en: Sublime in His nearness,

segments.arabic: وَ فِي إِشْرَاقِهِ مُنِيرٌ وَ فِي سُلْطَانِهِ قَوِيٌّ

translation.en: Brilliant in His glow, and Powerful in His (absolute) authority!
And is Everlasting in His Kingdom!

segments.arabic: وَ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَى رَسُولِهِ سَيِّدِنَا مُحَمَّدٍ نَبِيِّهِ وَ أَهْلِ بَيْتِهِ الطَّاهِرِينَ

translation.en: Allah's blessings be upon His Messenger, our Master Muhammed, and his immaculate household.
In the Name of Allah, the Merciful, the Compassionate.
translation.fa: به نام خداى بخشاینده مهربان

segments.arabic: أُعِيذُ نَفْسِي بِاللهِ الْأَكْبَرِ رَبِّ السَّمَاوَاتِ الْقَائِمَاتِ بِلَا عَمْدٍ

translation.en: I seek protection for myself in Allah, the Great, the Lord of the upright heavens,

segments.arabic: وَ بِالَّذِي خَلَقَهَا فِي يَوْمَيْنِ وَ قَضَى فِي كُلِّ سَماءٍ أَمْرَها وَ خَلَقَ الْأَرْضَ فِي يَوْمَيْنِ وَ قَدَّرَ فِيها أَقْواتَها

translation.en: and He Who created them in two days and determined affairs throughout all of them; heavens created the earth and determined in it its sustenance.

segments.arabic: وَ جَعَلَ فِيهَا جِبِالًا أَوْتَاداً وَ جَعَلَهَا فِجاجاً سُبُلًا

translation.en: Made in its mountains and set in ravines to serve as ways.
Produced the heavy clouds, making it subservient,

segments.arabic: وَ أَجْرَى الْفُلْكَ وَ سَخَّرَ الْبَحْرَ

translation.en: made the ships sail, made subservient the sea,

segments.arabic: وَ جَعَلَ فِي الْأَرْضِ رَواسِيَ وَ أَنْهاراً

translation.en: and made in the earth mountains and rivers;

segments.arabic: مِنْ شَرِّ مَا يَكُونُ فِي اللَّيْلِ وَ النَّهَارِ

translation.en: from the evil of what is in the night and the day

segments.arabic: وَ تَعْقِدُ عَلَيْهِ الْقُلُوبُ وَ تَرَاهُ الْعُيُونُ مِنَ الْجِنِّ وَ الْإِنْسِ

translation.en: and entangles the hearts, which the eyes of jinn and humankind see.

segments.arabic: كَفَانَا اللهُ كَفَانَا اللهُ كَفَانَا اللهُ
segments.transliteration: Allah protects us, Allah protects us, Allah protects us,

translation.en: there is no god save Allah,

segments.arabic: مُحَمَّدٌ رَسُولُ اللهِ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ الطَّاهِرِينَ وَ سَلَّمَ تَسْلِيماً كَثِيرا

translation.en: Muhammad is the Messenger of Allah, blessings of Allah be on him and his family.

segments.arabic: آمَنَ الرَّسُولُ بِمَا أُنزِلَ إِلَيْهِ مِن رَّبِّهِ وَالْمُؤْمِنُونَ ۚ كُلٌّ آمَنَ بِاللَّهِ وَمَلَائِكَتِهِ وَكُتُبِهِ وَرُسُلِهِ لَا نُفَرِّقُ بَيْنَ أَحَدٍ مِّن رُّسُلِهِ ۚ وَقَالُوا سَمِعْنَا وَأَطَعْنَا ۖ غُفْرَانَكَ رَبَّنَا وَإِلَيْكَ الْمَصِيرُ ﴿٢٨٥﴾ لَا يُكَلِّفُ اللَّهُ نَفْسًا إِلَّا وُسْعَهَا ۚ لَهَا مَا كَسَبَتْ وَعَلَيْهَا مَا اكْتَسَبَتْ ۗ رَبَّنَا لَا تُؤَاخِذْنَا إِن نَّسِينَا أَوْ أَخْطَأْنَا ۚ رَبَّنَا وَلَا تَحْمِلْ عَلَيْنَا إِصْرًا كَمَا حَمَلْتَهُ عَلَى الَّذِينَ مِن قَبْلِنَا ۚ رَبَّنَا وَلَا تُحَمِّلْنَا مَا لَا طَاقَةَ لَنَا بِهِ ۖ وَاعْفُ عَنَّا وَاغْفِرْ لَنَا وَارْحَمْنَا ۚ أَنتَ مَوْلَانَا فَانصُرْنَا عَلَى الْقَوْمِ الْكَافِرِينَ ﴿٢٨٦﴾

translation.en: In the name of Allah, the Beneficent, the Merciful.
translation.fa: به نام خداى بخشاینده مهربان

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ اللَّهُمَّ رَبَّنَا وَ لَكَ الْحَمْدُ

translation.en: Glory be to You our God; to You belongs the praise.
You are Allah, the Independent, the Everlasting, and the King.

segments.arabic: أَشْهَدُ أَنَّكَ إِلَهٌ لَا تَخْتَرِمُ الْأَيَّامُ مُلْكَكَ

translation.en: I bear witness that You are the God Whose kingdom cannot be destroyed,
and sins can not change Your superiority!

segments.arabic: لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ وَحْدَكَ لَا شَرِيكَ لَكَ وَ لَا رَبَّ سِوَاكَ

translation.en: There is no god save You, You alone, with no associate, no other God than You.
And there is no creator but You

segments.arabic: أَنْتَ خالِقُ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ وَ كُلُّ شَيْءٍ خَلْقُكَ

translation.en: And the Creator of all things and everything is Your creation!

segments.arabic: وَ أَنْتَ رَبُّ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ وَ كُلُّ شَيْءٍ عَبْدُكَ

translation.en: You are Lord of all things, and everything is Your Worshippers!

segments.arabic: وَ أَنْتَ إِلَهُ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ وَ كُلُّ شَيْءٍ يَعْبُدُكَ

translation.en: You are the God of everything and everything; worships You,

segments.arabic: وَ يُسَبِّحُ بِحَمْدِكَ وَ يَسْجُدُ لَكَ

translation.en: celebrates Your praise, and prostrate to You;
therefore, praise and glory be to You
and blessed be Your all Most Excellent Names!

segments.arabic: إِلَهاً مَعْبُوداً فِي جَلَالِ عَظَمَتِكَ وَ كِبْرِيَائِكَ

translation.en: A worshiped God in You majestic greatness and grandeur;

segments.arabic: وَ تَعَالَيْتَ مَلِكاً جَبَّاراً فِي وَقَارِ عِزَّةِ مُلْكِكَ

translation.en: exalted mighty king in Your self-glory solemnity Kingdom.

segments.arabic: وَ تَقَدَّسْتَ رَبّاً مَعْبُوداً [مَنْعُوتاً] فِي تَأْبِيدِ

translation.en: And hallowed worshipped God; in Your eternal mighty authority.

segments.arabic: مَنَعَةِ سُلْطَانِكَ وَ ارْتَفَعْتَ إِلَهاً قَاهِراً فَوْقَ مَلَكُوتِ عَرْشِكَ

translation.en: Exalted conquering God You are, upon Your kingdom throne,
You surpassed everything with Your highness,
and Your vision goes through everything.
Your awareness is delicate to everything;
Your knowledge surrounds everything,
Your protection is capable for everything,
and everything is safeguarded in Your Book.
Your light has fulfilled everywhere;
Your authority has conquered everything.

segments.arabic: وَ عَدَلَ فِي كُلِّ شَيْءٍ حُكْمُكَ

translation.en: Your judgment is fair in everything;

segments.arabic: وَ خَافَ كُلُّ شَيْءٍ مِنْ سَخَطِكَ

translation.en: everything fears Your wrath,

segments.arabic: وَ دَخَلَتْ فِي كُلِّ شَيْءٍ مَهَابَتُكَ

translation.en: and Your veneration has stepped in everything.
O, My Lord, through Your fear, severity,

segments.arabic: وَ تَأْيِيدِكَ قَامَتِ السَّمَاوَاتُ وَ الْأَرْضُ
segments.transliteration: and approval has the heavens, earth,

segments.arabic: وَ مَا فِيهِنَ مِنْ شَيْءٍ طَاعَةً لَكَ

translation.en: and what are in them stood up to You with obedience,

segments.arabic: وَ خَوْفاً مِنْ مَقَامِكَ وَ خَشْيَتِكَ

translation.en: frightening Your Place, and fearing You.
So determined is everything in Your decision;

segments.arabic: وَ انْتَهَى كُلُّ شَيْءٍ إِلَى أَمْرِكَ

translation.en: everything ended out to Your command.

segments.arabic: وَ مِنْ شِدَّةِ جَبَرُوتِكَ وَ عِزَّتِكَ

translation.en: Through The intensity of Your might and honor,
everything yields to Your authority,
and all things are dwarfed in the presence of Your sovereignty.

segments.arabic: وَ مِنْ غِنَاكَ وَ سَعَتِكَ افْتَقَرَ كُلُّ شَيْءٍ إِلَيْكَ

translation.en: Through Your generosity and broad benevolence, everything requires You
because everything is living upon Your sustenance

segments.arabic: وَ مِنْ عُلُوِّ مَكَانِكَ وَ قُدْرَتِكَ عَلَوْتَ كُلَّ شَيْءٍ مِنْ خَلْقِكَ وَ كُلُّ شَيْءٍ

translation.en: Your ability makes You above everything of Your creation from Your highest place.
Your judgment decides on everything below You,
and by Your will, their destinies run among them;

segments.arabic: بِمَشِيَّتِكَ مَا قَدَّمْتَ مِنْهَا لَمْ يَسْبِقْكَ

translation.en: what You offered of it didn't pass You,

segments.arabic: وَ مَا أَخَّرْتَ مِنْهَا لَمْ يُعْجِزْكَ

translation.en: what You delayed of it didn't make You powerless,

segments.arabic: وَ مَا أَمْضَيْتَ مِنْهَا أَمْضَيْتَهُ بِحُكْمِكَ وَ عِلْمِكَ

translation.en: and what You accomplished of it is being accomplished by Your judgment and knowledge.
Glory and praise be to You;
blessed You are our Lord, and sublime is Your Praise!

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ

translation.en: O Allah, bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,
translation.fa: خدایا درود فرست بر محمد و آل محمد

translation.en: Your; Servant, Messenger, and Prophet

segments.arabic: وَ آثِرْهُ بِصَفْوِ كَرَامَتِكَ عَلَى جَمِيعِ خَلْقِكَ

translation.en: prefer him with the elite charismata upon all Your creations
and grant him with the best merits from You.

segments.arabic: وَ بَلِّغْ بِهِ [بَلِّغْهُ] أَفْضَلَ مَحَلِّ الْمُكَرَّمِينَ

translation.en: Get him to achieve; the best place of the honored ones,

segments.arabic: وَ أَشْرَفَ رَحْمَتِكَ فِي شَرَفِ الْمُقَرَّبِينَ

translation.en: the noblest mercy among the closest companions nobility,
and the highest degree among the superiors.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ بَلِّغْ بِهِ الْوَسِيلَةَ مِنَ الْجَنَّةِ فِي الرِّفْعَةِ مِنْكَ وَ الْفَضِيلَةِ

translation.en: O, Allah, get him to raise his status to reach Paradise in exaltation from You and excellence.
And carry on his phase with the best honor
until the blesses are fulfilled upon him,
his remembrance upon the created beings extended,

segments.arabic: وَ اجْعَلْنَا مِنْ رُفَقَائِهِ عَلى سُرُرٍ مُتَقابِلِينَ مَعَ أَبِينَا إِبْرَاهِيمَ

translation.en: and make us from his company; face to face on couches with our father, Ibrahim.
May it be so; O, Allah of Truth and Lord of the worlds.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ بِاسْمِكَ الَّذِي أَنْزَلْتَهُ عَلَى مُوسَى فِي الْأَلْوَاحِ

translation.en: O Allah, I, verily, beseech You by Your Name that has been revealed upon Musa on the tablets.
I beseech You, by Your name that got placed
on the; skies thereupon are settled on,

segments.arabic: وَ عَلَى الْأَرْضِ فَاسْتَقَرَّتْ وَ عَلَى الْجِبَالِ فَأَرْسَتْ
وَ بِحَقِّ مُحَمَّدٍ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ نَبِيِّكَ

translation.en: And for the sake of Muhammad, Allah's blessing upon him and his Household; Your Prophet,

segments.arabic: وَ إِبْرَاهِيمَ خَلِيلِكَ وَ مُوسَى نَجِيِّكَ

translation.en: Ibraham; Your intimate friend, Musa; Your survivor
and Issa; Your word and spirit.

segments.arabic: وَ أَسْأَلُكَ بِتَوْرَاةِ مُوسَى وَ إِنْجِيلِ عِيسَى

translation.en: And I beseech You by the; Torah of Musa, Gospel of Issa,

segments.arabic: وَ زَبُورِ دَاوُدَ وَ قُرْآنِ مُحَمَّدٍ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ وَ عَلَيْهِمُ السَّلَامُ وَ عَلَى جَمِيعِ أَنْبِيَائِكَ

translation.en: Psalms of Dawood, and Muhammed's blessings of Allah upon him and his Household Quraan, peace be upon them and all the Prophets.

segments.arabic: وَ بِكُلِّ وَحْيٍ أَوْحَيْتَهُ وَ قَضَاءٍ قَضَيْتَهُ

translation.en: And by every; revelation You did, fulfillment You completed
and a book You has sent down;

segments.arabic: يَا إِلَهَ الْحَقِّ الْمُبِينِ وَ النُّورِ الْمُنِيرِ

translation.en: O, God of the Truth that makes all things manifest and The luminous light;

segments.arabic: وَ تُحْسِنَ لِيَ الْعَاقِبَةَ [الْعَافِيَةَ] فِي الْأُمُورِ كُلِّهَا

translation.en: and aid me in the outcome (wellness) in all things.

segments.arabic: فَإِنَّمَا أَنَا عَبْدُكَ وَ ابْنُ عَبْدِكَ

translation.en: I am only Your servant and the son of Your servant;
my forelock is in Your grasp, and I turn living under Your control.

segments.arabic: غَيْرَ مُعْجِزٍ وَ لَا مُمْتَنِعٍ عَجَزْتُ عَنْ نَفْسِي

translation.en: Not miraculous nor refusing; incapable before myself,

segments.transliteration: and people are incapable of me.

segments.arabic: فَلَا عَشِيرَةَ تَكْفِينِي وَ لَا مَالَ يَفْدِينِي

translation.en: Therefore, there is not a tribe that is enough for me,

segments.arabic: وَ لَا عَمَلَ يُنْجِينِي وَ لَا قُوَّةَ لِي فَأَنْتَصِرَ

translation.en: a work that can make me survive; neither power for me to win,

segments.arabic: وَ لَا أَنَا بَرِيءٌ مِنَ الذُّنُوبِ

translation.en: and I am not innocent of the sins.

segments.arabic: فَأَعْتَذِرَ وَ عَظُمَ ذَنْبِي فَلْيَسَعْ عَفْوُكَ لِمَغْفِرَتِي اللَّيْلَةَ بِمَا وَأَيْتَ عَلَى نَفْسِكَ

translation.en: So I apologize; my sin is much greater thereupon I seek Your pardon tonight to forgive me in the name of that You have made incumbent upon Yourself.
And grant me; the power as long as You keep me,
the reform as long as You keep me alive,
the help upon what You placed on me,
the patience in Your trying me,
the thankfulness in what You conferred upon me,
and blessing in what you bestow upon me.
O, Lord, dictate to me the principles of faith on the Day of Death
and, do not make me see my deeds in regret,

segments.arabic: وَ لَا تَفْضَحْنِي بِسَرِيرَتِي يَوْمَ أَلْقَاكَ

translation.en: do not disgrace me through my secret thoughts on the day of Your meeting,

segments.arabic: وَ لَا تُخْزِنِي بِسَيِّئَاتِي وَ بِبَلَائِكَ عِنْدَ قَضَائِكَ

translation.en: do not make me ashamed of my evil deeds and Your afflictions when You are deciding.

segments.arabic: وَ أَصْلِحْ مَا بَيْنِي وَ بَيْنَكَ

translation.en: And do reform conditions in between You and me,
assign my love in Your piety,

segments.arabic: وَ اكْفِنِي هَوْلَ الْمُطَّلَعِ وَ مَا أَهَمَّنِي

translation.en: spare me the time of the narration; what concerned me

segments.arabic: وَ مَا لَمْ يُهِمَّنِي مِمَّا أَنْتَ أَعْلَمُ بِهِ مِنِّي مِنْ أَمْرِ دُنْيَايَ وَ آخِرَتِي

translation.en: nor did not concern me in this world and the next which You knowest more than I,

segments.arabic: وَ أَعِنِّي عَلَى مَا غَلَبَنِي وَ مَا لَمْ يَغْلِبْنِي

translation.en: help me encounter what defeated me and what did not;
because all that is in Your hand, O, Lord!

segments.arabic: فَاكْفِنِي وَ اهْدِنِي وَ أَصْلِحْ بَالِي

translation.en: Therefore, secure me, guide me, reform my condition,
admit me to Paradise, and make it known for me.

segments.arabic: وَ أَلْحِقْنِي بِالَّذِينَ هُمْ خَيْرٌ مِنِّي

translation.en: And make me come upon those who are superior to me

segments.arabic: وَ ارْزُقْنِي مُرَافَقَةَ النَّبِيِّينَ وَ الصِّدِّيقِينَ

translation.en: and, grant me the company of the; prophets, the truthful one,

segments.transliteration: and a goodly company are they.

translation.en: You are indeed God of truth, Lord of the worlds;

segments.arabic: وَ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَى سَيِّدِنَا رَسُولِهِ مُحَمَّدٍ النَّبِيِّ

translation.en: blessings of Allah may be upon our Master Muhammed, the Prophet,

segments.arabic: وَ آلِهِ الطَّيِّبِينَ الطَّاهِرِينَ وَ سَلَّمَ تَسْلِيماً
segments.transliteration: And his good and pure Household, and may He spread thorough blessings over them.
