Night

translation.en: In the Name of Allah, the All-beneficent, the All-merciful.

segments.arabic: اَلْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ ٱلَّذِي جَعَلَ ٱللَّيلَ لِبَاساً
segments.transliteration: alhamdu lillahi alladhi jaʿala allayla libasan

translation.en: All praise be to Allah Who appointed the night to be a garment,
and sleep for a rest,
and day He appointed for a rising!

segments.arabic: لَكَ ٱلْحَمْدُ أَنْ بَعَثْتَنِي مِنْ مَرْقَدِي
segments.transliteration: laka alhamdu an baʿathtani min marqadi

translation.en: To You belongs praise, for You roused me from my sleep,
and had You willed, You would have made it everlasting;
an endless praise that will never be cut off

segments.transliteration: wa la yuhsi lahu alkhala'iqu ʿadadan

translation.en: and whose number the creatures will never count!

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ لَكَ ٱلْحَمْدُ أَنْ خَلَقْتَ فَسَوَّيْتَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma laka alhamdu an khalaqta fasawwayta

translation.en: O Allah, to You belongs praise, for You created, then fashioned,
ordained and decreed,
gave death and bestowed life,
made sick and healed,
made well and afflicted,
established the Throne
and encompassed the Kingdom!
I supplicate You with the supplication of one whose mediation is weak,
whose stratagems have been cut off,
whose term has drawn near,
whose expectation from this world has shrunk,
whose neediness for Your mercy has intensified,
whose remorse for his neglect has become great,
whose slips and stumbles have become many,
and whose repentance is devoted sincerely to Your face.
So, bless Muhammad,
the Seal of the Prophets,

segments.transliteration: wa ʿala ahli baytihi alttayyibina alttahirina

translation.en: and his Household, the good, the pure,
and provide me with the intercession of Muhammad,
Allah bless him and his Household,
and deprive me not of his companionship!
Surely, You are the Most Merciful of all those who show mercy!

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ ٱقْضِ لِي فِي ٱلأَرْبِعَاءِ اَرْبَعاً

translation.en: O Allah, decree for me on Wednesday four things:
Induce me to be strong in obedience to You,
to be active in worshiping You,
to be desirous for Your reward,

segments.arabic: وَزُهْدِي فِيمَا يُوجِبُ لِي أَلِيمَ عِقَابِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa zuhdi fima yujibu li alima ʿiqabika

translation.en: and to abstain from that which would make incumbent upon me Your painful punishment!
You are Gentle to whom You will!

text.en: Dua of Syeda Fatima (peace be upon her) for Wednesday

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ احْرُسْنَا بِعَيْنِكَ الَّتِيْ لَا تَنَامُ،
segments.transliteration: allaahummah rusnaa be-a’ynekal latee laa tanaamo

translation.en: O God, protect us through the eyes that never sleep
and through that support, which no one can reach.
And through your great names,

segments.arabic: وَ صَلِّ عَلٰى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ اٰلِهٖ،
segments.transliteration: wa salle a’laa mohammadin wa aalehi,

translation.en: O God, have mercy on Muhammad and the progeny of Muhammad

segments.arabic: وَ احْفَظْ عَلَيْنَا مَا لَوْ حَفِظَهٗ
segments.transliteration: wah faz a’laynaa maa law hafezahu

translation.en: and keep this faith of ours safe. Which if it had been secured by anyone else, it would have been destroyed

segments.arabic: غَيْرُكَ ضَاعَ وَ اسْتُرْ عَلَيْنَا مَا لَوْ سَتَرَهٗ غَيْرُكَ شَاعَ،
segments.transliteration: ghayroka zaa-a’ was tur a’laynaa maa law satarahu ghayroka shaa-a’,

translation.en: And conceal our defect. If anyone other than You had concealed them, they would have been divulged

segments.arabic: وَ اجْعَلْ كُلَّ ذٰلِكَ لَنَا مِطْوَاعًا اِنَّكَ سَمِيْعُ الدُّعَاءِ،
segments.transliteration: waj a’l kulla zaaleka lanaa mitwaa-a’n innaka samee-u’d do-a’a-e,

translation.en: and make all those things subservient to us, as indeed You are the one, who hears the supplications,
nearest to the servants and one who accepts their plea.
In the name of Allah the Beneficent the Merciful.

segments.arabic: اَلْحَمْدُ لِلّٰهِ الَّذِيْ مَرَضَاتُهٗ فِي الطَّلَبِ اِلَيْهِ وَ اِلْتِمَاسِ مَا لَدَيهِ وَسَخْطُهٗ فِيْ تَرْکِ الْاِلْحَاحِ فِيْ الْمَسْئَلَۃِ عَلَيْهِ وَ سُبْحَانَ اﷲِ شَاهِدُ کُلِّ نَجْوٰي بِعِلْمِهٖ وَ مُبَآئِنِ کُلِّ ذِيْ جِسْمٍ بِنَفْسِهٖ وَلَآ اِلٰهَ اِلاَّ اﷲُ الَّذِيْ لاَ يُدْرَکُ بِالْعُيُوْنِ وَالْاَبْصَارِ وَ لاَ يُجْهَلُ بِالْعُقُوْلِ وَالْاَلْبَابِ وَ يُخْلَقُ مِنَ الضَّمِيْرِ

translation.en:
Praise is for Allah who is pleased with the one who invokes Him and who supplicate to Him and in realizing his stubbornness His wrath is concealed. Pure is Allah who is aware of every whisper due to His knowledge and is different from all the creatures possessing body. 


There is no Lord except Allah. He cannot be seen by imagination or with eyes, and cannot be denied due to intellect and reason. Nor he can be created by the heart.

segments.arabic: وَ يَعْلَمُ خَآئِنَۃَ الْاَعْيَنِ وَمَا تَخْفِي الصُّدُوْرِ وَاﷲُ اَکْبَرُ الْمُتَجَلِّلُ عَنْ صِفَاتِ الْمَخْلُوْقِيْنَ الْمُطِّعُ عَلٰي مَافِيْ قُلُوْبِ الْخَلَآئِقِ اَجْمَعِيْنَ

translation.en: He is aware of the indication of eyes and the secrets of the hearts and Allah is too great and Majestic who is aware of the Qualities of the creation and is aware of the secrets of the entire Universe.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ اِنِّيْ اَسْئَلُکَ سُؤَالَ مَنْ لاَ يَمِلُّ دُعَآءَ رَبِّهٖ وَ اَتَضَرَّعُ اِلَيْکَ تَضَرَّعُ غَرِيْقٍ يَرْجُوْا کَشْفَ کُرْبِهٖ وَ اَبْتَهِلُ اِلَيْکَ اِبْتِهَالِ تَآئِبٍ مِنْ ذُنُوْبِهٖ وَ خَطَايَاهُ

translation.en:
O Allah! I seek from You like the one who does not fear his lord while asking from Him, and I beseech You like the one who is drowned in calamities and desires to come out of it.


 And I call upon You, so restlessly as the one who is repenting on his sins and errors.

segments.arabic: وَ اَنْتَ الرَّئُوْفُ الَّذِيْ مَلَکْتَ الْخَلَآئِقَ کَلُّهُمْ وَفَطَرْتَهُمْ اَجْنَاسًا مُخْتَلِفَاتِ الْاَلْوَانِ وَالْاَقْدَارِ عَلٰي مَشِيَّتِکَ وَ قَدَّرْتَ اٰجَالَهُمْ وَ اَرْزَاقَهُمْ فَلَمْ يَتَعَاظَمَکَ خَلْقُ خَلْقٍ حَتّٰي کَوَّنْتَهٗ کَمَا شِئْتَ مُخْتَلِفًا مِمَّا شِئْتَ فَتَعَالَيْتَ وَ تَجَبَّرْتَ عَنِ اتِّخَاذِ وَزِيْرٍ وَ تَعَزَّزْتَ عَنْ مُوَازَرَۃٍ شَرِيْکٍ وَ تَنَزَّهْتَ عَنِ اتِّخَاذِ الْاَبْنَآءِ وَ تَقَدَّسْتَ عَنْ مَلاَمَسَۃِ النِّسَآءِ۔

translation.en:
And You are the most merciful, lord of the entire creation, creating various creatures by Your Will. You have fixed their life span and their sustenance creating of a creature is not difficult for You and designed them as You desired. 


You are above everything so as to be dependent of anything, or that a partner be ascribed to You.

segments.arabic: فَلَيْسَتِ الْاَبْصَارُ بِمُدْرِکَۃٍ لَکَ وَ لَيْسَتِ الْاَوْهَامُ بِوَاقِعَۃٍ عَلَيْکَ وَ لَيْسَ لَکَ شَرِيْکٌ وَلاَ نِدٌّ وَلاَ عَدِيْلٌ وَلاَ نَظِيْرٌ وَ اَنْتَ الْفَرْدُ الْوَاحِدُ الدَّآئِمُ الْاَوَّلُ الْاٰخِرُ وَالْعَالِمُ الْاَحَدُ الصَّمَدُ الْقَآئِمُ الَّذِيْ لَمْ تَلِدْ وَلَمْ تُوْلَدْ وَلَمْ يَکُنْ لَکَ کَفُوًا اَحَدٌ-

translation.en:
We cannot see You with eyes, no false belief can reach up to You, and You have no partners, no opposite and no equal. 


You are one, alone and eternal. You are the first, the last, the Knower, unconcerned and the everlasting, You are not a son of anyone and no one is Your son.

segments.arabic: لاَ تَنَالُ بِوَصْفٍ وَلاَ تُدْرَکُ بِوَهْمٍ وَلاَ تُغَيِّرُکَ فِيْ مَرِّ الدُّهُوْرِ صَرْفٌ کَنْتَ اَزَلِيًّا لَمْ تَزَلْ وَلاَ تَزَالُ وَ عِلْمُکَ بِالْاَشْيَآءِ فِي الْخِفَآءِ کَعِلْمِکَ بِهَا فِي الْاِجْهَادِ وَالْاِعْلاَنِ۔

translation.en:
None is like you and no one can understand you by praising or by hallucination. 


No time, no rotation of the earth can change You. You were Eternal and will remain everlasting till end. You know what is concealed. Your knowledge is same as it was before.

segments.arabic: فَيَامَنْ ذَلَّتْ لِعَظَمَتِهٖ الْعُظَمَآءُ وَخَضَعَتْ لِعِزَّتِهِ الرُّءَ وسَآءُ

translation.en: O the one! O the one in comparsion of Whose greatness the greatest personalities are nothing.And beforeWhose might the mighty people are helpless.

segments.arabic: وَ مَنْ کَلَّتْ عَنْ بُلُوْغِ ذَاتِهٖ اَلْسُنُ الْبُلَغَآءِ وَمَنْ اَحْکَمَ تَدْبِيْرَ الْاَشْيَآءِ وَاسْتَعْجَمَتْ عَنْ اِدْرَاکِهٖ عِبَارَۃِ عُلُوْمِ الْعُلَمَآء

translation.en: The words of the litterateurs fail to reach His Being. The One Who has fixed the course of action of everything. And the writings of the eloquent ones fail to express His realities.

segments.arabic: يَا سَيِّدِيْ اَتُعَذِّبُنِيْ بِالنَّارِ وَ اَنْتَ اَمَلِيْ اَوْ تُسَلِّطُهَا عَلَيَّ بَعْدَ اِقْرَارِيْ لَکَ بِالتَّوْحِيْدِ

translation.en: My Lord! Will you inmate me in the fire? Though You are my wish or you'll subdue the fire of hell on me! as I confess your oneness

segments.arabic: وَ خُضُوْعِيْ وَ خُشُوْعِيْ لَکَ بِالسُّجُوْدِ اَوْ تُلَجْلِجُ لِسَانِيْ فِيْ الْمَوْقَفِ

translation.en: and I assert of my lowliness and bow down my head before You. Or my tongue falter in speech by giving the account,

segments.arabic: وَ قَدْ مَهَّدْتَ لِيْ بِمَنِّکَ سُبُلَ الْوُصُوْلِ اِلٰي التَّسْبِيْحِ وَالتَّحْمِيْدِ وَالتَّمْجِيْدِ

translation.en: Through your grace, you have paved for me the means to attain glorification, praise and glorification.

segments.arabic: فَيَا غَايَۃَ الطَّالِبِيْنَ وَ اَمَانَ الْخَآئِفِيْنَ وَ عِمَادَ الْمَلْهُوْفِيْنَ وَ غِيَاثَ الْمُسْتَغِيْثِيْنَ

translation.en: O helper of seekers, O protector of frightened people who seek protection, of frightened people who seek protection,

segments.arabic: وَجَارَ الْمُسْتَجِيْرِيْنَ وَ کَاشِفَ ضُرِّ الْمَکْرُوْبِيْنَ وَ رَبَّ الْعَالَمِيْنَ وَ اَرْحَمَ الرَّاحِمِيْنَ

translation.en: O comforter to remove the sorry of afflicted persons. O cherisher, of learned people and O greatest of all kind of people, O merciful,

segments.arabic: صَلِّ عَلٰي مُحَمَّدٍ وَ اٰلِ مُحَمَّدٍ وَ تُبْ عَلَيَّ وَ اَلْبِسْنِيْ الْعَافِيَۃِ وَارْزُقْنِيْ مِنْ فَضْلِکَ رِزْقًا وَاسِعًا وَاجْعَلْنِيْ مِنَ التَّوَّابِيْنَ

translation.en: O my Lord, bless Mohammad Mustafa and his progeny. Accept my repentance give me good health and vast sustenance out of your grace and place me among the pious people.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ اِنْ کُنْتَ کَتَبْتَنِيْ شَقِيًّا عِنْدَکَ فَاِنِّيْ اَسْئَلُکَ بِمَعَاقِدِ الْعِزِّ مِنْ رَحْمَتِکَ بِالْکِبْرِيَآءِ وَالْعَظَمَۃِ الَّتِيْ لاَ يُقَاوِمُهَا مُتَکَّبِّرٌ وَلاَ عَظِيْمٌ

translation.en: O Allah! You considered me as a sinner, I cry for mercy and quote for the sake of Your grace and honourable places and your grandeur and magnificence that no one can oppose you.

segments.arabic: اَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلٰي مُحَمَّدٍ وَ اٰلِ مُحَمَّدٍ وَ اَنْ تُحَوِّلْنِيْ سَعِيْدًا فَاِنَّکَ تَجْرِي الْاَمُوْرِ عَلٰي اِرَادَتِکَ وَ تَجِيْرُ وَلاَ يُجَارُ عَلَيْکَ وَ اَنْتَ عَلٰي کُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيْرٌ

translation.en:
O Allah, send Your blessings on Hazrat Mohammad Mustafa (s.a.w.a.) and his progeny. O My Lord, make me fortunate because all matters are in your possession.
 You are giving Your protection as there is no one except You who can give protection You have power over all things

segments.arabic: وَ اَنْتَ الرَّئُوْفُ الرَّحِيْمُ الْخَبِيْرُ تَعْلَمُ مَا فِيْ نَفْسِيْ وَلاَ اَعْلَمُ مَا فِيْ نَفْسِکَ اِنَّکَ اَنْتَ عَلاَّمُ الْغُيُوْبِ فَاَلْطُفْ بِيْ فَقَدِيْمًا لَطُفْتَ بِمُسْرِفٍ عَلٰي نَفْسِهٖ

translation.en: You are Merciful and Knower of all things. You know what is in my heart but I am not aware what is in your heart.of course you know all secret very well

segments.arabic: فَامْنُنْ عَلَيَّ فَقَدْ مَنَنْتَ عَلٰي غَرِيْقٍ فِيْ بُحُوْرٍ خَطِيْئَۃٍ هَآئِمًا اَسْلَمْتَهٗ لِلْحُتُوْفِ کَثْرَۃُ زَلَلِهٖ وَ تَطَوُّلْ عَلَيَّ

translation.en: Bestow Your favour on me, as You always bestowed Your blessings on whom who showed high handedness.Do favour on me as You obliged on them who lost in an ocean of errors and their errors caused them to die.

segments.arabic: يَا مُتَطَوِّلاً عَلَي الْمُذْنِبِيْنَ بِالصَّفْحِ وَالْعَفْوِ فَاِنَّکَ لَمْ تَزِلْ اٰخِذًا بِالْفَضْلِ عَلَي الْخَاطِئِيْنَ وَالصَّفْحِ (١) عَلَي الْعَاثِرِيْنَ وَ مَنْ وَجَبَ لَهٗ بِاِجْتِرَآئِهٖ عَلَي الْاٰثَامِ حُلُوْلَ دَارِ الْبَوَارِيَا عَالِمَ الْخَفِيَّاتِ وَالْاَسْرَارِ

translation.en: O Lord! You showed Your mercy on sinful person, forgive my sin also as You always bestowed Your favour on sinners and trial them by means of errors, who are abide for the hell, You showed Your forgiveness O Knower of concealed matters,

segments.arabic: يَا جَبَّارُ يَا قَهَّارُ وَمَا اَلْزَمْتَنِيْهِ مَوْلاَيَ مِنْ فَرْضِ الْاٰبَآءِ وَالْاُمَّهَاتِ وَ وَاجِبِ حُقُوْقِهِمْ مَعَ الْاِخْوَانِ وَالْاَخْوَاتِ فَاحْتَمِلْ ذٰلِکَ عَنِّيْ اِلَيْهِمْ وَ اَدِّهٖ

translation.en: O my Lord ?, the responsibilities of my parents, my brothers and sisters which are connected with me, You Yourself accomplishes them in behalf of me. Take my responsibility on You.

segments.arabic: يَا ذَا الْجَلاَلِ وَالْاِکْرَامِ وَاغْفِرْ لِلْمُؤْمِنِيْنَ وَالْمُؤْمِنٰتِ اِنَّکَ عَلٰي کُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيْرٌ۔
segments.transliteration:
O Lord of Majesty and Generosity, forgive all believing men and women.
No doubt You have power over all things.

translation.en: Ziyarat of 4 Imams- Imam Musa Al Kazim (as) , Imam Ali Ridha (as) , Imam Mohammed Taqi (as) and Imam Ali Naqi(as)
Peace be upon you [all], O saints of Allah!
Peace be upon you, O arguments of Allah!

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكُمْ يَا نُورَ ٱللَّهِ فِي ظُلُمَاتِ ٱلأَرْضِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿalaykum ya nura allahi fi zulumati al-ardi

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O light of Allah in the darkness of the earth!
Peace be upon you.
Blessings of Allah be upon you

segments.transliteration: wa ʿala ali baytikumu alttayyibina alttahirina

translation.en: and upon your Household, the pure and immaculate.
May Allah accept my father and mother as ransoms for you!
Indeed, you worshipped Allah sincerely

segments.transliteration: wa jahadtum fi allahi haqqa jihadihi

translation.en: and strove for His sake with due strife
until death came upon you.
So, may Allah curse all your enemies
from the jinn and human beings.

segments.arabic: وَأَنَا أَبْرَأُ إِلَىٰ ٱللَّهِ وَإِلَيْكُمْ مِنْهُمْ
segments.transliteration: wa ana abra'u ila allahi wa ilaykum minhum

translation.en: And I release myself before Allah and before you from them (i.e. your enemies).
O my master, O Abu-Ibrahim,
Musa, the son of Ja`far!
O my master, O Abu'l-Hasan,
`Ali, the son of Musa!
O my master, O Abu-Ja`far,
Muhammad, the son of `Ali!
O my master, O Abu'l-Hasan,
`Ali, the son of Muhammad!
I am your servant,
I believe in your secret and open affairs,
and I am staying with you as your guest, on this day,
which is Wednesday,
and I am in your vicinity;
so, receive me as your guest and neighbor,
[I ask you] by your Household, the pure and immaculate.
In the name of Allah, the Beneficent and Merciful.
translation.fa: به نام خداى بخشاینده مهربان

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ مَنْ تُسَبِّحُ لَهُ الْأَنْعَامُ بِأَصْوَاتِهَا يَقُولُونَ سُبُّوحاً قُدُّوساً

translation.en: Glory be to Him who The Cattles do glory Him with their voice saying: O, the Oft-Praised and Sacred!
Glory be to the Manifest, Truth Master.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ مَنْ تُسَبِّحُ لَهُ الْبِحَارُ بِأَمْوَاجِهَا

translation.en: Glory be to Him Who The Seas do glory Him with its waves!
Glory be to you, Our Allah, and Praise in you.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ مَنْ تُسَبِّحُ لَهُ مَلَائِكَةُ السَّمَاوَاتِ بِأَصْوَاتِهَا

translation.en: Glory be to Him, Who The Angels of Heavens do Glory him with their voices!
Glory be to Allah, who is Praised in every discourse!

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ اللهِ الَّذِي يُسَبِّحُ لَهُ الْكُرْسِيُّ وَ مَا حَوْلَهُ وَ مَا تَحْتَهُ

translation.en: Glory be to Allah, who is glorified by The throne from around and under it!

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ الْمَلِكِ الْجَبَّارِ الَّذِي مَلَأَ كُرْسِيُّهُ السَّمَاوَاتِ السَّبْعَ وَ الْأَرَضِينَ السَّبْعَ

translation.en: Glory be to The most Powerful Master, who His Throne has filled the seven havens and The seven earths!

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ اللهِ بِعَدَدِ مَا سَبَّحَهُ الْمُسَبِّحُونَ

translation.en: Glory be to Allah at the amount of how much the praises do glory Him!

segments.arabic: وَ الْحَمْدُ لِلهِ بِعَدَدِ مَا حَمِدَهُ الْحَامِدُونَ

translation.en: All praises are to Allah at the amount of how much The Praiser does thanks Him!

segments.arabic: وَ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللهُ بِعَدَدِ مَا هَلَّلَهُ الْمُهَلِّلُونَ

translation.en: And there is no god but You! at the amount of whom do declare worship only for You.

segments.arabic: وَ اللهُ أَكْبَرُ بِعَدَدِ مَا كَبَّرَهُ الْمُكَبِّرُونَ

translation.en: And Allah is the Magnificent! At the amount of whom do magnify Him!

segments.arabic: وَ أَسْتَغْفِرُ اللهَ بِعَدَدِ مَا اسْتَغْفَرَهُ الْمُسْتَغْفِرُونَ

translation.en: And I ask God's forgiveness! At the number of whom do Implor for His forgiveness!

segments.arabic: وَ لَا حَوْلَ وَ لَا قُوَّةَ إِلَّا بِاللهِ الْعَلِيِّ الْعَظِيمِ

translation.en: And there is no power and strength except with Allah, the Most High, the All-great;
at the number of people who say it!

segments.arabic: وَ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ

translation.en: And Allah's Blessings be upon Muhammed and his Household;
at the amount of whom do send their blessings upon Him!
Glory be to You, There is no God save you!
The livestock; do glorify you in their rangeland,
The Wild animals; do glorify you in Their most likely place,
The predatory beasts do glorify you in their landscape,
and The birds do glorify you in their nests!
Glory to you, There is no God save you,
glorified You are by; The oceans' waves,
The whales in its water,
The water in its rivers

segments.transliteration: and the vermin in its places!

translation.en: Glory to you, There is no God save you;
the Generous Who is never a miser,
the All-Sufficient who is never missing,
the Unprecedented who is never worn out!

segments.arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلهِ الْبَاقِي الَّذِي تَسَرْبَلَ بِالْبَقَاءِ

translation.en: All Praise to Allah; The Remaining, who demonstrates Himself through his present.
The Perpetual, Who will never cease to exist!
The Noble, Who will not be humiliated!
The Ruler, who will not be removed!
Glory to you, There is no God save you;
The Upright, Who is imperishable!
The Perpetual, Who is imperishable!
The All-Knowing, Who will not raise a doubt!
The All-Seeing, Who will not go astray!
The Forbearing, Who will not ignore!
Glory to you, There is no God save you,
The Wise, Who will never be oppressive!
The Watcher, Who will never forget one thing over another!
The Encompasser, Who is never engrossed with a thing to overlook another!
The Witness, Who will never is absent!
Glory to you, There is no God save you;
The All-Powerful, Who will never be in harm!
The Noble, Who is invulnerable!
The King, Who will never be overcome!
The Percipient, who will never be perceived!
The Demandant, who will never be incapable!
In the Name of Allah, the Merciful, the Compassionate.
translation.fa: به نام خداى بخشاینده مهربان

translation.en: I seek the protection of you; the One, the Refuge,
from the evil of what is blown on, knotted,

segments.arabic: وَ مِنْ شَرِّ ابْنِ قِتْرَةَ وَ مَا وَلَدَ

translation.en: and from the evil of Abu Mura (Satan) and what he has begotten.
I seek your protection; the One, the Highest,

segments.arabic: مِنْ شَرِّ مَا رَأَتْ عَيْنِي وَ مَا لَمْ تَرَ

translation.en: from that which the eye sees and does not see.

segments.arabic: أَسْتَعِيذُ بِاللهِ الْوَاحِدِ الْفَرْدِ الْكَبِيرِ الْأَعْلَى

translation.en: I seek your protection in the Unequalled, the Great,

segments.arabic: مِنْ شَرِّ مَنْ أَرَادَنِي بِأَمْرٍ عَسِيرٍ

translation.en: from the evil of what it intends for you (by the decree of the Sovereign).

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ

translation.en: O Allah, send blessings upon Muhammed and his Household;
translation.fa: خدایا درود فرست بر محمد و آل محمد

segments.arabic: وَ اجْعَلْنِي فِي جِوَارِكَ وَ حِصْنِكَ الْحَصِينِ

translation.en: Therefore, go, O, to the protection of Allah,
the Mighty, the Omnipotent, the King, the Most Holy, the Subduer,

segments.arabic: السَّلَامِ الْمُؤْمِنِ الْمُهَيْمِنِ الْغَفَّارِ عَالِمِ الْغَيْبِ

translation.en: the Perfect, the Faithful, the Guardian, the Mighty, the All-forgiving, the Knower of the unseen,
and the apparent, the Great and the Most High.

segments.arabic: هُوَ اللهُ هُوَ اللهُ هُوَ اللهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ

translation.en: He is Allah; He is Allah; He is Allah; no partner he has;

segments.arabic: مُحَمَّدٌ رَسُولُ اللهِ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ

translation.en: Muhammad is the Messenger of Allah, blessings,
and mercy of Allah on him and his family.

segments.arabic: المصدرالمصباح للكفعميثم تتعوذ بعوذة يوم الأحد
اَللهُ لَطِيْفٌ بِعِبَادِهِ يَرْزُقُ مَنْ يَشَآءُ وَ هُوَ الْقَوِيُّ الْعَزِيْزُ.
segments.transliteration: Allaahu lat’eefum bi-i’baadihi yarzuqu mayn ya shaa-u wa huwal qaweeyul a’zeez.

translation.en: Allah is Benignant to His servants; He gives sustenance to whom He pleases, and He is the Strong, the Mighty.[6]

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ اَدِمْ نِعْمَتَكَ وَ الْطُفْ بِنَا فِيْمَا قَدَّرْتَهُ.
segments.transliteration: Allaahumma adim ni’mataka walt’uf binaa feemaa qaddartah.

translation.en: O Allah make permanent Your bounty and Your Grace for us in what You have ordained.

text.en: SALAATSPrayer for Wednesday 1

translation.en: In the name of Allah, the Beneficent, the Merciful.
translation.fa: به نام خداى بخشاینده مهربان

translation.en: Glory be to You, our Lord, and praise for You;
You are, Who created all Your creatures with Your word;

segments.arabic: خَلْقِكَ فَكُلُّ مَشِيَّتِكَ أَتَتْكَ بِلَا لُغُوبٍ أَثْبَتَّ مَشِيَّتَكَ

translation.en: thereupon Your will came without burdening ascertained Your will.

segments.arabic: وَ لَمْ تَأَنَّ فِيهَا لِمَئُونَةٍ وَ لَمْ تَنْصِبْ فِيهَا لِمَشَقَّةٍ

translation.en: And You did not consider careful on it for intent nor arrange over it for hardship!

segments.arabic: وَ كَانَ عَرْشُكَ عَلَى الْمَاءِ وَ الظُّلْمَةُ فِي [عَلَى] الْهَوَاءِ وَ الْمَلَائِكَةُ يَحْمِلُونَ عَرْشَكَ

translation.en: And Your throne was above the water; darkness in the air and the Angels will bear Your throne.

segments.arabic: عَرْشَ النُّورِ وَ الْكَرَامَةِ وَ يُسَبِّحُونَ بِحَمْدِكَ

translation.en: The throne of light and Glory, glorifying with Your praise,

segments.arabic: وَ الْخَلْقُ مُطِيعٌ لَكَ خَاشِعٌ مِنْ خَوْفِكَ

translation.en: and the creatures are obedient toward You; humble of You fear,

segments.arabic: لَا يُرَى فِيهِ نُورٌ إِلَّا نُورُكَ

translation.en: can't be seen in it a light other than Your light

segments.arabic: وَ لَا يُسْمَعُ فِيهِ صَوْتٌ إِلَّا صَوْتُكَ

translation.en: nor be heard a voice other than Your voice,

segments.arabic: حَقِيقٌ بِمَا لَا يَحِقُّ إِلَّا لَكَ

translation.en: entitled in what is not ascertain to other than You!

segments.arabic: خَالِقُ الْخَلْقِ وَ مُبْتَدِعُهُ تَوَحَّدْتَ بِأَمْرِكَ

translation.en: The Creator of creatures and their originator, You are one and alone with Your decisions;

segments.arabic: وَ تَفَرَّدْتَ بِمُلْكِكَ وَ تَعَظَّمْتَ بِكِبْرِيَائِكَ

translation.en: you showed Your Uniqueness through Your kingdom. And verily; You showed Your Greatness through Your pride,

segments.arabic: وَ تَعَزَّزْتَ بِجَبَرُوتِكَ وَ تَسَلَّطْتَ بِقُوَّتِكَ

translation.en: You expressed Your Might through Your supremacy, You reigned through Your Power
and exalted with Your ability.

segments.arabic: فَأَنْتَ بِالْمَنْظَرِ الْأَعْلَى فَوْقَ السَّمَاوَاتِ الْعُلَى

translation.en: Thereupon, You are in the highest viewpoint above the high heavens!

segments.arabic: كَيْفَ لَا يَقْصُرُ دُونَكَ عِلْمُ الْعُلَمَاءِ

translation.en: How could not the scholars' knowledge be incapable before You,

segments.arabic: وَ لَكَ الْعِزَّةُ أَحْصَيْتَ خَلْقَكَ وَ مَقَادِيرَكَ

translation.en: and Glory be to You; You counted Your creation and ordainments;

segments.arabic: لِمَا جَلَّ مِنْ جَلَالِ مَا جَلَّ مِنْ ذِكْرِكَ

translation.en: for the sublime exalt of Your splendid mention

segments.arabic: وَ لِمَا ارْتَفَعَ مِنْ رَفِيعِ مَا ارْتَفَعَ مِنْ كُرْسِيِّكَ

translation.en: and for the highest pitch from what upraised of Your throne.

segments.arabic: عَلَوْتَ عَلَى عُلُوِّ مَا اسْتَعْلَى مِنْ مَكَانِكَ

translation.en: You advanced Your highness above the elevation of what overcome upon Your place!
You existed before Your all creation.
No assessor can assess Your value,
and the describers cannot describe Your being;

segments.arabic: رَفِيعُ الْبُنْيَانِ مُضِيْءُ الْبُرْهَانِ عَظِيمُ الْجَلَالِ
segments.transliteration: glorious base, illuminated proof, great solemnity,

translation.en: eternal Glory, encompassing of knowledge,

segments.transliteration: very pleasing tradition, and wise command!

segments.arabic: أَحْكَمَ الْأَمْرَ صُنْعُكَ وَ قَهَرَ كُلَّ شَيْءٍ سُلْطَانُكَ

translation.en: Your making excelled the commands, and Your power conquered everything
and took over the mightiness with Your mighty authority
and the sublimity of your great magnificence.
Moreover, You arranged everything with Your wisdom

segments.arabic: وَ أَحْصَيْتَ أَمْرَ الدُّنْيَا وَ الْآخِرَةِ كُلَّهَا بِعِلْمِكَ

translation.en: and Enumerated this world and the hereafter case with Your knowledge.

segments.arabic: وَ كَانَ الْمَوْتُ وَ الْحَيَاةُ بِيَدِكَ

translation.en: And the death and life are in Your hand,

segments.arabic: وَ ضَرَعَ كُلَّ شَيْءٍ إِلَيْكَ وَ ذَلَّ كُلُّ شَيْءٍ لِمُلْكِكَ

translation.en: and everything implored to You, and everything submitted to Your authority,
and everything yielded to Your obedience.
Therefore glorified be our Lord, and glorified is Your name;

segments.arabic: وَ تَبَارَكْتَ رَبَّنَا وَ تَعَالَى ذِكْرُكَ

translation.en: blessed is our Lord, high exalted is Your mention

segments.arabic: وَ بِقُدْرَتِكَ عَلَى خَلْقِكَ وَ لُطْفِكَ فِي أَمْرِكَ

translation.en: and by Your omnipotence upon Your creation and Your gentleness with Your command.

segments.arabic: لَا يَعْزُبُ عَنْكَ مِثْقَالُ ذَرَّةٍ فِي السَّمَا وَاتِ وَ الْأَرْض

translation.en: The weight of a dust mote; doesn't escape from you in heavens and earth,

segments.arabic: وَ لا أَصْغَرُ مِنْ ذلِكَ وَ لا أَكْبَرُ إِلَّا فِي كِتابٍ مُبِينٍ

translation.en: not even less than that nor more but (it is noted) in a clear record!
So, Glory and praise be to You;
blessed is our Lord, and splendid be the praising of You!

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ عَبْدِكَ وَ رَسُولِكَ وَ نَبِيِّكَ

translation.en: O Allah, (please) send blessings upon Muhammad, Your servant, Messenger, and Prophet,

segments.arabic: أَفْضَلَ مَا صَلَّيْتَ عَلَى أَحَدٍ مِنْ بُيُوتَاتِ الْمُسْلِمِينَ

translation.en: with the most excellent blessings you have ever sent upon any Muslim houses.

segments.arabic: صَلَاةً تُبَيِّضُ بِهَا وَجْهَهُ وَ تُقِرُّ بِهَا عَيْنَهُ

translation.en: The blessing in that which You illuminate with his face makes him delighted,
And make him an orator to Your laudations,

segments.arabic: مَا قَالَ صَدَّقْتَهُ وَ مَا سَأَلَ أَعْطَيْتَهُ

translation.en: what he says; You believed, what he asks for, You grant
and to who he mediates for; You mediated.

segments.arabic: وَ اجْعَلْ لَهُ مِنْ عَطَائِكَ عَطَاءً تَامّاً وَ قَسَماً

translation.en: And assign to him of Your bestowal; full bestowal completed portion,

segments.arabic: وَافِياً وَ نَصِيباً جَزِيلًا وَ اسْماً عَالِياً عَلَى النَّبِيِّينَ

translation.en: large share and, a high name upon the prophets,

segments.arabic: وَ الصَّالِحِينَ وَ حَسُنَ أُولئِكَ رَفِيقاً

translation.en: the most elevated rank ones and, a goodly company are they!
O Allah, I beseech You by Your Name;

segments.arabic: إِذَا ذُكِرَ اهْتَزَّ لَهُ عَرْشُكَ وَ تَهَلَّلَ لَهُ نُورُكَ

translation.en: if it is mentioned, Your throne shook, Your light gleamed,
and Your Angels rejoiced to it!

segments.arabic: وَ الَّذِي إِذَا ذُكِرَ تَزَعْزَعَتْ لَهُ السَّمَاوَاتُ وَ الْأَرْضُ وَ الْجِبَالُ وَ الشَّجَرُ وَ الدَّوَابُّ

translation.en: And in which if it is mentioned the; heavens, earth, mountains, trees, animals will be shaken for Him!

segments.arabic: وَ الَّذِي إِذَا ذُكِرَ تَفَتَّحَتْ لَهُ أَبْوَابُ السَّمَاءِ

translation.en: And in which if it is mentioned; the gates of heavens will be unfolded to Him,
the earth shone for Him
and the mountains glorified Him!

segments.arabic: وَ الَّذِي إِذَا ذُكِرَ تَصَدَّعَتْ لَهُ الْأَرْضُ

translation.en: And in which if it is mentioned; the earth be cracked for Him,

segments.arabic: وَ قَدَّسَتْ لَهُ الْمَلَائِكَةُ وَ الْإِنْسُ

translation.en: hallowed Him the Angels and humankind,
the rivers for Him burst out!

segments.arabic: وَ الَّذِي إِذَا ذُكِرَ ارْتَعَدَتْ مِنْهُ النُّفُوسُ وَ وَجِلَتْ مِنْهُ الْقُلُوبُ وَ خَشَعَتْ لَهُ الْأَصْوَاتُ

translation.en: And in which if it is mentioned; the souls are violent fear seized of Him and sounds are submitted of Him.

segments.arabic: أَنْ تَغْفِرَ لِي وَ لِوَالِدَيَّ وَ ارْحَمْهُما كَما رَبَّيانِي صَغِيراً

translation.en: Therefore, forgive my parents and me, bestow Your grace upon them as they cherished and reared me when I was a child,

segments.arabic: وَ ارْزُقْنِي ثَوَابَ طَاعَتِهِمَا وَ مَرْضَاتِهِمَا

translation.en: grant me their fidelity reward and satisfaction,

segments.arabic: وَ عَرِّفْ بَيْنِي وَ بَيْنَهُمَا فِي جَنَّتِكَ

translation.en: and make awareness between them in Your heaven and me!

segments.arabic: أَسْأَلُكَ لِي وَ لَهُمَا الْأَجْرَ فِي الْآخِرَةِ يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ

translation.en: For them and me, I beseech You for the reward in the hereafter; the Day of Resurrection.

segments.arabic: وَ الْعَفْوَ يَوْمَ الْقَضَاءِ وَ بَرْدَ الْعَيْشِ عِنْدَ الْمَوْتِ

translation.en: And the pardoning on the Doomsday, decree for ease after death,
the light of eyes that do not cease,

segments.arabic: وَ لَذَّةَ النَّظَرِ إِلَى وَجْهِكَ وَ شَوْقاً إِلَى لِقَائِكَ

translation.en: and the delight of witnessing Your presence and longing for Your meeting!

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي ضَعِيفٌ فَقَوِّ فِي رِضَاكَ ضَعْفِي

translation.en: O, Allah, I am weak; so strengthen my weakness in the course of Your pleasure,

segments.transliteration: and lead my forelock to goodness,

translation.en: and cause Islam to be the utmost of my pleasure.

segments.arabic: وَ اجْعَلِ الْبِرَّ أَكْبَرَ أَخْلَاقِي وَ التَّقْوَى زَادِي

translation.en: And appoint faithfulness as my most significant moral and Your reverential fear as my provision.
Grant me to achieve goodness for myself

segments.arabic: وَ أَصْلِحْ لِي دِينِيَ الَّذِي هُوَ عِصْمَةُ أَمْرِي

translation.en: and set right my religion that is the preserving tie of my affair.

segments.arabic: وَ بَارِكْ فِي دُنْيَايَ الَّتِي فِيهَا بَلَاغِي

translation.en: And bless me in this world that has my reach

segments.arabic: وَ أَصْلِحْ لِي آخِرَتِيَ الَّتِي إِلَيْهَا مُنْقَلَبِي وَ مَعَادِي

translation.en: and reforms my hereafter, where my recourses head for and my return;

segments.arabic: وَ اجْعَلْ دُنْيَايَ زِيَادَةً فِي كُلِّ خَيْرٍ

translation.en: make my life (in this world) more in every good

segments.arabic: وَ اجْعَلْ آخِرَ تِي عَافِيَةً مِنْ كُلِّ شَرٍّ

translation.en: and my hereafter a relief of every evil!

segments.arabic: وَ هَيِّئْ لِيَ الْإِنَابَةَ إِلَى دَارِ الْخُلُودِ

translation.en: And, prepare me for having love in the world Hereafter,

segments.arabic: وَ التَّجَافِيَ عَنْ دَارِ الْغُرُورِ وَ الِاسْتِعْدَادَ لِلْمَوْتِ قَبْلَ أَنْ يَنْزِلَ بِي

translation.en: not being proud and the preparedness to death before it lays down on me!

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ لَا تَأْخُذْنِي بَغْتَةً وَ لَا تَقْتُلْنِي فَجْأَةً

translation.en: O, Allah, do not overtake me all of a sudden and do not kill me, surprisingly,

segments.arabic: وَ لَا تُعَجِّلْنِي عَنْ حَقٍّ وَ لَا تَسْلُبْنِيهِ

translation.en: and do not make me give up on the right or deprive me of it!

segments.arabic: وَ عَافِنِي مِنْ مُمَارَسَةِ الذُّنُوبِ بِتَوْبَةٍ نَصُوحٍ

translation.en: And recover me from; performing the sins' act with sincere repentance,

segments.arabic: وَ مِنَ الْأَسْقَامِ الدَّوِيَّةِ بِالْعَفْوِ وَ الْعَافِيَةِ
segments.transliteration: chronic illnesses with pardon and well-being
and make myself die reassured safely.

segments.arabic: رَاضِيَةً بِمَا لَهَا مَرْضِيَّةً لَيْسَ عَلَيْهَا خَوْفٌ

translation.en: Satisfied with what it had pleasingly, neither have fear nor;

segments.arabic: وَ لَا حَزَنٌ وَ لَا جَزَعٌ وَ لَا فَزَعٌ وَ لَا وَجَلٌ
وَ لَا مَقْتٌ مِنْكَ مَعَ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ

translation.en: and hatred from You upon the believers
who have got precedence from You in Your rewards;
they shall be kept far from hell.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ

translation.en: O Allah, (please) send blessings upon Muhammad and His Household;
translation.fa: خدایا درود فرست بر محمد و آل محمد

segments.arabic: وَ مَنْ أَرَادَنِي بِحُسْنٍ فَأَعِنْهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ يَسِّرْهُ لِي

translation.en: And as for anyone who intends good to me, assist them with and pave it for me;

segments.arabic: فَ إِنِّي لِما أَنْزَلْتَ إِلَيَّ مِنْ خَيْرٍ فَقِيرٌ

translation.en: because surely I require whatever good You may send down to me.
And whoever desires for me;

segments.arabic: أَوْ حَسَدٍ أَوْ بَغْيٍ أَوْ عَدَاوَةٍ أَوْ ظُلْمٍ
segments.transliteration: evil, envy, offense, enmity or tyranny;

segments.arabic: فَإِنِّي أَدْرَأُ بِكَ فِي نَحْرِهِ وَ أَسْتَعِينُ بِكَ عَلَيْهِ

translation.en: indeed, then take me out from his machinations, and I seek Your help regarding him.

segments.arabic: فَاكْفِنِيهِ بِمَ شِئْتَ وَ اشْغَلْهُ عَنِّي بِمَ شِئْتَ فَإِنَّهُ

translation.en: So suffice me with what You will and preoccupy him against me with what You will;

segments.arabic: لَا حَوْلَ وَ لَا قُوَّةَ إِلَّا بِكَ

translation.en: because there is no change nor any strength except by You!

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الشَّيْطَانِ الرَّجِيمِ

translation.en: O, Allah, I seek refuge with You from the accursed shaytan,

segments.arabic: وَ مِنْ مَغَاوِيهِ وَ اعْتِرَاضِهِ وَ فَزَعِهِ وَ وَسْوَسَتِهِ

translation.en: from his; temptations, disagreements, fear, and whispers.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ فَلَا تَجْعَلْ لَهُ عَلَيَّ سُلْطَاناً

translation.en: O, Allah, do not make for him authority upon me,

segments.arabic: وَ لَا تَجْعَلْ لَهُ عَلَيَّ سَبِيلًا

translation.en: and do not let him find a way to me

segments.arabic: وَ لَا تَجْعَلْ لَهُ فِي مَالِي وَ وُلْدِي شِرْكاً

translation.en: and make for him neither a share nor portion in my properties and sons.

segments.arabic: وَ لَا نَصِيباً وَ بَاعِدْ بَيْنَنَا وَ بَيْنَهُ

translation.en: And Keep us far away from him

segments.arabic: كَمَا بَاعَدْتَ بَيْنَ الْمَشْرِقِ وَ الْمَغْرِبِ

translation.en: as You have kept the East far away from the West

segments.arabic: حَتَّى لَا يُفْسِدَ شَيْئاً مِنْ طَاعَتِكَ عَلَيْنَا

translation.en: so that he does not ruin any of our obeying to You,
and complete Your grace, to us with Your pleasure upon us;
O, Most Merciful of the merciful!
translation.fa: اى مهربانترین مهربانان

segments.arabic: وَ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَى سَيِّدِنَا رَسُولِهِ مُحَمَّدٍ النَّبِيِّ

translation.en: And blessings of Allah be upon our Master, His Messenger; the Prophet Muhammed

segments.arabic: وَ آلِهِ الطَّاهِرِينَ وَ سَلَّمَ تَسْلِيماً

translation.en: and his pure Household; and exalt you thoroughly.

segments.arabic: َلسَّلَامُ عَلَى الرِّضَا الْمُرْتَضٰى سَـمِيِّ سَيِّدِ الْوَصِيِّيْنَ وَ اِمَامِ الْمُتَّقِيْنَ خَلِيْفَةِ الرَّحْمٰنِ وَ اِمَامِ اَهْلِ الْقُرْآنِ
segments.transliteration: assalaamo a’lar rezal murtazaa samiyye sayyedil wasiyyeen wa emaamil muttaqeen khaleefatir rahmaane wa emaame ahlil qur-aane

translation.en: Peace be upon al-Reza, the well-pleased, exalted chief of the Prophet's successor, and leader of the pious ones, representative of the Beneficent, and leader of the people of the Holy Quran,

segments.arabic: وَ صَاحِبِ التَّاْوِيْلِ وَ مَعْدِنِ الْفُرْقَانِ وَ حَامِلِ التَّوْرَاةِ وَ الْاِنْـجِيْلِ وَ اِفْنَآءِ الْـخَبِيْثَاتِ وَ الْاَبَاطِيْلِ وَ الْقَائِلِ الْفَاعِلِ
segments.transliteration: wa saahebit taaweele wa ma’denir furqaan wa haamelit tawraate wal injeele wa ifnaaa-il khabeesaate wal abaateele wal qaa-elil faa-e’le

translation.en: the man of true interpretation, core of distinction (between the right and the wrong), the bearer of the Torah and the Gospel, destructor of the mischiefs and the vanities, instructor and doer (of action),

segments.arabic: وَ الْـحَاكِمِ الْعَادِلِ وَ الصَّادِقِ الْبَرِّ وَ الْـحَائِزِ الْفَخْرِ جَدُّهٗ سَيِّدُ النَّبِيِّيْنَ وَ اَبُوْهُ سَيِّدُ الْوَصِيِّيْنَ وَ اِلَيْهِ مَآبُ الْاَوَّلِيْنَ وَ الْآخِرِيْنَ
segments.transliteration: wal haakemil a’adele was saadeqil barre wal haa-ezil fakhre jaddohu sayyedun nabiyyeena wa abooho sayyedul wasiyyeena wa elayhe ma-aaabul awwaleena wal aakhereena

translation.en: the evenhanded judge, the truthful good doer, the possessor of the honour, his grandfather is the chief of the messengers, and his father is the chief of the Prophet's successor, and to him is the place of return for the first and the last.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا اَبَا الْـحَسَنِ عَلِيَّ بْنَ مُوسَى الرِّضَا وَ رَحْمَةُ اللهِ وَ بَرَكَاتُهٗ اَللّٰهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلٰى مُـحَمَّدٍ وَ عَلٰى اٰلِ مُـحَمَّدٍ وَ كَمَا اَكْرَمْتَهٗ بِـمُحَمَّدٍ رَسُوْلِكَ وَ جَعَلْتَهٗ فِيْ الْـحَقِّ دَلِيْلَكَ فَدَعَا اِلٰى سَبِيْلِكَ بِالْـحِكْمَةِ وَ الْمَوْعِظَةِ الْـحَسَنَةِ
segments.transliteration: assalaamo a’layka yaa abal hasane a’liyy ibne moosar rezaa wa rahmatul laahe wa barakaatohu allaahumma salle a’laa mohammadin wa a’laa aale mohammadin wa kamaa akramtahu be-mohammadin rasooleka wa ja-a’ltahu fil haqqe daleelaka fa-da-a’a elaa sabeeleka bil-hikmate wal maw-e’zatil hasanate

translation.en: Peace be on you, O Abal Hasan Ali, son of Moosa al-Reza and mercy of Allah and his blessings. O Allah! Send blessings upon Muhammad and on the progeny of Muhammad, and like You have honoured him with Muhammad, Your Prophet and appointed him as Your truthful guide, then he called towards Your path with wisdom and fair exhortation,

segments.arabic: فَاَكْمِلْ لَهُ الْعَهْدَ وَ تَـمِّمْ لَهُ الْوَعْدَ وَ اَيِّدْهُ وَ ذُرِّيَّتَهٗ وَ اَوْلِيَآئَهٗ بِالنَّصْرِ وَ الْـجُنْدِ لِيُخَلِّصَ الدِّيْنَ بِالْـجِدِّ فَيَعْمَلَ فِيْ ذٰلِكَ بِالْـجَهْدِ وَ يُصَيِّرَ لَكَ الدِّيْنَ خَالِصًا وَ الْـحَمْدَ تَامًّا
segments.transliteration: fa-akmil lahul a’hda wa tammim lahul wa’da wa ayyidho wa zurriyyatahu wa awleyaaa-ohu bin-nasre wal junde le-yokhallesad deena bil-jidde fa-ya’mala fee zaaleka bil-jahde wa yosayyera lakad deena khaalesan wal hamda taam-man

translation.en: then complete for him the promise, then complete for him the covenant and finish for him the promise, and support him and his progeny and his friends with victory and army to purify the religion with devotion, then act in it with exertion so he renders for Your pure religion and complete praise.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَيْهِ حَيًّا وَ مَيِّتًا وَ عَـجِّلْ فَرَجَنَا بِهٖ وَ بِالْوَصِيِّ مِنْ بَعْدِهٖ وَ انْصُرْهُ عَلٰى اَهْلِ طَاعَةِ الشَّيْطَانِ وَ اَعْزِزْ بِهِ الْاِيْـمَانَ وَ اَذْلِلْ بِهِ الشَّيْطَانَ.
segments.transliteration: allaahumma salle a’layhe hayyan wa mayyetan wa a’jjil farajanaa behi wa bil-wasiyye min ba’dehi wan surho a’laa ahle taa-a’tish shaytaane wa a-a’ziz behil eemaana wa azlil behish shaytaana.

translation.en: O Allah! Send blessings upon him when he is alive and when he dies, and expediate our relief by him and the vicegerent after him, and help him against the people of Satan, and through him honour the belief and degrade the Satan.

text.en: Thursday Rites.
4th Imam dua
Sy.Fatima(sa)dua
Imam Ali(as)dua
Ziyarat
Tasbih
Salats
Afternoon
Night

translation.en: In the Name of Allah, the All-beneficent, the All-merciful.

segments.arabic: اَلْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ ٱلَّذِي أَذْهَبَ ٱللَّيْلَ مُظْلِماً بِقُدْرَتِهِ
segments.transliteration: alhamdu lillahi alladhi adh-haba allayla muzliman biqudratihi

translation.en: All praise be to Allah Who has taken away the shadowy night by His power
and brought the sight-giving day through His mercy.

segments.transliteration: wa kasani diya'ahu wa atani niʿmatahu

translation.en: He has clothed me in its brightness and given me its favor.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ فَكَمَا أَبْقَيْتَنِي لَهُ فَ أَبْقِنِي لأَمْثَالِهِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma fakama abqaytani lahu fa-abqini li-amthalihi

translation.en: O Allah, just as You have spared me for this day, so also spare me for its likes,

segments.transliteration: wa salli ʿala alnnabiyyi muhammadin wa alihi

translation.en: bless the Prophet Muhammad and his Household,

segments.transliteration: wa la tafjaʿni fihi wa fi ghayrihi

translation.en: torment me not in it and in other
nights and days
by my commitment of unlawful acts
and clothing myself in sins;
provide me with its good,
the good of all within it,
and the good of everything after it;
and turn away from me its evil,
the evil of all within it,
and the evil of everything after it!

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي بِذِمَّةِ ٱلإِسْلامِ أَتَوَسَّلُ إِلَيْكَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni bidhimmati al-islami atawassalu ilayka

translation.en: O Allah, by the protective compact of Islam, I seek mediation with You!
By the inviolability of the Qur'an, I rely upon You!
By Muhammad the chosen,
Allah bless him and his Household,
I seek intercession with You.
So, recognize my protective compact
by which I hope my need will be granted,
O Most Merciful of all those who show mercy!

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ ٱقْضِ لِي فِي ٱلْخَمِيسِ خَمْساً
segments.transliteration: allahumma iqdi li fi alkhamisi khamsan

translation.en: O Allah, decree for me on Thursday five things,
which none embraces but Your generosity
and none supports but Your favors:
health through which I may have the strength to obey You,

segments.transliteration: wa ʿibadatan astahiqqu biha jazila mathubatika

translation.en: worship by which I may deserve Your plentiful reward,

segments.arabic: وَسَعَةً فِي ٱلْحَالِ مِنَ ٱلرِّزْقِ ٱلْحَلالِ
segments.transliteration: wa saʿatan fi alhali min alrrizqi alhalali

translation.en: plenty in my state through lawful provision,

segments.arabic: وَ أَنْ تُؤْمِنَنِي فِي مَوَاقِفِ ٱلْخَوْفِ بِأَمْنِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa an tu'minani fi mawaqifi alkhawfi bi-amnika

translation.en: and that You make me secure in the places of fear through Your security,

segments.arabic: وَتَجْعَلَنِي مِنْ طَوَارِقِ ٱلْهُمُومِ وَٱلْغُمُومِ فِي حِصْنِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa tajʿalani min tawariqi alhumumi walghumumi fi hisnika

translation.en: and place me in Your fortress against the striking of worries and sorrows!
Bless Muhammad and his Household,
translation.fa: درود فرست بر محمد و آلش

translation.en: and make my seeking his mediation as an intercessor give profit
on the Day of Resurrection!
Surely, You are the Most Merciful of all those who show mercy!

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ اِنِّيْ اَسْاَلُكَ الْهُدٰى وَ التُّقٰى،
segments.transliteration: allaahumma innee as-alokal hodaa wat toqaa

translation.en: O God, I ask You for guidance and piety,
and I am hopeful for chastity and needlessness.

segments.arabic: وَ الْعَمَلَ بِمَا تُحِبُّ وَ تَرْضٰى،
segments.transliteration: wal a’mala bemaa tohibbo wa tarzaa,

translation.en: And I seek every that act, which is liked and approved by You

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ اِنِّيْ اَسْاَلُكَ مِنْ قُوَّتِكَ لِضَعْفِنَا،
segments.transliteration: allaahumma innee as-aloka min quwwateka le-za’fenaa

translation.en: O God, I ask You from your strength for our weakness

segments.arabic: وَ مِنْ غِنَاكَ لِفَقْرِنَا وَ فَاقَتِنَا،
segments.transliteration: wa min ghenaaka le-faqrenaa wa faaqatenaa,

translation.en: and your needlessness for our poverty and hunger

segments.arabic: وَ مِنْ حِلْمِكَ وَ عِلْمِكَ لِجَهْلِنَا
segments.transliteration: wa min hilmeka wa i’lmeka le-jahlenaa.

translation.en: and your forbearance and knowledge for our ignorance.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلٰى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ اٰلِ مُحَمَّدٍ،
segments.transliteration: allaahumma salle a’laa mohammadin wa aale mohammadin

translation.en: O Allah, bless Muhammad and the progeny of Muhammad

segments.arabic: وَ اَعِنَّا عَلٰى شُكْرِكَ وَ ذِكْرِكَ وَ طَاعَتِكَ وَ عِبَادَتِكَ،
segments.transliteration: wa a-i’nnaa a’laa shukreka wa zikreka wa taa-a’teka wa e’baadateka,

translation.en: and help us in your thankfulness and remembrance and obedience and worship
O the most merciful of the merciful ones.
In the name of Allah the Beneficent the Merciful.

segments.arabic: اَلْحَمْدُ لِلّٰهِ الَّذِيْ لَهٗ مِنْ کُلِّ نَفْسٍ مِنَ الْاَنْفَاسِ وَ خَطَرَۃٍ مِنَ الْخَطَرَاتِ مِنَّا مِنَنٌ لاَ تُحْصٰي

translation.en: Praise is for Allah, His obligations are on our ingress and egress of breathing and all thoughts of mind are so much, that we can't count.

segments.arabic: وَ فِيْ کُلِّ لَحْظَۃٍ مِنَ الَّلَحَظَاتِ نِعَمٌ لاَ تُنْسٰي وَ فِيْ کُلِّ حَالٍ مِنَ الْحَالاَتِ عَائِدَۃٌ لاَ تُخْفٰي وَ سُبْحَانَ اﷲِ الَّذِيْ يَقْهَرُ الْقَوِيَّ وَ يَنْصُرُ الضَّعِيْفَ وَ يَجْبُرُ الْکَسِيْرَ وَ يُغْنِيْ الْفَقِيْرَ وَ يَقْبَلُ الْيَسِيْرَ وَ يُعْطِيْ الْکَثِيْرَ وَ هُوَ عَلٰي کُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيْرٌ

translation.en: And His blessing in every moment that we can't forget and in every condition there is a benefit that is not secret. And He is Pure, He subdues the strong and helps the weak and makes the poor rich and accepts an ordinary deeds and bestows his numerous blessings . He has power over all things.

segments.arabic: وَلاَ اِلٰهَ اِلاَّ اﷲُ اَلسَّابِغُ النِّعْمَۃِ الْبَالِغُ الْحِکْمَۃِ  اَلدَّامِغُ الْحُجَّۃِ اَلْوَاسِعِ الرَّحْمَۃِ الْمَانِحُ الْعِصْمَۃِ وَاﷲُ اَکْبَرُ  ذُوا السُّلْطَانِ الْمَنِيْعِ وَالْبُنْيَانِ الرَّفِيْعِ وَالْاِنْشَآءِ الْبَدِيْعِ وَالْحِسَابِ السَّرِيْعِ وَ صَلَّي اﷲُ عَلٰي مُحَمَّدٍ خَيْرِ النَّبِيِّيْنَ وَ اٰلِهِ الطَّاهِرِيْنَ وَ سَلَّمَ تَسْلِيْمًا

translation.en: And there is no other god except Allah. His perfectness of blessings, correct wisdom , and incontrovertible arguments and gives security as Allah is Great.His kingdom is safe and its foundations are firm. His arrangement is incomparable His settlement of account is very swift. And from all of His prophets Mohammad (s.a.w.a.) is best. O Allah bestow Your blessings on Mohammad (s.a.w.a.) and his progeny

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ اِنِّيْ اَسْئَلُکَ سُؤَالَ الْخَآئِفِ مِنْ وَقْفِهِ الْمَوْقَفِ الْوَجِلِ مِنَ الْعَرْضِ الْمُشْفِقِ مِنَ الْخَشْيَۃِ لِبَوَآئِقِ الْقِيٰمَۃِ الْمَاخُوْذِ عَلَي الْغِزَّۃِ النَّادِمِ عَلٰي خَطِيْئَتِهِ الْمَسْئُوْلِ الْمُحَاسَبِ الْمُثَابِ الْمُعَاقَبِ الَّذِيْ لَمْ يَکِنُّهٗ مُکَانٌ عَنْکَ وَلاَ وَجَدَ مَفَرًّا اِلاَّ اِلَيْکَ مُتَنَصِّلاً (١)

translation.en: O My Lord! On the day of resurrection one who is frightened or trembled or terrified to be caught in resurrection day, or one who was proud and now felt ashamed and idolaters, afflicted in checking their accounts, terrified person pray to Allah.No shelter can hide him in this situation and no one can give them shelter except you.

segments.arabic: مُلْتَجِاً مِنْ سَيِّئ عَمَلِهٖ مُقِرًّا بِعَظِيْمِ ذُنُوْبِهٖ قَدْ اَحَاطَتْ بِهِ الْهُمُوْمِ وَ ضَاقَتْ عَلَيْهِ رَحَآئِبُ التُّخُوْمِ مُوْقِنٌ بِالْمَوْتِ  مُبَادِرٍ بِالتَّوْبَۃٍ قَبْلَ الْفَوْتِ اِنْ مَنَنْتَ بِهَا عَلَيْهِ وَ عَفَوْتَ

translation.en: He was repenting for his bad deeds and was confessing for his great sins. Sorrows arrest him or an expansion of earth which becomes narrow for him and he is assured of his death and makes haste to repent before his death If you do Your favour on him and forgive

segments.arabic: فَاَنْتَ اِلٰهِيْ رَجَآئِيْ اِذَا ضَاقَ عَنِّيْ الرَّجَآءُ وَ مَلْجَآئِيْ اِذْ لَمْ اَجِدْ فِنَآئً لِلْاِلْتِجَآءِ تَوَحَّدْتَ سَيِّدِيْ بِالْعِزِّ وَالْعُلَآءِ وَ تَفَرَّدْتَ بِالْوَحْدَانِيَّۃِ وَ الْبَقَآءِ فَاَنْتَ الْمُتَعَزِّزُ الْمُتَفَرِّدُ بِالْمَجْدِ فَلَکَ

translation.en: then O my Lord! That time you are my wish, when my desires die, You are my shelter when I do not find any shelter. O my Lord, You are one and alone in faith and greatness and in Oneness. You are great in grandeur and magnificence.

segments.arabic: رَبِّيَ الْحَمْدُ لاَ يُوَارِيْ مِنْکَ مَکَانٌ وَّ لاَ يُغَيِّرُکَ دَهْرٌ وَلاَ زَمَانٌ اَلَّفْتَ بِقُدْرَتِکَ الْفِرَقَ وَ فَلَقْتَ بِقُدْرَتِکَ الْفَلْقَ وَ اَنْئَيْتَ بِکَرَمِکَ دَيَاجِيْ الَغَسَقِ وَ اَجْرَيْتَ مِنَ الصُّمِّ الصَّيَاخِيْدِ عَذْبًا وَ فُرَاتًا وَ اَهْمَرْتَ مِنَ الْمُعْصِرَاتِ مَآئً ثَجَّاجًا وَ جَعَلْتَ الشَّمْسَ لِلْبَرِيَّۃِ سِرَاجًا وَّهَّاجًا وَ الْقَمَرَ وَالنَّجُوْمَ اِبْرَاجًا مِنْ غَيْرِ اَنْ تُمَارِسَ فِيْمَا ابْتَدَأْتَ لُغُوْبًا وَلاَ عِلاَجًا

translation.en: O my Lord, all praise is for You. No shelter can hide You. No time or circumstance can change you, You have created various things together in one place and created the light of dawn and avert the darkness of night and makes sweet and pure streams. How from the hand rocks and flows cold shower from the clouds and makes the Sun shine like a lamp and makes the moon and the stars like the towers of light for the world and created the things in very beginning without any effort or without taking pain.

segments.arabic: وَ اَنْتَ اِلٰهُ کُلِّ شَيْءٍ وَ خَالِقُهٗ وَ جَبَّارُ کُلِّ مَخْلُوْقٍ وَ رَازِقُه ٗفَالْعَزِيْزُ مَنْ اَعْزَزْتَ وَالذَّلِيْلُ مَنْ اَذْلَلْتَ وَالسَّعِيْدُ مَنْ اَسْعَدْتَ وَالشَّقِيُّ مَنْ اَشْقَيْتَ َ الْغَنِيُّ مَنْ اَغْنَيْتَ وَالْفَقِيْرُ مَنْ اَفْقَرْتَ

translation.en: As You are the master of all things and You are the Provider and Powerful over all things. One can be said respectable only if you respect him and One who is dishonored by You is disgraced and if you can make one fortunate is lucky and if You make whom unfortunate is miserable and if You make one rich is a rich and if You make whom dependant is a beggar.

segments.arabic: اَنْتَ وَلِّيٖ وَ مَوْلاَيَ وَ عَلَيْکَ رِزْقِيْ وَ بِيَدِکَ نَاصِيَتِيْ فَصَلِّ عَلٰي مُحَمَّدٍ وَ اٰلِ مُحَمَّدٍ وَ افْعَلْ بِيْ مَا اَنْتَ اَهْلُهٗ

translation.en: O Allah! You are my guardian and my fortune and my sustenance is in Your hand. Send Your blessing on Sayyedana Mohammad and his progeny (saws.). And do good turn with me which is worthy of Your splendor.

segments.arabic: وَعْدُ بِفَضْلِکَ عَلٰي عَبْدٍ غَمَرَهٗ جَهْلَهٗ وَاسْتَوْلٰي عَلَيْهِ التَّسْوِيْفُ حَتّٰي سَالَمَ الْاَيَّامَ فَارْتَکَبَ الْمَحَارِمَ وَ الْاٰثَامَ فَاجْعَلْنِيْ

translation.en: Be kind with one who is ignored or falsehood has over-whelmed him and make a truce with the world and make commission of prohibition and sins.

segments.arabic: سَيِّدِيْ عَبْدًا يَفْزَعُ اِلَي التَّوْبَۃِ فَاِنَّهَا مَفْزَعُ الْمُذْنِبِيْنَ وَ اَغْنِنِيْ بِجُوْدِکَ الْوَاسِعِ عَنِ الْمَخْلُوْقِيْنَ وَلاَ تُخْرِجْنِيْ اِلٰي شِرَارِ الْعَالَمِيْنَ وَهَبْ لِيْ عَفْوَکَ فِيْ مَوْقِفِ يَوْمِ الدِّيْنِ (١)

translation.en:
O my Lord, settle me with those who seek protection by repent. Repentance is an asylum of a sinful person. Make me independent from the world by Your high power and kindness.

 Do not make me dependant of any one. Forgive me on the day of Judgment.

segments.arabic: فَاِنَّکَ اَرَحَمَ الرَّاحِمِيْنَ وَ اَجْوَدُ الْاَجْوَدِيْنَ وَ اَکْرَمُ الْاَکْرَمِيْنَ يَا مَنْ لَهٗ الْاَسْمَآءُ الْحُسْنٰي وَالْاَمْثَالُ الْعُلْيَا جَبَّارُ السَّمٰوٰتِ وَالْاَرْضِيْنَ اِلَيْکَ قَصَدْتُ رَاجِيًا فَلاَ تَرُدَّ يَدِيْ عَنْ سِنِّيْ مَوَاهِبِکَ صِفْرًا اِنَّکَ جَوَادٌ مِفْضَالٌ يَا رَؤُوْفًا بِالْعِبَادِ وَ مَنْ هُوَ لَهُمْ بِالْمِرْصَاد

translation.en:
No doubt You are kind and most generous . Your esteem is honorable of all. O my Lord, Your Beautiful Names and great instances are over whelming on the earth and the heaven.

 I in the hopeful manner turned my face towards You so do not send me our empty handed from Your bounties. No doubt You are generous and grateful and kind to all and takes care of the people.

segments.arabic: ِ اَسْئَلُکَ اَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلٰي مُحَمَّدٍ وَ اٰلِ مُحَمَّدٍ وَ اَنْ تُجْزِلَ ثَوَابِيْ وَ تُحْسِنَ مَاٰبِيْ وَ تَسْتُرَ عُيُوْبِيْ

translation.en: I request You to send blessing on Mohammad Mustafa and his Progeny (s.a.w.a.) and increase my virtues and make my last stage of my journey good, conceal my sins.

segments.arabic: وَ تَغْفِرَ ذُنُوْبِيْ وَ تُنْقِذَنِيْ مَوْلاَيَ بِفَضْلِکَ مِنْ اَلِيْمِ الْعِقَابِ اِنَّکَ جَوَادٌ کَرِيْمٌ وَهَّابٌ فَقَدْ اَلْقَتْنِيْ السَّيِّئَاتُ وَالْحَسَنَاتُ بَيْنَ ثَوَابٍ وَ عِقَابٍ

translation.en: O my Lord save me from Your severe chastisement. You are merciful and generous. O Allah, my good and bad deeds keep me in between virtues and chastisement.

segments.arabic: فَقَدْ رَجَوْتُ اَنْ تَکُوْنَ بِلُطْفِکَ تَتَغَمَّدُ عَبْدَکَ الْمُقِرُّ بِفَوَادِحِ الْعُيُوْبِ بِجُوْدِکَ وَ کَرَمِکَ يَا غَافِرَ الذُّنُوْبِ وَ تَصْفَحُ عَنْ زَلَلِهٖ فَلَيْسَ لِيْ سَيِّدَيْ رَبٌّ اَرْتَحِيْهِ غَيْرُکَ وَلَآ اِلٰهَ اَسْئَلُکَ جَبْرَ فَاقَتِيْ وَ مَسْکَنَتِيْ سِوَاکَ فَلاَ تُرَدَّنِيْ مِنْکَ بِالْخَيْبَۃِ يَا مُقِيْلُ الْعَثَرَاتِ وَ کَاشِفَ الْکُرُبَاتِ

translation.en:
I hope You shall conceal my bad virtues after confessing.O Pardoner, for the sake of Your Mercy, forgive me for taken false steps. Because O my Lord, no one is other god except You to whom I raise hope. 

No one is mine except You to whom I raise hope. No one is mine except You that I seek request to remove my poverty. O Pardoner of sins and troubles do not turn me without blessings.

segments.arabic: اِلٰهِيْ فَسُرَّنِيْ فَاِنِّيْ لَسْتُ بِاَوَّلَ مَنْ سَرَرْتَهُ يَا وَلِيَّ النِّعَمِ وَ شَدِيْدَ النِّقَمِ وَ دَآئِمَ الْمَجْدِ وَالْکَرَمِ وَاخْصُصْنِيْ مِنْکَ بِمَغْفِرَۃٍ لاَ يُقَارِنُهَا شَقَآئٌ وَ سَعَادَۃٌ لاَ يُدَانِيْهَا اَذًي

translation.en: O my Lord! Make me happy as I will not be first one from the happiest men whom you made happy before. O Master of blessings and given of severe chastisement, let me particular for salvation that misfortune cannot pass by and conferred me good fortune that no trouble can come near it.

segments.arabic: وَ اَلْهِمَنِيْ تُقَاکَ وَ مَحَبَّتَکَ وَ جَنِّبْنِيْ مُؤْبِقَاتِ مَعْصِيَتِکَ وَلاَ تَجْعَلْ لِلنَّارِ عَلَيَّ سُلْطَانًا اِنَّکَ اَهْلُ التَّقْوٰي وَ اَهْلُ الْمَغْفِرَۃِ وَ قَدْ دَعَوْتُکَ وَ تَکَفَّلْتَ بِالْاِجَابَۃِ فَلاَ تُخَيِّبْ سَآئِلَکَ وَلاَ تَخْذُلْ طَالِبَکَ وَ لاَ تَرُدَّ اٰمِلَکَ يَا خَيْرَ مَامُوْلٍ وَ اَسْئَلُکَ بِرَافَتِکَ وَ رَحْمَتِکَ وَ فَرْدَانِيَّتِکَ وَ رُبُوْبِيَّتِکَ يَا مَنْ هُوَ عَلٰي کُلِ شَيْءٍ قَدِيْرٌ وَ بِکُلِّ شَيْءٍ مُحِيْطٌ

translation.en:
Send me divine help of love and fear of You and keep me safe from destruction and do not allow the fire of hell over me.

 You are only worthy for salvation and piety. I pray to you and You have promised acceptance so do not make me disappointed. For the sake of your blessings, favours and providence I pray to you. O Allah you have power over all things.

segments.arabic: فَاَکْفِنِيْ مَا اَهَمَّنِيْ مِنْ اَمْرِ دُنْيَايَ وَ اٰخِرَتِيْ فَاِنَّکَ سَمِيْعُ الدُّعَآءِ لَطِيْفٌ لِّمَا تَشَآءُ وَ اَدْرِجْنِيْ دَرَجَ مَنْ اَوْجَبْتَ لَهٗ حُلُوْلُ دَارَکَرَامَتِکَ مَعَ اَصْفِيَآئِکَ وَ اَهْلِ اِخْتِصَاصِکَ بِجَزِيْلِ مَوَاهِبِکَ فِيْ دَرَجَات جَنَّاتِکَ مَعَ الَّذِيْنَ اَنْعَمْتَ عَلَيْهِمْ مِنَ النَّبِيِّيْنَ وَالصِّدِّيْقِيْنَ وَالشُّهَدَآءِ وَالصَّالِحِيْنَ وَ حَسُنُ اُوْلٰٓئِکَ رِفِيْقًا

translation.en: The matters of the world and resurrection have made me sad, so make me free as you are hearing and merciful to whom you like. Keep me among the pious and your beloved people who will be along with your Apostles, sincere, and martyred people in paradise. They will be good virtuous people. How nice will be their companionship?

segments.arabic: وَ مَا افْتَرَضْتَ عَلَيَّ فَاحْتَمِلْهُ عَنِّيْ اِلٰي مَنْ اَوْجَبَتْ حُقَوْقَهٗ مِنَ الْاٰبَآءِ وَالْاُمَّهَاتِ وَالْاِخْوَۃِ وَالْاَخْوَاتِ وَاغْفِرِلِيْ وَلَهُمْ مَعَ الْمُؤْمِنِيْنَ وَالْمُؤْمِنٰتِ اِنَّکَ قَرِيْبٌ مُجِيْبٌ وَاسِعُ الْبَرَکَاتِ

translation.en: O My Lord! Whatever the duties are on me, accomplish them especially the duties of my parents, brothers and sisters and forgive all Shiite Muslims along with them my relatives and myself. You are very near, knower and hearer of prayers and great auspicious. O the kind, the great kind of all.

segments.arabic: وَ ذٰلِکَ عَلَيْکَ يَسِيْرٌ يَا اَرْحَمَ الرَّاحِمِيْنَ۔ وَ صَلَّي اﷲُ عَلٰي مُحَمَّدٍ النَّبِيِّ وَ اٰلِهٖ وَ سَلَّمَ تَسْلِيْمًا۔
segments.transliteration: My request is very easy for you. O Allah! Grant Complete Safety with your blessings on Muhammed Mustafa (saws) and his innocent and most pure Progeny.

translation.en: Ziarah Imam Hassan Askari(as)
Peace be upon you, O saint of Allah!

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا حُجَّةَ ٱللَّهِ وَخَالِصَتَهُ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿalayka ya hujjata allahi wa khalisatahu

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O argument of Allah and His choicest!
Peace be upon you, O leader of the faithful believers,
inheritor of the messengers,
and argument of the Lord of the Worlds!

segments.arabic: صَلَّىٰ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْكَ وَعَلَىٰ آلِ بَيْتِكَ
segments.transliteration: salla allahu ʿalayka wa ʿala ali baytika

translation.en: May Allah send peace upon you and upon your Household,
the pure and immaculate!
O my master, O Abu-Muhammad,
al-Hasan, the son of `Ali!

segments.transliteration: ana mawlan laka wa li-ali baytika

translation.en: I am a servant of you and of your Household

segments.transliteration: wa hadha yawmuka wa huwa yawmu alkhamisi

translation.en: and today is your day, which is Thursday,

segments.arabic: وَأَنَا ضَيْفُكَ فِيهِ وَمُسْتَجِيرٌ بِكَ فِيهِ
segments.transliteration: wa ana dayfuka fihi wa mustajirun bika fihi

translation.en: and on this day, I am your guest and in your vicinity;
so, receive me hospitably as your guest and neighbor,
[I ask you] in the name of your Household, the pure and immaculate.
In the name of Allah, the Beneficent and Merciful.
translation.fa: به نام خداى بخشاینده مهربان

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْوَاسِعُ الَّذِي لَا يَضِيقُ

translation.en: Glory be to you, There is no God save you; The Immense, Who will not be narrowed!

segments.arabic: الْبَصِيرُ الَّذِي لَا يَضِلُّ النُّورُ الَّذِي لَا يُخْمَدُ

translation.en: The All-Seeing, Who will never astray! The Divine Light, Who will never be extinguished!

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْحَيُّ الَّذِي لَا يَمُوتُ

translation.en: Glory be to you, There is no God save you; The Ever-living, Who will never die!

segments.arabic: الْقَيُّومُ الَّذِي لَا يَهِنُ الصَّمَدُ الَّذِي لَا يُطْعَمُ

translation.en: The Self-Subsistent, who The Eternally Besought and Will never be fed!

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ مَا أَعْظَمَ شَأْنَكَ

translation.en: Glory be to you, There is no God save you;

segments.arabic: [وَ أَعَزَّ سُلْطَانَكَ وَ أَعْلَى مَكَانَكَ [وَ أَشْمَخَ مُلْكَكَ

translation.en: How mighty is your authority! How mighty is Your station!

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ مَا أَبَرَّكَ وَ أَرْحَمَكَ

translation.en: Glory be to you, There is no God save you; O, The most; Merciful, Benevolence,

segments.arabic: وَ أَحْلَمَكَ وَ أَعْظَمَكَ وَ أَسْمَحَكَ وَ أَجَلَّكَ
وَ أَكْرَمَكَ وَ أَعْلَمَكَ وَ أَعَزَّكَ وَ أَعْلَاكَ

translation.en: generous, All-Knowing, Mighty, High,

segments.arabic: وَ أَقْوَاكَ وَ أَسْمَعَكَ وَ أَبْصَرَكَ

translation.en: All-Powerful, All-Hearing, and All-Watching!
Glory be to you, There is no God save you;

segments.arabic: مَا أَكْرَمَ عَفْوَكَ وَ أَعْظَمَ تَجَاوُزَكَ

translation.en: O, How; generous is your pardon, and great is your overlooking!
Glory be to you, There is no God save you;

segments.arabic: مَا أَوْسَعَ رَحْمَتَكَ وَ أَكْثَرَ فَضْلَكَ

translation.en: O, How; expanded is your mercy and abundant is your bounties!
Glory be to you, There is no God save you;

segments.arabic: مَا أَنْعَمَ آلَاءَكَ وَ أَسْبَغَ نَعْمَاءَكَ

translation.en: O, How, Bestowed is his blessings and graces!
Glory be to you, There is no God save you;

segments.arabic: مَا أَفْضَلَ ثَوَابَكَ وَ أَجْزَلَ عَطَاءَكَ

translation.en: O, How; great is your Reward, and abundant is your gifts!
Glory be to you, There is no God save you;

segments.arabic: مَا أَوْسَعَ حُجَّتَكَ وَ أَوْضَحَ بُرْهَانَكَ

translation.en: O, How; immense is your Claim, and obvious is your Proof!
Glory be to you, There is no God save you;

segments.arabic: مَا أَشَدَّ أَخْذَكَ وَ أَوْجَعَ عِقَابَكَ

translation.en: O, How; tough is your taking, and Hurtful is your punishment!
Glory be to you, There is no God save you;

segments.arabic: مَا أَشَدَّ مَكْرَكَ وَ أَمْتَنَ كَيْدَكَ

translation.en: O, How; strong is your resourcefulness and firm cunning!
Glory be to you, There is no God save you;

segments.arabic: تُسَبِّحُ لَكَ السَّمَاوَاتُ السَّبْعُ وَ الْأَرَضُونَ السَّبْعُ

translation.en: Glorify you The seven Heavens and seven Earths!
Glory be to you, There is no God save you;

segments.arabic: الْقَرِيبُ فِي عُلُوِّكَ الْمُتَعَالِي فِي دُنُوِّكَ الْمُتَدَانِي دُونَ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ مِنْ خَلْقِكَ

translation.en: O, the high in your nearness and yet exalted in your nearness before your creatures!
Glory be to you, There is no God save you;
O, The close; Who is a priori to all existence!
O, The Everlasting when everything disappears!

segments.arabic: وَ الْبَاقِي بَعْدَ فَنَاءِ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ

translation.en: O, The Remaining, after everything (created) shall perish!
Glory be to you, There is no God save you;
Everything is minor before your omnipotence
Before your respect, all things are Lowly.
Everything obeyed your authority
and submitted to your All-Poweness!
Glory be to you, There is no God save you;
You are the One who rules over the kings by Your Power
Defeated the tyrants with your power!
You degraded The greats with your mightiness!
Glory be to you, There is no God save you;
with glorification that exceeds all the glorification of those who glorify Him,

segments.arabic: كُلِّهِمْ مِنْ أَوَّلِ الدَّهْرِ إِلَى آخِرِهِ

translation.en: from The beginning of time till eternity fulfilling The;

segments.arabic: وَ مِلْءَ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَ الْأَرَضِينَ وَ مِلْءَ مَا خَلَقْتَ وَ مِلْءَ مَا قَدَّرْتَ

translation.en: heavens, earth, what you created, and what you fated!
Glory be to you, There is no God save you;
The heavens glorify you on all its sides!
The sun is in its streaming;

segments.arabic: وَ الْقَمَرُ فِي مَنَازِلِهِ وَ النُّجُومُ فِي سَيَرَانِهَا

translation.en: The moon is in its places, the stars in its pacing,
and The orbit in its ascension.
Glory be to you, There is no God save you;

segments.arabic: يُسَبِّحُ لَكَ النَّهَارُ بِضَوْئِهِ وَ اللَّيْلُ بِدُجَائِهِ

translation.en: The day glorifies you by its Light, night by its darkness,

segments.arabic: وَ النُّورُ بِشُعَاعِهِ وَ الظُّلْمَةُ بِغُمُوضِهَا

translation.en: Light by its brightness, and The darkness with its Obscurely!
Glory be to you, There is no God save you;
The winds glorify you by blowing,

segments.arabic: وَ الْبَرْقُ بِأَخْطَافِهِ وَ الرَّعْدُ بِأَرْزَامِهِ
segments.transliteration: lightning by snatching, and thunder by bundling!

translation.en: Glory be to you, There is no God save you;
The earth glorifies you by its sustenance,

segments.arabic: وَ الْجِبَالُ بِأَطْوَادِهَا وَ الْأَشْجَارُ بِأَوْرَاقِهَا
segments.transliteration: mountains by its floating, trees by their leaves,

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ وَ بِحَمْدِكَ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ وَحْدَكَ لَا شَرِيكَ لَكَ

translation.en: Glory be to you, there is no God save You alone without having any partner;
at the amount of everything that glorifies you,

segments.arabic: وَ كَمَا تُحِبُّ يَا رَبِّ أَنْ تُحْمَدَ

translation.en: as you like to be Praised,

segments.arabic: [ وَ كَمَا يَنْبَغِي لِعَظَمَتِكَ وَ كِبْرِيَائِكَ [وَ عِزِّكَ

translation.en: and as should Your; Grandeur, Magnificence,

segments.arabic: وَ عِزَّتِكَ وَ قُوَّتِكَ وَ قُدْرَتِكَ
وَ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَى رَسُولِهِ مُحَمَّدٍ خَاتَمِ النَّبِيِّينَ وَ آلِهِ أَجْمَعِينَ

translation.en: O, Allah; send The blessings upon Muhammed, The seal of prophets and His household.
In the Name of Allah, the Merciful, the Compassionate.
translation.fa: به نام خداى بخشاینده مهربان

segments.arabic: أُعِيذُ نَفْسِي بِرَبِّ الْمَشارِقِ وَ الْمَغارِبِ

translation.en: I seek protection for myself in the Lord of the East and the West

segments.arabic: مِنْ كُلِّ شَيْطَانٍ مَارِدٍ وَ قَائِمٍ وَ قَاعِدٍ وَ عَدُوٍّ وَ حَاسِدٍ

translation.en: from the evil of every rebellious, standing, sitting, envious.

segments.arabic: وَ مُعَانِدٍ وَ يُنَزِّلُ عَلَيْكُمْ مِنَ السَّماءِماءً

translation.en: Refractory demon and We send down on you water from heaven,

segments.arabic: لِيُطَهِّرَكُمْ بِهِ وَ يُذْهِبَ عَنْكُمْ رِجْزَ الشَّيْطانِ

translation.en: to purify you thereby, to put away from you the defilement of Satan

segments.arabic: وَ لِيَرْبِطَ عَلى قُلُوبِكُمْ وَ يُثَبِّتَ بِهِ الْأَقْدامَ

translation.en: and to strengthen your hearts, and to make firm your feet.
Stamp Your foot!
This is a washing-place cool for drinking.

segments.arabic: وَ أَنْزَلْنا مِنَ السَّماءِ ماءً طَهُوراً لِنُحْيِيَ بِهِ بَلْدَةً مَيْتاً

translation.en: And We sent down from heaven pure water to revive dead land,

segments.arabic: وَ نُسْقِيَهُ مِمَّا خَلَقْنا أَنْعاماً وَ أَناسِيَّ كَثِيراً

translation.en: and give to drink of it what We created, many cattle and men.
Now God has lightened it for you.

segments.arabic: ذلِكَ تَخْفِيفٌ مِنْ رَبِّكُمْ وَ رَحْمَةٌ يُرِيدُ اللهُ

translation.en: So that a lightening granted you by your Lord and the mercy that Allah desires
to lighten things for you, God will suffice you for them.
He is the All-hearer and the All-knower.

segments.arabic: لا إِلهَ إِلَّا اللهُ وَ اللهُ غالِبٌ عَلى أَمْرِهِ

translation.en: There is no power except with Allah, no conqueror except Allah. God prevails in His purpose.

segments.arabic: لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللهُ مُحَمَّدٌ رَسُولُ اللهِ

translation.en: There is no God save Allah; Muhammad is the Messenger of Allah,
blessings of Allah be on him and his family.

segments.arabic: أَعُوذُ بِعِزَّةِ اللهِ وَ أَعُوذُ بِقُدْرَةِ اللهِ

translation.en: I seek refuge in the might of Allah and I seek refuge in the power of Allah

segments.arabic: وَ أَعُوذُ بِرَسُولِهِ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ وَ سَلَّمَ تَسْلِيماً
segments.transliteration: and I seek refuge in His Messenger, may Allah bless him and his family and may He salute them with thorough salutation.

translation.en: 1)Four rakat (2 X 2)Salat- Jamal Al Asbu Shaikh Tawoos - Recommended by Ayatullah Behjat & Ayatullah KashmiriFirst Rakat S Hamd & S Tawheed 11 timesSecond Rakat S Hamd & S Tawheed 21 timesThird Rakat S Hamd & S Tawheed 31 timesFourth Rakat S Hamd & S Tawheed 41 timesFollowed by S Tawheed 51 times & Salwaat 51 timesIN prostration Ya Allah X 100 times & mention your wishes2)Two Rakatwith Al Hamd & Sura 99 Zilzal 15 times in each Rakatto be saved from Fishar of Qabr ( Ref Manazerul Akhera - Shaikh Abbas Qummi)3)Two rakats.In every rakat after Surah Hamd recite Surah Nasr and Surah Kauther five times each and after Asr recite Surah Tawheed 40 times and Isteghfar 40 times. There is an inestimable reward for this.4)Ten rakatsprayer in each rakat recites Surah Hamd and Surah Tawheed ten timesIt is narrated from the Messenger of Allah (s.a.w.s.) that one who recites this on Thursday the angels will tell him: Ask whatever you want and it shall be fulfilled.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli ʿala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: O Allah, send blessings to Muhammad and his Household.
translation.fa: خدایا درود فرست بر محمد و آل محمد

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli ʿala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: O Allah, send blessings to Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,
translation.fa: خدایا درود فرست بر محمد و آل محمد

translation.en: hasten their Relief,
and destroy their enemies
from both jinn and human beings,
both the foremost and the later ones.

text.en: Recite after the `Asr Prayer on Thursday up to the end of Friday daytime.

translation.en: All Glory be to Allah.
Allah is the Most Great.
There is no god save Allah.

text.en: Last Hours of Thursday

segments.arabic: أَسْتَغْفِرُ ٱللَّهَ الَّذِي لاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ هُوَ
segments.transliteration: astaghfiru allaha alladhi la ilaha illa huwa

translation.en: I pray the forgiveness of Allah; there is no god but He,
the Ever-living, the Self-Subsisting,
and I repent to Him
as a slave who is submissive,
acquiescent, and poor,

segments.arabic: لاَ يَسْتَطيعُ لِنَفْسِهِ صَرْفاً وَلاَ عَدْلاً
segments.transliteration: la yastatiʿu linafsihi sarfan wa la ʿadlan

translation.en: not controlling for himself any harm or profit,

segments.transliteration: wa la nafʿan wa la darran

translation.en: or benefit or damage

segments.arabic: وَلاَ حَيَاةً وَلاَ مَوْتاً وَلاَ نُشُوراً
segments.transliteration: wa la hayatan wa la mawtan wa la nushuran

translation.en: and not controlling death nor life, nor raising (the dead) to life.
May Allah send peace upon Muhammad
and his Household; the pure, the immaculate,
the choicest, and the pious;
and may He spread thorough blessings over them.
O Allah, I beseech You in the name of Your Noble Face
and in the name of Your Sublime Name

segments.transliteration: an tusalliya ʿala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: to send blessings to Muhammad and his Household

segments.transliteration: wa an taghfira li dhanbiya alʿazima

translation.en: and to forgive me my grave sin.

text.en: Thursday Nights-Shab-e-Juma Duas page

translation.en: In the name of Allah, the Beneficent, the Merciful.
translation.fa: به نام خداى بخشاینده مهربان

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ رَبَّنَا كُنْتَ وَ لَمْ يَكُنْ قَبْلَكَ شَيْءٌ

translation.en: O, Allah, our Lord, You were, and nothing was there before You,

segments.arabic: وَ أَنْتَ تَكُونُ حِينَ لَا يَكُونُ غَيْرَكَ شَيْءٌ

translation.en: and You will exist when there is nothing except You.

segments.arabic: لَا يَعْلَمُ أَحَدٌ كُنْهَ عِزَّتِكَ وَ لَا يَسْتَطِيعُ أَحَدٌ أَنْ يَنْعَتَ عَظَمَتَكَ

translation.en: No one knows Your mightiness essence nor describes Your greatness,

segments.arabic: وَ لَا يَعْلَمُ أَحَدٌ أَيْنَ مُسَتَقَرُّكَ

translation.en: no one knows where is Your dwelling place;

segments.arabic: أَنْتَ فَوْقَ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ وَ أَنْتَ وَرَاءَ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ

translation.en: You are above everything, behind everything,

segments.arabic: وَ أَمَامَ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ وَ مَعَ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ

translation.en: in front of everything, and with everything.

segments.arabic: خَلَقْتَ يَا ذَا الْجَلَالِ وَ الْإِكْرَامِ

translation.en: You created, O Possessor of majesty and munificence;
glorification for Your Face purified the pride

segments.arabic: وَ الْعَظَمَةَ لِنَفْسِكَ وَ خَلَقْتَ الْقُوَّةَ

translation.en: and greatness of Your being and created the power
and competence of Your authority!

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ رَبَّنَا وَ لَكَ الْحَمْدُ عَلَى عَظَمَةِ مُلْكِكَ وَ جَلَالِ وَجْهِكَ

translation.en: So, Glory be to You, our God, and to you be the Praise upon the greatness of Your kingdom and Your Honorable Face;

segments.arabic: وَ هُوَ حَيْثُ لَا يَرَاهُ شَيْءٌ يُسَبِّحُ بِحَمْدِهِ

translation.en: and He is where nothing can witness Him; glorified is Him with His Praise
so, Glory and Praise be to You!
O God, our Lord to You belongs Praise;

segments.arabic: تَسَلَّطْتَ فَلَا أَحَدٌ مِنَ الْعِبَادِ يَحُدُّ وَصْفَكَ

translation.en: You ruled over the servants so no one will limit Your description.
You ruled with Your mightiness; You braced Yourself with Your omnipotence,

segments.arabic: وَ تَجَبَّرْتَ بِكِبْرِيَائِكَ وَ تَكَبَّرْتَ بِمُلْكِكَ

translation.en: You compelled with your pride, and You magnified with Your possessions,

segments.arabic: وَ تَمَلَّكْتَ بِقُدْرَتِكَ وَ قَدَرْتَ بِقُوَّتِكَ

translation.en: You possessed with Your power, You got capable with Your power.

segments.arabic: وَ لَا يَسْتَطِيعُ أَحَدٌ مِنَ الْعِبَادِ وَصْفَكَ

translation.en: No one among the servants can describe You,
and no one can evaluate Your value,

segments.arabic: وَ لَا يَسْبِقُ أَحَدٌ مِنْ قَضَائِكَ

translation.en: nor can anyone go beyond Your decree.
O God, our Lord to You belongs Praise;

segments.arabic: عَلَى جَلَالِ وَجْهِكَ وَ عَظَمَةِ مُلْكِكَ

translation.en: upon Your majestic face and the greatness of Your possessions;

segments.arabic: الَّذِي بِهِ قَامَتِ السَّمَاوَاتُ وَ الْأَرْضُ

translation.en: through which the heavens and earth endure.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ اللَّهُمَّ رَبَّنَا وَ لَكَ الْحَمْدُ

translation.en: Glory be to You, O Allah, our Lord; to You belongs Praise.
You filled everything with greatness,
and You created everything with power;
You encompass all things with knowledge,

segments.arabic: وَ وَسِعْتَ كُلَّ شَيْءٍ رَحْمَةً وَ عِلْماً

translation.en: and embracest everything in mercy and knowledge;
indeed, You are Most Merciful of the merciful!

segments.arabic: فَ سُبْحَانَكَ رَبَّنَا وَ لَكَ الْحَمْدُ عَلَى عِزَّةِ سُلْطَانِكَ

translation.en: Glory be to You, our God, and to you be the Praise upon Your glorified authority;

segments.arabic: الَّذِي خَشَعَ لَهُ كُلُّ شَيْءٍ مِنْ خَلْقِكَ

translation.en: which everything humbled to, from Your creation
and all Your servants got cautious of,
all Your creations are submitted to it.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ

translation.en: O Allah, bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammed;
translation.fa: خدایا درود فرست بر محمد و آل محمد

segments.arabic: وَ اجْزِهِ أَفْضَلَ الْجَزَاءِ وَ أَفْضَلَ

translation.en: repay him with the best reward, and with the best reward,

segments.arabic: مَا أَنْتَ جَازٍ أَحَداً مِنْ أَنْبِيَائِكَ عَلَى حِفْظِهِ دِينَكَ وَ إِبْلَاغِهِ وَ اتِّبَاعِهِ وَصِيَّتَكَ

translation.en: You ever granted to anyone of Your Prophets as he; safeguards Your religion and informs it, following Your will and command.

segments.arabic: وَ أَمْرَكَ حَتَّى تُشَرِّفَهُ يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ بِتَفْضِيلِكَ إِيَّاهُ عَلَى جَمِيعِ رُسُلِكَ

translation.en: Until You honor him with Your preferring upon all Your Messengers on the Day of Resurrection;
O Possessor of majesty and munificence!
O, Allah, just as You have rescued us through what You distinguished;

segments.arabic: مُحَمَّداً صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ

translation.en: Muhammed, blessings of Allah be upon him, and his Household
and have guided us through what You sent,

segments.arabic: وَ بَصَّرْتَنَا بِمَا أَوْصَيْتَهُ مِنَ الْعَمَلِ

translation.en: and have shown us through what deeds you command.
Therefore, send Your blessings upon him and his Household,
and repay him the best reward on our behalf.

segments.arabic: وَ أَفْضَلَ مَا جَازَيْتَ نَبِيّاً مِنْ أَنْبِيَائِكَ وَ رُسُلِكَ

translation.en: Best reward; You ever granted to any of Your Prophets and Messengers,

segments.arabic: وَ أَنْ تَجْمَعَ لِي بِهِ خَيْرَ الدُّنْيَا وَ الْآخِرَةِ

translation.en: and please grant me the best of this world and Hereafter.

segments.arabic: إِنَّكَ ذُو فَضْلٍ كَرِيمٍ يَا ذَا الْجَلَالِ وَ الْإِكْرَام
segments.transliteration: You are Possessor of generous bounty; O Possessor of majesty and munificence!

text.en: Significance of Thursday Nights
Throughout the night Allah (s.w.t.) calls:[ Oddatol Daee , Hadees 67]-Isn't there any believing servant who calls upon Me until before dawn so that I will grant his worldly and spiritual
Afternoon
Short Duas
Regular

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli ʿala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: O Allah, send blessings to Muhammad and his Household.
translation.fa: خدایا درود فرست بر محمد و آل محمد

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli ʿala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: O Allah, send blessings to Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,
translation.fa: خدایا درود فرست بر محمد و آل محمد

translation.en: hasten their Relief,
and destroy their enemies
from both jinn and human beings,
both the foremost and the later ones.

text.en: Recite after the `Asr Prayer on Thursday up to the end of Friday daytime.

translation.en: All Glory be to Allah.
Allah is the Most Great.
There is no god save Allah.

text.en: Last Hour of Thursday

segments.arabic: أَسْتَغْفِرُ ٱللَّهَ الَّذِي لاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ هُوَ
segments.transliteration: astaghfiru allaha alladhi la ilaha illa huwa

translation.en: I pray the forgiveness of Allah; there is no god but He,
the Ever-living, the Self-Subsisting,
and I repent to Him
as a slave who is submissive,
acquiescent, and poor,

segments.arabic: لاَ يَسْتَطيعُ لِنَفْسِهِ صَرْفاً وَلاَ عَدْلاً
segments.transliteration: la yastatiʿu linafsihi sarfan wa la ʿadlan

translation.en: not controlling for himself any harm or profit,

segments.transliteration: wa la nafʿan wa la darran

translation.en: or benefit or damage

segments.arabic: وَلاَ حَيَاةً وَلاَ مَوْتاً وَلاَ نُشُوراً
segments.transliteration: wa la hayatan wa la mawtan wa la nushuran

translation.en: and not controlling death nor life, nor raising (the dead) to life.
May Allah send peace upon Muhammad
and his Household; the pure, the immaculate,
the choicest, and the pious;
and may He spread thorough blessings over them.
O Allah, I beseech You in the name of Your Noble Face
and in the name of Your Sublime Name

segments.transliteration: an tusalliya ʿala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: to send blessings to Muhammad and his Household

segments.transliteration: wa an taghfira li dhanbiya alʿazima

translation.en: and to forgive me my grave sin.

text.en: Short Duas for Night Preceeding Friday

translation.en: O Allah, I beseech You in the name of Your Noble Face
and in the name of Your Sublime Name

segments.transliteration: an tusalliya ʿala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: to send blessings to Muhammad and his Household

segments.transliteration: wa an taghfira li dhanbiya alʿazima

translation.en: and to forgive me my grave sin.
O He Who is ever-Favorer on the beings!
O He Who is openhandedly Bestower of gifts!
O He Who is the Giver of sublime donations!
Bless Muhammad and his Household,
translation.fa: درود فرست بر محمد و آلش

translation.en: the best of all creatures in traits,
and forgive us, O Lord of Highness,
at this evening.
O Allah, You are my Lord;
there is no god save You;

segments.transliteration: khalaqtani wa ana ʿabduka wabnu amatika

translation.en: You have created me, and I am Your slave and the son of Your bondmaid;

segments.transliteration: wa fi qabdatika wa nasiyati biyadika

translation.en: and I am in Your grip; and my forehead is in Your Hand;

segments.arabic: أَمْسَيْتُ عَلَىٰ عَهْدِكَ وَوَعْدِكَ مَا ٱسْتَطَعْتُ
segments.transliteration: amsaytu ʿala ʿahdika wa waʿdika ma istataʿtu

translation.en: I come to observe my covenant and promise to You as much as I can.

segments.arabic: أَعُوذُ بِرِضَاكَ مِنْ شَرِّ مَا صَنَعْتُ
segments.transliteration: aʿudhu biridaka min sharri ma sanaʿtu

translation.en: I take refuge in Your pleasure against the evil of my deeds.
I acknowledge Your favors and confess of my sins.
So, (please) forgive my sins,

segments.arabic: إِنَّهُ لاَ يَغْفِرُ ٱلذُّنُوبَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ
segments.transliteration: innahu la yaghfiru aldhdhunuba illa anta

translation.en: for none can forgive sins save You.

text.en: Recited on the Night Preceeding FridayDua KumaylHadith KisaZiyarat WarithRemembering Imam Hussain (peace be upon him) and his companionsDua Allahumma Man Ta'abbaDua Ya Shahida Kulle Najwa
Almanac "Allhumma Ajalni"Weekday Night Dua " Allhumma Rabbana"Nafila App Dua 1"Allhumma Anta awalo"Nafila App-Dua 2"Allahumma be rehmateka indika"

translation.en: In the Name of Allah the All-compassionate, the All-merciful;
