translation.fa: به نام خداى بخشاینده مهربان

translation.en: O Allah make me Submissive,till I surrender to Thee,
make me happy by putting "fear of God" in my heart,do not make me miserable on account of disobedience unto Thee.

segments.arabic: وَخِرْ لِي فِي قَضَائِكَ وَبَارِكْ لِي فِي قَدَرِكَ

translation.en: Write (prescribe) for me freedom from pain, trouble and anxiety,make ready for me blessings and happiness,

segments.arabic: حَتَّى لاَ أُحِبَّ تَعْجِيلَ مَا أَخَّرْتَ وَلاَ تَأَخِيرَ مَا عَجّلْتَ

translation.en: so that I do not like what You delay to come in advance,or what You make happen quickly to be delayed.
Give me contentment and an independent disposition.

segments.arabic: وَمَتِّعْنِي بِسَمْعِي وَبَصَرِي وَاجْعَلْهُمَا الوَارِثِينَ مِنِّي

translation.en: Make me derive advantage from the power of hearing (I listen to and accept advise and obey) and seeing (discernment,intelligence, and perception of truth);and both of them to my inheritors

segments.arabic: وَانْصُرْنِي عَلَى مَنْ ظَلَمَنِي وَأَرِنِي فِيِهِ قُدْرَتَكَ

translation.en: Give me an upper hand over him who intimidates me, and treat me well through Thy might and power,
o Lord,and keep me in that exact state.

segments.arabic: اَللّهُمَّ أَعِنِّيْ عَلَى هَوْلِ يَوْمِ القِيَامَةِ

translation.en: o Allah! Attend to and, take care of me in the frightening hour of the Day of Judgement.

segments.arabic: وَأَخْرِجْنِي مِنَ الدُّنْيا سَالِمَاً وَأَدْخِلْنِي الْجَنَّةَ آمِنَاً

translation.en: Make me leave this world in safe and sound condition,and enter the permanent land of bliss and beauty (Paradise)in peace and tranquillity;

segments.arabic: وَاكفِنِي مُؤُنَتِي ومُؤنَةَ عِيالِي وَمُؤُنَةَ النَّاسِ

translation.en: multiply provisions alloted to me, and to my dependents, also promote welfare of the people and make me sit,through Thy mercy, in the company of Thy upright servants.
and join the delightful charming people who have refined manners, intellegent minds and beautiful faces,.

segments.transliteration: O Allah! If penalised (it means) I deserved punishment;

segments.arabic: أَنَا وَإِنْ تَغْفِرْ لِي فَأَهْلٌ لِذَلِكَ

translation.en: if forgiven (it is because) Thou art (the Most Merciful) Master. How would Thou punish?

segments.arabic: أَنْتَ وَكَيْفَ تُعَذِّبْنِي يَا سَيِّدِي وَحُبُّكَ فِي قَلْبِي أَمَا

translation.en: My Master! My heart is full of Thy love,undoubtedly,and Thy absolute authority,
very 'kindly, take notice of that,and keep, us together with people who are given respite.

segments.arabic: لَتَجْمَعَنَّ بَيْنِي وَبَيْنَ قَوْمٍ طَالَمَا عَادَيْتَهُم فِيكَ

translation.en: How much less attention they may pay to ' Thy commands!

segments.arabic: اَللّهُمَّ بِحَقِ أَوْلِيائِكَ الطَّاهِرِينَ عَلَيْهُمُ السَّلامُ

translation.en: O Allah ! For the sake of Thy pure and pious friends, peace be upon them,
make us preserve true traditions of the Holy Prophet (saws).
Return the possessions,to keep safe and watch over the Salat (adoration and worship of Allaah)

segments.arabic: اَللّهُمَّ أَنَا أَحَقُّ خَلْقِكَ أَنْ تَفْعَلَ ذَلِكَ بِنَا

translation.en: O Allah! truely, we are the worthiest among Thy creation,treat us in that context.
O Allah! . Make my knowledge about Thee of the highest quality.

segments.arabic: وَلاَ تُطْمِعَنَّ فِيَّ عَدُوَّاً وَلا حَاسِداًوَاحْفَظْنِي قَائِمَاً وَقَاعِدَاً وَيَقْظَانَ وَرَاقِدَاً

translation.en: Do not let me drown myself in hatred,nor feel resentfuI;keep me steadfast, within bounds, obedient,enduring.

segments.arabic: اَللّهُمَّ اغْفِرْ لِي وَارْحَمْنِي وَاهْدِنِي سَبِيلَكَ الأقْوَمَ

translation.en: O Allah forgive me,have mercy on me,make me strive in Thy honesty,
free me from the of burning Hell,from being consumed by the blazing fire,
make less what I have to pay back,and the punishment deserved
,make me be one of the choicest people for all times.

segments.arabic: اَللّهُمَّ ارْحَمْنِي مِمَّا لا طَاقَةَ لِي بِهِ وَلا صَبْرَ لِي عَلَيْهِ بِرَحْمَتِك يَا أَرْحَمَ الرَّاحِمِينَ.
segments.transliteration: o Allah' ' have mercy on me because I have not the strength,nor patience to withstand it (punishment) ,through Thy mercy,O the Most Merciful.

translation.en: Weekly Dua for Night
In the name of Allah, the Beneficent, the Merciful.
translation.fa: به نام خداى بخشاینده مهربان

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ رَبَّنَا كُنْتَ وَ لَمْ يَكُنْ قَبْلَكَ شَيْءٌ

translation.en: O, Allah, our Lord, You were, and nothing was there before You,

segments.arabic: وَ أَنْتَ تَكُونُ حِينَ لَا يَكُونُ غَيْرَكَ شَيْءٌ

translation.en: and You will exist when there is nothing except You.

segments.arabic: لَا يَعْلَمُ أَحَدٌ كُنْهَ عِزَّتِكَ وَ لَا يَسْتَطِيعُ أَحَدٌ أَنْ يَنْعَتَ عَظَمَتَكَ

translation.en: No one knows Your mightiness essence nor describes Your greatness,

segments.arabic: وَ لَا يَعْلَمُ أَحَدٌ أَيْنَ مُسَتَقَرُّكَ

translation.en: no one knows where is Your dwelling place;

segments.arabic: أَنْتَ فَوْقَ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ وَ أَنْتَ وَرَاءَ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ

translation.en: You are above everything, behind everything,

segments.arabic: وَ أَمَامَ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ وَ مَعَ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ

translation.en: in front of everything, and with everything.

segments.arabic: خَلَقْتَ يَا ذَا الْجَلَالِ وَ الْإِكْرَامِ

translation.en: You created, O Possessor of majesty and munificence;
glorification for Your Face purified the pride

segments.arabic: وَ الْعَظَمَةَ لِنَفْسِكَ وَ خَلَقْتَ الْقُوَّةَ

translation.en: and greatness of Your being and created the power
and competence of Your authority!

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ رَبَّنَا وَ لَكَ الْحَمْدُ عَلَى عَظَمَةِ مُلْكِكَ وَ جَلَالِ وَجْهِكَ

translation.en: So, Glory be to You, our God, and to you be the Praise upon the greatness of Your kingdom and Your Honorable Face;

segments.arabic: وَ هُوَ حَيْثُ لَا يَرَاهُ شَيْءٌ يُسَبِّحُ بِحَمْدِهِ

translation.en: and He is where nothing can witness Him; glorified is Him with His Praise
so, Glory and Praise be to You!
O God, our Lord to You belongs Praise;

segments.arabic: تَسَلَّطْتَ فَلَا أَحَدٌ مِنَ الْعِبَادِ يَحُدُّ وَصْفَكَ

translation.en: You ruled over the servants so no one will limit Your description.
You ruled with Your mightiness; You braced Yourself with Your omnipotence,

segments.arabic: وَ تَجَبَّرْتَ بِكِبْرِيَائِكَ وَ تَكَبَّرْتَ بِمُلْكِكَ

translation.en: You compelled with your pride, and You magnified with Your possessions,

segments.arabic: وَ تَمَلَّكْتَ بِقُدْرَتِكَ وَ قَدَرْتَ بِقُوَّتِكَ

translation.en: You possessed with Your power, You got capable with Your power.

segments.arabic: وَ لَا يَسْتَطِيعُ أَحَدٌ مِنَ الْعِبَادِ وَصْفَكَ

translation.en: No one among the servants can describe You,
and no one can evaluate Your value,

segments.arabic: وَ لَا يَسْبِقُ أَحَدٌ مِنْ قَضَائِكَ

translation.en: nor can anyone go beyond Your decree.
O God, our Lord to You belongs Praise;

segments.arabic: عَلَى جَلَالِ وَجْهِكَ وَ عَظَمَةِ مُلْكِكَ

translation.en: upon Your majestic face and the greatness of Your possessions;

segments.arabic: الَّذِي بِهِ قَامَتِ السَّمَاوَاتُ وَ الْأَرْضُ

translation.en: through which the heavens and earth endure.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ اللَّهُمَّ رَبَّنَا وَ لَكَ الْحَمْدُ

translation.en: Glory be to You, O Allah, our Lord; to You belongs Praise.
You filled everything with greatness,
and You created everything with power;
You encompass all things with knowledge,

segments.arabic: وَ وَسِعْتَ كُلَّ شَيْءٍ رَحْمَةً وَ عِلْماً

translation.en: and embracest everything in mercy and knowledge;
indeed, You are Most Merciful of the merciful!

segments.arabic: فَ سُبْحَانَكَ رَبَّنَا وَ لَكَ الْحَمْدُ عَلَى عِزَّةِ سُلْطَانِكَ

translation.en: Glory be to You, our God, and to you be the Praise upon Your glorified authority;

segments.arabic: الَّذِي خَشَعَ لَهُ كُلُّ شَيْءٍ مِنْ خَلْقِكَ

translation.en: which everything humbled to, from Your creation
and all Your servants got cautious of,
all Your creations are submitted to it.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ

translation.en: O Allah, bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammed;
translation.fa: خدایا درود فرست بر محمد و آل محمد

segments.arabic: وَ اجْزِهِ أَفْضَلَ الْجَزَاءِ وَ أَفْضَلَ

translation.en: repay him with the best reward, and with the best reward,

segments.arabic: مَا أَنْتَ جَازٍ أَحَداً مِنْ أَنْبِيَائِكَ عَلَى حِفْظِهِ دِينَكَ وَ إِبْلَاغِهِ وَ اتِّبَاعِهِ وَصِيَّتَكَ

translation.en: You ever granted to anyone of Your Prophets as he; safeguards Your religion and informs it, following Your will and command.

segments.arabic: وَ أَمْرَكَ حَتَّى تُشَرِّفَهُ يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ بِتَفْضِيلِكَ إِيَّاهُ عَلَى جَمِيعِ رُسُلِكَ

translation.en: Until You honor him with Your preferring upon all Your Messengers on the Day of Resurrection;
O Possessor of majesty and munificence!
O, Allah, just as You have rescued us through what You distinguished;

segments.arabic: مُحَمَّداً صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ

translation.en: Muhammed, blessings of Allah be upon him, and his Household
and have guided us through what You sent,

segments.arabic: وَ بَصَّرْتَنَا بِمَا أَوْصَيْتَهُ مِنَ الْعَمَلِ

translation.en: and have shown us through what deeds you command.
Therefore, send Your blessings upon him and his Household,
and repay him the best reward on our behalf.

segments.arabic: وَ أَفْضَلَ مَا جَازَيْتَ نَبِيّاً مِنْ أَنْبِيَائِكَ وَ رُسُلِكَ

translation.en: Best reward; You ever granted to any of Your Prophets and Messengers,

segments.arabic: وَ أَنْ تَجْمَعَ لِي بِهِ خَيْرَ الدُّنْيَا وَ الْآخِرَةِ

translation.en: and please grant me the best of this world and Hereafter.

segments.arabic: إِنَّكَ ذُو فَضْلٍ كَرِيمٍ يَا ذَا الْجَلَالِ وَ الْإِكْرَام
segments.transliteration: You are Possessor of generous bounty; O Possessor of majesty and munificence!

translation.en: Nafila App 1- Thursday Night Duas - Allhumma Anta awalo-
In the name of Allah, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful
translation.fa: به نام خداى بخشاینده مهربان

segments.arabic: اَللّهُمَّ أَنْتَ الأَوَّلُ فَلا شَيْءَ قَبْلَكَ
segments.transliteration: Allāhumma anta al-awwalu fā lā shay’ qablak

translation.en: O Allah, You are the First, and nothing is before You

segments.transliteration: Wa anta al-ākhiru alladhī lā yahlik

translation.en: And You are the Last, and nothing will outlast You

segments.transliteration: Wa anta al-ḥayyū alladhī lā yamūt

translation.en: And You are the Ever-Living, who never dies
And You are the Creator, who is never incapable

segments.transliteration: Wa anta al-Baṣīr alladhī lā yartāb

translation.en: And You are the All-Seeing, with no doubt

segments.transliteration: Wa anta as-Ṣādiq alladhī lā yakdhib

translation.en: And You are the Truthful, who never lies
The Subduer, who is never defeated
The Incomparable, whose works never come to an end
The Near, who never becomes distant
The Omnipotent, who is never wronged
The Forgiver, who never wrongs
The Eternal, who is not in need of sustenance
The Sustainer, who never sleeps
The Responder, who never tires
The Most Compassionate, who cannot be sought in vain
The All-Knowing, who is not taught
The Strong, who is never weak
The Magnificent, who cannot be described fully
The Faithful, who never betrays
The Just, who never wrongs
The Self-Sufficient, who is never poor
The Great, who never diminishes
The Protector, who cannot be defeated
The Benefactor, whose goodness is never denied
The Victor, who is never defeated
The Unique One, who is never dependent
The One, who seeks no counsel
The Bestower, who never tires
The Generous, who is never stingy
The Almighty, who is never humbled
The Preserver, who never forgets
The Ever-Sustaining, who never sleeps
The Hidden One, who cannot be seen
The Everlasting, who never perishes
The Remaining, who never decays
The Omnipotent, who is never contested
The One, who is not compared
There is no god but You
The Truth, who is not altered by time
And whose presence is not contained by places

segments.transliteration: Wa lā ya’khudhuka nawmun wa lā sinah

translation.en: And no sleep or drowsiness overtakes You
And nothing is comparable to You
And how can it be otherwise
When You are the Creator of everything
There is no god but You

segments.arabic: كُلُّ شَيءٍ هَالِكٌ إلاّ وَجْهَكَ الْكَرِيمَ
segments.transliteration: Kullu shay’in hālikun illā wajhaka al-karīm

translation.en: Everything perishes except Your Noble Face
The most honorable of faces
The refuge for the fearful and the protector of those seeking shelter
I ask You and not anyone else

segments.arabic: وَأَرْغَبُ إليكَ وَلاَ أَرْغَبُ إلى غَيْرِكَ
segments.transliteration: Wa arghabu ilayka wa lā arghabu ilā ghayrik

translation.en: And I turn to You with hope, not to anyone else
I ask You with the best of all requests

segments.transliteration: Wa anjahihā allati lā yanbaghī lil-‘ibād

translation.en: And I ask You for the most successful of them, which Your servants cannot ask except through You
That they should not ask You except with it
You are the Opener, the Bestower
The Source of all goodness, the Remover of faults
The Recorder of good deeds, the Eraser of sins
The Exalter of ranks
I ask You, O Allah, O Most Merciful
By Your most beautiful names

segments.arabic: وَكَلِمَاتِكَ الْعُليا وَنِعَمِكَ الَّتي لا تُحْصَى
segments.transliteration: Wa kalimātika al-‘uliyā wa ni‘amik allati lā tuḥṣā

translation.en: And by Your highest words and Your blessings that cannot be counted
And I ask You with the most honored of Your names to You
And with the most beloved and the most honored of them to You

segments.transliteration: Manzilah wa aqrabihā minka wa wasīlah

translation.en: In rank and the closest of them to You and the means to You
And the quickest of them to be answered by You
And by Your hidden and guarded name
The Majestic, the Glorious, the Great

segments.arabic: الَّذي تُحِبُّهُ وَتَرضَى عَمَّنْ دَعَاكَ بِهِ
segments.transliteration: Alladhī tuḥibbuhu wa tarḍā ‘amman da‘āka bihī

translation.en: Whom You love and are pleased with those who call You by it
And You answer their supplication
And it is Your right that You never reject the one who asks

segments.arabic: وَبُكُلِّ اسْمٍ هُوَ لَكَ فِي التَوْرَاةِ وَالإِنْجيلِ
segments.transliteration: Wa bi-kulli ismin huwa laka fi at-Tawrāt wa al-Injīl

translation.en: And by every name that is Yours in the Torah and the Gospel
And in the Psalms and the Qur'an, the great scripture

segments.arabic: وَبِكُلِّ اسمٍ هُوَ لَكَ عَلَّمْتَهُ أَحَداً مِنْ خَلْقِكَ
segments.transliteration: Wa bi-kulli ismin huwa laka ‘allamtahū aḥadan min khalqik

translation.en: And by every name You have taught to anyone among Your creation
Or kept it hidden from all creation

segments.arabic: أَوْ اسْتَأثَرْتَ بِهِ فِي عِلْمِ الْغَيِبِ عِنْدَكَ

translation.en: Or You have kept it for Yourself in the knowledge of the unseen

segments.arabic: وَبِكُلِّ اسْمٍ دَعَاكَ بِهِ حَمَلَةُ عَرْشِكَ
segments.transliteration: Wa bi-kulli ismin da‘āk bihī ḥamalat ‘arshik

translation.en: And by every name You are called by the bearers of Your Throne

segments.transliteration: Wa malā’ikatuka wa aṣfiyā’uka min khalqik

translation.en: And by Your angels and Your chosen ones among Your creation

segments.transliteration: Wa bi-ḥaqq as-sā’ilīn laka wa ar-rāghibīn ilayk

translation.en: And by the right of those who ask of You and those who yearn towards You

segments.transliteration: Wa al-muta‘awidhīn bika wa al-mutaḍarri‘īn ilayk

translation.en: And by those who seek refuge in You and those who humble themselves before You

segments.arabic: أَدْعُوكَ يَا أَللهُ دُعَاءَ مَنْ قَدْ اشْتَدَّتْ فَاقَتُهُ
segments.transliteration: Ad’ūka yā Allāhū du‘ā’ man qad ishtaddat fāqatuhu

translation.en: I call upon You, O Allah, as the one whose need has grown severe

segments.arabic: وَعَظُمَ جُرْمُهُ وَأَشْرَفَ عَلى الهَلَكَةِ نَفْسُهُ
segments.transliteration: Wa ‘aẓuma jurmuhu wa ashrāfa ‘alā al-halakāti nafsuh

translation.en: And whose sin has grown immense, and his soul is close to destruction

segments.arabic: وَضَعُفَتْ قُوَّتُهُ وَمَنْ لاَ يَثِقُ بِشَيءٍ مِنْ عَمَلِهِ
segments.transliteration: Wa ḍa‘ufat quwwatuhu wa man lā yaṯiqu bishay’in min ‘amalih

translation.en: And whose strength has weakened, and who trusts nothing of his deeds

segments.transliteration: Wa laa yajidu lifaaqatihi saaddan ghayrak.

translation.en: And he finds no reliever for his need but You.
I have fled from it to You.

segments.arabic: غيرَ مُستنكِفٍ وَلاَ مُسْتَكبِرٍ عَنْ عِبَادَتِكَ.

translation.en: Without reluctance or arrogance in worshiping You.
O comfort of every seeker of refuge.
O support of every needy one.
I ask You, as You are Allah.
The Most Compassionate, the Most Generous.
There is no god but You.
The Creator of the heavens and the earth.
The Possessor of Majesty and Honor.
The Knower of the unseen and the seen.
The Most Merciful, the Most Compassionate.
You are the Lord, and I am the servant.
You are the Master, and I am the owned.
You are the Mighty, and I am the humble.
You are the Rich, and I am the poor.
You are the Ever-Living, and I am the dead.
You are the Eternal, and I am the perishing.
You are the Benefactor, and I am the wrongdoer.
You are the Forgiving, and I am the sinner.
You are the Merciful, and I am the erring.
You are the Creator, and I am the created.
You are the Strong, and I am the weak.
You are the Giver, and I am the beggar.
You are the Sustainer, and I am the sustained.
You are the most deserving of my complaints.
I sought His help and placed my hope in Him.

segments.arabic: إِلهي كَمْ مِنْ مُذْنِبٍ قَدْ غَفَرْتَ لَهُ.
segments.transliteration: Ilahi kam min mudhnib qad ghafarta lahu.

translation.en: O my God, how many sinners You have forgiven.

segments.arabic: وَكَمْ مِنْ مُسيءٍ قَدْ تَجَاوَزْتَ عَنْهُ.
segments.transliteration: Wa kam min musee’in qad tajawazta ‘anhu.

translation.en: And how many wrongdoers You have overlooked.
So bless Muhammad and his family.
Forgive me, have mercy on me, and pardon me.
Grant me well-being and open for me from Your bounty.
Holy is Your mention, Sacred is Your command.
Your decree is final.

segments.arabic: يَسِّرْ لِي مِنْ أَمْرِي مَا أَخَافُ عُسْرَهُ.
segments.transliteration: Yassir li min amri ma akhaafu ‘usrahu.

translation.en: Ease for me the matters I fear difficulty in.

segments.arabic: وَفَرِّجْ عَنِّي وَعَنْ كُلِّ مُؤْمِنٍ وَمُؤْمِنَةٍ.
segments.transliteration: Wa farraj ‘anni wa ‘an kulli mu’minin wa mu’minah.

translation.en: And relieve me and every believing man and woman.
And suffice me from what I fear of necessity.
And avert from me what I fear of sorrow.

segments.arabic: وَسَهِّلْ لِي وَلِكُلِّ مُؤمِنٍ مَا أَرْجُوهُ.
segments.transliteration: Wa sahhil li wa likulli mu’minin ma arjooh.

translation.en: And make easy for me and every believer what I hope for.
There is no god but YOU
Glory be to You I have been an opressor to myself
In the name of Allah, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful.
translation.fa: به نام خداى بخشاینده مهربان

segments.arabic: اَللّهُمَّ إنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ رَحْمَةً مِنْ عِنْدكَ.

translation.en: O Allah, I ask You for mercy from You.

segments.arabic: تَهْدِي بِهَا قَلْبِي، وَتَجْمَعُ بِهَا أَمْرِي.
segments.transliteration: Tahdī bihā qalbī, wa tajma‘u bihā amrī.

translation.en: That guides my heart and unites my affairs.

segments.arabic: وَتَلُّمُ بِهَا شَعَثِي، وَتَحْفَظُ بِهَا غَائِبِي.
segments.transliteration: Wa tallummu bihā sha‘athī, wa taḥfaẓu bihā ghā’ibī.

translation.en: That mends my brokenness and protects what is absent of mine.

segments.arabic: وَتُصْلِحُ بِهَا شَاهِدِي، وَتَزَكِّي بِهَا عَمَلِي.
segments.transliteration: Wa tuṣliḥu bihā shāhidī, wa tuzakkī bihā ‘amalī.

translation.en: That rectifies my present state and purifies my deeds.

segments.arabic: وَتُلْهِمُنِي بِهَا رُشْدِي، وَتَعْصِمُنِي بِهَا مِنْ كُلِّ سُوْءٍ.
segments.transliteration: Wa tulhimunī bihā rushdī, wa ta‘ṣimunī bihā min kulli sū’.

translation.en: That inspires my guidance and protects me from all evil.

segments.arabic: اَللّهُمَّ أَعْطِنِي إيمَانَاً صَادِقَاً، وَيَقِيناً خَالِصَاً.
segments.transliteration: Allāhumma a‘ṭinī īmānan ṣādiqan, wa yaqīnan khāliṣan.

translation.en: O Allah, grant me true faith and pure certainty.

segments.transliteration: Wa raḥmatan anālu bihā sharafa karāmatika.

translation.en: And mercy through which I attain the honor of Your grace.
In this world and the Hereafter.

segments.arabic: اَللّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ الْفَوْزَ فِي الْقَضَاءِ.
segments.transliteration: Allāhumma innī as’aluka lfawza fi lqaḍā’.

translation.en: O Allah, I ask You for success in judgment.
And the ranks of the scholars, and the life of the joyful.
And victory over the enemies.
O Allah, I have placed my need before You.

segments.arabic: وَإِنْ ضَعُفَ عَمَلِي فَقَدْ افْتَقَرْتُ إِلَى رَحْمَتِكَ.
segments.transliteration: Wa in ḍa‘ufa ‘amalī faqad iftaqartu ilā raḥmatika.

translation.en: And though my deeds are weak, I am in need of Your mercy.

segments.arabic: فَأَسْأَلُكَ يَا قَاضِي الأُمُورِ، وَيَا شَافِي الصُّدُورِ.
segments.transliteration: Fa as’aluka yā Qāḍī lUmūr, wa yā Shāfī ṣṢudūr.

translation.en: So I ask You, O Arbiter of matters, and Healer of hearts.

segments.arabic: كَمَا تُجيرُ بَيْنَ الْبُحُورِ، أَنْ تُجِيرَنِي.
segments.transliteration: Kamā tujīru bayna lbuḥūr, an tujīranī.

translation.en: As You reconcile between the seas, to grant me safety.

segments.arabic: مِنْ عَذَابِ الْسَعِيرِ، وَمِنْ دَعْوَةِ الْثُّبُورِ.
segments.transliteration: Min ‘adhābi sSa‘īr, wa min da‘wati tThubūr.

translation.en: From the torment of Hellfire and the call of despair.
And from the trial of the graves.
O Allah, whatever is beyond my asking,

segments.arabic: وَلَمْ تَبْلَغْهُ نِيَّتِي، وَلَمْ تُحِطْ بِهِ مَسْأَلَتِي.
segments.transliteration: Wa lam tablughhu niyyatī, wa lam tuḥiṭ bihī mas’alatī.

translation.en: And my intention could not encompass, nor my request comprehend,

segments.arabic: مِنْ خَيْرٍ وَعَدْتَهُ أَحَدَاً مِنْ خَلْقِكَ.
segments.transliteration: Min khayrin wa‘adtahu aḥadan min khalqika.

translation.en: Of the good You promised to any of Your creation,
Indeed, I turn to You in earnest for it.

segments.arabic: اَللّهُمَّ يَا ذَا الْحَبْلِ الَّشدِيدِ، وَالأَمْرِ الرَّشِيدِ.
segments.transliteration: Allāhumma yā Dhā lḥabli shshadīd, wa lamri rrashīd.

translation.en: O Allah, O Possessor of firm resolve and wise command!
I ask You for safety on the Day of Judgment,
And Paradise on the Day of Eternity,
With the near ones who are witnesses.

segments.transliteration: Wa rrukka‘ wa ssujūd, almūfīna bi l‘uhūd.

translation.en: And those who bow and prostrate, fulfilling their pledges.
Indeed, You are Merciful and Loving.
And You do whatever You will.
O Allah, make us guides who are rightly guided,
Neither astray nor leading others astray.
At peace with Your allies and at war with Your enemies.
We love those who repent, out of love for You,
And oppose those who oppose You.
O Allah, this is the supplication, and it is upon You to respond.
And this is the effort, and upon You is the reliance.

segments.arabic: اَللّهُمَّ اجْعَلْ لِي نُورَاً فِي قَلْبِي.
segments.transliteration: Allāhumma aj‘al lī nūran fī qalbī.

translation.en: O Allah, make for me light in my heart,

segments.arabic: وَنُورَاً فِي قَبْرِي، وَنُورَاً بَيْنَ يَدَيَّ.
segments.transliteration: Wa nūran fī qabri, wa nūran bayna yadayya.

translation.en: And light in my grave, and light before me,

segments.transliteration: Wa nūran taḥtī, wa nūran fawqī.

translation.en: And light beneath me, and light above me,

segments.arabic: وَنُورَاً فِي سَمْعِي، وَنُورَاً فِي بَصَرِي.
segments.transliteration: Wa nūran fī sam‘ī, wa nūran fī baṣarī.

translation.en: And light in my hearing, and light in my sight,

segments.arabic: وَنُورَاً فِي شَعْرِي، وَنُورَاً فِي بَشَرِي.
segments.transliteration: Wa nūran fī sha‘rī, wa nūran fī basharī.

translation.en: And light in my hair, and light in my skin,

segments.arabic: وَنُورَاً فِي لَحْمِي، وَنُورَاً فِي عِظَامِي.
segments.transliteration: Wa nūran fī laḥmī, wa nūran fī ‘iẓāmī.

translation.en: And light in my flesh, and light in my bones.
O Allah, magnify the light for me.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ الَّذي اِرْتَدى بِالعِزِّ وَبَانَ بِهِ.
segments.transliteration: Subḥāna lladhī irtadā bil‘izz wa bāna bih.

translation.en: Glory be to Him who is cloaked in might and manifests through it.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ الَّذي لَبِسَ الْمَجْدَ وَتَكَرَّمَ بِهِ.
segments.transliteration: Subḥāna lladhī labisa lmajd wa takarrama bih.

translation.en: Glory be to Him who adorns majesty and ennobles through it.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ مَنْ لا يَنْبَغِي التَّسْبيحُ إلاّ لَهُ.
segments.transliteration: Subḥāna man lā yanbaghī ttasbīḥ illā lah.

translation.en: Glory be to Him to whom no glorification is due but His.
Glory be to the Possessor of bounty and blessings.
Glory be to the Possessor of glory and generosity.
Glory be to the Possessor of majesty and honor.

text.en: Before Fajr

segments.transliteration: allahumma salli ʿala muhammadin wa alihi

translation.en: O Allah, send blessings to Muhammad and his Household,
grant me Your satisfaction this very early morning,
place fear of You in my heart,
and separate it from (leaning to) anyone other than You,

segments.arabic: حَتَّىٰ لاَ أَرْجُوَ وَلاَ أَخَافَ إِلاَّ إِيَّاكَ
segments.transliteration: hatta la arjwa wa la akhafa illa iyyaka

translation.en: so that I will hope for and fear none save You.

segments.transliteration: allahumma salli ʿala muhammadin wa alihi

translation.en: O Allah, send blessings to Muhammad and his Household
and grant me resolute faith,
pure sincerity (to You),
honorable belief in (Your) oneness,
persistent straightness,
essential tolerance,
and satisfaction with (Your) predetermination and decrees.
O He Who settles the needs of His beseechers;

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ يَعْلَمُ مَا فِي ضَمِيرِ ٱلصَّامِتِينَ
segments.transliteration: ya man yaʿlamu ma fi damiri alssamitina

translation.en: O He Who knows what is in the innermost of the silent;
send blessings to Muhammad and his Household,
translation.fa: درود فرست بر محمد و آلش

translation.en: respond to my prayers,
forgive my sins,
expand my means of livelihood,
and settle the needs of myself

segments.transliteration: wa ikhwani fi dini wa ahli

translation.en: and my brethren-in-faith and my family members.

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي طُمُوحُ ٱلآمَالِ قَدْ خَابَتْ إِلاَّ لَدَيْكَ
segments.transliteration: ilahi tumuhu al-amali qad khabat illa ladayka

translation.en: O Allah, all ambitions of expectations are disappointed except those addressed to You,

segments.arabic: وَمَعَاكِفُ ٱلْهِمَمِ قَدْ تَعَطَّلَتْ إِلاَّ عَلَيْكَ
segments.transliteration: wa maʿakifu alhimami qad taʿattalat illa ʿalayka

translation.en: all resolute determinations are paralyzed except those relied upon You,

segments.arabic: وَمَذَاهِبُ ٱلْعُقُولِ قَدْ سَمَتْ إِلاَّ إِلَيْكَ
segments.transliteration: wa madhahibu alʿuquli qad samat illa ilayka

translation.en: and all reason-based tendencies are wasted except those directed to You.
So, You are the ultimate hope and to You is the resort.

segments.transliteration: ya akrama maqsudin wa ajwada mas'ulin

translation.en: O He Who is the noblest objective and the most magnanimous desired,
I am fleeing to You from myself.
O shelter of those who flee overburdened with the heavy loads of sins,
carrying my sins on my back,
I cannot find any interceder for me

segments.arabic: سِوَىٰ مَعْرِفَتِي بِأَنَّكَ أَقْرَبُ مَنْ رَجَاهُ ٱلطَّالِبُونَ
segments.transliteration: siwa maʿrifati bi'annaka aqrabu man rajahu alttalibuna

translation.en: except that I know for sure that You are the nearest of all those who are hoped by beseechers
and of all those whose donations are expected by the desirous.
O He Who has split the intellects on the recognition of Him,
made tongues articulate with the praising of Him

segments.arabic: وَجَعَلَ مَا ٱمْتَنَّ بِهِ عَلَىٰ عِبَادِهِ فِي كِفَاءٍ لِتَاْدِيَةِ حَقِّهِ
segments.transliteration: wa jaʿala ma imtanna bihi ʿala ʿibadihi fi kifa'in lita'diyati haqqhi

translation.en: and made that which He has conferred upon His servants enough means for the fulfillment of their duties towards Him;
(please) send blessings to Muhammad and his Household,
translation.fa: درود فرست بر محمد و آلش

segments.arabic: وَلاَ تَجْعَلْ لِلشَّيْطَانِ عَلَىٰ عَقْلِي سَبيلاًَ
segments.transliteration: wa la tajʿal lilshshaytani ʿala ʿaqli sabilan

translation.en: do not give Satan any way (of success) over my reason,

segments.transliteration: wa la lilbatili ʿala ʿamali dalilan

translation.en: and do not give wrongness a way to reach my deeds.

segments.arabic: أَسْتَغْفِرُ ٱللَّهَ ٱلَّذِي لاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ هُوَ
segments.transliteration: astaghfiru allaha alladhi la ilaha illa huwa

translation.en: I pray the forgiveness of Allah save Whom there is no god;
the Ever-living and Ever-subsisting,and I turn in repentance to Him
I begin this morning seeking the protection of Allah,
the protection of His angels,

segments.transliteration: wa dhimami anbiya'ihi wa rusulihi ʿalayhimu alssalamu

translation.en: the protections of His prophets and messengers, peace be upon them,

segments.arabic: وَذِمَّةِ مُحَمَّدٍ صَلَّىٰ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ
segments.transliteration: wa dhimmati muhammadin salla allahu ʿalayhi wa alihi

translation.en: the protection of Muhammad, peace be upon him and his Household,

segments.arabic: وَذِمَمِ ٱلأَوْصِيَاءِ مِنَ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَلَيْهِمُ ٱلسَّلاَمُ
segments.transliteration: wa dhimami al-awsiya'i min ali muhammadin ʿalayhimu alssalamu

translation.en: and the protections of the Successors from Muhammad's progeny, peace be upon them.

segments.arabic: آمَنْتُ بِسِرِّ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَلَيْهِمُ ٱلسَّلاَمُ وَعَلاَنِيَتِهِمْ
segments.transliteration: amantu bisirri ali muhammadin ʿalayhimu alssalamu wa ʿalaniyatihim

translation.en: I believe in the secrets of Muhammad's progeny, peace be upon them, and in their open affairs
and in their exoteric and their esoteric affairs.

segments.arabic: وَأَشْهَدُ أَنَّهُمْ فِي عِلْمِ ٱللَّهِ وَطَاعَتِهِ
segments.transliteration: wa ash-hadu annahum fi ʿilmi allahi wa taʿatihi

translation.en: I bear witness that they, as regarding their knowledge of Allah and their obedience to Him,

segments.transliteration: ka-muhammadin salla allahu ʿalayhi wa alihi

translation.en: are just like Muhammad, peace be upon him and his Household.

text.en: Surah's (Chapters) to be Recited on the Night Preceeding Friday
Salaats for the Night Preceeding Friday
It is worth mentioning that it is highly recommended to offer many (supererogatory) prayers at Friday nights such as;
Imam `Ali's Prayer, known as(Salat Amir al-Mu'minin)
Atwo-unit prayerin each of which after Sura Hamd, recite Sura Tawheed 70 times. Upon completion of the prayer say 'Astaghfirullah' 70 times.
It has been reported from the Holy Prophet, 'If one recites (

Asix-unit prayerin each of which after Surah Hamd recite Ayatul Kursi and Surah Kafiroon once each and Surah Tawheed thrice.
After the prayers, recite Ayatul Kursi three times. For one who recites this prayer the Almighty Allah appoints an angel to purify his sins who purifies his sins and in their place writes good fortune and bestows him whatever he desires.
Prayer of Imam Mahdi (peace be upon him) on Night of Friday

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إنْ أطَعْتُكَ فَالَمحْمَدَةُ لَكَ وَإنْ عَصَيْتُكَ فَالحُجَّةُ لَكَ مِنْكَ الرّوحُ وَمِنْكَ الفَرَجُسُبْحانَ مَنْ أنْعَمَ وَشَكَرَ سُبْحانَ مَنْ قَدَرَ وَغَفَرَ. اللَّهُمَّ إنْ كُنْتُ عَصَيْتُكَ فَإنّي قَدْ أطَعْتُكَ في أحَبِّ الاشْياءِإلَيكَ وَهوَ الايمانُ بِكَ، لَمْ أتَّخِذْ لَكَ وَلَداً وَلَمْ أدْعُ لَكَ شَريكا مَنّا مِنْكَ بِهِ عَليّ لامنّا مِنّي بِهِ عَلَيْكَ، وَقَدْ عَصَيْتُكَ ياإلهي عَلى غَيْرِ وَجْهِ المُكابَرَةِ وَلا الخُروجَ عَنْ عُبودِيَّتِكَ وَلا الجُحودِ لِرِبوبيَّتِكَ،ولكِنْ أطَعْتُ هَوايَ وَأزَلَّني الشَّيْطانُ فَلَكَ الحُجَّةُ عَليّ وَالبَيانُ، فَإنْ تُعَذِبْني فَبِذنوبي غَيْرَ ظالِمٍ وَإنْ تَغْفِرْ لي وَتَرْحَمْنِي فَإنَّكَ جَوادٌ كَريمٌ.

ياآمِنا مِنْ كُلِّ شَيٍ وَكُلُّ شَيٍ مِنْكَ خائِفٌ حَذِرٌ أسْأَلَكَ بِأمْنِكَ مِنْ كُلِّ شَيٍ وَخَوفِ كُلِّ شَيٍ مِنْكَ
أنْ تُصَلّيَ عَلى مُحَمَّدٍ وِآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ، وَأنْ تُعْطيَني أمانا لِنَفْسي وَأهْلي وَمالي وَوَلَدي
حَتّى لاأخافَ أحَداً وَلاأحْذَرَ مِنْ شَيٍ أبَداً إنَّكَ عَلى كُلِّ شَيٍ قَديرٌ
وَحَسْبُنا اللَّه وَنِعْمَ الوَكيلُ ياكافيَ إبْراهيمَ نَمْرودَ وَياكافيَ موسى فِرْعَوْنَ
أَسْأَلُكَ أنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلى مُحَمَّدٍ وَآل مُحَمَّدٍ وَأنْ تَكْفيَني شَرَّ

translation.en: Recite last 10 Verses of Sura Kahaf (18) on Thursday Nights before sleeping for salvation from the Dajjal

segments.arabic: وَعَرَضْنَا جَهَنَّمَ يَوْمَئِذٍ لِّلْكَافِرِينَ عَرْضًا ﴿١٠٠﴾الَّذِينَ كَانَتْ أَعْيُنُهُمْ فِي غِطَاءٍ عَن ذِكْرِي وَكَانُوا لَا يَسْتَطِيعُونَ سَمْعًا ﴿١٠١﴾أَفَحَسِبَ الَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا أَن يَتَّخِذُوا عِبَادِي مِن دُونِي أَوْلِيَاءَ ۚ إِنَّا أَعْتَدْنَا جَهَنَّمَ لِلْكَافِرِينَ نُزُلًا ﴿١٠٢﴾قُلْ هَلْ نُنَبِّئُكُم بِالْأَخْسَرِينَ أَعْمَالًا﴿١٠٣﴾الَّذِينَ ضَلَّ سَعْيُهُمْ فِي الْحَيَاةِ الدُّنْيَا وَهُمْ يَحْسَبُونَ أَنَّهُمْ يُحْسِنُونَ صُنْعًا ﴿١٠٤﴾ أُولَـٰئِكَ الَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا بِآيَاتِ رَبِّهِمْ وَلِقَائِهِ فَحَبِطَتْ أَعْمَالُهُمْ فَلَا نُقِيمُ لَهُمْ يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ وَزْنًا ﴿١٠٥﴾ ذَٰلِكَ جَزَاؤُهُمْ جَهَنَّمُ بِمَا كَفَرُوا وَاتَّخَذُوا آيَاتِي وَرُسُلِي هُزُوًا ﴿١٠٦﴾إِنَّ الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا وَعَمِلُوا الصَّالِحَاتِ كَانَتْ لَهُمْ جَنَّاتُ الْفِرْدَوْسِ نُزُلًا﴿١٠٧﴾خَالِدِينَ فِيهَا لَا يَبْغُونَ عَنْهَا حِوَلًا ﴿١٠٨﴾ قُل لَّوْ كَانَ الْبَحْرُ مِدَادًا لِّكَلِمَاتِ رَبِّي لَنَفِدَ الْبَحْرُ قَبْلَ أَن تَنفَدَ كَلِمَاتُ رَبِّي وَلَوْ جِئْنَا بِمِثْلِهِ مَدَدًا ﴿١٠٩﴾قُلْ إِنَّمَا أَنَا بَشَرٌ مِّثْلُكُمْ يُوحَىٰ إِلَيَّ أَنَّمَا إِلَـٰهُكُمْ إِلَـٰهٌ وَاحِدٌ ۖ فَمَن كَانَ يَرْجُو لِقَاءَ رَبِّهِ فَلْيَعْمَلْ عَمَلًا صَالِحًا وَلَا يُشْرِكْ بِعِبَادَةِ رَبِّهِ أَحَدًا ﴿١١٠﴾
segments.transliteration: Pdf Lbl All duasPdf 3 ColDesktop pageFriday Duas

translation.en: Recommended Salaats on Thursday Nights (Shab e Juma)s
I implore for Allah's forgiveness.

text.en: (2)Repeats the following litany one hundred times:

translation.en: All glory be to Allah all praise be to Allah;;

segments.arabic: وَلاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ ٱللَّهُ وَٱللَّهُ اكْبَرُ
segments.transliteration: wa la ilaha illa allahu wallahu akbaru

translation.en: there is no god save Allah;Allah is the Greatest;

segments.arabic: وَلاَ حَوْلَ وَلاَ قُوَّةَ إِلاَّ بِٱللَّهِ ٱلْعَلِيِّ ٱلْعَظِيمِ
segments.transliteration: wa la hawla wa la quwwata illa billahi alʿaliyyi alʿazimi

translation.en: and there is no power and no might save with Allah, the All-high, the All-Great.

text.en: (3)repeats the salwaat one hundred times:

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli ʿala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: O Allah, (please) bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad
translation.fa: خدایا درود فرست بر محمد و آل محمد

text.en: Another Prayer 2

translation.en: All glory be to Allah and with the Praising o

text.en: Significance of Friday
Imam al-Sadiq (peace be upon him) says,"Verily, Fridays enjoy rights (incumbent upon people).
After Fajr
General Acts
4/6th Imams dua
Main Duas
Misc.
Ziyarat/Salwat
Tasbih
Dhuhr
Sunset-Night
Salats
After Friday Salaat-ul Fajr

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ مَا قُلْتُ فِي جُمُعَتِي هٰذِهِ مِنْ قَوْلٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma ma qultu fi jumuʿati hadhihi min qawlin

translation.en: O Allah, whatever saying I have uttered this week,
whatever oath I have taken during it,
and whatever vow I have made during it,
verily, it is Your will that is before all that.

segments.arabic: فَمَا شِئْتَ مِنْهُ أَنْ يَكُونَ كَانَ
segments.transliteration: fama shi'ta minhu an yakuna kana

translation.en: Hence, only that which You will to have effect will come to pass

segments.arabic: وَمَا لَمْ تَشَأْ مِنْهُ لَمْ يَكُنْ
segments.transliteration: wa ma lam tasha' minhu lam yakun

translation.en: and whatever You do not will to have effect will never come to pass.

segments.transliteration: allahumma ighfir li wa tajawaz ʿanni

translation.en: O Allah, (please) forgive me and overlook my offenses.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ مَنْ صَلَّيْتَ عَلَيْهِ فَصَلاَتِي عَلَيْهِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma man sallayta ʿalayhi fasalati ʿalayhi

translation.en: O Allah, whosoever You bless, then I invoke Your blessings upon him
and whosoever You curse, then I invoke Your curse upon him.
O Allah, I am resorting to You with my needs,
and I am putting in Your presence my poverty,
my indigence, and my deprivation.
Verily, I hope for Your forgiveness more than I rely on my deeds.

segments.transliteration: wa lamaghfiratuka wa rahmatuka awsaʿu min dhunubi

translation.en: Indeed, Your forgiveness and Your mercy are more inclusive than my sins are.

segments.arabic: فَتَوَلَّ قَضَاءَ كُلِّ حَاجَةٍ لِي بِقُدْرَتِكَ عَلَيْهَا
segments.transliteration: fatawalla qada'a kulli hajatin li biqudratika ʿalayha

translation.en: So, (please) embark on settling all my needs out of Your power over them,
out of the easiness for You to do that,
and out of my urgent need for that.

segments.arabic: فَإنِّي لَمْ أُصِبْ خَيْراً قَطُّ إِلاَّ مِنَكَ
segments.transliteration: fa'inni lam usib khayran qattu illa minka

translation.en: Verily, I have not gained any good thing save from You

segments.arabic: وَلَمْ يَصْرِفْ عَنِّي سُوءاً قَطُّ أَحَدٌ سِوَاكَ
segments.transliteration: wa lam yasrif ʿanni su'an qattu ahadun siwaka

translation.en: and none could ever repel evil from me save You.

segments.transliteration: wa lastu arju li-akhirati wa dunyaya wa

translation.en: I hope for none to stand for me in my affairs of this world and the Next World
and on the day of my poverty,
when people will leave me alone in my hole (i.e. grave)
and I will then confess of my sins before You, except You.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ وَعَجِّلْ فَرَجَهُمْ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli ʿala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin wa ʿajjil farajahum

translation.en: O Allah, bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad and hasten their Reappearance

segments.arabic: لَا بِشَيْءٍ مِن آلَاءِكَ رَبِّي اُكَذِّبُ
segments.transliteration: la bishay'in min ala'ika rabbi ukadhdhibu.

translation.en: "None of Your favors do I deny,"

segments.transliteration: astaghfiru allaha rabbi wa atubu ilayhi

translation.en: I pray for the forgiveness of Allah—my Lord, and I repent before Him.
O Allah, (please do) let Your blessings
and the blessings of Your angels and Messengers
be on Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad.

segments.transliteration: allahumma salli ʿala muhammadin wa alihi

translation.en: O Allah, send blessings to Muhammad and his Household,
grant me Your satisfaction this very early morning,
place fear of You in my heart,
and separate it from (leaning to) anyone other than You,

segments.arabic: حَتَّىٰ لاَ أَرْجُوَ وَلاَ أَخَافَ إِلاَّ إِيَّاكَ
segments.transliteration: hatta la arjwa wa la akhafa illa iyyaka

translation.en: so that I will hope for and fear none save You.

segments.transliteration: allahumma salli ʿala muhammadin wa alihi

translation.en: O Allah, send blessings to Muhammad and his Household
and grant me resolute faith,
pure sincerity (to You),
honorable belief in (Your) oneness,
persistent straightness,
essential tolerance,
and satisfaction with (Your) predetermination and decrees.
O He Who settles the needs of His beseechers;

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ يَعْلَمُ مَا فِي ضَمِيرِ ٱلصَّامِتِينَ
segments.transliteration: ya man yaʿlamu ma fi damiri alssamitina

translation.en: O He Who knows what is in the innermost of the silent;
send blessings to Muhammad and his Household,
translation.fa: درود فرست بر محمد و آلش

translation.en: respond to my prayers,
forgive my sins,
expand my means of livelihood,
and settle the needs of myself

segments.transliteration: wa ikhwani fi dini wa ahli

translation.en: and my brethren-in-faith and my family members.

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي طُمُوحُ ٱلآمَالِ قَدْ خَابَتْ إِلاَّ لَدَيْكَ
segments.transliteration: ilahi tumuhu al-amali qad khabat illa ladayka

translation.en: O Allah, all ambitions of expectations are disappointed except those addressed to You,

segments.arabic: وَمَعَاكِفُ ٱلْهِمَمِ قَدْ تَعَطَّلَتْ إِلاَّ عَلَيْكَ
segments.transliteration: wa maʿakifu alhimami qad taʿattalat illa ʿalayka

translation.en: all resolute determinations are paralyzed except those relied upon You,

segments.arabic: وَمَذَاهِبُ ٱلْعُقُولِ قَدْ سَمَتْ إِلاَّ إِلَيْكَ
segments.transliteration: wa madhahibu alʿuquli qad samat illa ilayka

translation.en: and all reason-based tendencies are wasted except those directed to You.
So, You are the ultimate hope and to You is the resort.

segments.transliteration: ya akrama maqsudin wa ajwada mas'ulin

translation.en: O He Who is the noblest objective and the most magnanimous desired,
I am fleeing to You from myself.
O shelter of those who flee overburdened with the heavy loads of sins,
carrying my sins on my back,
I cannot find any interceder for me

segments.arabic: سِوَىٰ مَعْرِفَتِي بِأَنَّكَ أَقْرَبُ مَنْ رَجَاهُ ٱلطَّالِبُونَ
segments.transliteration: siwa maʿrifati bi'annaka aqrabu man rajahu alttalibuna

translation.en: except that I know for sure that You are the nearest of all those who are hoped by beseechers
and of all those whose donations are expected by the desirous.
O He Who has split the intellects on the recognition of Him,
made tongues articulate with the praising of Him

segments.arabic: وَجَعَلَ مَا ٱمْتَنَّ بِهِ عَلَىٰ عِبَادِهِ فِي كِفَاءٍ لِتَاْدِيَةِ حَقِّهِ
segments.transliteration: wa jaʿala ma imtanna bihi ʿala ʿibadihi fi kifa'in lita'diyati haqqhi

translation.en: and made that which He has conferred upon His servants enough means for the fulfillment of their duties towards Him;
(please) send blessings to Muhammad and his Household,
translation.fa: درود فرست بر محمد و آلش

segments.arabic: وَلاَ تَجْعَلْ لِلشَّيْطَانِ عَلَىٰ عَقْلِي سَبيلاًَ
segments.transliteration: wa la tajʿal lilshshaytani ʿala ʿaqli sabilan

translation.en: do not give Satan any way (of success) over my reason,

segments.transliteration: wa la lilbatili ʿala ʿamali dalilan

translation.en: and do not give wrongness a way to reach my deeds.

segments.arabic: أَسْتَغْفِرُ ٱللَّهَ ٱلَّذِي لاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ هُوَ
segments.transliteration: astaghfiru allaha alladhi la ilaha illa huwa

translation.en: I pray the forgiveness of Allah save Whom there is no god;
the Ever-living and Ever-subsisting,and I turn in repentance to Him

text.en: Friday Duas at Fajr

translation.en: I begin this morning seeking the protection of Allah,
the protection of His angels,

segments.transliteration: wa dhimami anbiya'ihi wa rusulihi ʿalayhimu alssalamu

translation.en: the protections of His prophets and messengers, peace be upon them,

segments.arabic: وَذِمَّةِ مُحَمَّدٍ صَلَّىٰ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ
segments.transliteration: wa dhimmati muhammadin salla allahu ʿalayhi wa alihi

translation.en: the protection of Muhammad, peace be upon him and his Household,

segments.arabic: وَذِمَمِ ٱلأَوْصِيَاءِ مِنَ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَلَيْهِمُ ٱلسَّلاَمُ
segments.transliteration: wa dhimami al-awsiya'i min ali muhammadin ʿalayhimu alssalamu

translation.en: and the protections of the Successors from Muhammad's progeny, peace be upon them.

segments.arabic: آمَنْتُ بِسِرِّ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَلَيْهِمُ ٱلسَّلاَمُ وَعَلاَنِيَتِهِمْ
segments.transliteration: amantu bisirri ali muhammadin ʿalayhimu alssalamu wa ʿalaniyatihim

translation.en: I believe in the secrets of Muhammad's progeny, peace be upon them, and in their open affairs
and in their exoteric and their esoteric affairs.

segments.arabic: وَأَشْهَدُ أَنَّهُمْ فِي عِلْمِ ٱللَّهِ وَطَاعَتِهِ
segments.transliteration: wa ash-hadu annahum fi ʿilmi allahi wa taʿatihi

translation.en: I bear witness that they, as regarding their knowledge of Allah and their obedience to Him,

segments.transliteration: ka-muhammadin salla allahu ʿalayhi wa alihi

translation.en: are just like Muhammad, peace be upon him and his Household.
All glory be to Allah, the All-great and with the Praising of Him;

segments.transliteration: astaghfiru allaha rabbi wa atubu ilayhi

translation.en: I pray the forgiveness of Allah, my Lord, and I turn repentant to Him.

text.en: Ghusl and Duai.
Ghusl and Dua

segments.arabic: أَشْهَدُ أَنْ لاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ ٱللَّهُ
segments.transliteration: ash-hadu an la ilaha illa allahu

translation.en: I bear witness that there is no god except Allah,
the One, (there is) no associate with Him;

segments.transliteration: wa ash-hadu anna muhammadan ʿabduhu wa rasuluhu

translation.en: and I testify that Muhammad is His servant and His Messenger.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli ʿala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin wajʿalni mina alttawwabina

translation.en: O Allah, send blessings to Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,
translation.fa: خدایا درود فرست بر محمد و آل محمد

translation.en: and make me of those who turn to You constantly

segments.transliteration: ash-hadu an la ilaha illa allahu

translation.en: and those who keep themselves pure and clean.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ طَهِّرْنِيْ وَ طَهِّرْ قَلْبِيْ وَ انْقِ غُسْلِيْ وَ اَجْرِ عَلٰى لِسَانِيْ ذِكْرَكَ وَ ذِكْرَ نَبِيِّكَ مُحَمَّدٍ صَلَّي اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ اٰلِهٖ وَ اجْعَلْنِيْ مِنَ التَّوَّابِيْنَ وَ مِنَ الْمُتَطَهِّرِيْنَ.
segments.transliteration: allaahumma tahhirnee wa tahhir qalbee wan qe ghuslee wa ajre a’laa lesaanee zikraka wa zikra nabiyyeka mohammadin sallal laaho a’layhe wa aalehi waj a’lnee menat tawwaabeena wa menal motatahhereen.

translation.en: O Allah! Purify me and purify my heart, adorn my bath, and make Your remembrance and remembrance of Your prophet Muhammad, peace of Allah be on him and his progeny, flow on my tongue. Make me amongst the repantent and the purified ones.

text.en: SalwaatTheSalwaat-Invocation of blessingsupon the Holy Prophet and his Household 1000 times and in different formats has been highly recommended for Friday.Imam Muhammad al-Baqir (peace be upon him)
Salwaat

segments.arabic: اَللّهُمَّ اجْعَلْ صَلَواتِكَ وَصَلَوَاتِ مَلَاْئِكَتِكَ وَرُسُلِكَ وَجَمِيعِ خَلْقِكَ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وأَهْلِ بَيْتِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَلَيْهِ وَعَليْهِمُ السَّلَامُ وَرَحْمَةُ اللهِ وَبَرَكَاتُهُ.
اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلى مُحَمَّدٍ وَّآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ وَّعَجِّلْ فَرَجَهُمْ
segments.transliteration:
Ettiquettesii.It isrecommended to cut the mustache neatly and trim the nails,
As has been mentioned in narrations, these acts bring about expansion in sustenance, and security from insanity and leprosy.
Whilst doing that, say the following :بسم ٱللهوبٱللهbismillahi wa billahiIn the Name of Allah (I begin);and by (the command of) Allahوعلى سنة محمد وآل محمدwa ʿala sunnati muhammadin wa ali muhammadand according to the tradition of Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad (I do this).It is also recommended, on cutting the nails, to start with the little finger of the left hand and end with that of the right hand. The same thing is applicable to the nails of the feet. Then, the cut nails should be buried.iii.It is recommended toapply perfume and put on the best of one’s clothes.iv.It is recommended togive Sadqa/Alms, for the rewards are doubled up on Fridays and at Friday nights, as is confirmed by narrations, as one thousand folds as giving alms on other days.v.It is recommended toarrange fruits and wholesome meals to the family membersso that Fridays will be their days of pleasure.vi.It is recommended toeat pomegranate before breakfast and to eat seven leaves of endive before midday.Imam Musa al-Kadhim (peace be upon him) is reported to have said,“The heart of him who eats a pomegranate before breakfast on Fridays will be enlightened for forty days. To eat two pomegranates increases the period of enlightenment to eighty days, and so on. It also dismisses the evil suggestions. Of course, to get rid of Satan’s suggestions is to stop acting disobediently to Almighty Allah; and to stop acting disobediently to Him allows entrance to Paradise.”In al-Misbah, the author has said that to eat pomegranates on Fridays and at Friday nights has great merits.vii.It is recommended todedicate Fridays to learning the religiouslawsand instructions, not to wandering in others’ gardens, accompanying the vicious and the licentious, speaking about the others’ defects, laughing and guffawing, reciting poetry, and discussing useless subjects as well as similar matters. Disadvantages arisen from such matters are too many to be mentioned.Imam Jaʿfar al-Sadiq (peace be upon him) is reported as saying,“Woe to a Muslim who does not dedicate Fridays to learning the affairs of his religion.”viii.It is recommended tovisit the tombs of one’s relatives in general and parents in particular. Imam al-Baqir (peace be upon him) is reported as saying,“Visit the graves of your relatives on Fridays, for they know about those who visit their graves and will be happy for that.”ix.It is recommended to dye hair with hibiscus, for it saves from leprosy and insanity.Surahsx.Aga Mohinuddin kumaili khurasaniin NijatBaksh Giraftaran says that Allah(swt) himself will take care of the person & his family ( like a weekly insurance)if we recites after any salat Fajr/Dhuhr ON FRIDAY the following; 
Sura Fatiha & Sura Tauheed once & then Sura Falaq & Sura Naas7times eachxi.SURAHSIt is also highly recommended to reciteSurahs al-Nisa' (No. 4)Surah Hud (No. 11)al-Kahf (No.18)al-Saffat (No. 37)al-Rahman (No. 55Surah al-Ahqaf (No. 46Surah al-Mu'minun (No. 23)xii.Imam al-Sadiq (peace be upon him) is reported as saying that any one who recites Surah al-Ahqaf at Friday nights or on Fridays will not be inflicted by dismays in his worldly life and will be saved from the horrors on the Resurrection Day,and that any one who recites Surah al-Mu'minun regularly each Friday will come upon a happy end and will be granted an abode in the Supreme Paradise with the Prophets and Messengers of Almighty Allah.Imam Mahdi(ajtfs) and FridayFriday - Day Associated with the Awaited Saviour, Imam Mahdi (peace be upon him)Friday has a relationship with Imam al-Mahdi —may Allah hasten his advent— from several aspects. On Friday, Imam al-Mahdi (peace be upon him) was born and on Friday, his delightful advent shall be. Hence, to expect Relief on Friday should be more intense than other days.In the Imam's (peace be upon him) Ziyarat on Fridays the following statement is mentioned;'Today is Friday, which is your day on which your advent is expected to bring about relief to the believers at your hands..'In fact, Friday has been decided as feast day just because it is the day on which Imam al-Mahdi (peace be upon him) will reappear in order to purify the entire earth from the filth of polytheism and atheism and from the dirt of acts of disobedience to Almighty Allah and from sins.Recite Friday Ziyarat of Imam Mahdi(ajtfs) in the Ziyarat tab on this page.ReciteDua' al-Nudbah Supplication,ReciteSalwaat on Imam ajtfsRecite thesupplication that Imam ʿAli ibn Musa al-Ridha (peace be upon him) advised to be said for the sake of Imam al-Mahdi (peace be upon him).Index of All Supplications related to Imam Mahdi(ajtfs)Friday and Imam Zamana from Najmuth SaqibIt is having a special significance with regard to Imam Zamana (a.s.).
One of them being that the birth of the Holy Imam (a.s.) occurred on that
day and also that his reappearance will
also take place on Friday; therefore, awaiting and anticipation on that day
is more than on other days as is explained in some traditional reports and
in it is mentioned in Ziyarat of the Imam specially performed on Friday
that:O Master, O Lord of the time, benedictions of God be on you, and on
your family members on this Friday and it is the day on which I anticipate
your reappearance and victory in it for the believer upon your hands…till
the end when it is said:O my Lord, O the master of the age, blessings of the Almighty Allah be on
you, and on your family members; this is Friday and it is the day on which
you await your reappearance and the deliverance of the believers at your
hands.And I O my master, on that day, am your guest and I seek refuge with you
and you, O my master, are the noble one and the descendant of the great
ones and you are appointed to afford refuge; thus accept me in your care
and give me refuge…and so on.On the contrary, considering Friday to be a day of Eid from the four
important Eid days in fact from the aspect that it is a special day for the
believers as they will be elated on seeing the earth purified from the filth
of polytheism and infidelity and the dirts of divine disobedience and from
the presence of the tyrants, apostates, disbelievers and hypocrites and the
appearance of the word of truth, the loftiest religion, laws of faith and the
emblems of Muslims without any hurdle and prohibition of anyone from
the enemies of the Almighty Allah and his devotees on that bright day will
be pleased and elated.In the supplication after the rising of the Sun on Friday there is hint to this
point as Sayyid Ibne Taaoos has mentioned in Jamaalul Usboo’1 , p. 152 from
Imam Moosa Kazim (a.s.) that he said to Muhammad bin Sinan on Friday:Have you recited the necessary supplication this day?
He replied: asked: Which supplication?
He replied: Say:Peace be on you, O the new blessed day which the Almighty Allah has
made as the Eid for His friends, who are purified from the filths and who
have exited from mischief and those, who have returned with His Awliya
(a.s.) and who are cleaned of pains and the filths of beliefs and evil deeds,
who have devoted their lives to the love of the friends of the Almighty Allah.Then turn towards the Sun and say:“Peace be on you O the brilliant Sun.” and so on.
On the contrary, Friday is one of the names of the master of the affair or it is an allusion to that noble man or the reason of naming Friday as Fridayas Saduq in Khesaal p. 396 has narrated from Saqar bin Abi Dalf.Imam Ali Naqi (a.s.) says in the exegesis of the tradition of the Messenger
of Allah (s.a.w.a.) that you must not be inimical to the days, as they will
also be inimical to you. Then he said: We are the days…
Till he said: And Friday is the son of my son and the folks of truth will
gather with him.Saduq said: Days are not the Imams (a.s.); however it is an allusion to them so that other than the folks of truth do not understand its meaning asthe Almighty Allah has stated:“I swear by the fig and the olive, And mount Sinai, And this city made
secure,”95:1-3
implying the Prophet, Ali, Hasan and Husain (a.s.) and then He has
mentioned some other similes also therein.Husain bin Hamadan in his book has narrated from Hasan
bin Masud and Muhammad bin Khalil that they said: We came to our master, Abul Hasan Ali bin Muhammad (a.s.) in Samarrah and found him
with some Shia people. We asked the Imam regarding the auspicious and inauspicious days.He replied: Do not be inimical to the days, lest they become inimical to
you.I asked the Imam about the meaning of this tradition.He replied: There are two meanings of this tradition: outward and inward.The outward meaning is that Saturday is for us, Sunday is for our Shia,
Monday is for Bani Umayyah, Tuesday is for their followers; Wednesday
is for Bani Abbas and Thursday is for their followers; and Friday is the Eid
for Muslims. And the inward meaning is that Saturday is my grandfather,
the Messenger of Allah (s.a.w.a.), Sunday is Ameerul Momineen (a.s.),
Monday is Hasan and Husain (a.s.), Tuesday is Ali bin Husain,
Muhammad bin Ali and Ja’far bin Muhammad (a.s.); Wednesday is Moosa
Ibne Ja’far, Ali bin Moosa and Muhammad bin Ali (a.s.) and I; and
Thursday is my son, Hasan and Friday is his son; who will unite the words;
that is the faiths. All will unite on a single faith and through it he will
perfect the bounty and the Almighty Allah will prove and express the truth
and destroy falsehood and he is your awaited Mahdi. Then he recited:
“In the name of Allah, the Beneficent, the Merciful. What remains
with Allah is better for you if you are believers, and I am not a
keeper over you.”11:86Then he said: He, by Allah, is the remnant of Allah.2Hidaayatul Kubraa, p. 363
Saduq (r.a.) writes in Khesaal:394 narrating from Imam Ja’far Sadiq (a.s.)
that he said: Saturday is for us, Sunday is for our Shia, Monday is for our
enemies, Tuesday is for Bani Umayyah, Wednesday is for taking medicine,
Thursday is the day when wishes will be fulfilled and Friday is for hygiene
and for use of perfumes and it is the Eid of Muslims and it is the superior
to Eidul Fitr and Eidul Azha.Day of Ghadeer is the best of the Eids and it is the 18th of Zilhajj and it
was a Friday. The Qaaem of us Ahle Bayt (a.s.), will appear on Friday and
the Judgment Day will be on Friday and no deeds is better on Friday,
except reciting Salawat on Muhammad and Aale Muhammad (a.s.).Allamah Majlisi has narrated in Behaarul Anwaarvol. 3, pp. 340-341 that from the ancient
sources of our scholars: After you conclude the Morning Prayer on Friday,
recite the following testimony and then recite Salawat on Muhammad and
Aale Muhammad (a.s.) and it is a lengthy supplication and some of its
sentences are related to Imam Asr (a.s.)In the name of Allah, the Beneficent, the Merciful. O Allah, be for Your
Wali among Your creatures, a protector, a guard, a leader and helper, till
he lives in Your earth in peace and enjoys it for a long time. And appoint
him and his progeny the inheritor Imams.And bring together his dispersed affairs, and perfect his rule, and bring
for him his subjects and make his glory strong, and bless him with patience
and forbearance. Till he takes revenge and give peace to his heart. And
cure the hearts of malice and make the burning hearts cool. And end the
regret of aggrieved souls, from the aspect of blood shed unlawfully and
broken relations, and unknown obedience [ignorance about compulsory
obedience of the rightful Imam] make the hardships good for him and
make Your bestowals wide and complete Your bounties on him with a good
protection to him. O Allah, remove the fear of enemy from him and erase
his memory of enemies; do bad with all those who wish bad for him and
plot against all those who plot against him and reserve evil for him. O
Allah, scatter their conglomeration and end their limit and make their
hearts overawed and make their steps slip. And crush their tribes, and
scatter their affairs as they have wasted the prayer and have followed
their base desires.They have committed evils and kept away from good. Therefore, apprehend
them through exemplary punishment and show them regrets. Indeed You
are powerful over everything.It is recommended to recite the well known Dua Nudbah, which is related
to His Eminence and in fact the points mentioned therein are very
touching and moving; causing one to be emotionally charged with
attachment to the Imam for one, who has tasted even a little bit of the
syrup of his love; it is bitterness of the poison of his separation, which
becomes effective on Friday; on the contrary on its eve also as is
mentioned in an ancient book of Ziyarat written by Shaykh Tabarsi, the
author of Ehtejaaj, in which it is mentioned that it should be recited and
since it is a lengthy supplication and is available in many other books as
well, we have not mentioned it here.The best deed on FridayHe says that the best of the deeds on Friday is to recite a hundred times
after Asr Prayer: O Allah, bless Muhammad and the progeny of
Muhammad and hasten their reappearance. And in many supplications of
Friday, seeking help and hastening of the reappearance in the first
supplications of the post prayer litanies of Zuhr on Friday, it is mentioned:
O Allah, as my life is dedicated for Paradise with an infallible from the
progeny of the Messenger of Allah (s.a.w.a.), who is aggrieved due to his
victimization and whose rulership is destined that through him He would
fill up the earth with justice as it would have been fraught with injustice
and oppression. O Allah, hasten his reappearance.

translation.en: Ettiquettes

text.en: Ettiquettes

translation.en: In the Name of Allah (I begin);and by (the command of) Allah

segments.transliteration: wa ʿala sunnati muhammadin wa ali muhammad

translation.en: and according to the tradition of Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad (I do this).

text.en: Surahs
Surahs
x.Aga Mohinuddin kumaili khurasaniin NijatBaksh Giraftaran says that Allah(swt) himself will take care of the person & his family ( like a weekly insurance)if we recites after any salat Fajr/Dhuhr ON
Imam Mahdi(ajtfs) and Friday
Imam Mahdi(ajtfs) and Friday
Friday - Day Associated with the Awaited Saviour, Imam Mahdi (peace be upon him)Friday has a relationship with Imam al-Mahdi —may Allah hasten his advent— from several aspects.
Main Duas recited on FridayDua' al-NudbahAlla Humma Idfa from Imam `Ali ibn Musa al-Ridha (as)for the sake of Imam al-Mahdi (ajtfs)Dua ofImam Ali(as)

translation.en: In the Name of Allah, the All-beneficent, the All-merciful.

segments.arabic: اَلْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ ٱلْأَوَّلِ قَبْلَ ٱلْإِنْشَاءِ وَٱلْإِحْيَاءِ
segments.transliteration: alhamdu lillahi al-awwali qabla al-insha'i wal-ihya'i

translation.en: All praise be to Allah, the First before the bringing forth and the giving of life,
and the Last after the annihilation of all things,

segments.arabic: ٱلْعَلِيمِ ٱلَّذِي لاَ يَنْسَىٰ مَنْ ذَكَرَهُ
segments.transliteration: alʿalimi alladhi la yansa man dhakarahu

translation.en: the All-knowing Who forgets not him who remembers Him,
decreases not him who thanks Him,
disappoints not him who supplicates Him,

segments.transliteration: wa la yaqtaʿu raja'a man rajahu

translation.en: and cuts not off the hope of him who hopes in Him!
O Allah, I call You to witness
and You are sufficient Witness
and I call to witness all Your angels,
the inhabitants of Your heavens,
the bearers of Your Throne,

segments.transliteration: wa man baʿathta min anbiya'ika wa rusulika

translation.en: Your prophets and Your messengers whom You have sent out,
and the various kinds of creatures You have brought forth,
that I bear witness that You are Allah;
there is no god but You, You alone,

segments.transliteration: la sharika laka wa la ʿadila

translation.en: Who have no associate nor any equal,

segments.transliteration: wa la khulfa liqawlika wa la tabdila

translation.en: and Your word has no failing, nor any change;

segments.arabic: وَ أَنَّ مُحَمَّداً صَلَّىٰ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ عَبْدُكَ وَرَسُولُكَ
segments.transliteration: wa anna muhammadan salla allahu ʿalayhi wa alihi ʿabduka wa rasuluka

translation.en: and that Muhammad, Allah bless him and his Household, is Your servant and Your messenger;
he delivered to the servants that with which You charged him,

segments.arabic: وَجَاهَدَ فِي ٱللَّهِ عَزَّ وَجَلَّ حَقَّ ٱلْجِهَادِ
segments.transliteration: wa jahada fi allahi ʿazza wa jalla haqqa aljihadi

translation.en: struggled for Allah as is His due,

segments.arabic: وَ أَنَّهُ بَشَّرَ بِما هُوَ حَقُّ مِنَ ٱلثَّوابِ
segments.transliteration: wa annahu bashshara bima huwa haqqun min alththawabi

translation.en: gave the good news of the truth of reward,

segments.arabic: وَ أَنْذَرَ بِما هُوَ صِدْقٌ مِنَ ٱلعِقَابِ
segments.transliteration: wa andhara bima huwa sidqun min alʿiqabi

translation.en: and warned of the veracity of punishment.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ ثَبِّتْنِي عَلَىٰ دِينِكَ مَا أَحْيَيْتَنِي
segments.transliteration: allahumma thabbitni ʿala dinika ma ahyaytani

translation.en: O Allah, make me firm in Your religion as long as You keep me alive,

segments.arabic: وَلاَ تُزِغْ قَلْبِي بَعْدَ إِذْ هَدَيْتَنِي
segments.transliteration: wa la tuzigh qalbi baʿda idh hadaytani

translation.en: make not my heart swerve after You have guided me,

segments.transliteration: wa hab li min ladunka rahmatan

translation.en: and give me mercy from You,
surely, You are the All-bestower.

segments.transliteration: salli ʿala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: Bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,
translation.fa: بر محمّد و خاندان محمّد درود فرست

translation.en: make me one of his followers and his partisans,
muster me in his band,
and give me the success of accomplishing the obligatory observance of Fridays,

segments.arabic: وَمَا أَوْجَبْتَ عَلَيَّ فِيهَا مِنَ ٱلطَّاعَاتِ
segments.transliteration: wa ma awjabta ʿalayya fiha min attaʿati

translation.en: performing the acts of obedience which You have made incumbent upon me within it,
and receiving the bestowal which You have apportioned for its people
on the Day of Recompense!
Surely, You are the Almighty, the All-wise!

text.en: B.The Holy Prophet (s)

translation.en: O Allah, You are my Lord;
there is no god save You;

segments.transliteration: khalaqtani wa ana ʿabduka wabnu amatika

translation.en: You have created me, and I am Your slave and the son of Your bondmaid;

segments.transliteration: wa fi qabdatika wa nasiyati biyadika

translation.en: and I am in Your grip; and my forehead is in Your Hand;

segments.arabic: امْسَيْتُ عَلَىٰ عَهْدِكَ وَوَعْدِكَ مَا ٱسْتَطَعْتُ
segments.transliteration: amsaytu ʿala ʿahdika wa waʿdika maistataʿtu

translation.en: I come to observe my covenant and promise to You as much as I can.

segments.arabic: اعُوذُ بِرِضَاكَ مِنْ شَرِّ مَا صَنَعْتُ
segments.transliteration: aʿudhu biridaka min sharri ma sanaʿtu

translation.en: I take refuge in Your pleasure against the evil of my deeds.
I acknowledge Your favors and confess of my sins.

text.en: C. Dua by Imam Sadiq(as)on Friday

translation.en: In the name of Allah, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful.
translation.fa: به نام خداى بخشاینده مهربان

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلامُ عَلَيْكَ أَيُّهَا الْيَوْمُ الْجَدِيدُ الْمُبَارَكُ الَّذِي جَعَلَ اللَّهُ عِيداً لِأَوْلِيَائِهِ الْمُطَهَّرِينَ مِنَ الدَّنَسِ الْخَارِجِينَ عَنِ الْبَلْوَى
segments.transliteration: Assalāmu ‘alayka ayyuhā lyawmu ljadīdu lmubāraku alladhī ja‘ala llāhu ‘īdan liawliyā’ihi lmuṭahharīna mina ddanasi lkhārijīna ‘ani lbalwā.

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O new blessed day, which Allah has made a celebration for His purified allies who are free from defilement and tribulation.

segments.arabic: الْمَكْرُورِينَ مَعَ أَوْلِيَائِهِ الْمُصطَفَّيْنَ مِنَ الْعَكَرِ الْبَاذِلِينَ أَنْفُسَهُمْ مَعَ أَوْلِيَاءِ الرَّحْمَنِ تَسْلِيماً
segments.transliteration: Almakrūrīna ma‘a awliyā’ihi lmuṣṭafayyna mina l‘akari lbādilīna anfusahum ma‘a awliyā’i rRaḥmāni taslīman.

translation.en: The ones enduring trials with His chosen allies, those purified of impurities, who sacrificed themselves in submission alongside the allies of the Most Merciful.
Peace be upon you, an everlasting and eternal peace.
And turn to the sun and say:

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلامُ عَلَيْكِ أَيَّتُهَا الشَّمْسُ الطَّالِعَةُ وَالنُّورُ الْفَاضِلُ الْبَهِيُّ
segments.transliteration: Assalāmu ‘alayki ayyatuha shshamsu ṭṭāli‘atu wa nnūru lfāḍilu lbahiyy.

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O shining sun, the radiant and resplendent light.

segments.arabic: أُشْهِدُكِ بِتَوْحِيدِ اللَّهِ لِتَكُونِي شَاهِدِي إِذَا ظَهَرَ الرَّبُّ لِفَصْلِ الْقَضَاءِ فِي الْعَالَمِ الْجَدِيدِ.
segments.transliteration: Ushhiduki bitawḥīdi llāhi litakūnī shāhidī idhā ẓahara rRabbu lifaṣli lqaḍā’i fī l‘ālamī ljadīd.

translation.en: I bear witness through you to the Oneness of Allah so that you may be my witness when the Lord appears to settle judgment in the new world.

segments.arabic: اَللّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ وَبِنُورِ وَجْهِكَ الْكَرِيمِ أَنْ تُشَوِّهَ خَلْقِي
segments.transliteration: Allāhumma innī a‘ūdhu bika wa binūri wajhika lkarīmi an tushawwih khalqī.

translation.en: O Allah, I seek refuge in You and in the light of Your noble face from any distortion of my form.

segments.arabic: وَأَنْ تُرَدِّدَ رُوحِي فِي الْعَذَابِ بِنُورِكَ الْمَحْجُوبِ عَنْ كُلِّ نَاظِرٍ نَوِّرْ قَلْبِي
segments.transliteration: Wa an turaddida rūḥī fī l‘adhābi binūrika lmaḥjūbi ‘an kulli nāẓirin nawwir qalbī.

translation.en: And from my soul being returned to torment; by Your light concealed from all eyes, illuminate my heart.

segments.arabic: فَإِنِّي أَنَا عَبْدُكَ وَفِي قَبْضَتِكَ وَلَا رَبَّ لِي سِوَاكَ.
segments.transliteration: Fa innī anā ‘abduka wa fī qabḍatika wa lā Rabba lī siwāka.

translation.en: For indeed, I am Your servant, within Your grasp, and I have no Lord besides You.

segments.arabic: اَللّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَتَقَرَّبُ إِلَيْكَ بِقَلْبٍ خَاضِعٍ وَإِلَى وَلِيِّكَ بِبَدَنٍ خَاشِعٍ وَإِلَى الْأَئِمَّةِ الرَّاشِدِينَ بِفُؤَادٍ مُتَوَاضِعٍ
segments.transliteration: Allāhumma innī ataqarrabu ilayka biqalbin khāḍi‘in wa ilā waliyyika bibaḍanin khāshi‘in wa ilā la’imma rrāshidīna bifu’ādin mutawāḍi‘.

translation.en: O Allah, I draw near to You with a submissive heart, to Your guardian with a humble body, and to the rightlyguided Imams with a modest soul.

segments.transliteration: Wa ilā nnuqabā’i lkirāmi wa nnujabā’i laghirrah.

translation.en: And to the noble leaders and the distinguished chosen ones.

segments.arabic: بِالذُّلِّ وَأَرْغُمُ أَنْفِي لِمَنْ وَحَّدَكَ وَلَا إِلَهَ غَيْرُكَ وَلَا خَالِقَ سِوَاكَ
segments.transliteration: Bidhdhulli wa urghimu anfī liman waḥḥadaka wa lā ilāha ghayruka wa lā khāliqa siwāka.

translation.en: With humility, I lower my nose in submission to the One who declares Your Oneness, for there is no deity besides You, nor creator other than You.

segments.arabic: وَأُصَغِّرُ خَدِّي لِأَوْلِيَائِكَ الْمُقَرَّبِينَ وَأَفْضِي عَنْكَ كُلَّ ضِدٍّ وَنِدٍّ
segments.transliteration: Wa uṣaghghiru khaddī liawliyā’ika lmuqarrabīn wa ufḍī ‘anka kulla ḍiddin wa nidd.

translation.en: I humble my cheek before Your close allies and renounce every opposition or equal to You.
For I am Your humble servant, acknowledging my sin.

segments.arabic: أَسْأَلُكَ يَا سَيِّدِي حَطَّهَا عَنِّي وَتَخْلِيصِي مِنَ الْأَدْنَاسِ وَالْأَرْجَاسِ.
segments.transliteration: As’aluka yā Sayyidī ḥaṭṭahā ‘annī wa takhlīṣī mina ladnāsi wa larjās.

translation.en: I ask You, O my Master, to remove it from me and purify me from filth and impurities.

segments.arabic: إِلَهِي وَسَيِّدِي قَدِ انْقَطَعْتُ عَنْ ذَوِي الْقُرْبَى وَاسْتَغْنَيْتُ بِكَ عَنْ أَهْلِ الدُّنْيَا مُتَعَرِّضاً لِمَعْرُوفِكَ
segments.transliteration: Ilāhī wa Sayyidī qad inqaṭa‘tu ‘an dhawī lqurbā wa istaghnaytu bika ‘an ahli ddunyā muta‘arriḍan lima‘rūfik.

translation.en: My God and Master, I have cut off ties with relatives and found sufficiency in You over the people of the world, seeking Your favor.

segments.arabic: أَعْطِنِي مِنْ مَعْرُوفِكَ مَعْرُوفاً تُغْنِينِي بِهِ عَمَّنْ سِوَاكَ.
segments.transliteration: A‘ṭinī min ma‘rūfika ma‘rūfan tughnīnī bihi ‘amman siwāka.

translation.en: Grant me from Your bounty a favor that makes me independent of all besides You.

segments.arabic: اللّهُمَّ اجْعَلْني أخْشاكَ كأني أراكَ وَأسْعِدْني بِتَقْواكَ، وَلاتُشْقِني بِنَشْطي لِمَعاصيكَ وَخِرْ لي في قَضائِكَ وَبارِكْ لي في قَدَرِكَ حَتّى لا أحُبَّ تأخيرَ ما عَجّلْتَ وَلاتَعْجيلَ ماأخّرْتَ،
segments.transliteration: allahummaj-a’lnee akhshaaka h’attaa ka annee araaka wa as-i’dnee bi-taqwaaka wa laa tushqinee bi-ma-a’as’eeka wa khir lee fee qaz”aaa-ika wa baarik lee fee qadrika h’attaa laa uh’ibba taa’jeela maa akhkharta wa laa taakheera maa a’jjalta

translation.en: O Allah make me submissive, till I surrender to Thee, make me happy by putting "fear of God" in my heart, Do not make me miserable on account of disobedience unto Thee. Write (prescribe) for me freedom from pain, trouble and anxiety, make ready for me blessings and happiness, so that what is last does not come in advance. Or what is urged to happen quickly is not delayed. Give me contentment and an independent disposition.

segments.arabic: واجْعَلْ غِناي في نَفْسي وَمَتِعْني في سَمْعي وَبَصَري وَاجْعَلْهُما الوارِثَيْنِ مِنّي، وَانْصِرْني عَلى مَنْ ظَلَمَني وَأرِني فيهِ قُدْرَتَكَ يارَبِّ وَأقِرَّ بِفَضْلِكَ عَيْني.
segments.transliteration: waj-a’l ghinaaya fee nafsee wa mattia’-nee bi-sam-e’e. wa bas’aree waj-a’l humal waaritheena minnee wan s’urnee a’laa man z’alamanee wa arinee feehi qudrataka yaa rabbi wa aqrir bid’aalika a’ynee

translation.en: Make me derive advantage from the power of hearing (listen to and accept advise and obey), And seeing (discernment, intelligence, and perception of truth); And both of them to my inheritors (children) Give me an upper hand over him who intimidates me, and treat me well through Thy might and power;

segments.arabic: اللّهُمَّ أعِنّي عَلى هَوْلِ يَوْمِ القيامَةِ، وَأخْرِجْني مِنَ الدُّنْيا سالِما، وَزَوِّجني مِنَ الحورِ العينِ، وَاكْفِني مؤُونَتي وَمؤُونَةَ عيالي وَمؤُونَةَ النّاسِ، وَأدْخِلْني بِرَحْمَتِكَ في عِبادِكَ الصالِحينَ.
segments.transliteration: allahumma a-i’nnee a’laa hawli yawmil qiyaamah wa akhrijnee minad dunyaa saaliman wa adkhinil jannata aaminan’w wa zawwijnee minal h’ooril e’eni wakfinee moo-natee wa moo-nata a’yaalee wa moo-natan naasi wa adkhilnee birah’matika fee i’baadikas’ s’aalih’eena

translation.en: O Lord, and keep me in that exact state. O Allah! Attend to and take care of me in the frightening hours of the Day of Judgment. Make me leave this world in safe and sound condition, and enter the permanent land of bliss and beauty (Paradise) in peace and tranquility; And join the delightful charming people who have refined manners, intelligent minds and beautiful faces, multiply provisions allotted to me, and to my dependents, also promote welfare of the people and make me sit, through Thy mercy, in the company of Thy upright servants.

segments.arabic: اللّهُمَّ إنْ تُعَذِّبْني فَأهْلٌ لِذلِكَ أنا وَإنْ تَغْفِرْ لي فأهْلٌ لِذلك أنْتَ ، وكيف تعذبني
segments.transliteration: allahumma in u-a’d’d’ibnee fa-ahlun lid’aalika anaa wa in taghfir lee fa-ahlun lid’aalika anta wa kayfa tu-a’d’d’ibnee

translation.en: O Allah! If penalized (it means) I deserved punishment; if forgiven ( it is because) Thou art (the Most Merciful) Master. How would Thou punish?

segments.arabic: يا سيدي وحبك في قلبي ، أما وعزتك لئن فعلت لتجمعن بيني وبين قوم طالما عاديتهم فيك
segments.transliteration: yaa sayyidee wa h’ubbuka fee qalbee amaa wa i’zzatika la-in fa-a’lta d’aalika bee li-najma-u’nna baynee wa bayna qawmin t’aala maa a’adaytuhum feeka

translation.en: O My Master! My heart is full of Thy Love, undoubtedly, and Thy absolute authority, very kindly, take notice of that, and keep us together with people who are given respite. How much less attention they may pay to Thy commands

segments.arabic: اللهم بحق أوليائك الطاهرين اللّهُمَّ إرْزِقْنا صِدْقَ الحَديثِ وَأداءِ الامانَةِ وَالُمحافَظَةَ عَلى الصلواتِ،
segments.transliteration: allaahumma bih’aqqi awliyaa-ikat’ t’aahireena a’layimus salaam arzuqnaa s’idqal h’adeethi wa adaaa-al amaanatil muh’aafaz’ata a’las’ s’alawaati

translation.en: O Allah! For the sake of Thy pure and pious friends, peace be upon them, make us preserve true traditions of the Holy Prophet (S.A), And come up to the confidence put in us, to keep safe and watch over the "backbone" of Thy religion (adoration and worship of Allah).

segments.arabic: اللّهُمَّ إنَّا أحَقُّ خَلْقِكَ أنْ تَفْعَلَهُ بِنا، اللّهُمَّ افْعَلْهُ بِنا برحمتك
segments.transliteration: allaahumma innaa ah’aqqu khalqika an taf-a’la a’aalika binaa allaahummaf a’lhu binaa birah’matika

translation.en: O Allah! Truly, we are the worthiest among thy creation, treat us in that context. O Allah! Treat us mercifully.

segments.arabic: اللّهُمَّ ارْفَعْ ظَنّي صاعِداً وَلا تُطْمِعْ فِيَّ عَدوّا وَلا حاسِداً وَأحْفَظْنِي قائِما وَقاعِداً وَيَقْظانَ وَراقِداً،
segments.transliteration: allaahumma arfaa’z’annee ilayka s’aa-i’dan wa laa tat’ma-inna fiyya a’duwwan wa laa h’aasidan wah’faz’nee qaaa-iman wa qaa-i’dan wa yaqt’anna wa raaqidan

translation.en: O Allah! Make my knowledge about thee of the highest quality. Do not let me drown myself in hatred, nor feel resentful; keep me steadfast, within bounds, obedient, enduring.

segments.arabic: اللّهُمَّ إغْفِرْ لي وَارْحَمْني وَاهْدِني سَبيلَكَ الاقْوَمُ وَقِني حَرَّ جَهَنَّمَ وَ احْطِطْ عَنّي المَغْرَمَ وَالمَأثَمَ وَاجْعَلْني مِنْ خيارِ العالَمِ.
segments.transliteration: allaahummaghfir lee warh’amnee wahdinee sabeelakal aqwamu wa qinee h’arra jahannama wa h’areeqal muz”rami wah’t’ut’ a’nnil maghrama wal maa-thuma waj-a’lnee min khiyaaril a’alami

translation.en: O Allah forgive me, have mercy on me, make me strive in Thy way honestly, free me from the heat of burning Hell, from being consumed by the blazing fire, make less what I have to pay back, and punishment I deserve, make me be one of the choicest people for all times.

segments.arabic: إرْحَمْني مَمّا لاطاقَةَ لي بِهِ وَلاصَبْرَ لي عَلَيْهِ. برحمتك يا أرحم الرحمين ،  اللهم صل على محمد وآهل بيته الطيبين الطاهرين
segments.transliteration: allaahumma arh’amnee mimmaa laa t’aaqai lee bihee wa laa s’abra lee a’layhi bi-rah’matika yaa arh’amar raah’imeen allaahumma s’alli a’laa muh’ammadin’w wa aali muh’ammad.

translation.en: O Allah! Have mercy on me because have not the strength, nor patience to withstand it (punishment), Through Thy mercy, O the Most Merciful.  O Allah send blessings on Muhammad and on the children of Muhammad.

text.en: Dua Yarhamaha Ibaad on Friday

translation.en: In the name of Allah, the Most Merciful, the Most Compassionate.
translation.fa: به نام خداى بخشاینده مهربان

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ يَرْحَمُ مَنْ لَا يَرْحَمُهُ الْعِبَادُ
segments.transliteration: Yā Man Yarḥam Man Lā Yarḥamuhu al-‘Ibād

translation.en: O He Who shows mercy to those whom the servants do not show mercy,

segments.arabic: وَيَا مَنْ يَقْبَلُ مَنْ لَا تَقْبَلُهُ الْبِلَادُ
segments.transliteration: Wa Yā Man Yaqbal Man Lā Taqbaluhu al-Bilād

translation.en: O He Who accepts those whom the lands do not accept,

segments.arabic: وَيَا مَنْ لَا يَحْتَقِرُ أَهْلَ الْحَاجَةِ إِلَيْهِ
segments.transliteration: Wa Yā Man Lā Yaḥtaqir Ahl al-Ḥājah ilayh

translation.en: O He Who does not despise those in need of Him,

segments.arabic: وَيَا مَنْ لَا يُخَيِّبُ الْمُلِحِّينَ عَلَيْهِ
segments.transliteration: Wa Yā Man Lā Yukhayyib al-Muliḥḥīn ‘alayh

translation.en: O He Who does not disappoint those who persist in asking Him,

segments.arabic: وَيَا مَنْ لَا يَجْبَهُ بِالرَّدِّ أَهْلَ الدَّالَّةِ عَلَيْهِ
segments.transliteration: Wa Yā Man Lā Yajbah bi-al-Radd Ahl al-Dāllah ‘alayh

translation.en: O He Who does not respond with rejection to those who depend on Him,

segments.arabic: وَيَا مَنْ يَجْتَبِي صَغِيرَ مَا يُتْحَفُ بِهِ
segments.transliteration: Wa Yā Man Yajtabī Ṣaghīr Mā Yutḥaf bih

translation.en: O He Who accepts the little that is offered to Him,

segments.transliteration: Wa Yashkur Yasīr Mā Yu‘mal lah

translation.en: And appreciates the small deeds done for Him,
O He Who thanks for the little,
And rewards with the great,

segments.arabic: وَيَا مَنْ يَدْنُو إِلَى مَنْ دَنَا مِنْهُ
segments.transliteration: Wa Yā Man Yadnū ilā Man Danā Minhu

translation.en: O He Who draws near to those who draw near to Him,

segments.arabic: وَيَا مَنْ يَدْعُو إِلَى نَفْسِهِ مَنْ أَدْبَرَ عَنْهُ
segments.transliteration: Wa Yā Man Yad‘ū ilā Nafsih Man Adbar ‘anhu

translation.en: O He Who calls to Himself those who turn away from Him,

segments.transliteration: Wa Yā Man Lā Yughayyir al-Ni‘mah

translation.en: O He Who does not change the blessings,
And does not hasten to punish,

segments.arabic: وَيَا مَنْ يُثْمِرُ الْحَسَنَةَ حَتَّى يُنْمِيَهَا
segments.transliteration: Wa Yā Man Yuthmir al-Ḥasanah ḥattā Yunmiyahā

translation.en: O He Who makes the good deed grow until He completes it,
And forgives the bad deed until He removes it,
Hopes have turned away before reaching the extent of Your generosity,
