With needs, and the containers of requests have been filled with the abundance of Your generosity,

segments.arabic: أَوْعِيَةُ الطَّلِبَاتِ، وَتَفَسَّخَتْ دُونَ بُلُوغِ نَعْتِكَ
segments.transliteration: Aw‘iyat al-Ṭalibāt, wa-Tafassaḥat Dūn Bulūgh Na‘tika

translation.en: And the descriptions have fallen short of reaching Your attributes,

segments.arabic: الصِّفَاتُ، فَلَكَ الْعُلُوُّ الْأَعْلَى فَوْقَ كُلِّ عَالٍ
segments.transliteration: al-Ṣifāt, Falak al-‘Ulū al-A‘lā Fawq Kull ‘Ālī

translation.en: So You have the highest loftiness above all that is high,
And the most glorious majesty above all that is majestic,
Every great thing before You is small,

segments.arabic: وَكُلُّ شَرِيفٍ فِي جَنْبِ شَرَفِكَ حَقِيرٌ
segments.transliteration: wa-Kull Sharīf fī Janb Sharafik Ḥaqīr

translation.en: And every honorable thing beside Your honor is insignificant.
Those who approach anyone other than You are disappointed,
And those who expose themselves except to You are losers,
And those who seek assistance except by You are lost,

segments.arabic: وَأَجْدَبَ الْمُنْتَجِعُونَ إِلَّا مَنِ انْتَجَعَ فَضْلَكَ
segments.transliteration: wa-Ajdaba al-Muntaji‘ūn illā Man Intaja‘ Faḍlak

translation.en: And those who seek pastures except for Your bounty are barren.
Your door is open for those who desire,
And Your generosity is available to the seekers,
And Your help is near to those who cry out for it.
Those who hope in You are not disappointed,
And those who expose themselves to Your gifts do not despair,
And those who seek Your forgiveness are not afflicted by Your punishment.
Your provision is extended to those who disobey You,
And Your forbearance is offered to those who oppose You,
Your habit is to be kind to those who do wrong,
And Your way is to preserve those who transgress,
Until Your patience has deceived them,

segments.arabic: عَنِ الرُّجُوعِ، وَصَدَّهُمْ إِمْهَالُكَ عَنِ النُّزُوعِ

translation.en: From returning, and Your delay has prevented them from repenting.
You only delayed them so that they might return,

segments.arabic: إِلَى أَمْرِكَ، وَأَمْهَلْتَهُمْ ثِقَةً بِدَوَامِ مُلْكِكَ
segments.transliteration: ilā Amrik, wa-Amhaltahum Thiqatan bi-Dawām Mulkik

translation.en: To Your command, and You gave them respite trusting in the permanence of Your dominion.

segments.arabic: فَمَنْ كَانَ مِنْ أَهْلِ السَّعَادَةِ خَتَمْتَ لَهُ بِهَا
segments.transliteration: Fa-Man Kān Min Ahl al-Sa‘ādah Khatamt lahu bihā

translation.en: So, whoever is among the people of happiness, You have sealed it for him,

segments.arabic: وَمَنْ كَانَ مِنْ أَهْلِ الشَّقَاوَةِ خَذَلْتَهُ لَهَا
segments.transliteration: wa-Man Kān Min Ahl al-Shaqāwah Khadhaltahu Lahā

translation.en: And whoever is among the people of misery, You have forsaken him to it.
All of them are returning to Your judgment,
And their affairs will return to Your command.

segments.arabic: لَمْ يَهِنْ عَلَى طُولِ مُدَّتِهِمْ سُلْطَانُكَ

translation.en: Your authority has not weakened over the length of their duration,
And Your proof has not been invalidated by Your delay in punishing them.

segments.arabic: حُجَّتُكَ قَائِمَةٌ لَا تُدْحَضُ، وَسُلْطَانُكَ ثَابِتٌ
segments.transliteration: Ḥujjatuka Qā’imah Lā Tudḥaḍ, wa-Sulṭānuka Thābit

translation.en: Your argument is established and cannot be invalidated, and Your authority is firm,

segments.arabic: لَا يَزُولُ، فَالْوَيْلُ الدَّائِمُ لِمَنْ جَنَحَ عَنْكَ
segments.transliteration: Lā Yazūl, Fa-al-Wayl al-Dā’im li-Man Janaḥ ‘ank

translation.en: It does not waver, so the eternal woe is for those who deviate from You,
And the disgrace that ruins for those who lose hope in You,
And the most severe misery for those who are deluded by You.
How much he will wander in Your punishment,
And how long he will hesitate in Your retribution,
And how far his end is from relief,
And how hopeless he is of an easy way out.

segments.arabic: عَدْلًا مِنْ قَضَائِكَ لَا تَجُورُ فِيهِ

translation.en: It is justice from Your judgment that is not unjust,

segments.arabic: وَإِنْصَافاً مِنْ حُكْمِكَ لَا تَحِيفُ عَلَيْهِ

translation.en: And fairness from Your rule that is not biased against him.
You have made the arguments clear, and exhausted the excuses,

segments.arabic: وَقَدْ تَقَدَّمْتَ بِالْوَعِيدِ، وَتَلَطَّفْتَ فِي التَّرْغِيبِ
segments.transliteration: wa-Qad Taqaddamt bi-al-Wa‘īd, wa-Talaṭṭaft fī al-Targhīb

translation.en: And You have advanced the warning, and been gentle in encouragement,
And You have given examples, and prolonged the respite,
And You have delayed while being capable of hastening,
And You have been patient while being able to act promptly.
Your patience is not out of weakness,
Nor is Your delay out of helplessness,
Nor is Your withholding out of neglect,
Nor is Your waiting out of pretense,
But so that Your argument may be more complete,
And Your generosity more perfect,
And Your beneficence more abundant,
And Your blessings more complete.
All of that was and has not ceased to be,
And it will continue to be and You will not cease.
Your argument is more sublime than to be described,

segments.arabic: بِكُلِّهَا، وَمَجْدُكَ أَرْفَعُ مِنْ أَنْ يُحَدَّ
segments.transliteration: bi-Kulliha, wa-Majduka Arfa‘ min an Yuḥadd

translation.en: In its entirety, and Your glory higher than to be limited,

segments.arabic: بِكُنْهِهِ، وَنِعْمَتُكَ أَكْثَرُ مِنْ أَنْ تُحْصَى
segments.transliteration: bi-Kunhih, wa-Ni‘matuka Akthar min an Tuḥṣā

translation.en: In its essence, and Your blessings more numerous than to be counted,

segments.arabic: بِأَسْرِهَا، وَإِحْسَانُكَ أَكْثَرُ مِنْ أَنْ تُشْكَرَ
segments.transliteration: bi-Asrihā, wa-Iḥsānuka Akthar min an Tushkar

translation.en: In their entirety, and Your kindness more abundant than to be thanked,

segments.arabic: عَلَى أَقَلِّهِ، وَقَدْ قَصَّرَ بِيَ السُّكُوتُ

translation.en: For the least of it, and my silence has fallen short,
From praising You, and my restraint has hindered me,
From glorifying You, and my utmost is to admit my shortcomings.

segments.arabic: لَا رَغْبَةً يَا إِلَهِي بَلْ عَجْزاً

translation.en: Not out of desire, O my God, but out of incapacity.
So here I am approaching You with supplication,
And asking You for good hospitality,
So bless Muhammad and his family,
And hear my whispers, and answer my supplication,
And do not seal my day with disappointment,
And do not confront me with rejection in my request,
And honor my departure from You,
And my return to You.
You are not constrained by what You wish,
And not incapable of what You are asked,
And You are capable of everything,

segments.arabic: وَلَا حَوْلَ وَلَا قُوَّةَ إِلَّا بِاللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: wa-Lā Ḥawla wa-Lā Quwwata illā bi-Allah

translation.en: And there is no power and no strength except by Allah,
The Most High, the Most Great.
In the name of Allah and by Allah,
I have taken the first,
And I have taken the last,
And I have taken those standing,
And I have taken those sitting,
Darkness covers their eyes,
And the sky sends upon them flames,
And the earth, meteors,

segments.transliteration: Fa aghshay-nāhum fa hum lā yubṣirūn,

translation.en: We have blinded them so they do not see,
Allah protects me,
And strengthens me against creation,
By Allah's light I see clearly,
And by Allah the Holy's strength, I seek help,
Allah gives me,
And Allah, the King, the Compeller, raises me,
On the wings of the cherubim,
And the truthful ones,
And the ones who line up,
And those who glorify You,
I call upon Allah,
And You are Allah, the Most Merciful of the merciful,
To You, Allah, I call,
God of the heavens and the earth,
To You, Allah, I call,
God of the near angels,
To You, Allah, I call,
God of all creation,
To You, Allah, I call,
God of the sun and the moon,
To You, Allah, I call,
God of the stars,
To You, Allah, I call,
God of the East and the West,
To You, Allah, I call,
A Holy God,

segments.arabic: أَنْتَ اللَّهُ الْعَزِيزُ الْجَبَّارُ الْمُتَكَبِّرُ الرَّحْمَنُ الرَّحِيمُ،
segments.transliteration: Anta Allāh al-‘Azīz al-Jabbār al-Mutakabbir al-Raḥmān al-Raḥīm,

translation.en: You are Allah, the Mighty, the Compeller, the Majestic, the Most Merciful,
Whose mercy is vast,
The Creator of the throne of His greatness,
The Mighty, the Great, the Majestic,
Blessed is the name of Allah,
The King of Kings,
May these names of Yours,
Be a support and victory for me,
And an opening and awe,
And light and greatness,
Forever as long as I live,

segments.arabic: وَ تَكُونُ لِي حِفْظاً وَ خَلَاصاً وَ نَجَاحاً،
segments.transliteration: Wa takūnu lī ḥifẓan wa khilāṣan wa najāḥan,

translation.en: And be for me a protection, deliverance, and success,
I am Your servant and the son of Your servant,
Your mercy envelops me,
And Your punishment covers me,
By Your might and awe,
Save me from calamities,

segments.arabic: كَمَا نَجَّيْتَ إِبْرَاهِيمَ خَلِيلَكَ مِنَ النَّارِ،
segments.transliteration: Kamā najjayta Ibrāhīm khalīlaka mina al-nār,

translation.en: As You saved Abraham, Your friend, from the fire,

segments.arabic: وَ كَمَا كَبَسَ مُوسَى كَلِيمُكَ فِرْعَوْنَ،
segments.transliteration: Wa kamā kabasa Mūsā kalīmuka Fir‘awn,

translation.en: And as You destroyed Pharaoh for Moses, Your speaker,
And by these names, save me by them,

segments.arabic: وَ كَمَا الْأَرْضُ مَكْبُوسَةٌ تَحْتَ السَّمَاءِ،
segments.transliteration: Wa kamā al-arḍu makbūsatun taḥta al-samā’,

translation.en: And just as the earth is beneath the sky,

segments.arabic: وَ كَمَا بَنُو آدَمَ مَكْبُوسُونَ تَحْتَ السَّمَاءِ،
segments.transliteration: Wa kamā banū Ādam makbūsūna taḥta al-samā’,

translation.en: And as the sons of Adam are beneath the sky,
And beneath the Angel of Death,

segments.arabic: وَ كَمَا مَلَكُ الْمَوْتِ مَكْبُوسٌ بَيْنَ يَدَيِ اللَّهِ رَبِّ الْعَالَمِينَ،
segments.transliteration: Wa kamā malaku al-mawt makbūsun bayna yaday Allāh Rabb al-‘ālamīn,

translation.en: And just as the Angel of Death is between the hands of Allah, the Lord of the worlds,

segments.arabic: كَذَلِكَ يَكُونُ الْخَلَائِقُ مَكْبُوسِينَ تَحْتَ قَدَمَيَّ أَبَداً مَا أَحْيَيْتَنِي،
segments.transliteration: Kadhālika yakūnu al-khalā’iqu makbūsīna taḥta qadamayya abadan mā aḥyaytanī,

translation.en: Likewise, the creatures shall be beneath my feet as long as I live,
O Helper of the Muslims,
O Responder to the distressed,
O Most Merciful of the merciful,

segments.arabic: أَنْتَ لِي حِرْزٌ مِنْ جَمِيعِ خَلْقِكَ،
segments.transliteration: Anta lī ḥirzun min jamī‘ khalqik,

translation.en: You are my protection from all Your creation,

segments.arabic: وَ مِنْ بَنِي آدَمَ وَ بَنَاتِ حَوَّاءَ وَ أَتْبَاعِهِمْ،
segments.transliteration: Wa min banī Ādam wa banāti Ḥawwā’ wa atbā‘ihim,

translation.en: And from the sons of Adam and the daughters of Eve and their followers,

segments.arabic: وَ مِنْ شَرِّ الْجِنِّ وَ الْإِنْسِ،
segments.transliteration: Wa min sharri al-jinn wa al-ins,

translation.en: And from the evil of the jinn and humans,

segments.arabic: أَنْ لَا يَسْطُوَ عَلَيَّ أَحَدٌ مِنْهُمْ،

translation.en: That none of them overpower me,
Your neighbor is mighty,
There is no god but You,

segments.arabic: تَمَسَّكْتُ بِالْعُرْوَةِ الْوُثْقىٰ الَّتِي لَا انْفِصٰامَ لَهٰا،
segments.transliteration: Tamassaktu bi-al-‘urwati al-wuthqā allati lā infiṣāma lahā,

translation.en: I cling to the firm handle that never breaks,

segments.arabic: الَّتِي لَا يُجَاوِزُهَا بَرٌّ وَ لَا فَاجِرٌ،
segments.transliteration: Allati lā yujāwizhā barrun wa lā fājirun,

translation.en: That no righteous or wicked can surpass,
I hold fast to Allah's strong rope,

segments.arabic: أَعُوذُ بِاللَّهِ مِنْ شَرِّ فَسَقَةِ الْعَرَبِ وَ الْعَجَمِ،
segments.transliteration: A‘ūdhū bi-Allāh min sharri fasakati al-‘arab wa al-‘ajam,

translation.en: I seek refuge in Allah from the evil of the wicked among the Arabs and the non-Arabs,

segments.arabic: وَ مِنْ شَرِّ الْجِنِّ وَ الْإِنْسِ،
segments.transliteration: Wa min sharri al-jinn wa al-ins,

translation.en: And from the evil of the jinn and humans,

segments.arabic: وَ مِنْ شَرِّ مَنْ يُرِيدُ بِي سُوءً أَوْ يُرِيدُ بِي شَرّاً،
segments.transliteration: Wa min sharri man yurīdu bī sū'an aw yurīdu bī sharran,

translation.en: And from the evil of anyone who intends harm or evil against me,
I rely on Allah,

segments.arabic: وَ مَنْ يَتَوَكَّلْ عَلَى اللَّهِ فَهُوَ حَسْبُهُ،
segments.transliteration: Wa man yatawakkal ‘ala Allāh fahuwa ḥasbuh,

translation.en: And whoever relies on Allah, He is sufficient for him,
Indeed, Allah will accomplish His purpose,

segments.arabic: قَدْ جَعَلَ اللَّهُ لِكُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدْراً،
segments.transliteration: Qad ja‘ala Allāhu likulli shay'in qadrā,

translation.en: Allah has set a measure for everything,
Allah is sufficient for me,
In the name of Allah and by Allah, I believe,
And in Allah, I trust,
And in Allah, I seek refuge,
And in Allah, I take hold,
And in Allah the Great, I seek protection,
From the accursed Satan,

segments.arabic: أَعُوذُ بِكَلِمَاتِ اللَّهِ التَّامَّاتِ الَّتِي لَا يُجَاوِزُهُنَّ بَرٌّ وَ لَا فَاجِرٌ،
segments.transliteration: A‘ūdhū bi-kalimāti Allāh al-tammāti allati lā yujāwizhunnā barrun wa lā fājir,

translation.en: I seek refuge in Allah's perfect words that no righteous or wicked can surpass,
From what He created and formed,

segments.arabic: وَ مِنْ شَرِّ كُلِّ مَا يَطْرُقُ بِاللَّيْلِ وَ النَّهَارِ،
segments.transliteration: Wa min sharri kulli mā yaṭruqu bi-al-layl wa al-nahār,

translation.en: And from the evil of all that comes by night and day,
Except for one who comes with goodness by Your mercy,
O Most Merciful of the merciful,

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شَرِّ نَفْسِي،
segments.transliteration: Allāhumma innī a‘ūdhū bika min sharri nafsī,

translation.en: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from the evil of my soul,

segments.arabic: وَ مِنْ شَرِّ كُلِّ دَابَّةٍ أَنْتَ آخِذٌ بِنَاصِيَتِهَا،
segments.transliteration: Wa min sharri kulli dābbatin anta ākhidhun bināṣiyatihā,

translation.en: And from the evil of every creature You have control over,

segments.arabic: وَ مِنْ شَرِّ كُلِّ عَيْنٍ نَاظِرَةٍ وَ أُذُنٍ سَامِعَةٍ،
segments.transliteration: Wa min sharri kulli ‘aynin nāẓirah wa udhn sāmi‘ah,

translation.en: And from the evil of every watching eye and listening ear,

segments.arabic: وَ مِنْ شَرِّ كُلِّ مَارِدٍ وَ جَبَّارٍ عَنِيدٍ،
segments.transliteration: Wa min sharri kulli mārid wa jabbār ‘anīd,

translation.en: And from the evil of every rebellious and stubborn tyrant,
O Allah, I have sought refuge in You,
And entrusted my affairs to You,
You are my Guardian and my Lord,

segments.arabic: فَلَا تُسَلِّمْنِي وَ لَا تَخْذُلْنِي وَ لَا تَكِلْنِي إِلَى نَفْسِي طَرْفَةَ عَيْنٍ،
segments.transliteration: Fa-lā tusallimnī wa lā takhdhulnī wa lā takilnī ilā nafsī tarfata ‘ayn,

translation.en: Do not abandon me, nor forsake me, nor leave me to myself even for the blink of an eye,

segments.arabic: وَ لَا تُؤَاخِذْنِي بِذُنُوبِي وَ إِسْرَافِي عَلَى نَفْسِي،
segments.transliteration: Wa lā tu’ākhidhnī bidhunūbī wa isrāfī ‘alā nafsī,

translation.en: And do not hold me accountable for my sins and my excesses upon myself,
And help me to be grateful for Your blessings,
O Beneficent, O Compeller,
Make me a grateful servant,

segments.arabic: لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْعَلِيُّ الْعَظِيمُ،
segments.transliteration: Lā ilāha illā anta al-‘alī al-‘aẓīm,

translation.en: There is no god but You, the Most High, the Great,
On You I rely,
You are the Lord of the Great Throne,

segments.arabic: لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْحَلِيمُ الْكَرِيمُ،
segments.transliteration: Lā ilāha illā anta al-ḥalīm al-karīm,

translation.en: There is no god but You, the Forbearing, the Generous,
Glory be to Allah, the Lord of the worlds,

segments.arabic: رَبِّ السَّمَاوَاتِ السَّبْعِ وَ مَا فِيهِنَّ وَ مَا فَوْقَهُنَّ وَ مَا بَيْنَهُنَّ،
segments.transliteration: Rabb al-samāwāt al-sab‘ wa mā fīhinna wa mā fawqahunna wa mā baynahunna,

translation.en: Lord of the seven heavens and all within them, above them, and between them,
And Lord of the Great Throne,
Praise be to Allah, the Lord of the worlds,
O Allah, make me beloved to all Your creation,

segments.arabic: حَتَّى لَا يَكُونَ لِي فِي قَلْبِ أَحَدٍ مِنْ خَلْقِكَ غِلْظَةٌ،
segments.transliteration: Ḥattā lā yakūna lī fī qalbi aḥad min khalqik ghilẓah,

translation.en: So that there is no harshness towards me in the heart of any of Your creation,
And they do not oppose me,
And make them receive me with open faces,
And fulfill my needs,
And seek my approval,
And fear my displeasure,
In Your Holy, Great, Greatest name, I call upon You,

segments.arabic: يَا اللَّهُ يَا نُوراً فِي نُورٍ وَ نُوراً إِلَى نُورٍ وَ نُوراً فَوْقَ نُورٍ،
segments.transliteration: Yā Allāh yā nūran fī nūr wa nūran ilā nūr wa nūran fawqa nūr,

translation.en: O Allah, O Light in Light, Light upon Light, Light above Light,
And Light beneath Light,

segments.arabic: وَ نُوراً يُضِي‌ءُ بِهِ كُلُّ نُورٍ وَ كُلُّ ظُلْمَةٍ،
segments.transliteration: Wa nūran yuḍī’u bihi kullu nūr wa kullu ẓulmah,

translation.en: And Light that illuminates every light and every darkness,

segments.arabic: وَ يُطْفَى بِهِ شِدَّةُ كُلِّ شَيْطَانٍ وَ سُلْطَانٍ،
segments.transliteration: Wa yuṭfā bihi shiddatu kulli shayṭān wa sulṭān,

translation.en: And extinguishes the intensity of every devil and ruler,

segments.arabic: وَ بِاسْمِكَ الَّذِي تَكَلَّمَ بِهِ الْمَلَائِكَةُ،
segments.transliteration: Wa bi-ismika allathi takallama bihi al-malā'ikah,

translation.en: And by Your name by which the angels spoke,
So that the waves have no power over them,

segments.arabic: وَ بِهِ يَذِلُّ كُلُّ جَبَّارٍ عَنِيدٍ،

translation.en: And by it every rebellious tyrant is humbled,
May the creatures be under my feet,
By Your name that You named Yourself with,

segments.arabic: وَ اسْتَقْرَرْتَ بِهِ عَلَى عَرْشِكَ وَ عَلَى كُرْسِيِّكَ،

translation.en: And settled upon Your Throne and Your Chair,

segments.arabic: بِاسْمِكَ الْعَظِيمِ الْأَعْظَمِ يَكُونُ لِي نُوراً،
segments.transliteration: Bi-ismika al-‘aẓīm al-a‘ẓam yakūnu lī nūran,

translation.en: By Your Great, Greatest name, it will be a light for me,
And awe before all creation,
By Your holy, blessed names,
You are the Generous, the Noble,
The Mighty, the Compeller, the Majestic,
There is no god but You,

segments.arabic: يَا رَبَّ كُلِّ شَيْ‌ءٍ وَ وَارِثَهُ،
segments.transliteration: Yā Rabb kulli shay’ wa wārithuh,

translation.en: O Lord of all things and their Inheritor,

segments.arabic: يَا اللَّهُ أَنْتَ الْمَحْمُودُ فِي كُلِّ فِعَالِهِ،
segments.transliteration: Yā Allāh anta al-maḥmūd fī kulli fi‘āl,

translation.en: O Allah, You are the Praised in all Your actions,
O Most Merciful of the merciful,
O there is no god but You,
The Exalted in His Majesty,
O Allah, O Most Merciful of the merciful,

segments.arabic: يَا رَحْمَانَ كُلِّ شَيْ‌ءٍ وَ رَاحِمَهُ،
segments.transliteration: Yā raḥmāna kulli shay’ wa rāḥimah,

translation.en: O Merciful to all things and their Compassionate,

segments.arabic: يَا مُمِيتَ كُلِّ شَيْ‌ءٍ وَ وَارِثَهُ،
segments.transliteration: Yā mumīta kulli shay’ wa wārithah,

translation.en: O Destroyer of all things and their Inheritor,

segments.arabic: يَا حَيُّ حِينَ لَا حَيَّ فِي دَيْمُومِيَّةِ مُلْكِهِ وَ بَقَائِهِ،
segments.transliteration: Yā ḥayyū ḥīna lā ḥayy fī daymūmiyyati mulkīh wa baqā’īh,

translation.en: O the Living One when there is no living being in the permanence of His kingdom and existence,

segments.arabic: يَا رَافِعُ الْمُرْتَفِعُ فَوْقَ سَمَائِهِ بِقُدْرَتِهِ،
segments.transliteration: Yā rāfi‘ al-murtafi‘ fawqa samā’īh bi-qudratīh,

translation.en: O the Exalter, the Elevated, above His heavens by His power,

segments.arabic: يَا قَيُّومُ لَا يَفُوتُهُ شَيْ‌ءٌ مِنْ خَلْقِهِ،
segments.transliteration: Yā qayyūm lā yafūtuhū shay’ min khalqīh,

translation.en: O the Sustainer, nothing escapes Him from His creation,
O the Last, O the Everlasting,

segments.arabic: يَا أَوَّلَ كُلِّ شَيْ‌ءٍ وَ آخِرَهُ،
segments.transliteration: Yā awwal kulli shay’ wa ākhirah,

translation.en: O the First of all things and the Last,

segments.arabic: يَا دَائِمُ بِغَيْرِ فَنَاءٍ وَ لَا زَوَالٍ لِمُلْكِهِ،
segments.transliteration: Yā dā’im bi-ghayri fanā’ wa lā zawāl li-mulkīh,

translation.en: O the Everlasting without end, nor decline to His kingdom,
O the Eternal, without any likeness,
There is nothing like Him,

segments.arabic: يَا مُبْدِئَ كُلِّ شَيْ‌ءٍ وَ مُعِيدَهُ،
segments.transliteration: Yā mubdi’a kulli shay’ wa mu‘īdah,

translation.en: O the Originator of all things and their Restorer,

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَا يَصِفُ الْوَاصِفُونَ كُنْهَ جَلَالِهِ فِي مُلْكِهِ وَ عِزِّهِ وَ جَبَرُوتِهِ،
segments.transliteration: Yā man lā yaṣifu al-wāṣifūna kunha jalālīh fī mulkīh wa ‘izzīh wa jabarūtīh,

translation.en: O He whom describers cannot describe the reality of His Majesty in His kingdom, might, and dominion,

segments.arabic: يَا كَبِيرُ أَنْتَ الَّذِي لَا تَهْتَدِي الْعُقُولُ لِصِفَتِهِ فِي عَظَمَتِهِ،
segments.transliteration: Yā kabīr anta allathi lā tahtadī al-‘uqūl li-ṣifatīh fī ‘aẓamatīh,

translation.en: O the Great, You are the One to whom minds cannot find a way to describe His greatness,
O the Resurrector,
O the Creator without example,

segments.arabic: يَا زَاكِي الطَّاهِرُ مِنْ كُلِّ آفَةٍ،
segments.transliteration: Yā zākī al-ṭāhir min kulli āfah,

translation.en: O the Pure, free from every defect,

segments.arabic: يَا كَافِي الْمُتَوَسِّعُ لِمَا خَلَقَ مِنْ عَطَايَا فَضْلِهِ الَّذِي لَا يَنْفَدُ،
segments.transliteration: Yā kāfī al-mutawassi‘u limā khalaqa min ‘aṭāyā faḍlīh allathi lā yanfad,

translation.en: O the Sufficient, the Expander for what He created from the gifts of His bounty that do not exhaust,
O Pure, free from every evil,
His actions do not mix with it,

segments.arabic: يَا جَبَّارُ أَنْتَ الَّذِي وَسِعَتْ كُلَّ شَيْ‌ءٍ رَحْمَتُهُ،
segments.transliteration: Yā jabbār anta allathi wasi‘at kulli shay’ raḥmatuh,

translation.en: O the Compeller, You are the One whose mercy encompasses everything,
O the Most Compassionate,
O the Benefactor,
O Possessor of Majesty and Honor,

segments.arabic: أَنْتَ الَّذِي قَدْ عَمَّ الْخَلَائِقَ مَنُّهُ وَ فَضْلُهُ،
segments.transliteration: Anta allathi qad ‘amma al-khalā’iq minnuh wa faḍluh,

translation.en: You are the One whose grace and bounty have encompassed the creatures,

segments.arabic: يَا دَيَّانَ الْعِبَادِ وَ كُلٌّ يَقُومُ خَاضِعاً لِهَيْبَتِهِ،
segments.transliteration: Yā dayyān al-‘ibād wa kullun yaqūmu khāḍi‘an li-haybatih,

translation.en: O the Judge of the servants, and all stand humbled before His awe,

segments.arabic: يَا خَالِقَ مَا فِي السَّمَاوَاتِ وَ الْأَرْضِينَ،
segments.transliteration: Yā khāliqa mā fī al-samāwāt wa al-arḍīn,

translation.en: O the Creator of what is in the heavens and the earths,
And to Him is the return of all,

segments.arabic: يَا رَحِيمَ كُلِّ صَرِيخٍ وَ مَكْرُوبٍ،
segments.transliteration: Yā raḥīm kulli ṣarīkh wa makrūb,

translation.en: O the Merciful to every distressed and grieved one,

segments.arabic: يَا صَادِقَ الْوَعْدِ فَلَا تَصِفُ الْأَلْسُنُ جَلَالَ مُلْكِهِ وَ عِزِّهِ،
segments.transliteration: Yā ṣādiqa al-wa‘d fa-lā taṣifu al-alsun jalāla mulkīh wa ‘izzīh,

translation.en: O the Truthful in promise, the tongues cannot describe the majesty of His kingdom and might,
O the Originator of wonders,

segments.arabic: لَمْ يَبْتَغِ فِي إِنْشَائِهَا عَوْنَ أَحَدٍ مِنْ خَلْقِهِ،
segments.transliteration: Lam yabtagh fī insha'ihā ‘awna aḥad min khalqīh,

translation.en: He did not seek help from any of His creation in their creation,

segments.arabic: يَا عَالِمَ الْغُيُوبِ فَلَا يَفُوتُهُ شَيْ‌ءٌ مِنْ خَلْقِهِ،
segments.transliteration: Yā ‘ālim al-ghuyūb fa-lā yafūtuhū shay’ min khalqīh,

translation.en: O Knower of the unseen, nothing escapes Him from His creation,

segments.arabic: يَا مُعِيدَ مَا أَفْنَى إِذَا بَرَزَ الْخَلَائِقُ لِدَعْوَتِهِ مِنْ مَخَافَتِهِ،
segments.transliteration: Yā mu‘īd mā afnā idhā baraza al-khalā’iq li-da‘watīh min makhāfatīh,

translation.en: O Restorer of what He destroys when the creatures emerge at His call from His fear,

segments.arabic: يَا حَلِيماً ذَا أَنَاةٍ فَلَا شَيْ‌ءَ يُعَادِلُهُ مِنْ خَلْقِهِ،
segments.transliteration: Yā ḥalīman dhā anāt fa-lā shay’ yu‘ādiluh min khalqīh,

translation.en: O Forbearing, O the Patient, nothing equals Him from His creation,

segments.arabic: يَا حَمِيدَ الْفِعَالِ فِي خَلْقِهِ بِلُطْفِهِ،
segments.transliteration: Yā ḥamīd al-fi‘āl fī khalqīh bi-luṭfīh,

translation.en: O Praiseworthy in His actions among His creation by His kindness,

segments.arabic: يَا عَزِيزُ الْغَالِبُ عَلَى أَمْرِهِ فَلَا شَيْ‌ءَ يُعَادِلُهُ،
segments.transliteration: Yā ‘azīz al-ghālib ‘alā amrīh fa-lā shay’ yu‘ādiluh,

translation.en: O Mighty, the Dominant over His command, nothing equals Him,

segments.arabic: يَا ظَاهِرَ [قَاهِرَ] الْبَطْشِ الشَّدِيدِ الَّذِي لَا يُطَاقُ انْتِقَامُهُ،
segments.transliteration: Yā ẓāhir [qāhir] al-baṭsh al-shadīd allathi lā yuṭāq intiqāmuh,

translation.en: O Overpowering, the Severe in might, whose revenge cannot be withstood,

segments.arabic: يَا عَالِي الْقَرِيبُ فِي عُلُوِّهِ وَ ارْتِفَاعِهِ وَ دَوَامِهِ،
segments.transliteration: Yā ‘ālī al-qarīb fī ‘ulūh wa irtifā‘īh wa dawāmīh,

translation.en: O the High, the Near in His height, elevation, and permanence,
O Most Compassionate,

segments.arabic: يَا مَنَّانُ فَلَا شَيْ‌ءَ يَقْهَرُ سُلْطَانَهُ،
segments.transliteration: Yā mannān fa-lā shay’ yaqhar sulṭānah,

translation.en: O Benefactor, nothing overpowers His authority,

segments.arabic: يَا نُورَ كُلِّ شَيْ‌ءٍ وَ هُدَاهُ،
segments.transliteration: Yā nūr kulli shay’ wa hudāh,

translation.en: O Light of all things and their guide,
You are the One who illuminates the darkness with His light,
O Holy, the Pure,
There is nothing like Him,

segments.arabic: يَا قَرِيبُ الْمُجِيبُ الْمُتَدَانِي دُونَ كُلِّ شَيْ‌ءٍ،
segments.transliteration: Yā qarīb al-mujīb al-mutadānī dūna kulli shay’,

translation.en: O the Near, the Responsive, nearer than everything,
O the High, the Lofty in the sky,

segments.arabic: فَوْقَ كُلِّ شَيْ‌ءٍ عُلُوُّهُ وَ ارْتِفَاعُهُ،

translation.en: Above all things is His height and elevation,
O Creator of wonders,
And Restorer after their destruction by His power,
O King,
O Majestic,

segments.arabic: يَا مَنِ الْعَدْلُ أَمْرُهُ وَ الصِّدْقُ وَعْدُهُ،
segments.transliteration: Yā man al-‘adlu amruhu wa al-ṣidqu wa‘duhu,

translation.en: O He whose command is justice and promise is truth,
O Praised in His actions,

segments.arabic: فَلَا تَبْلُغُ الْأَوْهَامُ كُنْهَ جَلَالِهِ فِي مُلْكِهِ وَ عِزِّهِ،
segments.transliteration: Fa-lā tablughu al-awhām kunha jalālīh fī mulkīh wa ‘izzīh,

translation.en: So the minds cannot reach the reality of His majesty in His kingdom and might,
O Generous in forgiveness,

segments.arabic: أَنْتَ الَّذِي مَلَأَ كُلَّ شَيْ‌ءٍ عَدْلُهُ وَ فَضْلُهُ،
segments.transliteration: Anta allathi mala’a kulli shay’ ‘adluh wa faḍluh,

translation.en: You are the One whose justice and bounty fill all things,
O Great in pride and glory,
So the might of His kingdom is not comprehended,
O Wonderful,

segments.arabic: فَلَا تَنْطِقُ الْأَلْسُنُ بِكُلِّ آلَائِهِ وَ ثَنَائِهِ،
segments.transliteration: Fa-lā tanṭiqu al-alsun bi-kulli ālā’īh wa thanā’īh,

translation.en: The tongues cannot express all His bounties and praises,

segments.arabic: أَسْأَلُكَ يَا اللَّهُ أَمَاناً مِنْ عُقُوبَتِكَ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَ الْآخِرَةِ،
segments.transliteration: As’āluka yā Allāh amānan min ‘uqūbatik fī al-dunyā wa al-ākhirah,

translation.en: I ask You, O Allah, for safety from Your punishment in this world and the Hereafter,

segments.arabic: وَ أَسْأَلُكَ نُوراً وَ نَصْراً وَ رِفْعَةً عِنْدَ جَمِيعِ خَلْقِكَ،
segments.transliteration: Wa as’āluka nūran wa naṣran wa rif‘atan ‘inda jamī‘ khalqik,

translation.en: And I ask You for light, victory, and elevation before all Your creation,

segments.arabic: مِنْ بَنِي آدَمَ وَ بَنَاتِ حَوَّاءَ،
segments.transliteration: Min banī Ādam wa banāti Ḥawwā’,

translation.en: From the sons of Adam and the daughters of Eve,

segments.arabic: رَبَّ الْأَرْوَاحِ الْفَانِيَةِ وَ الْأَجْسَادِ الْبَالِيَةِ،
segments.transliteration: Rabb al-arwāḥ al-fāniyah wa al-ajsaad al-bāliyah,

translation.en: Lord of the perishable souls and the decayed bodies,
And the elevated souls,

segments.arabic: وَ أَسْأَلُكَ بِطَاعَةِ الْعُرُوقِ الْمُلْتَئِمَةِ إِلَى أَمَاكِنِهَا،
segments.transliteration: Wa as’āluka bi-ṭā‘ati al-‘urūq al-multā’imah ilā amākinīhā,

translation.en: And I ask You by the obedience of the veins returning to their places,

segments.arabic: وَ بِطَاعَةِ الْقُبُورِ الْمُتَشَقِّقَةِ عَنْ أَهْلِهَا،

translation.en: And by the obedience of the graves splitting open for their inhabitants,
And by Your truthful call among them,
And Your taking the right from them,

segments.arabic: إِذَا بَرَزَ الْخَلَائِقُ فَهُمْ مِنْ مَخَافَتِكَ وَ شِدَّةِ سُلْطَانِكَ،
segments.transliteration: Idhā baraza al-khalā’iq fa-hum min makhāfatika wa shiddati sulṭānik,

translation.en: When the creatures emerge, they are from Your fear and the severity of Your dominion,
Awaiting Your decree,
And fearing Your punishment,
And hoping for Your mercy,
Make me among the near and successful ones,

segments.arabic: وَ أَلْقِ عَلَيَّ مَحَبَّةً وَ نُوراً وَ نِعْمَةً وَ هَيْبَةً،
segments.transliteration: Waalqi ‘alayya maḥabbatan wa nūran wa ni‘matan wa haybatan,

translation.en: And cast upon me love, light, blessing, and awe,

segments.arabic: وَ اجْعَلْنِي مِمَّنْ يُسْمَعُ قَوْلِي وَ يُرْفَعُ أَمْرِي عَلَى كُلِّ أَمْرٍ،
segments.transliteration: Wa ij‘alnī mimman yusma‘u qawlī wa yurfa‘u amrī ‘alā kulli amr,

translation.en: And make me among those whose words are heard and whose matters are elevated over all matters,

segments.arabic: أَنَا عَبْدُكَ وَ ابْنُ عَبْدِكَ الْفَقِيرُ إِلَى رَحْمَتِكَ،
segments.transliteration: Anā ‘abduka wa ibn ‘abdika al-faqīr ilā raḥmatika,

translation.en: I am Your servant and the son of Your servant, in need of Your mercy,
Make me, O Allah, exalted and elevated,

segments.arabic: يَا نُورَ النُّورِ يَا مِصْبَاحَ النُّورِ،
segments.transliteration: Yā nūr al-nūr yā miṣbāḥ al-nūr,

translation.en: O Light of the light, O Lamp of the light,
I repel them by You,
And seek refuge in You from their evils,
And seek Your help against them,

segments.arabic: فَاكْفِنِي أَمْرَهُمْ بِلَا حَوْلَ وَ لَا قُوَّةَ إِلَّا بِكَ،
segments.transliteration: Fa-kfinī amrahum bi-lā ḥawl wa lā quwwa illā bika,

translation.en: So suffice me against their matters without any power or strength except by You,
O Allah, the Most High, the Great,

segments.arabic: إِنْ نَشَأْ نُنَزِّلْ عَلَيْهِمْ مِنَ السَّمَاءِ آيَةً فَظَلَّتْ أَعْنَاقُهُمْ لَهَا خَاضِعِينَ،
segments.transliteration: In nasha’ nunazzil ‘alayhim mina al-samā’ āyatan fa-ẓallat a‘nāquhum lahā khāḍi‘īn,

translation.en: If We willed, We could send down upon them a sign from the sky, so their necks would remain humbled to it,

segments.arabic: إِنَّا رُسُلُ رَبِّكَ لَنْ يَصِلُوا إِلَيْكَ،
segments.transliteration: Innā rusul rabbika lan yaṣilū ilayk,

translation.en: Indeed, We are the messengers of your Lord; they will not reach you,

segments.arabic: يَا مُوسَىٰ أَقْبِلْ وَ لَا تَخَفْ إِنَّكَ مِنَ الْآمِنِينَ،
segments.transliteration: Yā Mūsā aqbil wa lā takhaf innaka mina al-āminīn,

translation.en: O Moses, come forward and do not fear, indeed you are among the secure,

segments.arabic: كَتَبَ اللَّهُ لَأَغْلِبَنَّ أَنَا وَ رُسُلِي،
segments.transliteration: Kataba Allāh la-aghlibanna anā wa rusulī,

translation.en: Allah has decreed, "I will surely overcome, I and My messengers,"
Indeed, Allah is Powerful, Mighty,
O Allah, by Your might, O Everlasting,

segments.arabic: أَسْأَلُكَ بِالِاسْمِ الَّذِي أَحَطْتَهُ بِحِجَابِ النُّورِ،
segments.transliteration: As’āluka bi-al-ism allathi aḥaṭṭahū bi-ḥijābi al-nūr,

translation.en: I ask You by the name that You encompassed with the veil of light,
The light of the heavens and the earth,
By which the eyes of the observers are illuminated,
I seek refuge in Your Lordship, O Allah,

segments.arabic: بِاسْمِكَ الَّذِي تَقُولُ بِهِ لِلشَّيْ‌ءِ كُنْ فَيَكُونُ،
segments.transliteration: Bi-ismika allathi taqūlu bihi lil-shay’ kun fa-yakūn,

translation.en: By Your name with which You say to a thing, "Be," and it is,

segments.arabic: إِلَّا قَضَيْتَ حَاجَتِي وَ أَنْجَحْتَ طَلِبَتِي،
segments.transliteration: Illā qaḍayta ḥājātī wa anjaḥta ṭalabatī,

translation.en: Except You fulfill my need and grant my request,
And make my affair easy,
And cover my faults,
And secure my fear,

segments.arabic: وَ رَزَقْتَنِي نُوراً وَ عِزّاً وَ هَيْبَةً وَ قَبُولًا وَ رِفْعَةً،
segments.transliteration: Wa razaqtanī nūran wa ‘izzan wa haybatan wa qubūlan wa rif‘atan,

translation.en: And provide me with light, honor, awe, acceptance, and elevation,
Before all Your creation,
By Your power and strength,

segments.arabic: وَ بِاسْمِكَ الَّذِي وَسِعَ كُلَّ شَيْ‌ءٍ،
segments.transliteration: Wa bi-ismika allathi wasi‘a kulli shay’,

translation.en: And by Your name that encompasses everything,
And is broader than it,
O Everlasting,

segments.arabic: أَدِمْ مَا أَنَا فِيهِ مِنْ نِعْمَتِكَ وَ عَافِيَتِكَ،
segments.transliteration: Adim mā anā fīh min ni‘matika wa ‘āfiyatika,

translation.en: Continue for me what I am in of Your blessings and well-being,
And make my matters first in righteousness,
And last in success,
By Your mercy, O Most Merciful of the merciful.

text.en: 1.Friday Ziyarah of Imam Mahdi (peace be upon him)
2.Ziyarah and Salwaat on Ahlulbayt (peace be upon them)for Friday

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا حُجَّةَ ٱللَّهِ فِي أَرْضِهِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿalayka ya hujjata allahi fi ardihi

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O argument of Allah in His lands!

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا عَيْنَ ٱللَّهِ فِي خَلْقِهِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿalayka ya ʿayna allahi fi khalqihi

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O sight of Allah on His creatures!
Peace be upon you, O light of Allah
by which those who have been guided [to the true guidance] are guided
and by which the believers are relieved!
Peace be upon you, O polite and fearful!
Peace be upon you, O sincere patron!
Peace be upon you, O ark of salvation!
Peace be upon you, O essence of life!
Peace be upon you.
May Allah send blessings to you
and upon your Household,
the pure and immaculate.
Peace be upon you.
May Allah hasten that which He has promised you;
namely, victory and prevalence of your authority.
Peace be upon you, O my master.
I am a servant of you
and I recognize the first and the last of your affair.

segments.arabic: أَتَقَرَّبُ إِلَىٰ ٱللَّهِ تَعَالَىٰ بِكَ وَبِآلِ بَيْتِكَ
segments.transliteration: ataqarrabu ila allahi taʿala bika wa bi-ali baytika

translation.en: I seek nearness to Allah, the Exalted, through your Household and you

segments.arabic: وَأَنْتَظِرُ ظُهُورَكَ وَظُهُورَ ٱلْحَقِّ عَلَىٰ يَدَيْكَ
segments.transliteration: wa antaziru zuhuraka wa zuhura alhaqqi ʿala yadayka

translation.en: and I am expecting your advent and the prevalence of the truth at your hands.

segments.arabic: وَأَسْأَلُ ٱللَّهَ أَنْ يُصَلِّيَ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: wa as'alu allaha an yusalliya ʿala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: And I beseech Allah to send blessings to Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,

segments.transliteration: wa an yajʿalani mina almuntazirina laka

translation.en: and to include me with those who are expecting you,
those who follow you and support you against your enemies,

segments.arabic: وَٱلْمُسْتَشْهَدِينَ بَيْنَ يَدَيْكَ فِي جُمْلَةِ أَوْلِيَائِكَ
segments.transliteration: walmustash-hadina bayna yadayka fi jumlati awliya'ika

translation.en: and those who will be martyred in front of you in the group of your loyalists.
O my master, O Patron of the Age!
May Allah's blessings be upon you
and upon your Household.
Today is Friday,

segments.transliteration: wa huwa yawmuka almutawaqqaʿu fihi zuhuruka

translation.en: which is your day on which your advent is expected
to bring about relief to the believers at your hands,
and killing of the disbelievers with your sword.

segments.arabic: وَأَنَا يَا مَوْلاَيَ فِيهِ ضَيْفُكَ وَجَارُكَ
segments.transliteration: wa ana ya mawlaya fihi dayfuka wa jaruka

translation.en: On this day, O my master, I am your guest and in your vicinity

segments.arabic: وَأَنْتَ يَا مَوْلاَيَ كَرِيمٌ مِنْ أَوْلاَدِ ٱلْكِرَامِ
segments.transliteration: wa anta ya mawlaya karimun min awladi alkirami

translation.en: and you, my master, are generous and the descendant of the generous people,
and you are commanded to receive your guests and neighbors hospitably;
so, receive me as your guest and neighbor.
May Allah's blessings be upon you
and upon your Household, the immaculate.

segments.arabic: نَزِيْلُكَ حَيْثُ مَا اتَّجَهَتْ رِكَابِيْ وَ ضَيْفُكَ حَيْثُ كُنْتُ مِنَ الْبِلَادِ

translation.en: "I am your visitor wherever my mount turns.. and I am your guest whichever place I may be"
In the name of Allah, the Beneficent and Merciful.
translation.fa: به نام خداى بخشاینده مهربان

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ مَنْ لَبِسَ الْعِزَّ وَ فَازَ بِهِ

translation.en: Glory be to Him Who has dressed with grandeur and owned it!

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ مَنْ تَعَطَّفَ بِالْمَجْدِ وَ تَكَرَّمَ بِهِ

translation.en: Glory be to Him Who has deigned and condescended with grandeur!

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ مَنْ لَا يَنْبَغِي التَّسْبِيحُ إِلَّا لَهُ

translation.en: Glory be to Him save Whom none is worthy of being glorified!

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ مَنْ أَحْصَى كُلَّ شَيْءٍ بِعِلْمِهِ

translation.en: Glory be to Him Whose knowledge has counted all things!
Glory be to The endurance and The Most gracious!
Glory be to You Who holds all abundance and bounties!
Glory be to the Powerful and Generous!

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ بِمَعَاقِدِ الْعِزِّ مِنْ عَرْشِكَ

translation.en: O Allah, I beseech You in the name of the objects of dignity in Your Throne,
in the name of the utmost mercy in Your Book,

segments.arabic: وَ بِاسْمِكَ الْأَعْظَمِ وَ ذِكْرِكَ الْأَعْلَى

translation.en: and in the name of Your Greatest Name, Your highest remembrance,
and Your Accomplished Words.

segments.arabic: وَ تَمَّتْ كَلِمَاتُكَ صِدْقاً وَ عَدْلًا

translation.en: And Your words became perfected in truth and justice.
None can change Thy words;
indeed You are The noble and wise!
O, The Possessor of Majesty and Grace;

segments.arabic: أَسْأَلُكَ بِمَا لَا يَعْدِلُهُ شَيْءٌ مِنْ مَسَائِلِكَ

translation.en: I beseech you in the name of The requests that are made to you which nothing can match it,

segments.arabic: أَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ

translation.en: To bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,

segments.arabic: وَ تَجْعَلَ لِي مِنْ أَمْرِي فَرَجاً وَ مَخْرَجاً

translation.en: and make for my relief and exit regarding my affair,

segments.arabic: وَ أَنْ تُوَسِّعَ عَلَيَّ رِزْقِي فِي يُسْرٍ مِنْكَ وَ عَافِيَةٍ

translation.en: and is possible for me enough means of livelihood with easiness and good health from you!
Glory be to the Living, the Self-Subsistent, and the most Forbearing!
Glory be to The wise and Noble!
Glory be to the awakener and Successor!
Glory be to Allah the Most High and the Incomparably Great!
Glory be to Him, and (all) the praise be to Him!

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ

translation.en: O Allah, Send Blessings upon Muhammed and the household Of Muhammed;
translation.fa: خدایا درود فرست بر محمد و آل محمد

segments.arabic: كَمَا صَلَّيْتَ وَ بَارَكْتَ عَلَى إِبْرَاهِيمَ

translation.en: as You bestowed blessings, increase, and mercy upon Ibrahim

segments.arabic: وَ آلِ إِبْرَاهِيمَ إِنَّكَ حَمِيدٌ مَجِيدٌ

translation.en: and the progeny of Ibrahim, indeed You are the praised and the glorious!
In the Name of Allah, the Merciful, the Compassionate.
translation.fa: به نام خداى بخشاینده مهربان

segments.arabic: لَا حَوْلَ وَ لَا قُوَّةَ إِلَّا بِاللهِ الْعَلِيِّ الْعَظِيمِ

translation.en: There is no might nor power except with Allah, the Highest, the Mighty;

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ رَبَّ الْمَلَائِكَةِ وَ الرُّوحِ وَ النَّبِيِّينَ وَ الْمُرْسَلِينَ

translation.en: Allah, the Lord of the angels, Spirits, Prophets, and Messengers,

segments.arabic: وَ قَاهِرَ مَنْ فِي السَّمَاوَاتِ وَ الْأَرَضِينَ

translation.en: Subduer of those in the heavens and earth,

segments.arabic: وَ خَالِقَ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ وَ مَالِكَهُ

translation.en: Creator of all things, and their King.

segments.arabic: كُفَّ عَنَّا بَأْسَ أَعْدَائِنَا وَ مَنْ أَرَادَ بِنَا سُؤاً مِنَ الْجِنِّ وَ الْإِنْسِ

translation.en: Protect me from our enemies' might, whether human or Jinn,

segments.arabic: وَ اجْعَلْ بَيْنَنَا وَ بَيْنَهُمْ حِجَاباً وَ حَرَساً وَ مَدْفَعاً

translation.en: and make between them and us a guard, a barrier, and a defense.

segments.arabic: إِنَّكَ رَبُّنَا لَا حَوْلَ وَ لَا قُوَّةَ لَنَا إِلَّا بِاللهِ عَلَيْهِ

translation.en: Surely You are the defenser Lord. There is no might nor power except with You.
In You we trust; to You, we turn.
You are the Mighty, the Wise.

segments.arabic: رَبَّنَا عَافِنَا مِنْ شَرِّ كُلِّ سُوؤٍ وَ مِنْ شَرِّ كُلِّ دَابَّةٍ

translation.en: Therefore, protect us from the evil of every creature
You have taken by the forelock,

segments.arabic: وَ مِنْ شَرِّ ما سَكَنَ فِي اللَّيْلِ وَ النَّهارِ

translation.en: the evil of what inhabits the night and day,

segments.arabic: وَ مِنْ [شَرِّ] كُلِّ سُوؤٍ وَ مِنْ شَرِّ كُلِّ ذِي شَرٍّ
segments.transliteration: and evil of every evil thing.

segments.arabic: رَبَّ الْعَالَمِينَ وَ إِلَهَ الْمُرْسَلِينَ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِهِ أَجْمَعِينَ

translation.en: May it be so, O Lord of the Worlds, and bless Muhammad, the Prophet of mercy, and his pure family

segments.arabic: وَ أَوْلِيَائِكَ وَ خُصَّ مُحَمَّداً وَ آلَهُ بِأَتَمِّ ذَلِكَ

translation.en: and companions, especially Muhammed and his family.

segments.arabic: وَ لَا حَوْلَ وَ لَا قُوَّةَ إِلَّا بِاللهِ الْعَلِيِّ الْعَظِيمِ

translation.en: And there is no strength or power, except for Allah, the high and the mighty.

segments.arabic: بِسْمِ اللهِ وَ بِاللهِ أُومِنُ وَ بِاللهِ أَعُوذُ وَ بِاللهِ

translation.en: In the name of Allah; by Allah, I believe; by Allah, I seek protection;

segments.arabic: أَعْتَصِمُ وَ بِاللهِ أَسْتَجِيرُ وَ بِعِزَّةِ اللهِ
segments.transliteration: by Allah, hold fast; by Allah, I seek sanctuary.

segments.arabic: وَ مَنَعَتِهِ أَمْتَنِعُ مِنْ شَيَاطِينِ الْإِنْسِ وَ الْجِنِّ

translation.en: I repel against Satan of humans and Jinn,

segments.arabic: وَ مِنْ رَجِلِهِمْ وَ خَيْلِهِمْ وَ رَكْضِهِمْ وَ عَطْفِهِمْ
segments.transliteration: from their walkers; riders, runners, sympathy,

segments.arabic: وَ رَجْعَتِهِمْ وَ كَيْدِهِمْ وَ شَرِّهِمْ وَ شَرِّ

translation.en: return, deceit, and evil by Allah's might and defense.

segments.arabic: مَا يَأْتُونَ بِهِ تَحْتَ اللَّيْلِ وَ تَحْتَ النَّهَارِ

translation.en: And the evil of what they bring beneath the night and day,

segments.arabic: وَ مِنْ شَرِّ الْغَائِبِ وَ الْحَاضِرِ

translation.en: And the evil of the absentee, presented,

segments.arabic: وَ الشَّاهِدِ وَ الزَّائِرِ أَحْيَاءً وَ أَمْوَاتاً أَعْمَى وَ بَصِيراً

translation.en: witness, and visitor, whether alive and dead; endowed with eyesight and blind.

segments.arabic: وَ مِنْ شَرِّ الْعَامَّةِ وَ الْخَاصَّةِ وَ مَنْ نَفْسٍ وَ وَسْوَسَتِهَا

translation.en: And the evil of the general and special, and self's tempting!

segments.arabic: وَ مِنْ شَرِّ الدَّنَاهِشِ وَ الْحِسِّ وَ اللَّمْسِ

translation.en: And the evil of Al-Dinahesh (kind of Jinn), faint nose, taction,

segments.arabic: وَ وَ اللَّبْسِ وَ مِنَ الْجِنِّ وَ الْإِنْسِ

translation.en: possess of Jinn and humans.

segments.arabic: وَ بِالْاِسْمِ الَّذِي اهْتَزَّ لَهُ عَرْشُ بِلْقِيسَ

translation.en: And by the name of this particular name which Balqees' throne shook.

segments.arabic: وَ أُعِيذُ نَفْسِي وَ دِينِي وَ جَمِيعَ مَا تُحِيطُهُ [تَحُوطُهُ] عِنَايَتِي

translation.en: And, I seek refuge for myself, religion, and everything that is surrounded by my consideration

segments.arabic: مِنْ شَرِّ كُلِّ صُورَةٍ وَ خِيَالٍ

translation.en: from the evil of every picture and imagination,

segments.arabic: أَوْ بَيَاضٍ أَوْ سَوَادٍ أَوْ تِمْثَالٍ أَوْ مُعَاهَدٍ أَوْ غَيْرِ
segments.transliteration: or whiteness, blackness, sculpture, alley or not.

segments.arabic: مُعَاهَدٍ مِمَّنْ يَسْكُنُ الْهَوَاءَ وَ السَّحَابَ

translation.en: From who reside in the air, clouds,

segments.arabic: وَ الظُّلُمَاتِ وَ النُّورَ وَ الظِّلَّ وَ الْحَرُورَ
وَ الْبَرَّ وَ الْبُحُورَ وَ السَّهْلَ وَ الْوُعُورَ
وَ الْخَرَابَ وَ الْعُمْرَانَ وَ الْآكَامَ وَ الْآجَامَ
وَ الْمَغَايِضَ وَ الْكَنَائِسَ وَ النَّوَاوِيسَ

translation.en: wilderness, and Cemeteries.

segments.arabic: مِنَ الصَّادِرِينَ وَ الْوَارِدِينَ مِمَّنْ يَبْدُو

translation.en: The coming and going from who appears
in the night and spreads in the day;

segments.arabic: وَ بِالْعَشِيِّ وَ الْإِبْكَارِ وَ الْغُدُوِّ وَ الْآصَالِ

translation.en: in the early hours of night and morning, in the morning and the evening hours,

segments.arabic: وَ الْمُرِيبِينَ وَ الْأَسَامِرَةِ وَ الْأَفَاتِرَةِ وَ الْفَرَاعِنَةِ
segments.transliteration: and the; suspicious, conversationalists, devils, tyrants,

segments.arabic: وَ الْأَبَالِسَةِ وَ مِنْ جُنُودِهِمْ وَ أَزْوَاجِهِمْ

translation.en: and satans, and from their; soldiers, partners,

segments.arabic: وَ عَشَائِرِهِمْ وَ قَبَائِلِهِمْ وَ مِنْ هَمْزِهِمْ وَ لَمْزِهِمْ

translation.en: clans, and tribes, and from their; backbiting, slandering,

segments.arabic: وَ نَفْثِهِمْ [وَ نَفْخِهِمْ] وَ وِقَاعِهِمْ وَ أَخْذِهِمْ
segments.transliteration: the defamed poem (puffing up), plotting, taking,

segments.arabic: وَ لَمْحِهِمْ وَ احْتِيَالِهِمْ وَ أَخْلَاقِهِمْ
وَ مِنْ شَرِّ كُلِّ ذِي شَرٍّ مِنَ السَّحَرَةِ وَ الْغِيلَانِ

translation.en: And against the evil of all; the magicians, monsters,

segments.arabic: وَ أُمِّ الصِّبْيَانِ وَ مَا وَلَدُوا وَ مَا وَرَدُوا

translation.en: Um Al-Sibiaan evil and what they gave birth to and came out of them.

segments.arabic: وَ مِنْ شَرِّ كُلِّ ذِي شَرٍّ دَاخِلٍ وَ خَارِجٍ

translation.en: And against the evil of all that is; coming in and going out,

segments.arabic: وَ عَارِضٍ وَ مُتَعَرِّضٍ وَ سَاكِنٍ وَ مُتَحَرِّكٍ
segments.transliteration: clashing and exposed, quiet and moving,

segments.arabic: وَ ضَرَبَانِ عِرْقٍ وَ صُدَاعٍ وَ شَقِيقَةٍ وَ أُمِّ مِلْدَمٍ
وَ الْحُمَّى وَ الْمُثَلَّثَةِ وَ الرِّبْعِ وَ الْغِبِّ وَ النَّافِضَةِ

translation.en: fever, triple (days of fever), quartan fever, every other day fever, shivering fever,

segments.arabic: وَ الصَّالِبَةِ وَ الدَّاخِلَةِ وَ الْخَارِجَةِ

translation.en: stiffing fever and coming in and going out evil.

segments.arabic: وَ مِنْ شَرِّ كُلِّ دَابَّةٍ أَنْتَ آخِذٌ بِناصِيَتِها

translation.en: And the evil of "every crawling creature that You has taken by the forelock!
Surely You are on a straight path

segments.arabic: وَ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّدِ

translation.en: and send Allah your enormous blessings upon Muhammad and his Household,
Friday Dua at the Time of Dhuhr
There is no god save Allah.
Allah is the Most Great.
Glory be to Allah.

segments.arabic: اَلْحَمْدُ للهِ الَّذي لَمْ يَتَّخِذْ وَلَداً
segments.transliteration: alhamdu lillahi alladhi lam yattakhidh waladan

translation.en: All praise be to Allah Who has not taken to Himself a son

segments.arabic: وَلَمْ يَكُنْ لَهُ شَرِيكٌ فِي ٱلْمُلْكِ
segments.transliteration: wa lam yakun lahu sharikun fi almulki

translation.en: nor has He had any partner in sovereignty

segments.arabic: وَلَمْ يَكُنْ لَهُ وَلِيٌّ مِنَ ٱلذُّلِّ
segments.transliteration: wa lam yakun lahu waliyyun mina aldhdhulli

translation.en: nor does He need any to protect Him from humiliation,
and magnify Him for His greatness and glory.
O Conferrer of boon amply!
O Repeller of troubles!
O Maker of souls!
O Sublime in determinations!
O Coverer [of daylight] with darkness!
O Lord of magnanimity and nobility!
O Remover of harm and pains!
O Entertainer of those lonely in darkness!
O All-knowing Who never needs teaching!

segments.transliteration: salli ʿala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: (Please) send blessings to Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad
translation.fa: بر محمّد و خاندان محمّد درود فرست

translation.en: and do to me all that which befits You.
O He Whose Name is remedy,
the remembrance of Whom is cure,
and the obedience to Whom is sufficiency,
(please) have mercy upon him whose wealth is only hope [for You]
and whose weapon is only weeping.
Glory be to You. There is no god save You.
O All-tender, O All-Bestower,
translation.fa: اى پرعطا اى پرنعمت

translation.en: O Fashioner of the heavens and the earth,
O Lord of majesty and honor.

text.en: Friday Surahs and Duas After Salaat-ul Dhuhr

translation.en: O Allah, (please do) let Your blessings
and the blessings of Your angels and Messengers
be on Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ وَعَجِّلْ فَرَجَهُمْ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli ʿala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin wa ʿajjil farajahum

translation.en: O Allah, send blessings to Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad and hasten their Relief.
O Allah, include me with the inhabitants of Paradise
whose stuffing is blessing
and whose constructors are the angels
with our Prophet Muhammad,
peace of Allah be upon him and his Household,
and our father Abraham, peace be upon him.

text.en: Friday Duas after Salaat-ul 'Asr

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمُّ صَلّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ وَعَجِّلْ فَرَجَهُمْ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli ʿala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin wa ʿajjil farajahum

translation.en: O Allah, bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad and hasten their Relief.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli ʿala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: O Allah, bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad—
translation.fa: خدایا درود فرست بر محمد و آل محمد

translation.en: the Successors and the pleased—
with the best of Your blessings,
and confer upon them
with the best of your favors.
And peace be upon them
and upon their souls and bodies;
and Allah's mercy and blessings be upon them.
The blessings of Allah, His angels,
His prophets, His messengers,
and all of His creatures
be upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad.
And peace be upon him and upon them
and upon their souls and bodies.
So be Allah's mercy and blessings.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli ʿala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: O Allah, bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad
translation.fa: خدایا درود فرست بر محمد و آل محمد

translation.en: the Successors and the pleased
with the best of Your blessings,
and confer upon them
with the best of your favors.
And peace be upon him and them
and Allah's mercy and blessings be also upon them.

text.en: It is recommended to repeat seventy times after the `Asr Prayer so that sins will be forgiven:

translation.en: I pray the forgiveness of Allah and I repent before Him.

text.en: Recite Dua Marefat-Allahumma Arrifni
Reported from Imam al-Sadiq (peace be upon him) who said: If you wish toplease Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad(peace be upon them all) you may say the following invocation:

translation.en: O Allah, O He Who is the most magnanimous of all those who may grant!
O He Who is the best of all those who are asked!
O He Who is the most Merciful of all those whose mercy may be sought!

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِهِ فِي ٱلأَوَّلِينَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli ʿala muhammadin wa alihi fi al-awwalina

translation.en: O Allah, send blessings to Muhammad and his Household among the foremost generations,

segments.arabic: وَصَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِهِ فِي ٱلآخِرِينَ
segments.transliteration: wa salli ʿala muhammadin wa alihi fi al-akhirina

translation.en: send blessings to Muhammad and his Household among the last generations,

segments.arabic: وَصَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِهِ فِي ٱلْمَلأِ ٱلأَعْلَىٰ
segments.transliteration: wa salli ʿala muhammadin wa alihi fi almala'i al-aʿla

translation.en: send blessings to Muhammad and his Household among the Highest Chiefs,

segments.arabic: وَصَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِهِ فِي ٱلْمُرْسَلِينَ
segments.transliteration: wa salli ʿala muhammadin wa alihi fi almursalina

translation.en: and send blessings to Muhammad and his Household among the Messengers.
O Allah, (please) grant Muhammad and his Household
the right of mediation, preference,
honor, loftiness,
and the grand rank.
O Allah, I believed in Muhammad,

segments.arabic: صَلَّىٰ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ وَلَمْ أَرَهُ
segments.transliteration: salla allahu ʿalayhi wa alihi wa lam arahu

translation.en: may Allah's blessings be upon him and his Household, while I have not seen him;
so, do not deprive me of seeing him on the Resurrection Day,
confer upon me with the favor of accompanying him,
cause me to die while I follow his creed,
and allow me to drink from his Pool
a drink that is quenching,
palatable, and pleasant,
after which I will never be thirsty.
Verily, You have power over all things.
O Allah, I believe in Muhammad,

segments.arabic: صَلَّىٰ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ وَلَمْ أَرَهُ
segments.transliteration: salla allahu ʿalayhi wa alihi wa lam arahu

translation.en: may Allah's blessings be upon him and his Household, while I have not seen him;
so, (please) show me his face in the gardens of Paradise.
O Allah, convey to Muhammad,
may Allah's blessings be upon him and his Household,
many greetings and compliments from me.

text.en: Recommended Salaats on Fridays

translation.en: I implore for Allah's forgiveness.

text.en: (2)Repeats the following litany one hundred times:

translation.en: All glory be to Allah all praise be to Allah;;

segments.arabic: وَلاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ ٱللَّهُ وَٱللَّهُ اكْبَرُ
segments.transliteration: wa la ilaha illa allahu wallahu akbaru

translation.en: there is no god save Allah;Allah is the Greatest;

segments.arabic: وَلاَ حَوْلَ وَلاَ قُوَّةَ إِلاَّ بِٱللَّهِ ٱلْعَلِيِّ ٱلْعَظِيمِ
segments.transliteration: wa la hawla wa la quwwata illa billahi alʿaliyyi alʿazimi

translation.en: and there is no power and no might save with Allah, the All-high, the All-Great.

text.en: (3)repeats the salwaat one hundred times:

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli ʿala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: O Allah, (please) bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad
translation.fa: خدایا درود فرست بر محمد و آل محمد

text.en: Another Prayer 2

translation.en: All glory be to Allah and with the Praising o

text.en: A Third Prayer
Duas at the Last Hour of Friday

translation.en: Glory be to You! There is no god save You!
O All-tender! O All-bestower!
translation.fa: اى پرعطا اى پرنعمت

translation.en: O Fashioner of the heavens and the earth!
of Majesty and Honor.
In the name of Allah, the Beneficent, the Merciful.
translation.fa: به نام خداى بخشاینده مهربان

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ اللَّهُمَّ رَبَّنَا [وَ بِحَمْدِكَ] وَ لَكَ الْحَمْدُ

translation.en: Glory be to You, O Allah, our God, (and for You is the praise!) To You be all praise;
You the Ever-living, Self-Subsisting,

segments.arabic: الْأَوَّلُ الْكَائِنُ وَ لَمْ يَكُنْ شَيْءٌ مِنْ خَلْقِكَ

translation.en: The first existing; none was creating you,
or any of your possessions were seen

segments.arabic: أَوْ يُتَدَبَّرْ فِي شَيْءٍ مِنْ أَمْرِكَ أَوْ يُتَفَكَّرْ فِي شَيْءٍ

translation.en: or contemplated in any of your matters or accomplishment.

segments.arabic: مِنْ قَضَائِكَ قَائِمٌ بِقِسْطِكَ مُدَبِّرٌ لِأَمْرِكَ

translation.en: Sitting on your throne, standing by your justice, controller of your affairs.

segments.arabic: قَدْ جَرَى فِيمَا هُوَ كَائِنٌ قَدَرُكَ

translation.en: Your destiny has been applied to what happened,

segments.arabic: وَ مَضَى فِيمَا أَنْتَ خَالِقٌ عِلْمُكَ

translation.en: and your knowledge has been applied to what you created.

segments.arabic: خَلَقْتَ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَ الْأَرْضَ فِرَاشاً وَ بِنَاءً

translation.en: You created the heavens and earth as a spreading and covering!
Furthermore, you made the heavens accepted home to your majesty,

segments.arabic: وَ وَقَارِكَ وَ عِزَّتِكَ وَ سُلْطَانِكَ
ثُمَّ جَعَلْتَ فِيهَا كُرْسِيَّكَ وَ عَرْشَكَ

translation.en: Therefore, you maintained your chair and throne in it,

segments.arabic: ثُمَّ سَكَنْتَهَا لَيْسَ فِيهَا شَيْءٌ غَيْرُكَ

translation.en: lived in it without anything except You;

segments.arabic: مُتَكَبِّراً فِي عَظَمَتِكَ مُتَعَظِّماً فِي كِبْرِيَائِكَ

translation.en: proud in your greatness; significant in your pride;

segments.arabic: مُتَوَحِّداً فِي عُلُوِّكَ مُتَمَكِّناً فِي مُلْكِكَ

translation.en: the only one in your highness; capable of your kingdom;

segments.arabic: مُتَعَالِياً فِي سُلْطَانِكَ مُحْتَجِباً فِي عِلْمِكَ

translation.en: exalting in your authority; veiling yourself by your knowledge,
Therefore, blessed are You and high exalted!

segments.arabic: وَ عَلَا هُنَاكَ بَهَاؤُكَ وَ نُورُكَ وَ عِزَّتُكَ وَ قُدْرَتُكَ

translation.en: Up there, your; glory, light, might, omnipotence,

segments.arabic: وَ سُلْطَانُكَ وَ حَوْلُكَ وَ قُوَّتُكَ وَ رَحْمَتُكَ
وَ قُدْسُكَ وَ أَمْرُكَ وَ مَخَافَتُكَ وَ تَمْكِينُكَ الْمَكِينُ
وَ كِبْرُكَ الْكَبِيرُ وَ عَظَمَتُكَ الْعَظِيمَةُ

translation.en: splendid enormousness and great mightiness are soaring.

segments.arabic: وَ أَنْتَ اللهُ الْحَيُّ قَبْلَ كُلِّ حَيٍّ

translation.en: You Allah the Ever-Living who was there before anything else,
the Sempiternal before any eternal,
The king with the great kingdom,

segments.arabic: الْمُمْتَدَحُ الْمُمُدَحُ اسْمُكَ فِي السَّمَاوَاتِ وَ الْأَرْضِ

translation.en: the praised praiseworthy name in heavens, earth,

segments.arabic: وَ خَالِقُهُنَّ وَ نُورُهُنَّ وَ رَبُّهُنَّ وَ إِلَهُهُنَّ وَ مَا فِيهِنَّ

translation.en: its; creator, light, God, and Allah and what's in them.

segments.arabic: فَسُبْحَانَكَ وَ بِحَمْدِكَ رَبَّنَا وَ جَلَّ ثَنَاؤُكَ

translation.en: Glory and praise be to You, Allah and Your Praise-worthiness is Most Exalted.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ عَبْدِكَ وَ رَسُولِكَ وَ نَبِيِّكَ
segments.transliteration: God, bless Muhammad, Your slave, messenger, prophet,

segments.arabic: وَ اجْزِهِ بِكُلِّ خَيْرٍ أَبْلَاهُ وَ شَرٍّ جَلَاهُ وَ يُسْرٍ أَتَاهُ

translation.en: and reward him by; the best he did of, an evil he dispels, simplicity he accomplished,

segments.arabic: وَ ضَعِيفٍ قَوَّاهُ وَ يَتِيمٍ آوَاهُ وَ مِسْكِينٍ رَحِمَهُ

translation.en: strengthing of a weaker, sheltering an orphan, having mercy upon paupers,

segments.arabic: وَ جَاهِلٍ عَلَّمَهُ وَ دِينٍ بَصَّرَهُ

translation.en: the teaching of the ignorant, enlightening a pious

segments.arabic: وَ حَقٍّ نَصَرَهُ الْجَزَاءَ الْأَوْفَى وَ الرَّفِيقَ الْأَعْلَى

translation.en: and truth he helped with the; fullest repayment,highest helping friend

segments.arabic: وَ الشَّفَاعَةَ الْجَائِزَةَ وَ الْمَنْزِلَ الرَّفِيعَ فِي الْجَنَّةِ عِنْدَكَ آمِينَ رَبَّ الْعَالَمِينَ

translation.en: rewarded intercession and a raised home in heaven close by you; may it be so, Lord of the worlds.

segments.arabic: اجْعَلْ لَهُ مَنْزِلًا مَغْبُوطاً وَ مَجْلِساً رَفِيعاً

translation.en: Make; an envied home for him, a high seated position,

segments.arabic: وَ ظِلًّا ظَلِيلًا وَ مُرْتَفِعاً جَسِيماً جَمِيلًا
وَ نَظَراً إِلَى وَجْهِكَ يَوْمَ تَحْجُبُهُ عَنِ الْمُجْرِمِينَ

translation.en: and gazing upon Your face when you hinder it from the criminals.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ

translation.en: O Allah, bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad.
translation.fa: خدایا درود فرست بر محمد و آل محمد

segments.arabic: وَ اجْعَلْهُ لَنَا فَرَطاً وَ اجْعَلْ حَوْضَهُ لَنَا مَوْرِداً

translation.en: Make him for us; a precede, his pool our reach,

segments.arabic: وَ لِقَاءَهُ لَنَا مَوْعِداً يَسْتَبْشِرُ بِهِ أَوَّلُنَا وَ آخِرُنَا

translation.en: and his meeting a promise that our first and last be cheerful about,

segments.arabic: وَ أَنْتَ عَنَّا رَاضٍ فِي دَارِكَ دَارِ السَّلَامِ

translation.en: while You are satisfied with us in Your home; the abode of Islam,
heavens; the Gardens of Delight
may it be so, Allah of Truth, Lord of the worlds.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ

translation.en: O Allah, bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad.
translation.fa: خدایا درود فرست بر محمد و آل محمد

segments.arabic: وَ أَسْأَلُكَ بِاسْمِكَ الَّذِي هُوَ نُورٌ مِنْ نُورٍ وَ نُورٌ فَوْقَ كُلِّ نُورٍ

translation.en: I beseech You in Your name, which is a light from light, and light upon every light.

segments.arabic: وَ نُورٌ تُضِيءُ بِهِ كُلَّ ظُلْمَةٍ

translation.en: And the light which illuminates every darkness,

segments.arabic: وَ تَكْسِرُ بِهِ قُوَّةَ كُلِّ شَيْطَانٍ مَرِيدٍ وَ جَبَّارٍ عَنِيدٍ وَ جِنِّيٍّ عَتِيدٍ

translation.en: and You break with it the disobedient, obstinate tyrant, and prepared Jinn Satan (devil) power.

segments.arabic: وَ تُؤْمِنُ بِهِ خَوْفَ كُلِّ خَائِفٍ

translation.en: And secure the fear of every frightened.

segments.arabic: وَ تُبْطِلُ بِهِ سِحْرَ كُلِّ سَاحِرٍ وَ حَسَدَ كُلِّ حَاسِدٍ

translation.en: And inactive every magic of a magician and the evil of all those who are jealous!

segments.arabic: وَ يَتَضَرَّعُ لِعَظَمَتِهِ الْبَرُّ وَ الْفَاجِرُ

translation.en: His greatness is beseeched by every faithful and libertine.

segments.arabic: وَ بِاسْمِكَ الْأَكْبَرِ الَّذِي سَمَّيْتَ بِهِ نَفْسَكَ

translation.en: And (I beseech ) by your great name that; You named Yourself with,
the throne You established Yourself on
and Your chair that You sat firmly on

segments.arabic: أَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ

translation.en: to send the blessings upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad.
Do open before me (the door) this night,

segments.arabic: يَا رَبِّ بَابَ كُلِّ خَيْرٍ فَتَحْتَهُ لِأَحَدٍ مِنْ خَلْقِكَ

translation.en: O, Lord of every goodness door You opened before anyone of Your creatures,
Your intimate servants, and those who obey You.
Then do not ever close it before me;

segments.arabic: حَتَّى أَلْقَاكَ وَ أَنْتَ عَنِّي رَاضٍ

translation.en: until I meet You while You are satisfied with me.

segments.arabic: أَسْأَلُكَ ذَلِكَ بِرَحْمَتِكَ وَ أَرْغَبُ إِلَيْكَ فِيهِ بِقُدْرَتِكَ

translation.en: I ask You for that by Your mercy and by Your ability, wishing for Your help in this request.

segments.arabic: فَشَفِّعِ اللَّيْلَةَ يَا رَبِّ رَغْبَتِي وَ أَكْرِمْ طَلِبَتِي

translation.en: Therefore, My Lord mediate for me tonight my desire; settle my need,

segments.arabic: وَ نَفِّسْ كُرْبَتِي وَ ارْحَمْ عَبْرَتِي

translation.en: relieve my distress, mercy upon my weeping,

segments.arabic: وَ صِلْ وَحْدَتِي وَ آنِسْ وَحْشَتِي
segments.transliteration: associate my loneliness, divert my soleness,

segments.arabic: وَ اسْتُرْ عَوْرَتِي وَ آمِنْ رَوْعَتِي وَ اجْبُرْ فَاقَتِي

translation.en: hide my faults, calm my fear, settle my neediness,

segments.arabic: وَ لَقِّنِّي حُجَّتِي وَ أَقِلْنِي عَثْرَتِي

translation.en: dictate to me the principles of faith and lessen my lapses.

segments.arabic: وَ اسْتَجِبْ اللَّيْلَةَ دُعَائِي وَ أَعْطِنِي مَسْأَلَتِي

translation.en: Respond to my supplication today, (please) Answer my request,

segments.arabic: وَ أَعْظِمْ مِنْ مَسْأَلَتِي وَ كُنْ بِدُعَائِي حَفِيّاً

translation.en: make my request considerable, be gracious toward my prayer,

segments.arabic: [وَ كُنْ بِي رَحِيماً وَ لَا تُقَنِّطْنِي [مِنْ رَحْمَتِكَ

translation.en: be merciful on me; do not make me lose hope of Your mercy.

segments.arabic: وَ لَا تُؤْيِسْنِي مِنْ رَوْحِكَ وَ لَا تَخْذُلْنِي

translation.en: (Please) do not make me despair of Your soothing mercy, do not abandon me;

segments.arabic: وَ أَنَا أَدْعُوكَ وَ لَا تَحْرِمْنِي

translation.en: while I beseech You, do not deprive me;

segments.arabic: وَ أَنَا أَسْأَلُكَ وَ لَا تُعَذِّبَنِي وَ أَنَا أَسْتَغْفِرُكَ

translation.en: while I ask You and do not punish me while I seek forgiveness of you.
O, Most Merciful of the merciful!
translation.fa: اى مهربانترین مهربانان

segments.arabic: وَ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ أَهْلِ بَيْتِهِ أَجْمَعِينَ

translation.en: O, Allah's blessings upon Muhammed and his whole Household.
In the Name of Allah, the All-beneficent, the All-merciful.
“In the name of Allah,” the word of those who hold fast to Him,
the speech of those who seek His protection

segments.arabic: وَ أَعُوذُ بِٱللَّهِ تَعَالَىٰ مِنْ جَوْرِ ٱلْجَائِرِينَ
segments.transliteration: wa a`udhu billahi ta`ala min jawri alja'irina

translation.en: I seek refuge in Allah, high exalted is He, from the injustice of the unjust,
the trickery of the enviers,
and the oppression of the wrongdoers,
and I praise Him beyond the praise of the praisers!
O Allah, You are the One without partner,
and the King without having been made sovereign;
no one opposes You in Your decree
and no one contests You in Your kingdom.
I beseech You to bless Muhammad
Your servant and Your messenger,

segments.transliteration: wa an tuzi`ani min shukri na`maka

translation.en: inspire me with a thanksgiving for Your favors
that You take to the utmost limit of Your good pleasure,
help me to obey You,
hold fast to worshiping You,
and deserve Your reward,
through the gentleness of Your solicitude

segments.arabic: وَتَرْحَمَنِي وَتَصُدَّنِي عَنْ مَعَاصِيكَ مَا أَحْيَيْتَنِي
segments.transliteration: wa tarhamani wa tasuddani `an ma`asika ma ahyaytani

translation.en: have mercy upon me, bar me from acts of disobedience to You as long as You keep me alive,

segments.transliteration: wa tuwaffiqani lima yanfa`uni ma abqaytani

translation.en: give me success in what profits me as long as You spare me,
expand my breast through Your Book,
lessen my burden through its recitation,

segments.transliteration: wa tamnahani alssalamata fi dini wa nafsi

translation.en: bestow upon me health in my religion and my soul,

segments.transliteration: wa la tuhisha bi ahla unsi

translation.en: estrange not my intimates from me,

segments.arabic: وَتُتِمَّ إِحْسَانَكَ فِيمَا بَقِيَ مِنْ عُمُرِي
segments.transliteration: wa tutimma ihsanaka fima baqiya min `umri

translation.en: and complete Your beneficence in what is left of my lifetime,
just as You have shown beneficence in that of it which has passed!
O Most Merciful of all those who show mercy!

name: Ziyarat Of Holy Prophet (s) on Saturday

segments.arabic: أَشْهَدُ أَنْ لاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ ٱللَّهُ
segments.transliteration: ash-hadu an la ilaha illa allahu

translation.en: I bear witness that there is no god save Allah;
alone without having any partner;
and I bear witness that you are His messenger
and you are Muhammad, the son of `Abdullah.

segments.arabic: وَأَشْهَدُ أَنّكَ قَدْ بَلَّغْتَ رِسَالاتِ رَبِّكَ
segments.transliteration: wa ash-hadu annaka qad ballaghta risalati rabbika

translation.en: And I bear witness that you have truly conveyed the missions of your Lord,
well-wished for your nation,
striven hard in the way of Allah
by means of wisdom and excellent preaching,
and fulfilled the duty that is incumbent upon you;
and you have been sympathetic with the believers
and unyielding to the unbelievers;
and you have worshipped Allah sincerely
until death came upon you.

segments.arabic: فَبَلَغَ ٱللَّهُ بِكَ أَشْرَفَ مَحَلِّ ٱلْمُكَرَّمِينَ
segments.transliteration: fabalagha allahu bika ashrafa mahalli almukarramina

translation.en: Allah therefore has lifted you up to the most honorable place of the honored ones.
All praise be to Allah Who has saved us, through you,
from polytheism and deviation.
O Allah, (please) send blessings to Muhammad and his Household,
and make Your blessings, the blessings of Your angels,
Your prophets, the Messengers,
Your righteous servants,
the inhabitants of the heavens and the [layers of the] earth,

segments.arabic: وَمَنْ سَبَّحَ لَكَ يَا رَبَّ ٱلعَالَمِينَ
segments.transliteration: wa man sabbaha laka ya rabba al`alamina

translation.en: and ever one who glorifies You, O Lord of the worlds,
from the past and the late generations,
be on Muhammad, Your servant, messenger,
prophet, trustee,
elite, most-beloved,
elect, choice,
dignitary, select,
and the best of Your creatures.
And grant him preference, virtue,
[right of] mediation, and sublime rank;
and send him a praiseworthy status
which all the past and the late generations wish to have.
O Allah, You have said:

segments.transliteration: wa law annahum idh zalamu anfusahum

translation.en: “And had they, when they were unjust to themselves,
come to you and asked forgiveness of Allah,
and the Messenger had also asked forgiveness for them,
they would have found Allah Oft-returning to mercy, Merciful.”
O my God, I have come to Your Prophet, seeking forgiveness of You
and repenting before You from my sins;
so, (please) send blessings to Muhammad and his Household
and forgive them for me.
O our master,
I turn by you and by your Household

segments.transliteration: ila allahi ta`ala rabbika wa rabbi

translation.en: towards Allah, the Exalted, your and my Lord,
so that He may forgive me.

text.en: Then repeat the following three times:
text.ar: ثمَّ قٌل ثلاثَ مرّاتٍ:

segments.transliteration: inna lillahi wa inna ilayhi raji`una

translation.en: Verily, we are Allah's and verily unto Him shall we return.
Then say the following:
We are stricken by losing you, O beloved of our hearts!
Too shocking is our misfortune of losing you!
Because the Revelation has been interrupted
and because we have missed you.

segments.transliteration: fa inna lillahi wa inna ilayhi raji`una

translation.en: Nevertheless, we are Allah’s and to Him shall we return.
O our master, O Allah’s Messenger!

segments.arabic: صَلَوَاتُ ٱللَّهِ عَلَيْكَ وَعَلَىٰ آلِ بَيْتِكَ ٱلطَّاهِرِينَ
segments.transliteration: salawatu allahi `alayka wa `ala ali baytika alttahirina

translation.en: May Allah’s blessings be upon you and upon your Household, the immaculate.

segments.transliteration: hadha yawmu alssabti wa huwa yawmuka

translation.en: This day is Saturday, which is your day,

segments.transliteration: wa ana fihi dayfuka wa jaruka

translation.en: and on this day I am your guest and in your vicinity;
so, receive me as your guest and as your neighbor.
Indeed, you are generous and hospitable
and you are commanded [by Allah] to host your neighbors.
So, receive me as your guest and treat me hospitably;
and accept us as your neighbors and treat us in due hospitability;

segments.arabic: بِمَنْزِلَةِ ٱللَّهِ عِنْدَكَ وَعِنْدَ آلِ بَيْتِكَ

translation.en: [I ask you] in the name of Allah’s standing with you and with your Household
and in the name of their standing with Him
and in the name of the knowledge that He has entrusted with you all.
Verily, He is the most generous of all those who show generosity.

text.en: Sayyid Ibn Tawus quoted Imam al-Hasan al-’Askari(a.s.) to have said: In the books of my forefathers (a.s.), I have read that whoever offers on Saturdays a four unit prayer; reciting in each unit Surah al-Faatehah, Surah al-Tawheed, and <ref=1:2:255-257>Ayat Al-Kursi</ref>, Allah the Almighty and All-majestic will grant him the rank of the Prophets, the martyrs, and the righteous people. How excellent the company of these is!
text.ar: روى السيد ابن طاووس عن الإمام العسكري عليه‌السلام قال : قرأت من كتب آبائي عليهم‌السلام من صلّى يوم السبت أربع ركعات يقرأ في كل ركعة فاتحة الكتاب وقل هو الله أحد و <ref=1:2:255-257>آیة الکرسي</ref> كتبه الله عزَّ وجلَّ في درجة النبيين والشهداء والصالحين وحسن أولئك رفيقا

text.en: When the reporter asked Imam al-’Askari(a.s.) about the best time of offering these prayers, the Imam (a.s.) answered, “The best time is the period between sunrise and midday.”
text.ar: فسأل الراوي فقال : في أيّ ساعة من ساعات الأيام أصلّي هذه الصلوات؟ فقال ما بين طلوع الشمس إلى زوالها

translation.en: In the Name of Allah, the All-compassionate, the All-merciful.

segments.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ الَّذِي لاَ أَرْجُو إِلاَّ فَضْلَهُ
segments.transliteration: bismillahi alladhi la arju illa fadlahu

translation.en: In the name of Allah, from whom I hope for nothing but bounty,
I fear nothing but justice,
I rely upon nothing but His word,
and I cling to nothing but His Rope.

segments.arabic: بِكَ أَسْتَجِيـرُ يَا ذَا ٱلْعَفْوِ وَٱلرِّضْوَانِ

translation.en: In You do I seek sanctuary— O Possessor of pardon and good pleasure—
from wrong and enmity,
from the vicissitudes of time
from recurrence of sorrows,
from the striking of mishaps,

segments.arabic: وَمِنِ ٱنْقِضَاءِ ٱلْمُدَّةِ قَبْلَ ٱلتَّأَهُّبِ وَٱلْعُدَّةِ
segments.transliteration: wa min inqida'i almuddati qabla altta'ahhubi wal`uddati

translation.en: and from the expiration of the term before preparation and readiness.

segments.arabic: وَإِيَّاكَ أَسْتَرْشِدُ لِمَا فيهِ ٱلصَّلاَحُ وَٱلإِصْلاَحُ
segments.transliteration: wa iyyaka astarshidu lima fihi alssalahu wal-islahu

translation.en: From You do I seek guidance to that wherein is righteousness and setting aright.

segments.arabic: وَبِكَ أَسْتَعينُ فيمَا يَقْتَرِنُ بِهِ ٱلنَّجَاحُ وَٱلإِنْجَاحُ
segments.transliteration: wa bika asta`inu fima yaqtarinu bihi alnnajahu wal-injahu

translation.en: From You do I seek help in that which is linked to success and favorable response.

segments.arabic: وَإِيَّاكَ أَرْغَبُ فِي لِبَاسِ ٱلْعَافِيَةِ وَتَمَامِهَا
segments.transliteration: wa iyyaka arghabu fi libasi al`afiyati wa tamamiha

translation.en: From You do I desire for the garment of wellbeing and its completion,
and the covering of health and its permanence.

segments.arabic: وَ أَعُوذُ بِكَ يَا رَبِّ مِنْ هَمَزَاتِ ٱلشَّيَاطينِ
segments.transliteration: wa a`udhu bika ya rabbi min hamazati alshshayatini

translation.en: I seek refuge in You, O my Lord, from the evil suggestions of the devils.

segments.arabic: وَ أَحْتَرِزُ بِسُلْطَانِكَ مِنْ جَوْرِ ٱلسَّلاَطِينِ
segments.transliteration: wa ahtarizu bisultanika min jawri alssalatini

translation.en: I seek protection in Your sovereignty from the injustice of the sovereigns.

segments.arabic: فَتَقَبَّلْ مَا كَانَ مِنْ صَلاَتِي وَصَوْمِي
segments.transliteration: fataqabbal ma kana min salati wa sawmi

translation.en: So, (please) accept my past prayers and fasting,

segments.arabic: وَٱجْعَلْ غَدِي وَمَا بَعْدَهُ أَفْضَلَ مِنْ سَاعَتِي وَيَوْمِي
segments.transliteration: waj`al ghadi wa ma ba`dahu afdala min sa`ati wa yawmi

translation.en: make my morrow and what is after it better than my present hour and my day,
exalt me in my clan and people,
and protect me in my waking and sleep,
for You are Allah, the Best Guardian,
and You are the most Merciful of all those who show mercy.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَبْرَأُ إِلَيْكَ فِي يَوْمِي هٰذَا
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni abra'u ilayka fi yawmi hadha

translation.en: O Allah, I repudiate, before You on this day of mine
and on all Sundays that follow it,
polytheism and atheism.
I devote my supplication sincerely to You,
addressing myself to Your response.
I observe the acts of obedience to You
for hope of gaining Your rewards.
So, (please) bless Muhammad, the best of Your creation
and the caller to Your truth,

segments.arabic: وَ أَعِزَّنِي بِعِزِّكَ ٱلَّذِي لاَ يُضَامُ
segments.transliteration: wa a`izzani bi`izzika alladhi la yudamu

translation.en: and fortify me with Your almightiness, which is invulnerable,
protect me with Your Eye, which never sleeps,
and seal my affair by acting devoutly to You
and my life with forgiveness!
Surely, You are the All-forgiving, the All-compassionate!

name: Ziyarat Of Imam Ali (as) on Sunday

translation.en: Peace be upon the Prophetic Tree
and the Hashemite plant that is luminous,
fruitful of Prophethood,
and elegant with Imamate.
And [peace be] upon your two grave-fellows; Adam and Noah,
peace be upon both of them.
Peace be upon you and upon your Household,
the pure and immaculate.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ وَعَلَىٰ ٱلْمَلاَئِكَةِ ٱلْمُحْدِقِينَ بِكَ

translation.en: Peace be upon you and upon the angels surrounding you
and encompassing your tomb.
O my master, O Commander of the Believers!
Today is Sunday,
which is your day and carrying your name,

segments.transliteration: wa ana dayfuka fihi wa jaruka

translation.en: and, on this day, I am your guest and in your vicinity;
therefore, my master, receive me as your guest and neighbor.
Surely, you are generous and hospitable
and you are commanded to treat your neighbors hospitably.
So, (please) do to me that which I desire from you
and I hope you to do,
[I ask you] in the name of your and your Household’s standing with Allah
and His standing with you all,
and in the name of your cousin, Allah’s Messenger,

segments.transliteration: salla allahu `alayhi wa alihi wa sallama

translation.en: may Allah’s peace and blessings be upon him
and upon them all.
Peace be upon you, O examined lady.
He Who created you has examined you
and found that you have passed the examination patiently.

segments.arabic: أَنَا لَكِ مُصَدِّقٌ صَابِرٌ عَلَىٰ مَا أَتَىٰ بِهِ أَبُوكِ وَوَصِيُّهُ صَلَوَاتُ ٱللَّهِ عَلَيْهِمَا
segments.transliteration: ana laki musaddiqun sabirun `ala ma ata bihi abuki wa wasiyyuhu salawatu allahi `alayhima

translation.en: I verify that you were patient about what came upon your father and his his successor peace be upon both of

segments.transliteration: wa ana as'aluki in kuntu saddaqtuki

translation.en: I now beseech you by my belief in you
to attach & associate me with my belief in both of them
so that I will be delighted.
So, testify for me that I am totally loyal to you
and to your Household;
peace of Allah be upon them all.

text.en: Ziarat second Version
text.ar: زیارة أخری:

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكِ يَا مُمْتَحَنَةُ امْتَحَنَكِ الَّذِي خَلَقَكِ قَبْلَ أَنْ يَخْلُقَكِ وَ كُنْتِ لِمَا امْتَحَنَكِ بِهِ صَابِرَةً

translation.en: Peace be on you, O the carefully examined, tried and measured by Him who created you, and found you, in your test, cool and compact, steady and stable.

segments.arabic: وَ نَحْنُ لَكِ أَوْلِيَاءُ مُصَدِّقُونَ وَ لِكُلِّ مَا أَتَى بِهِ أَبُوكِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ وَ سَلَّمَ

translation.en: We tell the truth about you; calm and quiet, with self control and composure (you) put up with all that which your father blessings of Allah be on him and on his family

segments.arabic: وَ أَتَى بِهِ وَصِيُّهُ عَلَيْهِ السَّلاَمُ مُسَلِّمُونَ

translation.en: and his "Wasi" (successor) peace be on him came across.

segments.arabic: وَ نَحْنُ نَسْأَلُكَ اللَّهُمَّ إِذْ كُنَّا مُصَدِّقِينَ لَهُمْ أَنْ تُلْحِقَنَا بِتَصْدِيقِنَا بِالدَّرَجَةِ الْعَالِيَةِ

translation.en: We beseech you, (If I have stated the truth), to bind us together with the testimony, concerning both of them, in order to give joy and satisfaction to my heart and soul.

segments.arabic: لِنُبَشِّرَ أَنْفُسَنَا بِأَنَّا قَدْ طَهُرْنَا بِوِلاَيَتِهِمْ (بِوَلاَيَتِهِمْ) عَلَيْهِمُ السَّلاَمُ

translation.en: So bear witness that truly I, by heart, made evident your, and your children's "wilayat" (superintendent guardianship), blessings of Allah be on them all

text.en: When the reporter asked Imam al-’Askari(a.s.) about the best time of offering these prayers, the Imam (a.s.) answered, “The best time is the period between sunrise and midday.”
text.ar: فسأل الراوي فقال : في أيّ ساعة من ساعات الأيام أصلّي هذه الصلوات؟ فقال ما بين طلوع الشمس إلى زوالها
