text.en: Imam al-Hasan al-’Askari(a.s.) is also reported to have said that whoever offers on Sundays a four unit prayer; reciting in each unit Surah al-Faatehah and <ref=1:67>Surah Al-Mulk</ref> , will be allowed by Almighty Allah to occupy any place in Paradise he likes.
text.ar: وعنه عليه‌السلام أيضاً قال : من صلّى يوم الأحد أربع ركعات يقرأ في كل ركعة فاتحة الكتاب وسورة : <ref=1:67>الملک</ref> ، بوأه الله من الجنة حيث يشاء

translation.en: In the Name of Allah, the All-beneficent, the All-merciful

segments.arabic: اَلْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ ٱلَّذِي لَمْ يُشْهِدْ أَحَداً
segments.transliteration: alhamdu lillahi alladhi lam yushhid ahadan

translation.en: Praise be to Allah Who allowed none to witness
when He created the heavens and the earth,

segments.arabic: وَلاَ ٱتَّخَذَ مُعِيناً حِيـنَ بَرَأَ ٱلنَّسَمَاتِ
segments.transliteration: wa lattakhadha mu`inan hina bara`a annasamati

translation.en: and Who took no helper when He authored the spirits!
He has no associate in Divinity
and no support in Unity.
Tongues fall silent before the limit of describing Him,
intellects fail before the core of knowing Him,
tyrants fall low in awe of Him,
faces are humbled in fear of Him,
and everything mighty yields to His mightiness!
So, to You belongs praise, again and again, well-measured,
continually, methodically!
And may His blessings be upon His Messenger endlessly,
and His salutation (be upon him) everlastingly, eternally!

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ ٱجْعَلْ أَوَّلَ يَوْمِي هٰذَا صَلاَحاً
segments.transliteration: allahumma ij`al awwala yawmi hadha salahan

translation.en: O Allah, (please) make the beginning of this day of mine righteousness,
its middle prosperity,
and its end success!

segments.arabic: وَ أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ يَوْمٍ اَوَّلُهُ فَزَعٌ
segments.transliteration: wa a`udhu bika min yawmin awwaluhu faza`un

translation.en: I seek refuge in You from a day whose beginning is fright,
whose middle is anxiety,
and whose end is pain!

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْتَغْفِرُكَ لِكُلِّ نَذْرٍ نَذَرْتُهُ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni astaghfiruka likulli nadhrin nadhartuhu

translation.en: O Allah, I pray forgiveness from You for every vow I have vowed,
every promise I have made,
and every pledge I have pledged
and then I failed to keep for You.

segments.arabic: وَ أَسْأَلُكَ فِي مَظَالِمِ عِبَادِكَ عِنْدِي

translation.en: I ask You concerning the complaints of Your servants against me:
If there is a servant from among Your servants
or a bondmaid from among Your bondmaids,

segments.arabic: كَانَتْ لَهُ قِبَلِي مَظْلَمَةٌ ظَلَمْتُهَا إِيَّاهُ
segments.transliteration: kanat lahu qibali mazlamatun zalamtuha iyyahu

translation.en: who has against me a complaint
because I have wronged him in respect to himself, his reputation,

segments.arabic: أَوْ فِي مَالِهِ أَوْ فِي أَهْلِهِ وَوَلَدِهِ
segments.transliteration: aw fi malihi aw fi ahlihi wa waladihi

translation.en: his property, his wife or his child,
or because evil words I have spoken about him in his absence,

segments.arabic: أَوْ تَحَامُلٌ عَلَيهِ بِمَيْلٍ أَوْ هَوًىٰ

translation.en: an imposition upon him through inclination, caprice,
scorn, zeal,
false show, bigotry,
whether he be absent or present,
alive or dead,
such that my hand has fallen short
and my capacity has been too narrow to make restitution to him
or to annul my obligation to him,

segments.transliteration: fa as'alika ya man yamliku alhajati

translation.en: I ask You, O He who owns all objects of need,
which are granted by His will
and hasten to His desire

segments.arabic: أَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: an tusalliya `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: that You bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,
and make [the one I have wronged] satisfied with me in the manner that You will,
and gift me mercy from You,
because, indeed, forgiveness decreases You not
and giving injures You not.
O Most Merciful of all those who show mercy!

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ أَوْلِنِي فِي كُلِّ يَومِ ٱثْنَيْنِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma awlini fi kulli yawmi ithnayni

translation.en: O Allah, bestow upon me on every Monday
with two favors from You:
the felicity to obey You at its beginning
and the favor of Your forgiveness at its end!
O He who is the God
and none other than Whom grants forgiveness for sins!

name: Ziyarat Of Imam Hassan (as) on Monday

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ رَسُولِ رَبِّ ٱلْعَالَمِينَ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka ya ibna rasuli rabbi al`alamina

translation.en: Peace be on you, O son of the Messenger of the Lord of the Worlds!

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ أَمِيرِ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ

translation.en: Peace be on you, O son of the Commander of the Believers!

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ فَاطِمَةَ ٱلزَّهْرَاءِ

translation.en: Peace be on you, O son of Fatimah, the luminous lady!
Peace be on you, O beloved of Allah!
Peace be on you, O choice of Allah!
Peace be on you, O trustee of Allah!
Peace be on you, O Argument of Allah!
Peace be on you, O Light of Allah!
Peace be on you, O Path of Allah!

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بَيَانَ حُكْمِ ٱللَّهِ

translation.en: Peace be on you, O elucidation of the rule of Allah!

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا نَاصِرَ دِينِ ٱللَّهِ

translation.en: Peace be on you, O supporter of the religion of Allah!
Peace be on you, O pure master!
Peace be on you, O self-righteous and truthful!
Peace be on you, O practiser (of God’s commands) and trustee!
Peace be on you, O well-experienced in the interpretation (of the Qur'an)!
Peace be on you, O guide and well-guided!
Peace be on you, O immaculate and pure!
Peace be on you, O pious and infallible!
Peace be on you, O veritable truth!
Peace be on you, O martyr and veracious!

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا أَبَا مُحَمَّدٍ ٱلْحَسَنَ بْنَ عَلِيٍّ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka ya aba muhammadin alhasana ibna `aliyyin

translation.en: Peace be on you, O Abu-Muhammad al-Hasan, the son of `Ali!
Allah’s mercy and blessings be upon you!

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ رَسُولِ ٱللَّهِ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O son of Allah’s Messenger!

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ أَمِيرِ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O son of the Commander of the Believers!

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ سَيِّدَةِ نِسَاءِ ٱلْعَالَمِينَ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka ya ibna sayyidati nisa'i al`alamina

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O son of the doyenne of the women of the world!
I bear witness that you performed the prayers [duly],
defrayed the poor-rate,
enjoined the right,
forbade the wrong,
worshipped Allah sincerely,

segments.transliteration: wa jahadta fi allahi haqqa jihadihi

translation.en: and strove for the sake of Allah with due striving
until death came upon you.
So, peace from me be upon you

segments.transliteration: ma baqitu wa baqiya allaylu walnnaharu

translation.en: as long as I am alive and as long as day and night remain,
and peace be upon your Household, the pure, the immaculate.

segments.arabic: أَنَا يَا مَوْلاَيَ مَوْلىٰ لَكَ وَلآِلِ بَيْتِكَ
segments.transliteration: ana ya mawlaya mawlan laka wa li-ali baytika

translation.en: O my master, I am a servant of you and of your Household,
peaceful with those who keep peace with you,
at war against those who are at war against you,
and believing in your secret and open affairs
and your inward and outward affairs.
May Allah curse your enemies
from the past and late generations.

segments.arabic: وَأَنَا أَبْرَأُ إِلَىٰ ٱللَّهِ تَعَالَىٰ مِنْهُمْ
segments.transliteration: wa ana abra'u ila allahi ta`ala minhum

translation.en: And I release myself from them before Almighty Allah!
O my master, Abu-Muhammad;

segments.arabic: يَا مَوْلاَيَ يَا أَبَا عَبْدِ ٱللَّهِ

translation.en: and my master, Abu-`Abdullah!
Today is Monday,
which is the day of both of you and carrying your names.
On this day, I am your guest;
therefore, receive me as your guest and treat me hospitably.
Verily, you both are the most excellent hosts a guest may gain.

segments.transliteration: wa ana fihi min jiwarikuma fa-ajirani

translation.en: On this day too, I am in your vicinity; so, treat me as your neighbor,
since you are commanded to receive your guests and neighbors hospitably.
May Allah’s peace be upon you both and upon your immaculate household.

text.en: Imam al-Hasan al-’Askari(a.s.) is also reported to have said that whoever offers on Mondays a ten unit prayer; reciting in each unit Surah al-Faatehah once and repeating Surah al-Tawheed ten times, Almighty Allah will grant him on Friday light that shines the place of the Assemblage (on the Resurrection Day) due to which all the creatures of Almighty Allah will wish to have its like on that day.
text.ar: وقال عليه‌السلام أيضا : من صلّى يوم الاثنين عشر ركعات يقرأ في كل ركعة فاتحة الكتاب وقل هو الله أحد عشراً جعل اللّه له يوم الجمعة نوراً يضي منه الموقف حتى يغطبه به جميع من خلق الله في ذلك اليوم

text.en: When the reporter asked Imam al-’Askari(a.s.) about the best time of offering these prayers, the Imam (a.s.) answered, “The best time is the period between sunrise and midday.”
text.ar: فسأل الراوي فقال : في أيّ ساعة من ساعات الأيام أصلّي هذه الصلوات؟ فقال ما بين طلوع الشمس إلى زوالها

translation.en: In the Name of Allah, the All-beneficent, the All-merciful.
All praise be to Allah;
and praise is His right, since He deserves it,
abundant praise!

segments.arabic: وَ أَعُوذُ بِهِ مِنْ شَرِّ نَفْسِي:
segments.transliteration: wa a`udhu bihi min sharri nafsi

translation.en: I seek refuge in Him from the evil of my soul,
“For surely, the soul commands to evil
except as my Lord has mercy.”

segments.arabic: وَ أَعُوذُ بِهِ مِنْ شَرِّ ٱلشَّيْطَانِ
segments.transliteration: wa a`udhu bihi min sharri ashshaytani

translation.en: I seek refuge in Him from the evil of Satan
who adds sins to my sin.

segments.arabic: وَ أَحْتَرِزُ بِهِ مِنْ كُلِّ جَبَّارٍ فَاجِرٍ
segments.transliteration: wa ahtarizu bihi min kulli jabbarin fajirin

translation.en: I seek protection with Him from every wicked tyrant,
unjust sovereign,
and conquering enemy.
O Allah, place me among Your troops,
for Your troops—they are the victors,
and place me in Your party,
for Your party—they are the ones who prosper,
and place me among Your friends,

segments.arabic: فَإِنَّ أَوْلِيَائَكَ لاَ خَوْفٌ عَلَيْهِمْ وَلاَ هُمْ يَحْزَنُونَ
segments.transliteration: fa-inna awliya'aka la khawfun `alayhim wala hum yahzanuna

translation.en: for Your friends—no fear shall be upon them, nor shall they experience sorrow.
O Allah, set right for me my religion,
for it is the preserving tie of my affair;
set right for me my hereafter,
for it is the abode of my permanent lodging

segments.transliteration: wa ilayha min mujawarati alli'ami mafarri

translation.en: and to it I flee from the neighborhood of the vile!

segments.arabic: وَٱجْعَلِ ٱلْحَيَاةَ زِيَادَةً لِي فِي كُلِّ خَيْرٍ
segments.transliteration: waj`al alhayata ziyadatan li fi kulli khayrin

translation.en: Make life an increase for me in every good

segments.arabic: وَٱلْوَفَاةَ رَاحَةً لِي مِنْ كُلِّ شَرٍّ
segments.transliteration: walwafata rahatan li min kulli sharrin

translation.en: and death an ease for me from every evil!
O Allah, send blessings to Muhammad,
translation.fa: خدایا درود فرست بر محمّد

translation.en: the Seal of the Prophets
and the completion of the number of the envoys,
and upon his Household, the good, the pure,
and upon his Companions, the distinguished,

segments.transliteration: wa hab li fi alththulatha'i thalathan

translation.en: and give me on Tuesday three things:

segments.arabic: لاَ تَدَعْ لِي ذَنْباً إِلاَّ غَفَرْتَهُ
segments.transliteration: la tada` li dhanban illa ghafartahu

translation.en: Leave no sin for me unless You forgive it,
no grief unless You take it away,
and no enemy unless You repel him!
In the name of “In the name of Allah,” the best of the Names,
In the name of Allah, the Lord of the earth and the heaven,
I seek to repulse every hateful thing, the first of which is His anger,

segments.arabic: وَ أَسْتَجْلِبُ كُلَّ مَحْبُوبٍ أَوَّلُهُ رِضَاهُ
segments.transliteration: wa astajlibu kulla mahbubin awwaluhu ridahu

translation.en: and I seek to attract every lovable thing, the first of which is His good pleasure!
So, seal me with forgiveness from You,
O Patron of beneficence!

name: Ziyarat of three Imams on Tuesday

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكُمْ يَا خُزَّانَ عِلْمِ ٱللَّهِ

translation.en: Peace be on you, O depositories of Allah’s knowledge!

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكُمْ يَا تَرَاجِمَةَ وَحْيِ ٱللَّهِ

translation.en: Peace be on you, O interpreters of Allah’s Revelation!
Peace be on you, O leaders to true guidance!
Peace be on you, O signs of piety!

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكُمْ يَا أَوْلاَدَ رَسُولِ ٱللَّهِ

translation.en: Peace be on you, O descendants of Allah’s Messenger!
I recognize your rights,
I discernibly acknowledge your true standing,
I incur the hostility of your enemies,
and I show loyalty to your loyalists.
May Allah accept me, my father, and mother as ransoms for you!
Blessings of Allah be upon you.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَتَوَالَىٰ آخِرَهُمْ كَمَا تَوَالَيْتُ أَوَّلَهُمْ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni atawala akhirahum kama tawalaytu awwalahum

translation.en: O Allah, I am willingly showing loyalty to the last of them just as I have shown loyalty to the first of them,

segments.transliteration: wa abra'u min kulli walijatin dunahum

translation.en: I release myself from any confidant other than them,

segments.transliteration: wa akfuru biljibti walttaghuti wallati wal`uzza

translation.en: and I reject all idols, false deities, al-Lat, and al-`Uzza.
Blessings of Allah be upon you, O my Masters!
Mercy of Allah and His benedictions be upon you, too.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا سَيِّدَ ٱلْعَابِدِينَ وَسُلاَلَةَ ٱلْوَصِيِّينَ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka ya sayyida al`abidina wa sulalata alwasiyyina

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O master of the worshippers and descendant of the Prophets’ successors.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بَاقِرَ عِلْمِ ٱلنَّبِيِّينَ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O he who split open the knowledge of the Prophets.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا صَادِقاً مُصَدِّقاً فِي ٱلْقَوْلِ وَٱلْفِعْلِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka ya sadiqan musaddaqan fi alqawli walfi`li

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O veracious and honest in all [your] words and deeds.
O my Masters! Today is your day,
which is Tuesday,
and on this day, I am your guest
and I am in your vicinity;
so, receive me as your guest and treat me as your neighbor,
[I ask you] by Allah’s standing with you
and with your Household, the pure and immaculate.

text.en: When the reporter asked Imam al-’Askari(a.s.) about the best time of offering these prayers, the Imam (a.s.) answered, “The best time is the period between sunrise and midday.”
text.ar: فسأل الراوي فقال : في أيّ ساعة من ساعات الأيام أصلّي هذه الصلوات؟ فقال ما بين طلوع الشمس إلى زوالها

text.en: Imam al-Hasan al-’Askari(a.s.) is also reported to have said that whoever offers on Tuesdays a six unit prayer; reciting in each unit Surah al-Faatehah, the <ref=1:2:285-286>last two verses of Surah al-Baqarah</ref> , and <ref=1:99>Surah Al-Zalzalah</ref>, Almighty Allah will forgive all of his sin as if his mother has just given birth to him.
text.ar: وعنه عليه‌السلام أيضا : من صلّى يوم الثلاثاء ست ركعات يقرأ في كل ركعة فاتحة الكتاب و <ref=1:2:285-286>آية آمنَ الَّرسول</ref> إلى آخرها وسورة <ref=1:99>الزلزلة</ref> مرة واحدة غفر الله له ذنوبه حتى يخرج منها كيوم ولدته أمّه

translation.en: In the Name of Allah, the All-beneficent, the All-merciful.

segments.arabic: اَلْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ ٱلَّذِي جَعَلَ ٱللَّيلَ لِبَاساً
segments.transliteration: alhamdu lillahi alladhi ja`ala allayla libasan

translation.en: All praise be to Allah Who appointed the night to be a garment,
and sleep for a rest,
and day He appointed for a rising!

segments.arabic: لَكَ ٱلْحَمْدُ أَنْ بَعَثْتَنِي مِنْ مَرْقَدِي
segments.transliteration: laka alhamdu an ba`athtani min marqadi

translation.en: To You belongs praise, for You roused me from my sleep,
and had You willed, You would have made it everlasting;
an endless praise that will never be cut off
and whose number the creatures will never count!

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ لَكَ ٱلْحَمْدُ أَنْ خَلَقْتَ فَسَوَّيْتَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma laka alhamdu an khalaqta fasawwayta

translation.en: O Allah, to You belongs praise, for You created, then fashioned,
ordained and decreed,
gave death and bestowed life,
made sick and healed,
made well and afflicted,
established the Throne
and encompassed the Kingdom!
I supplicate You with the supplication of one whose mediation is weak,
whose stratagems have been cut off,
whose term has drawn near,
whose expectation from this world has shrunk,
whose neediness for Your mercy has intensified,
whose remorse for his neglect has become great,
whose slips and stumbles have become many,
and whose repentance is devoted sincerely to Your face.
So, bless Muhammad,
the Seal of the Prophets,
and his Household, the good, the pure,
and provide me with the intercession of Muhammad,
Allah bless him and his Household,
and deprive me not of his companionship!
Surely, You are the Most Merciful of all those who show mercy!

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ ٱقْضِ لِي فِي ٱلأَرْبِعَاءِ اَرْبَعاً

translation.en: O Allah, decree for me on Wednesday four things:
Induce me to be strong in obedience to You,
to be active in worshiping You,
to be desirous for Your reward,

segments.arabic: وَزُهْدِي فِيمَا يُوجِبُ لِي أَلِيمَ عِقَابِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa zuhdi fima yujibu li alima `iqabika

translation.en: and to abstain from that which would make incumbent upon me Your painful punishment!
You are Gentle to whom You will!

name: Ziyarat Of Four Imams on Wednesday

translation.en: Peace be upon you [all], O saints of Allah!
Peace be upon you, O arguments of Allah!

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكُمْ يَا نُورَ ٱللَّهِ فِي ظُلُمَاتِ ٱلأَرْضِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alaykum ya nura allahi fi zulumati al-ardi

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O light of Allah in the darkness of the earth!
Peace be upon you.
Blessings of Allah be upon you
and upon your Household, the pure and immaculate.
May Allah accept my father and mother as ransoms for you!
Indeed, you worshipped Allah sincerely

segments.transliteration: wa jahadtum fi allahi haqqa jihadihi

translation.en: and strove for His sake with due strife
until death came upon you.
So, may Allah curse all your enemies
from the jinn and human beings.

segments.arabic: وَأَنَا أَبْرَأُ إِلَىٰ ٱللَّهِ وَإِلَيْكُمْ مِنْهُمْ
segments.transliteration: wa ana abra'u ila allahi wa ilaykum minhum

translation.en: And I release myself before Allah and before you from them (i.e. your enemies).
O my master, O Abu-Ibrahim,
Musa, the son of Ja`far!
O my master, O Abu’l-Hasan,
`Ali, the son of Musa!
O my master, O Abu-Ja`far,
Muhammad, the son of `Ali!
O my master, O Abu’l-Hasan,
`Ali, the son of Muhammad!
I am your servant,
I believe in your secret and open affairs,
and I am staying with you as your guest, on this day,
which is Wednesday,
and I am in your vicinity;
so, receive me as your guest and neighbor,
[I ask you] by your Household, the pure and immaculate.

text.en:
Imam al-Hasan al-’Askari(a.s.) is also reported to have said that whoever offers on Wednesdays a four unit prayer; reciting in each unit Surah al-Faatehah, Surah al-Tawheed, and <ref=1:97>Surah Al-Qadr</ref>
, Almighty Allah will accept his repentance from all sins and will give him in marriage a Paradisiacal woman.
text.ar: وعنه عليه‌السلام أيضا : من صلى يوم الأربعاء أربع ركعات يقرأ في كل ركعة الحمد والاخلاص وسورة <ref=1:97>القدر</ref> مرة واحدة تاب الله عليه من كل ذنب وزوّجه بزوجة من الحور العين

text.en: When the reporter asked Imam al-’Askari(a.s.) about the best time of offering these prayers, the Imam (a.s.) answered, “The best time is the period between sunrise and midday.”
text.ar: فسأل الراوي فقال : في أيّ ساعة من ساعات الأيام أصلّي هذه الصلوات؟ فقال ما بين طلوع الشمس إلى زوالها

translation.en: In the Name of Allah, the All-beneficent, the All-merciful.

segments.arabic: اَلْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ ٱلَّذِي أَذْهَبَ ٱللَّيْلَ مُظْلِماً بِقُدْرَتِهِ
segments.transliteration: alhamdu lillahi alladhi adh-haba allayla muzliman biqudratihi

translation.en: All praise be to Allah Who has taken away the shadowy night by His power
and brought the sight-giving day through His mercy.

segments.transliteration: wa kasani diya'ahu wa atani ni`matahu

translation.en: He has clothed me in its brightness and given me its favor.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ فَكَمَا أَبْقَيْتَنِي لَهُ فَ أَبْقِنِي لأَمْثَالِهِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma fakama abqaytani lahu fa-abqini li-amthalihi

translation.en: O Allah, just as You have spared me for this day, so also spare me for its likes,

segments.transliteration: wa salli `ala alnnabiyyi muhammadin wa alihi

translation.en: bless the Prophet Muhammad and his Household,

segments.transliteration: wa la tafja`ni fihi wa fi ghayrihi

translation.en: torment me not in it and in other
nights and days
by my commitment of unlawful acts
and clothing myself in sins;
provide me with its good,
the good of all within it,
and the good of everything after it;
and turn away from me its evil,
the evil of all within it,
and the evil of everything after it!

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي بِذِمَّةِ ٱلإِسْلامِ أَتَوَسَّلُ إِلَيْكَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni bidhimmati al-islami atawassalu ilayka

translation.en: O Allah, by the protective compact of Islam, I seek mediation with You!
By the inviolability of the Qur'an, I rely upon You!
By Muhammad the chosen,
Allah bless him and his Household,
I seek intercession with You.
So, recognize my protective compact
by which I hope my need will be granted,
O Most Merciful of all those who show mercy!

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ ٱقْضِ لِي فِي ٱلْخَمِيسِ خَمْساً
segments.transliteration: allahumma iqdi li fi alkhamisi khamsan

translation.en: O Allah, decree for me on Thursday five things,
which none embraces but Your generosity
and none supports but Your favors:
health through which I may have the strength to obey You,
worship by which I may deserve Your plentiful reward,

segments.arabic: وَسَعَةً فِي ٱلْحَالِ مِنَ ٱلرِّزْقِ ٱلْحَلالِ
segments.transliteration: wa sa`atan fi alhali min alrrizqi alhalali

translation.en: plenty in my state through lawful provision,

segments.arabic: وَ أَنْ تُؤْمِنَنِي فِي مَوَاقِفِ ٱلْخَوْفِ بِأَمْنِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa an tu'minani fi mawaqifi alkhawfi bi-amnika

translation.en: and that You make me secure in the places of fear through Your security,

segments.arabic: وَتَجْعَلَنِي مِنْ طَوَارِقِ ٱلْهُمُومِ وَٱلْغُمُومِ فِي حِصْنِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa taj`alani min tawariqi alhumumi walghumumi fi hisnika

translation.en: and place me in Your fortress against the striking of worries and sorrows!
Bless Muhammad and his Household,
translation.fa: درود فرست بر محمد و آلش

translation.en: and make my seeking his mediation as an intercessor give profit
on the Day of Resurrection!
Surely, You are the Most Merciful of all those who show mercy!

name: Ziyarat Of Imam Hassan Askari(as) on Thursday

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O saint of Allah!

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا حُجَّةَ ٱللَّهِ وَخَالِصَتَهُ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka ya hujjata allahi wa khalisatahu

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O argument of Allah and His choicest!
Peace be upon you, O leader of the faithful believers,
inheritor of the messengers,
and argument of the Lord of the Worlds!

segments.arabic: صَلَّىٰ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْكَ وَعَلَىٰ آلِ بَيْتِكَ

translation.en: May Allah send peace upon you and upon your Household,
the pure and immaculate!
O my master, O Abu-Muhammad,
al-Hasan, the son of `Ali!

segments.transliteration: ana mawlan laka wa li-ali baytika

translation.en: I am a servant of you and of your Household

segments.transliteration: wa hadha yawmuka wa huwa yawmu alkhamisi

translation.en: and today is your day, which is Thursday,

segments.arabic: وَأَنَا ضَيْفُكَ فِيهِ وَمُسْتَجِيرٌ بِكَ فِيهِ
segments.transliteration: wa ana dayfuka fihi wa mustajirun bika fihi

translation.en: and on this day, I am your guest and in your vicinity;
so, receive me hospitably as your guest and neighbor,
[I ask you] in the name of your Household, the pure and immaculate.

text.en: Shaykh al-Tusi says it is recommended, on Thursdays, to repeat the invocations of blessings upon Muhammad and his Household 1000 times in the following form:
text.ar: وقالَ الشّيخ الطّوسي : وَيستحبّ في يَوم الخميس الصّلاة على النبي صلى‌الله‌عليه‌وآله ألف مَرَّة ، وَيستحبّ أنْ يقول فيه :

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: O Allah, send blessings to Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,
translation.fa: خدایا درود فرست بر محمد و آل محمد

translation.en: hasten their Relief,
and destroy their enemies
from both jinn and human beings,
both the foremost and the later ones.

text.en: Great reward will be the share of him who utters this invocation from Thursday afternoons up to the last hour of Fridays.
text.ar: وَإنْ قالَ ذلك مِنْ بَعد العصر يَوم الخميس إلى آخر نهار يَوم الجُمعة كانَ لَهُ فَضل كثير

text.en: Shaykh al-Tusi has recorded that it is recommended to say the following prayer of forgiveness at the last hour of Thursdays:
text.ar: وَقالَ الشّيخ أيضاً : وَيستحبّ أنْ تَستغفر آخر نهارك يَوم الخميس فتَقول :

segments.arabic: أَسْتَغْفِرُ ٱللَّهَ الَّذِي لاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ هُوَ
segments.transliteration: astaghfiru allaha alladhi la ilaha illa huwa

translation.en: I pray the forgiveness of Allah; there is no god but He,
the Ever-living, the Self-Subsisting,
and I repent to Him
as a slave who is submissive,
acquiescent, and poor,

segments.arabic: لاَ يَسْتَطيعُ لِنَفْسِهِ صَرْفاً وَلاَ عَدْلاً
segments.transliteration: la yastati`u linafsihi sarfan wa la `adlan

translation.en: not controlling for himself any harm or profit,

segments.transliteration: wa la naf`an wa la darran

translation.en: or benefit or damage

segments.arabic: وَلاَ حَيَاةً وَلاَ مَوْتاً وَلاَ نُشُوراً
segments.transliteration: wa la hayatan wa la mawtan wa la nushuran

translation.en: and not controlling death nor life, nor raising (the dead) to life.
May Allah send peace upon Muhammad
and his Household; the pure, the immaculate,
the choicest, and the pious;
and may He spread thorough blessings over them.

text.en: Imam al-Hasan al-’Askari(a.s.) is also reported to have said that whoever offers on Thursdays a ten unit prayer; reciting in each unit Surah al-Faatehah once and repeating Surah al-Tawheed ten times, the angels will say to him, ‘Ask, and you will grant it.”
text.ar: وقال عليه‌السلام من صلّى يوم الخميس عشر ركعات يقرأ في كل ركعة فاتحة الكتاب وقل هو الله أحد عشراً قالت الملائكة سل تعط

text.en: When the reporter asked Imam al-’Askari(a.s.) about the best time of offering these prayers, the Imam (a.s.) answered, “The best time is the period between sunrise and midday.”
text.ar: فسأل الراوي فقال : في أيّ ساعة من ساعات الأيام أصلّي هذه الصلوات؟ فقال ما بين طلوع الشمس إلى زوالها

text.en: First: Repeat very often the following litanies:
text.ar: الأول : الإكثار من قول :

translation.en: All Glory be to Allah.
Allah is the Most Great.
There is no god save Allah.

text.en: Second: At Thursday nights, it is recommended to recite the following chapters (Surah) of the Holy Qur’an:
text.ar: الثاني : أنْ يقرأ ليلة الجُمعة

text.en:
<ref=1:17>Surah Al-Isra</ref> 
<ref=1:18>Surah Al-Kahf</ref> 
<ref=1:26>Surah Al-Shu'ara</ref> 
<ref=1:27>Surah Al-Naml</ref> 
<ref=1:28>Surah Al-Qasas</ref> 
<ref=1:32>Surah Al-Sajdah</ref> 
<ref=1:36>Surah Al-Yasin</ref> 
<ref=1:38>Surah Sad</ref> 
<ref=1:46>Surah Al-Ahqaf</ref> 
<ref=1:56>Surah Al-Waqi'ah</ref> 
<ref=1:41>Surah Fussilat</ref> 
<ref=1:44>Surah Al-Dukhan</ref> 
<ref=1:52>Surah Al-Tur</ref> 
<ref=1:54>Surah Al-Qamar</ref> 
<ref=1:62>Surah Al-Jumu'ah</ref>
text.ar:
<ref=1:17>الإسراء</ref>
 ، <ref=1:18>الکهف</ref>
، <ref=1:26>الشعراء</ref>
 ، <ref=1:27>النمل</ref>
، <ref=1:28>القصص</ref>
 ، <ref=1:32>السجدة</ref>
 ، <ref=1:36>یس</ref>
 ، <ref=1:38>ص</ref>
 ، <ref=1:46>الأَحقاف</ref>
 ، <ref=1:56>الواقعة</ref>
 ، <ref=1:41>فصلت</ref>
 ، <ref=1:44>الدخان</ref>
 ، <ref=1:52>الطور</ref>
 ، <ref=1:54>القمر</ref>
 ، <ref=1:62>الجمعة</ref>

text.en: If there is not enough time to recite all these Surahs, one may choose Surah <ref=1:56>Surah Al-Waqi'ah</ref> and those preceding it [in the aforesaid list].Imam al-Sadiq(a.s.) is reported to have said that one who recites Surah <ref=1:17>Surah Al-Isra</ref> each Friday night will join Imam al-Mahdi(a.s.) as one of his companions.He (a.s.) is also reported as saying that one who recites Surah <ref=1:18>Surah Al-Kahf</ref>  at Thursday nights will die as martyr and will be resurrected with and in the line of the martyrs (on the Resurrection Day).
text.ar:
فإنْ لَمْ تسنحْ لَهُ الفرصة فليختار من هذه السّور  ، <ref=1:56>الواقعة</ref>
 وَما قبلها. فقد روي عَن الصّادق عليه‌السلام قالَ : مَنْ قَرَأَ <ref=1:17>الإسراء</ref> في كُلِّ ليلة جُمعة لَمْ يَمُتْ حتّى يدرك القائِم عليه‌السلام فيكون من أصحابهِ. وقالَ عليه‌السلام : مَنْ قَرأ سُورَة  ، <ref=1:18>الکهف</ref> كُلّ ليلة جُمعة لَمْ يَمُتْ إِلاّ شهيداً أو بَعثهُ الله مع الشّهداء ووقف يَوم القيّامة مع الشّهداء

text.en:
He (a.s.) is also reported as saying that one who recites the <ref=1:26>Surah Al-Shu'ara</ref> 
<ref=1:27>Surah Al-Naml</ref> 
<ref=1:28>Surah Al-Qasas</ref> 
 at Thursday nights will be included with the intimate saints of Almighty Allah, will be made in the vicinity and under the protection of Him, will never be inflicted with misery in his worldly life, and will be given beyond his pleasure on the Resurrection Day.
text.ar:
وقالَ عليه‌السلام : مَنْ قرأ  ، <ref=1:18>الکهف</ref>
، <ref=1:26>الشعراء</ref>
 ، <ref=1:27>النمل</ref>
 في ليلة الجُمعة كانَ مِنْ أولياء الله وَفي جوار الله وَفي كنفه وَلم يصبه في الدّنيا بُؤس أبداً ، وَأُعطي في الآخرة مِنَ الجنّة حتّى يرضى وَفوق رضاه وَزوّجه الله مائة زوجة مِنَ الحور العين

text.en:
He (a.s.) is also reported as saying that one who recites <ref=1:32>Surah Al-Sajdah</ref> 
 at Thursday nights will be given his Record of Deeds in his right hand, will not be interrogated about his evildoings, and will be included with the companions of Muhammad and his Household - peace be upon them all.
text.ar: وَقالَ عليه‌السلام : مَنْ قرأ سُورَة  ، <ref=1:32>السجدة</ref> في كُلِّ ليلة جُمعة أعطاه الله كتابه بِيمينه وَلَمْ يُحاسِبْهُ بِما كانَ منه وَكانَ مِنْ رُفقاءِ مُحَمَّد وَأهل بيته عليهم‌السلام

text.en: Imam Muhammad al-Baqir (a.s.) is authentically reported to have said that one who recites <ref=1:38>Surah Sad</ref>  at Thursday nights will be granted the welfare of this world as well as the Next World in such an excellent way that none would deserve except Prophets and archangels and will be allowed to Paradise as well as all those whom he loves among his household including the servants.
text.ar:
وَبسند معتبر عَن الباقِر عليه‌السلام قالَ : مَنْ قرأ سُورَة  ، <ref=1:38>ص</ref>
 في ليلة الجُمعة أُعطي من خير الدّنيا وَالآخرة مالَمْ يُعط أحَداً مِنَ النّاس إِلاّ نَبيّاً مُرسلاً أو مَلَكاً مُقَرّباً ، وَأدخله الله ألجنّة وَكُلُّ مَنْ أحبَّ مِنْ أهل بَيته حتّى خادمه الَّذي يخدمه وَإنْ لَمْ يكن في حدِّ عياله وَلا في حدِّ مَنْ يَشفع لَهُ

text.en:
Imam Ja’far al-Sadiq(a.s.) is reported to have said that one who recites on Fridays or at Thursday nights Surah <ref=1:46>Surah Al-Ahqaf</ref> 
 will be saved, by Almighty Allah, from terrors in the worldly life and will be secured from the horror of the Resurrection Day.
text.ar:
وَعَن الصّادق عليه‌السلام قالَ : مَنْ قرأ في لَيلة الجُمعة أو يَوم الجُمعة سُورَة   <ref=1:46>الأَحقاف</ref>
 لَمْ يُصبهُ الله بِرَوعة في الحياة الدنيّا وَأمّنه من فزع يَوم القيّامة إن شاء الله

text.en: He (a.s.) is also reported as saying that one who recites Surah <ref=1:56>Surah Al-Waqi'ah</ref>  at Thursday nights will be loved by Almighty Allah, all people will be made to love him, will be saved from all miseries, poverty, neediness, and misfortunes in this worldly life, and will be joined to the companions of Imam AliAmeer al-Momineen(a.s.) because this Surah is ascribed to him.It has been also narrated that to recite <ref=1:62>Surah Al-Jumu'ah</ref>  at Thursday nights is decided as expiation (forgiving the sins) for the evildoings committed throughout the week.
text.ar:
وَقال عليه‌السلام : من قرأ   <ref=1:56>الواقعة</ref>
 كُلَّ ليلة جُمعة أحبّهُ الله تَعالى وأحبّه إلى النّاس أجمعين وَلَمْ يَرَ في الدنيّا بُؤساً أبداً وَلافقراً وَلا فاقة وَلا آفة من آفات الدّنيّا ، وَكانَ من رُفقاءِ أمير المُؤمنين عليه‌السلام. وَهذهِ السّورة سُورَة أمير المُؤمنين عليه‌السلام خاصة لا يشركه فيها أحد. وروي أنّ من قرأ سُورَة الجُمعة كُلّ ليلة جُمعة كانت كفارة لَهُ ما بَين الجُمعة إلى <ref=1:62>الجُمعة</ref>

text.en: A similar merit has been narrated for reciting <ref=1:18>Surah Al-Kahf</ref>  at Thursday nights or after the two obligatory Zohr and Asr Prayers on Fridays.
text.ar: وَروي مِثلُهُ فِيمَنْ قرأ سُورَة الكهف في كُلِّ ليلة جُمعة ، وفي مَنْ قرأها بعد فريضتي الظّهر والعصر يَوم الجُمعة

text.en: It is worth mentioning that it is highly recommended to offer many (supererogatory) prayers at Thursday nights such as Imam Ali’s Prayer, known as (Salat Ameer al-Momineen)
text.ar: واعلم أنّ الصّلوات المأثورة في ليلة الجُمعة عديدة منها : صلاة أمير المُؤمنِين عليه‌السلام

text.en:
and the two-unit prayer in each of which one should recite <ref=1:1>Surah Al-Fatihah</ref>  once and repeat Surah <ref=1:99>Surah Al-Zalzalah</ref> 
 fifteen times. It has been narrated that one who offers this prayer will be saved, by Almighty Allah, from the grave torment and the horrors on the Resurrection Day.
text.ar:
ومنها الصلاة ركعتان يقرأ في كُلِّ ركعة الحَمد وسُورَة <ref=1:99>الزلزلة</ref>
 خَمس عَشرة مَرَّة ، فقد روي أنّ من صلاّ ها أمّنه الله تَعالى من عذاب القبر وأهوَال يَوم القيامة

text.en:
Third: It is recommended to recite <ref=1:62>Surah Al-Jumu'ah</ref>  in the first unit of the Maghrib (Sunset) and Isha’ (Evening) obligatory Prayers, and to recite <ref=1:112>Surah Al-Ikhlas</ref> 
 in the second unit of the Maghrib Prayer and <ref=1:87>Surah Al-A'laa</ref> 
 in the second unit of the Isha’ Prayer.
text.ar:
الثالث : أن يقرأ سُورَة <ref=1:62>الجمعة</ref>
 في الرّكعة الأولى من فريضتي المغرب والعشاء ، ويقرأ التوّحيد في الثّانية من المغرب و 
<ref=1:87>الأعلی</ref>
 في الثّانية من العشاء

text.en:
Fourth: It is highly recommended to avoid reciting poetry at Thursday nights. Imam Ja’far al-Sadiq(a.s.) is authentically reported to have said that it is abominable to say poetry for one observing fasting (sawm), the Muhrim (entering into Ihram: putting the pilgrimage uniform and entering the state of being performing the obligatory rites of the ritual Hajj), and on Fridays and at Thursday nights. When he was asked whether this instruction is effective on the religiously acceptable poetry too, the Imam (a.s.) answered affirmatively.

It has been also authentically narrated on the authority of Imam Ja’far al-Sadiq(a.s.) that the Holy Prophet (s.a.w.a.) said, “One who utters even one verse of poetry on Fridays and at Thursday nights will have nothing of the rewards except that of uttering that poetry.”

According to another narration, the prayers of those who recite poetry on Fridays will not be accepted.
text.ar: الرابع : ترك إنشاد الشّعر ففي الصّحيح عن الصّادق صَلَواتُ الله وسَلامُهُ عَلَيهِ أنّه يكره رواية الشّعر للصّائم والمحرم وفي الحرم وفي يوم الجُمعة وفي اللّيالي. قال الرّاوي : وإن كانَ شِعراً حقّا؟ فأجاب عليه‌السلام : وإِن كانَ حقّا. وفي حديث معتبر عَن الصّادق عليه‌السلام : أنّ النبي صلى‌الله‌عليه‌وآله قالَ : من أنشد بيتاً من الشّعر في ليلة الجُمعة أَو نهارها لَمْ يكن لَهُ سواه نصيب من الثّواب في تلك اللّيلة ونهارها ، وعلى رواية أخرى : لَمْ تقبل صلاته في تلك اللّيلة ونهارها

text.en: Fifth: It is highly recommended to pray Almighty Allah for the good of one’s brethren-in-faith very frequently so as to copy the deed of Lady Fatimah al-Zahra’. According to a Hadith, one who prays for ten deceased individuals will be unquestionably allowed to enter Paradise.
text.ar: الخامِس : أن يُكثر من الدّعاءِ لاخوانه المؤمنين كما كانت تصنع الزّهراءِ عليه‌السلام ، وإذا دعا لعشر من الاَموات منهم فقد وجبت لَهُ الجّنة كما في الحديث.

text.en: Sixth: It is also recommended to say the supplications dedicated to Fridays. Actually, these supplications are too numerous to be cited in this chapter; therefore, a few of them will be hereinafter mentioned:
text.ar: السّادس : أن يدعو بالمأثور من أدعيتها وهي كثيرة ونحن نقتصر على ذكر نبذ يسيرةٍ منها : بسند صحيح عَن الصّادق عليه‌السلام : انّ من دعا بهذا الدّعاء ليلة الجُمعة في السّجدة الاَخيرة من نافلة العشاء سبع مرّات فرغ مغفوراً لَهُ ، والأفضل أن يكرّر العمل في كُلِّ ليلة :

text.en: Imam Ja’far al-Sadiq(a.s.) is authentically reported as saying that one who says the following supplicatory prayer in the last prostration of the Isha’ supererogatory prayer at Thursday nights and repeats it seven times will have all his sins forgiven as soon as he accomplishes that prayer. Yet, it is desirable to repeat this deed each night:

translation.en: O Allah, I beseech You in the name of Your Noble Face
and in the name of Your Sublime Name

segments.transliteration: an tusalliya `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: to send blessings to Muhammad and his Household

segments.transliteration: wa an taghfira li dhanbiya al`azima

translation.en: and to forgive me my grave sin.

text.en: The Holy Prophet (s.a.w.a.) is reported to have said that one who repeats the following supplicatory prayer seven times at Thursday night will be allowed Paradise if he departs life at that night; and one who repeats it seven times on Friday will be also allowed Paradise if he departs life on that day:
text.ar: وَعَن النّبّي صلى‌الله‌عليه‌وآله قالَ : من قال هذه الكلمات سبع مرّات في ليلة الجُمعة فمات ليلته دَخَل الجنّة ، وَمَن قالَها يَوم الجُمعة فمات في ذلكَ اليوم دَخَل الجنّة :

translation.en: O Allah, You are my Lord;
there is no god save You;
You have created me, and I am Your slave and the son of Your bondmaid;

segments.transliteration: wa fi qabdatika wa nasiyati biyadika

translation.en: and I am in Your grip; and my forehead is in Your Hand;

segments.arabic: أَمْسَيْتُ عَلَىٰ عَهْدِكَ وَوَعْدِكَ مَا ٱسْتَطَعْتُ

translation.en: I come to observe my covenant and promise to You as much as I can.

segments.arabic: أَعُوذُ بِرِضَاكَ مِنْ شَرِّ مَا صَنَعْتُ
segments.transliteration: a`udhu biridaka min sharri ma sana`tu

translation.en: I take refuge in Your pleasure against the evil of my deeds.
I acknowledge Your favors and confess of my sins.
So, (please) forgive my sins,

segments.arabic: إِنَّهُ لاَ يَغْفِرُ ٱلذُّنُوبَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ
segments.transliteration: innahu la yaghfiru aldhdhunuba illa anta

translation.en: for none can forgive sins save You.

text.en: Shaykh al-Tusi, Sayyid Ibn Tawus, al-Kaf’ami, and Sayyid Ibn Baqi have recorded that it is recommended to say the following supplicatory prayer on Fridays and at Friday nights and on the day and night of ‘Arafat (the ninth of Dhu’l-Hijjah). However, the supplication will be hereinafter cited as quoted from Shaykh al-Tusi’s book of al-Misbah:
text.ar: وقالَ الشّيخ الطّوسي والسّيّد والكفعمي والسّيّد ابن باقي : يستحبّ أن يدعى بهذا الدّعاء في ليلة الجُمعة ونهارها وَفي ليلة عرفة ونهارها ونحن نروي الدعاء عَن كتاب (المصباح) للشّيخ وهُوَ :

translation.en: In the Name of Allah, the All-beneficent, the All-merciful.
O Allah, One may call up, prepare,
ready oneself, and stand prepared
for purpose of coming to a creature
in the hope of gaining his aid
and asking for his gift and present.
As for myself, to You—O my Lord—I make my preparations and readiness
hoping for Your pardon
and asking for Your gift and present.
So, (please) do not disappoint my entreaty.

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ لاَ يَخِيبُ عَلَيْهِ سَائِلٌ

translation.en: O He Who never disappoints His beseechers
and Whose prizes never decrease His ample-giving!

segments.arabic: فَإنّي لَمْ آتِكَ ثِقَةً بِعَمَلٍ صَالِحٍ عَمِلْتُهُ
segments.transliteration: fa'inni lam atika thiqatan bi`amalin salihin `amiltuhu

translation.en: I have not come to You with confidence of a righteous deed that I have done
nor have I had any hope in a grant of any creature.

segments.arabic: اتَيْتُكَ مُقِرّاً عَلَىٰ نَفْسِي بِٱلإسَاءَةِ وَٱلظُّلْمِ

translation.en: Rather, I have come to You professing myself to be evildoer and transgressor

segments.arabic: مُعْتَرِفاً بِانْ لاَ حُجَّةَ لِي وَلاَ عُذْرَ
segments.transliteration: mu`tarifan bi-an la hujjata li wa la `udhra

translation.en: and confessing that I lack any pretext or excuse.
I have come to You hoping for Your great pardon
due to which You have pardoned the wrongdoers.

segments.arabic: فَلَمْ يَمْنَعْكَ طُولُ عُكُوفِهِمْ عَلِي عَظِيمِ ٱلْجُرْمِ

translation.en: Hence, their long-lasting retirement to their grave offenses has not prevented You
from turning to them with mercy.
O He Whose mercy is huge
and Whose pardon is great;

segments.arabic: يَا عَظيـمُ يَا عَظيـمُ يَا عَظيـمُ

translation.en: O All-great, O All-great, O All-great;
nothing can repel Your rage except Your forbearance

segments.arabic: وَلاَ يُنْجِي مِنْ سَخَطِكَ إِلاَّ ٱلتَّضَرُّعُ إِلَيْكَ
segments.transliteration: wa la yunji min sakhatika illa alttadarru`u ilayka

translation.en: and nothing can save from Your wrath except imploring earnestly to You.
So, my God, (please) grant me a relief

segments.arabic: بِٱلْقُدْرَةِ ٱلَّتِي تُحْيِي بِهَا مَيْتَ ٱلْبِلاَدِ
segments.transliteration: bilqudrati allati tuhyi biha mayta albiladi

translation.en: in the name of the power through which You restore to life the derelict lands,

segments.arabic: وَلاَ تُهْلِكْنِي غَمّاً حَتَّىٰ تَسْتَجِيبَ لِي
segments.transliteration: wa la tuhlikni ghamman hatta tastajiba li

translation.en: and do not cause me to perish out of grief until You respond to me
and show me signs of Your response to my prayers.

segments.arabic: وَاذِقْنِي طَعْمَ ٱلْعَافِيَةِ إلَىٰ مُنَتَهَىٰ اجَلِي
segments.transliteration: wa adhiqni ta`ma al`afiyati ila muntaha ajali

translation.en: (please) Make me taste the flavor of wellbeing up to the end of my lifetime,
do not make my enemies gloat over me,
do not give them a hand over me,
and do not make them control over me.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنْ وَضَعْتَنِي فَمَنْ ذَا ٱلَّذِي يَرْفَعُنِي
segments.transliteration: allahumma in wada`tani faman dha alladhi yarfa`uni

translation.en: O Allah, If You humiliate me, who can then exalt me?

segments.arabic: وَإِنْ رَفَعْتَنِي فَمَنْ ذَا ٱلَّذِي يَضَعُنِي
segments.transliteration: wa in rafa`tani faman dha alladhi yada`uni

translation.en: And if You exalt me, who can then humiliate me?

segments.arabic: وَإِنْ اهْلَكْتَنِي فَمَنْ ذَا ٱلَّذِي يَعْرِضُ لَكَ فِي عَبْدِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa in ahlaktani faman dha alladhi ya`ridu laka fi `abdika

translation.en: If You annihilate me, who can then interfere before You concerning the affair of me—Your slave
or who can intercede to ask You about it?

segments.arabic: وَقَدْ عَلِمْتُ انَّهُ لَيْسَ فِي حُكْمِكَ ظُلْمٌ
segments.transliteration: wa qad `alimtu annahu laysa fi hukmika zulmun

translation.en: I have already known for sure that Your decrees are devoid of injustice
and Your punishment does not count on immediateness.

segments.transliteration: wa innama ya`jalu man yakhafu alfawta

translation.en: Verily, immediateness is the work of him who fears lest he may miss,

segments.transliteration: wa innama yahtaju ila alzzulmi aldda`ifu

translation.en: and only do the weak need injustice.

segments.arabic: وَقَدْ تَعَالَيْتَ يَا إِلٰهِي عَنْ ذٰلِكَ عُلُوّاً كَبِيراً
segments.transliteration: wa qad ta`alayta ya ilahi `an dhalika `uluwwan kabiran

translation.en: As for You, O my God, You are too exalted to be so—Exalted and Great You are beyond all measure!
O Allah, I take refuge in You; so, (please) have protection upon me!
I call for Your safekeeping; so, (please) keep me under Your security!
I appeal for Your sustenance; so, (please) provide me with sustenance!
I put trust in You; so, (please) keep me under Your supervision!
I call for Your aid against my enemy; so, (please) grant me support!
I seek Your assistance; so, (please) assist me!

segments.transliteration: wa astaghfiruka ya ilahi faghfir li

translation.en: I ask for Your forgiveness; so, (please) forgive me.
So, respond! Respond! Respond!

text.en: Seventh: It is highly recommended to say the famous supplicatory prayer known as <ref=3:1299>Dua Kumayl</ref>
text.ar: السابع : أن يدعو <ref=3:1299>بدعاء كميل</ref>

text.en: Eighth: It is also recommended to say <ref=3:1101>Ya Shahida kulli Najwa</ref>
text.ar: الثامن : أن يقرأ الدعاء :<ref=3:1101>اللّهُمَّ يا شاهِدَ كُلِّ نَجْوى</ref>

text.en: Ninth: It is recommended to repeat the following supplicatory prayer ten times:
text.ar: التاسع : أن يقول عشر مرات :

translation.en: O He Who is ever-Favorer on the beings!
O He Who is openhandedly Bestower of gifts!
O He Who is the Giver of sublime donations!
Bless Muhammad and his Household,
translation.fa: درود فرست بر محمد و آلش

translation.en: the best of all creatures in traits,
and forgive us, O Lord of Highness,
at this evening.

text.en: Tenth: Following Imam Ja’far al-Sadiq(a.s.) it is recommended to have pomegranate at Thursday nights. Yet, it is preferable to have it before going to sleep. In this respect, it has been narrated that to eat pomegranate before going to sleep procures security until morning. It is also instructive to extend a handkerchief on the ground so as to save all the seeds of a pomegranate from loss and then eat them all. It is also recommended not to share anyone with it.
text.ar: العاشر : أن يأكُل الرمان كما كانَ يعمل الصادق عليه‌السلام في كل ليلة جُمعة ، ولعل الاَحسن أَن يجعل الاَكُل عند النوم ، فقد روي أنّ من أكلَ الرمان عند النوم أمن في نفسهِ إلى الصباح وَيَنبَغي أن يبسط لاكلِ الرمان منديلاً يحتفظ بِما يتساقط من حَبِّهِ فيجمعهُ ويأكلهُ وكما ينبغي أَن لا يشرك أحداً في رمانتهِ.

text.en: Eleventh: In his book of al-’Arus, Shaykh Ja’far ibn Ahmad al-Qummi has recorded that Imam al-Sadiq(a.s.) is reported to have said that one who repeats the following litany one hundred times between the Dawn supererogatory and obligatory prayers will be owned, by Almighty Allah, a house in Paradise:
text.ar: الحادي عشر: روى الشيخ جعفر بن أحمد القمّي في كتاب (العروس) عَن الصادق عليه‌السلام : أنّ من قال بَينَ نافلة الصبح وفريضته مائة مَرَّة :

translation.en: All glory be to Allah, the All-great and with the Praising of Him;

segments.transliteration: astaghfiru allaha rabbi wa atubu ilayhi

translation.en: I pray the forgiveness of Allah, my Lord, and I turn repentant to Him.

text.en: Twelfth: Shaykh al-Tusi, Sayyid Ibn Tawus, and others have mentioned the following supplicatory prayer confirming that it is recommended to say it at Thursday nights just before dawn:
text.ar: الثاني عشر: وهذا الدعاء رواه الشيخ والسَّيِّد وغيرهما وقالوا : يستحبّ أن يدعى بهِ في السَّحر ليلة الجُمعة ، وهذا هو الدعاء :

translation.en: O Allah, send blessings to Muhammad and his Household,
grant me Your satisfaction this very early morning,
place fear of You in my heart,
and separate it from (leaning to) anyone other than You,

segments.arabic: حَتَّىٰ لاَ أَرْجُوَ وَلاَ أَخَافَ إِلاَّ إِيَّاكَ
segments.transliteration: hatta la arjwa wa la akhafa illa iyyaka

translation.en: so that I will hope for and fear none save You.
O Allah, send blessings to Muhammad and his Household
and grant me resolute faith,
pure sincerity (to You),
honorable belief in (Your) oneness,
persistent straightness,
essential tolerance,
and satisfaction with (Your) predetermination and decrees.
O He Who settles the needs of His beseechers;

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ يَعْلَمُ مَا فِي ضَمِيرِ ٱلصَّامِتِينَ
segments.transliteration: ya man ya`lamu ma fi damiri alssamitina

translation.en: O He Who knows what is in the innermost of the silent;
send blessings to Muhammad and his Household,
translation.fa: درود فرست بر محمد و آلش

translation.en: respond to my prayers,
forgive my sins,
expand my means of livelihood,
and settle the needs of myself

segments.transliteration: wa ikhwani fi dini wa ahli

translation.en: and my brethren-in-faith and my family members.

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي طُمُوحُ ٱلآمَالِ قَدْ خَابَتْ إِلاَّ لَدَيْكَ
segments.transliteration: ilahi tumuhu al-amali qad khabat illa ladayka

translation.en: O Allah, all ambitions of expectations are disappointed except those addressed to You,

segments.arabic: وَمَعَاكِفُ ٱلْهِمَمِ قَدْ تَعَطَّلَتْ إِلاَّ عَلَيْكَ
segments.transliteration: wa ma`akifu alhimami qad ta`attalat illa `alayka

translation.en: all resolute determinations are paralyzed except those relied upon You,

segments.arabic: وَمَذَاهِبُ ٱلْعُقُولِ قَدْ سَمَتْ إِلاَّ إِلَيْكَ
segments.transliteration: wa madhahibu al`uquli qad samat illa ilayka

translation.en: and all reason-based tendencies are wasted except those directed to You.
So, You are the ultimate hope and to You is the resort.

segments.transliteration: ya akrama maqsudin wa ajwada mas'ulin

translation.en: O He Who is the noblest objective and the most magnanimous desired,
I am fleeing to You from myself.
O shelter of those who flee overburdened with the heavy loads of sins,
carrying my sins on my back,
I cannot find any interceder for me

segments.arabic: سِوَىٰ مَعْرِفَتِي بِأَنَّكَ أَقْرَبُ مَنْ رَجَاهُ ٱلطَّالِبُونَ
segments.transliteration: siwa ma`rifati bi'annaka aqrabu man rajahu alttalibuna

translation.en: except that I know for sure that You are the nearest of all those who are hoped by beseechers
and of all those whose donations are expected by the desirous.
O He Who has split the intellects on the recognition of Him,
made tongues articulate with the praising of Him

segments.arabic: وَجَعَلَ مَا ٱمْتَنَّ بِهِ عَلَىٰ عِبَادِهِ فِي كِفَاءٍ لِتَاْدِيَةِ حَقِّهِ
segments.transliteration: wa ja`ala ma imtanna bihi `ala `ibadihi fi kifa'in lita'diyati haqqhi

translation.en: and made that which He has conferred upon His servants enough means for the fulfillment of their duties towards Him;
(please) send blessings to Muhammad and his Household,
translation.fa: درود فرست بر محمد و آلش

segments.arabic: وَلاَ تَجْعَلْ لِلشَّيْطَانِ عَلَىٰ عَقْلِي سَبيلاًَ

translation.en: do not give Satan any way (of success) over my reason,
and do not give wrongness a way to reach my deeds.

text.en: When Friday dawns, it is recommended to say the following:
text.ar: فإذا طلع الفجر يَوم الجُمعة فليقُل :

translation.en: I begin this morning seeking the protection of Allah,
the protection of His angels,

segments.transliteration: wa dhimami anbiya'ihi wa rusulihi `alayhimu alssalamu

translation.en: the protections of His prophets and messengers, peace be upon them,

segments.arabic: وَذِمَّةِ مُحَمَّدٍ صَلَّىٰ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ
segments.transliteration: wa dhimmati muhammadin salla allahu `alayhi wa alihi

translation.en: the protection of Muhammad, peace be upon him and his Household,

segments.arabic: وَذِمَمِ ٱلأَوْصِيَاءِ مِنَ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَلَيْهِمُ ٱلسَّلاَمُ
segments.transliteration: wa dhimami al-awsiya'i min ali muhammadin `alayhimu alssalamu

translation.en: and the protections of the Successors from Muhammad’s progeny, peace be upon them.

segments.arabic: آمَنْتُ بِسِرِّ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَلَيْهِمُ ٱلسَّلاَمُ وَعَلاَنِيَتِهِمْ
segments.transliteration: amantu bisirri ali muhammadin `alayhimu alssalamu wa `alaniyatihim

translation.en: I believe in the secrets of Muhammad’s progeny, peace be upon them, and in their open affairs
and in their exoteric and their esoteric affairs.

segments.arabic: وَأَشْهَدُ أَنَّهُمْ فِي عِلْمِ ٱللَّهِ وَطَاعَتِهِ
segments.transliteration: wa ash-hadu annahum fi `ilmi allahi wa ta`atihi

translation.en: I bear witness that they, as regarding their knowledge of Allah and their obedience to Him,
are just like Muhammad, peace be upon him and his Household.

text.en: It has been also narrated that one who says the following litany three times before the Dawn (Fajr) Prayer on Fridays will have all his sins forgiven even if they are as innumerable as swelling foams:
text.ar: وَروي أنّ من قالَ يَوم الجُمعة قَبلَ صلاة الصبح ثلاث مرّات :

segments.arabic: أَسْتَغْفِرُ ٱللَّهَ ٱلَّذِي لاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ هُوَ
segments.transliteration: astaghfiru allaha alladhi la ilaha illa huwa

translation.en: I pray the forgiveness of Allah save Whom there is no god;
the Ever-living and Ever-subsisting,and I turn in repentance to Him

text.en: غفرت ذنوبه ولو كانت أكثر من زبد البحر.
<ref=3:1224>Prayer of Imam Mahdi</ref>
text.ar: <ref=3:1224>صلاة الإمام المهدي (عج) في لیلة الجمعة</ref>

text.en: The Holy Prophet’s Prayer
text.ar: صلاة النبي صلى‌الله‌عليه‌وآله

text.en: Sayyid Ibn Tawus, may Allah have mercy on him, has narrated, through an authenticated chain of authority, that when he was asked about Ja`far al-Tayyar’s Prayer, Imam al-Ridha (`a) said, “Have you known about the Holy Prophet’s Prayer? Perhaps, the Holy Prophet (s) had never offered Ja`far al-Tayyar’s Prayer and Ja`far al-Tayyar had never offered the Holy Prophet’s Prayer.” When the asker asked him to teach him that prayer, Imam al-Ridha (`a) said:
text.ar: روى السيّد ابن طاووس رض بسند معتبر عَن الرِّضا (صلوات الله عَليِهِ) أنَّهُ سُئل عَن صلاة جعفر الطَّيّار (رض) فقال : اين أَنتَ عَن صلاة النبّي صلى‌الله‌عليه‌وآله فَعسى رسول الله صلى‌الله‌عليه‌وآله لَمْ يُصلِّ صلاة جعفر قطّ ، ولعل جعفراً لَمْ يُصلِّ صلاة رسول الله صلى‌الله‌عليه‌وآله قطّ. فَقُلت : علِّمنيها ، قالَ :

text.en:
Offer a two-unit prayer reciting in each unit Surah <ref=1:1>Al-Fatehah</ref>
 once and Surah <ref=1:97>Al-Qadr</ref> 
 fifteen times. When you come to the Ruku` (genuflection), repeat it (i.e. Surah al-Qadr) fifteen times; when you raise your body after the Ruku`, recite it fifteen times; when you do the Sujud (prostration), repeat it fifteen times; when you raise your head from the Sujud, repeat it fifteen times; when you do the second prostration, repeat it fifteen times; and when you raise your head from the second prostration, repeat it fifteen times. When you finish your prayer, you will have all your sins forgiven by Almighty Allah and you will have all your requests granted for you. The supplication that should be said thereafter is as follows:
text.ar:
تصلِّي ركعتين تقرأ في كلِّ ركعة <ref=1:1>الفاتحة</ref>
 الكتاب و <ref=1:97>القدر</ref> 
 خمس عشر مَرَّة ثم تركع فَتقرأها خمس عشرة مَرَّة وخمس عشرة مَرَّة إِذا إستَويتَ قائماً ، وخمس عشرة مَرَّة إِذا سَجَدتَ وخمس عشرة مَرَّة إِذا رفعت رأسك من السّجود ، وخمس عشرة مَرَّة في السّجدة الثّانية ، وخمس عشرة مَرَّة إِذا رفعتَ رأسك مِنَ الثّانية ، ثمَّ تنصرف ولَيسَ بَينكَ وَبَينَ الله تَعالى ذنب إِلاّ وقد غفر لك وتُعطى جميع ما سألت والدُّعاء بعدها :

translation.en: There is no god save Allah;
our Lord and the Lord of our fathers of old.
There is no god save Allah;

segments.transliteration: ilahan wahidan wa nahnu lahu muslimuna

translation.en: one God, and to Him are we submissive.
There is no god save Allah;
we worship none save Him,
making our devotion sincere as in His sight
even though the polytheists may detest it.
There is no god save Allah;
alone, alone, alone,
He has truly fulfilled His promise,
granted His servant victory,
made powerful His soldiers,
and defeated the parties alone.
All sovereignty be His and all praise be to Him.
And He has power over all things.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ اَنْتَ نُورُ ٱلسَّمَاوَاتِ وَٱلاَرْضِ وَمَنْ فِيهِنَّ
segments.transliteration: allahumma anta nuru alssamawati wal-ardhi wa man feehinna

translation.en: O Allah, You are the Light of the heavens and the earth and whatever is in these two.
So, all praise be to You.

segments.arabic: وَاَنْتَ قَيَّامُ ٱلسَّمَاوَاتِ وَٱلاَرْضِ وَمَنْ فيهِنَّ
segments.transliteration: wa anta qayyamu alssamawati wal-ardhi wa man feehinna

translation.en: And You are the Fashioner of the heavens and the earth and whatever exists in these two.
So, all praise be to You.
You are the (utter) Truth,
Your promise is utterly true,
Your word is true,
Your fulfillment is true,
Paradise is true,
and Hellfire is true.
O Allah, to You have I surrendered,
in You do I believe,
on You do I rely,
for Your sake do I dispute,
and Your judgment do I seek.

segments.arabic: يَا رَبِّ يَا رَبِّ يَا ربِّ
segments.transliteration: ya rabbi ya rabbi ya rabbi

translation.en: O my Lord; O my Lord; O my Lord;
translation.fa: پروردگارا، پروردگارا، پروردگارا؛

segments.transliteration: ighfir lee ma qaddamtu wa akhkhartu

translation.en: (please) forgive me my past and next sins
and my hidden and open ones.

segments.arabic: اَنْتَ إِلٰهِي لاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ اَنْتَ
segments.transliteration: anta ilahee la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: You are verily my God; there is no god save You.
Send blessings upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,
translation.fa: بر محمّد و خاندان محمّد درود فرست

translation.en: forgive me,
have mercy on me,
and accept my repentance.
Verily, You are the Oft-Returning, the Most Merciful.

text.en:
Shaykh al-Tusee and Sayyid Ibn Tawus have recorded that Imam Ja`far al-¯adiq (`a) said: One who offers the four-unit prayer ( 2 salat of 2 units each)of Imam `Ali Ameer al-Mu'mineen (`a) will be as free of sins as newborns and will have all his requests granted. all rakats, recite Surah <ref=1:1>Al-Fatehah</ref>
 once and repeat Surah <ref=1:112>al-Ekhlas</ref>
 (No. 112) fifty times.
text.ar:
روى الشَّيخ والسَّيِّد عَن الصّادق عليه‌السلام أنَّه قالَ : من صَلَّى منكم أربَع ركعات صلاة أمير المؤمنين عليه‌السلام خرج مِن ذُنوبهِ كيَوم وَلَدتهُ أمّهُ ، وقضيت حوائجه. يقرأ في كُلِّ ركعة <ref=1:1>الفاتحة</ref>
 مَرَّة وخمسين مَرَّة <ref=1:112>الإخلاص</ref>
 : (قُلْ هُوَ الله أحَدٌ) ،

text.en: On accomplishment, say the following litany of Imam `Ali, peace be upon him:
text.ar: فإذا فرغ منها دعا بهذا الدعاء وهُوَ تسبيحَهُ عليه‌السلام :

translation.en: Glory be to Him Whose signs never perish.
Glory be to Him Whose reserves never downgrade.
Glory be to Him Whose honor never vanishes.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ مَنْ لاَ يَنْفَدُ مَا عِنْدَهُ

translation.en: Glory be to Him Whose possessions never run out.
Glory be to Him Whose duration (of existence) is never interrupted.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ مَنْ لاَ يُشَارِكُ اَحَداً فِي اَمْرِهِ
segments.transliteration: subhana man la yushariku ahadan fee amrihee

translation.en: Glory be to Him Who never betakes to Himself a partner in His affairs.
Glory be to Him save Whom there is no god.

text.en: Thereafter, say the following supplicatory prayer:
text.ar: فَليدعو بَعد ذلك ويَقولُ :

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ عَفَا عَنِ ٱلسَّيِئَاتِ وَلَمْ يُجَازِ بِهَا
segments.transliteration: ya man `afa `ani alssayyi'ati wa lam yujazi biha

translation.en: O He who overlooks sins and does not inflict punishment in return,
(please) have mercy on Your servant, O Allah,
that is I myself, that is I myself.
I am Your servant, O my Chief,

segments.arabic: اَنَا عَبْدُكَ بَيْنَ يَدَيْكَ يَا رَبَّاهُ

translation.en: I am Your servant; I am at Your disposal; O my Lord.
O my God, in the name of Your Being, O my Hope,
O my All-beneficent, O my Supporter,
Your servant, Your servant, has no strategy.
O Ultimate of my desire!

segments.arabic: يَا مُجْرِيَ ٱلدَّمِ فِي عُرُوقِ عَبْدِكَ

translation.en: O He Who makes blood run into the veins of Your slave!
O my Chief, O my Master!

segments.arabic: اَيَا هُوَ اَيَا هُوَ يَا رَبَّاهُ
segments.transliteration: aya huwa aya huwa ya rabbahu

translation.en: O He Who is Unique! O He Who is Unique! O my Lord!
I—Your servant, Your servant—

segments.arabic: لاَ حِيلَةَ لِي وَلاَ غِنىٰ بِي عَنْ نَفسِْي
segments.transliteration: la heelata lee wa la ghinan bee `an nafsee

translation.en: have no strategy and I cannot avail myself

segments.arabic: وَلاَ اَسْتَطِيعُ لَهَا ضَرّاً وَلاَ نَفْعاً
segments.transliteration: wa la astatee`u laha dharran wa la naf`an

translation.en: and I have no control over loss or over profit.
I do not find anyone from whom I may seek help;
so, all profitable avenues have been blocked,
and all my expectations have turned into disappointments.
Helpless and forsaken I came to You,
So, I have presented myself before You in this current stand.

segments.arabic: يَا إِلٰهِي بِعِلْمِكَ كَانَ هٰذَا كُلُّهُ
segments.transliteration: ya ilahee bi`ilmika kana hadha kulluhu

translation.en: O my God, You are aware of all that which I speak about.
So, how would You deal with me?

segments.transliteration: wa layta shi`ree kayfa taqulu lidu`a'ee

translation.en: If I but knew how would You dispense with my prayer?
Would You say, ‘Yes’ or ‘No’?

segments.arabic: فَإِنْ قُلْتَ لاَ فَيَا وَيْلِي يَا وَيْلِي يَا ويْلِي
segments.transliteration: fa-in qulta la fayawaylee yawaylee yawaylee

translation.en: If You say ‘No,’ then I am ruined! I am ruined! I am ruined!

segments.arabic: يَا عَوْلِي يَا عَوْلِي يَا عَوْلِي

translation.en: Woe to me! Woe to me! Woe to me!

segments.arabic: يَا شِقْوَتِي يَا شِقْوَتِي يَا شِقْوَتِي
segments.transliteration: ya shiqwatee ya shiqwatee ya shiqwatee

translation.en: Oh my misery! Oh my misery! Oh my misery!

segments.arabic: يَا ذُلّي يَا ذُلِّي يَا ذُلِّي
segments.transliteration: ya dhullee ya dhullee ya dhullee

translation.en: Oh my ill-luck! Oh my ill-luck! Oh my ill-luck!
To whom? By Whom?

segments.arabic: اَوْ عِنْدَ مَنْ اَوْ كَيْفَ اَوْ مَاذَا
segments.transliteration: aw `inda man aw kayfa aw madha

translation.en: From whom? How? What?
In which place to take shelter?
For whom shall I hope?

segments.arabic: وَمَنْ يَجُودُ عَلَيَّ بِفَضْلِهِ حِينِ تَرْفُضُنِي
segments.transliteration: wa man yajudu `alayya bifadhlihee heena tarfudhunee

translation.en: Who shall bestow upon me with his favor when You forsake me?
O Liberal in forgiveness!

segments.arabic: وَإِنْ قُلْتَ نَعَمْ كَمَا هُوَ ٱلظَّنُّ بِكَ وَٱلرَّجَاءُ لَكَ
segments.transliteration: wa in qulta na`am kama huwa al¨¨annu bika walrraja'u laka

translation.en: But if You say ‘Yes,’ as I expect You to say and as I desire from You,

segments.arabic: فَطُوبَىٰ لِي اَنَا ٱلسَّعيدُ وَاَنَا ٱلْمَسْعُودُ
segments.transliteration: fatuba lee ana alssa`eedu wa ana almas`udu

translation.en: then joy is for me, I am successful, I am happy;
then joy is for me, I will receive (Your) mercy.
O Ever-merciful! O Ever-compassionate!
O Ever-sympathetic! O Ever-commiserating!
O Ever-sovereign! O Just!

segments.arabic: لاَ عَمَلَ لِي اَبْلُغُ بِهِ نَجَاحَ حَاجَتِي
segments.transliteration: la `amala lee ablughu bihee najaha hajatee

translation.en: I lack any act due to which I can attain achievement of my desire.

segments.arabic: اَسْاَلُكَ بِٱسْمِكَ ٱلَّذِي جَعَلْتَهُ فِي مَكْنُونِ غَيْبِكَ
segments.transliteration: as'aluka bismika alladhee ja`altahu fee maknuni ghaybika

translation.en: I thus beseech You in the name of Your Name which You have reserved in the innermost of Your Hidden Knowledge

segments.arabic: وَٱسْتَقَرَّ عِنْدَكَ فَلاَ يَخْرُجُ مِنْكَ إِلىٰ شَيْءٍ سِوَاكَ
segments.transliteration: wastaqarra `indaka fala yakhruju minka ila shay'in siwaka

translation.en: and it has thus settled with You so firmly that nothing of it can come out from You to any other thing.

segments.arabic: اَسْاَلُكَ بِهِ وَبِكَ فَإنَّهُ اَجَلُّ وَاَشْرَفُ اَسْمَائِكَ
segments.transliteration: as'aluka bihee wa bika fa'innahu ajallu wa ashrafu asma'ika

translation.en: I beseech You by it and by You, for it is certainly the most exalted and honored of Your Names.
I have nothing to mention except this,
and no one can be more beneficent to me than You.
O Absolute Being! O Creator of creation!
O He Who has introduced Himself to me!
O He Who has commanded me to obey Him!
O He Who has warned me against disobeying Him!
O He Who is besought! O He Who is pleaded!
O He Who is desired!

segments.arabic: رَفَضْتُ وَصِيَّتَكَ ٱلَّتِي اَوْصَيْتَنِي وَلَمْ اُطِعْكَ
segments.transliteration: rafadhtu wasiyyataka allatee awsaytanee wa lam uti`ka

translation.en: I have overlooked Your instructions, which You gave me and have not obeyed You.

segments.arabic: وَلَوْ اَطَعْتُكَ فِيمَا اَمَرْتَنِي لَكَفَيْتَنِي مَا قُمْتُ إِلَيْكَ فيهِ
segments.transliteration: wa law ata`tuka feema amartanee lakafaytanee ma qumtu ilayka feehi

translation.en: If I obeyed You in what You have ordered me, You would certainly grant my requests that I am presenting before You.

segments.transliteration: wa ana ma`a ma`siyatee laka rajin

translation.en: In spite of my transgression, I am hopeful for You.

segments.arabic: فَلاَ تَحُلْ بَيْنِي وَبَيْنَ مَا رَجَوْتُ
segments.transliteration: fala tahul baynee wa bayna ma rajawtu

translation.en: So, do not let my hope remain unfulfilled.

segments.arabic: يَا مُتَرَحِّماً لِي اَعِذْنِي مِنْ بَيْنِ يَدَيَّ وَمِنْ خَلْقِي
segments.transliteration: ya mutarahhiman lee a`idhnee min bayni yadayya wa min khalfee

translation.en: O He Who always has mercy upon me, keep me safe, under Your protection, from (all evils that are) before me, behind me,

segments.transliteration: wa min fawqee wa min tahtee

translation.en: above me, below me,

segments.transliteration: wa min kulli jihati al-ihatati bee

translation.en: and from all sides that surround me.
O Allah, [I beseech You] in the name of Muhammad, my master,
and [in the name of] `Ali, my chief,
and [in the names of] the orthodox Imams (leaders), peace be upon them,

segments.transliteration: ij`al `alayna salawatika wa ra'fataka wa rahmataka

translation.en: (please) bestow upon us with Your blessings, compassions, and mercy;
and grant us expansive shares of Your sustenance;
and help us repay our debts and settle all our needs,

segments.arabic: يَا اللَّهُ يَا اللَّهُ يَا اللَّهُ
segments.transliteration: ya allahu ya allahu ya allahu

translation.en: O Allah, O Allah, O Allah.
Verily, You have full power over all things.

text.en: The Imam (`a) then added: One who offers this prayer and says this supplication will have all his sins forgiven.
text.ar: ثُمَّ قالَ عليه‌السلام : من صَلَّى هذه الصلاة ودَعا بِهذا الدُّعاءِ انفتَل ولَمْ يَبق بَينه وبين الله تعالى ذَنب إِلاّ غُفِرَ لهُ.

text.en: Numerous are the narrations that have mentioned splendid reward for those who offer this prayer on Fridays. Similarly, one who says the following supplicatory prayer after that prayer will have all his previous and coming sins forgiven, will be given the reward of him who recites the holy Qur'an entirely twelve times, and will be saved from thirst on the Resurrection Day:
text.ar: أقول : ورَدتنا أحاديث كثيرة في فَضلِ هذه الاَربع ركعات في يَوم الجُمعة ، وإِذا قالَ المُصَلِّي بعد ما فَرغ منها : اللّهُمَّ صَلِّ على النَّبِيِّ العَرَبِيِّ وَآلِهِ. ففي الحديث انهُ يُغفَر لَهُ ما تَقدَّم مِن ذنبِهِ وَما تَأخَّر ، وكانَ كمَن خَتمَ القُرآن اثنتَي عشرة ختمة ، ورفع الله عنه عطش يَوم القيَّامة.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ ٱلنَّبِيِّ ٱلْعَرَبِيِّ وَآلِهِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala alnnabiyyi al`arabiyyi wa alihee

translation.en: O Allah, send blessings to the Arab Prophet and on his Household.

text.en:
It is narrated that Lady Fatimah al-Zahra', peace be upon her, used to offer a two-unit prayer taught by Archangel Gabriel. In the first unit, she used to recite Surah <ref=1:1>Al-Fatehah</ref>
 and repeat Surah <ref=1:97>Al-Qadr</ref> 
 one hundred times. In the second unit, she used to recite Surah <ref=1:1>Al-Fatehah</ref>
 and Surah <ref=1:112>al-Ekhlas</ref>
. After Tasleem (i.e. the concluding part of a prayer), she would say the following :
text.ar:
صلاة فاطمة (صَلَواتُ الله عَلَيهاِ) رُوي انَّهُ كانت لفاطمة عليها‌السلام ركعتان تُصلَّيهما عَلَّمها جبرائيل عليه‌السلام. تَقرأ في‌الرّكعة الأولى بعد <ref=1:1>الفاتحة</ref>
 سُورَة <ref=1:97>القدر</ref> 
 مائة مَرَّة ، وَفي الثّانية بعد <ref=1:1>الفاتحة</ref>
 تَقرأ سُورَة <ref=1:112>الإخلاص</ref>
 ، وإِذا سَلَّمتْ قالتْ :

translation.en: Glory be to the Lord of Honor and Sublime Authority.
Glory be to the Lord of Majesty and Exalted Greatness.
Glory be to the Lord of eternal, splendid sovereignty.
Glory be to Him Who dressed Himself with splendor and beauty.
Glory be to Him Who is clad in light and dignity.

segments.arabic: سُبحَانَ مَنْ يَرَىٰ اَثَرَ ٱلَّنمْلِ فِي ٱلصَّفَا
segments.transliteration: subhana man yara athara alnnamli fee alssafa

translation.en: Glory be to Him Who makes out the footprints of the ant on the stone.

segments.arabic: سُبحَانَ مَنْ يَرَىٰ وَقْعَ ٱلطَّيْرِ فِِي ٱلْهَوَاءِ
segments.transliteration: subhana man yara waq`a alttayri fee alhawa'i

translation.en: Glory be to Him Who knows (the exact time and place of) the bird dipping down through the air.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ مَنْ هُوَ هٰكَذَا لاَ هٰكَذَا غَيْرُهُ
segments.transliteration: subhana man huwa hakadha la hakadha ghayruhu

translation.en: Glory be to Him Who is like this and no one (other than Him) is like this.

text.en: Sayyid Ibn Tawus adds that it is better to say the famous Tasbeeh al-Zahra' after offering this prayer and then invoke Almighty Allah’s blessings upon the Holy Prophet and his Household.
text.ar: قال السَّيِّد : ورُوِيَ أَنَّهُ يُسبِّح بعد الصلاة تسبيحها المنقول عقيب كُلّ فَريضَة ثمَّ يُصلِّي على مُحَمَّدٍ وآلِ مُحَمَّد مائة مَرَّة

text.en: However, in Misbah al-Mutahajjid, Shaykh al-Tusee has recorded that Lady Fatimah al-Zahra'’s prayer consists of two units in the first of which Surah al-Fatihah is recited once and Surah al-Qadr is repeated one hundred times; and in the second unit, Surah al-Fatihah is recited once and Surah al-Tawheed is repeated one hundred times. After the Tasleem, Tasbeeh al-Zahra' is said and then one’s knees and arms are uncovered so as to embrace the ground with all organs of prostration without putting any barrier between the ground and the organs of prostration. Such being the case, one should supplicate to Almighty Allah and pray for granting one’s requests. Being prostrating oneself, one should say the following prayer: MP3
text.ar: وقالَ الشَّيخ في كتاب مصباح المتهجد : أنَّ صلاة فاطمة عليها‌السلام ركعتان ، تقرأ في الأولى الحَمد وسُورَة القدر مائة مَرَّة ، وَفي الثّانية بعد الحَمد سُورَة التَوحيد مائة مَرَّة ، فاِذا سَلَّمَتْ سَبَّحَتْ تَسبيحُ الزهراءِ عليها‌السلام ، ثمَّ تقول :

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَيْسَ غَيْرَهُ رُبٌّ يُدْعَىٰ
segments.transliteration: ya man laysa ghayrahu rabbun yud`a

translation.en: O He besides Whom there is no lord to be supplicated!
translation.fa: اى کسى که جز او پروردگارى نیست که خوانده شود

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَيْسَ فَوْقَهُ إِلٰهٌ يُخْشَىٰ
segments.transliteration: ya man laysa fawqahu ilahun yukhsha

translation.en: O He above Whom there is no god to be feared!

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَيْسَ دُونَهُ مَلِكٌ يُتَّقَىٰ
segments.transliteration: ya man laysa dunahu malikun yuttaqa

translation.en: O He except Whom there is no master to be revered!

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَيْسَ لَهُ وَزِيْرٌ يُؤْتَىٰ
segments.transliteration: ya man laysa lahu wazeerun yu'ta

translation.en: O He Who has no counselor to be approached!

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَيْسَ لَهُ حَاجِبٌ يُرْشَىٰ
segments.transliteration: ya man laysa lahu hajibun yursha

translation.en: O He Who has no attendant to be bribed!

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَيْسَ لَهُ بَوَّابٌ يُغْشَىٰ
segments.transliteration: ya man laysa lahu bawwabun yughsha

translation.en: O He Who has no doorkeeper to be visited (secretly)!

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ لاَ يَزْدَادُ عَلَىٰ كَثْرَةِ ٱلسُّؤَالِ إِلاَّ كَرَماً وَجُوداً
segments.transliteration: ya man la yazdadu `ala kathrati alssu'ali illa karaman wa judan

translation.en: O He Who gives not but generously and liberally no matter how many the demands are

segments.arabic: وَعَلَىٰ كَثْرَةِ ٱلذُّنُوبِ إِلاَّ عَفْواً وَصَفْحاً
segments.transliteration: wa `ala kathrati aldhdhunubi illa `afwan wa safhan

translation.en: and deals not with numerous sins but mercifully and kindly!
Send blessings upon Muhammad and his Household…

text.en: And then one may mention one’s personal requests.
text.ar: ويَسأل حاجَتَه

text.en: Lady Fatimah al-Zahra(sa)’s Another Prayer
text.ar: صلاة اُخرى لَها عليها‌السلام

text.en:
Shaykh al-Tusee and Sayyid Ibn Tawus have reported on the authority of ¯afwan that Muhammad ibn `Ali al-°alabee, once, visited Imam Ja`far al-¯adiq (`a) one Friday and asked him to teach him the best deed to be practiced on Fridays. The Imam (`a) said: Listen, Muhammad! I do not know any one who was more beloved and more respected than Lady Fatimah al-Zahra', peace be upon her, in the view of the Holy Prophet, peace be upon him and his Household. Likewise, I do not know anything that was more valuable than that which he had taught her to do on Fridays. In Friday morning, one should bathe oneself, stand upright, and offer a four-unit prayer each two alone. In the first unit, recite Surah <ref=1:1>Al-Fatehah</ref>
once and repeat Surah <ref=1:112>al-Ekhlas</ref>
 fifty times. In the second, recite Surah <ref=1:1>Al-Fatehah</ref>
 once and repeat Surah <ref=1:100>Al-Adiyaat</ref> 
 fifty times. In the third, recite Surah <ref=1:1>Al-Fatehah</ref>
 once and repeat Surah <ref=1:99>Al-Zalzalah</ref>
 fifty times. In the fourth, recite Surah <ref=1:1>Al-Fatehah</ref>
 once and repeat <ref=1:110>Al-Nasr</ref> 
 fifty times. This Surah was the concluding revelation. Upon accomplishment of the prayer, pray Almighty Allah with the following prayer:
text.ar:
روى الشَّيخ والسَيِّد عَن صفوان قالَ : دَخَل مُحَمَّد بن عليّ الحلبي على الصّادق عليه‌السلام في يَوم الجُمعة فقال لَهُ : تُعلِّمني أفضل ما أصنع في هذا اليوم؟ فقال : يا مُحَمَّد ، ما أعلم انَّ اَحَداً كانَ أكبر عِنْدَ رسول الله صلى‌الله‌عليه‌وآله من فاطِمة ولا أفضل ممّا عَلَّمها اَبوها مُحَمَّد بن عَبد الله صلى‌الله‌عليه‌وآله قالَ : مَن أصبح يَوم الجُمعة فاغتسل وصفَّ قَدَمَيه وصَلَّى أربع ركعات مثنى مثنى ، يقرأ في أوَّل ركعة <ref=1:1>الفاتحة</ref>
 الكتاب و <ref=1:112>الإخلاص</ref>
 خمسين مَرَّة وَفي الثّانية <ref=1:1>الفاتحة</ref>
 الكتاب و <ref=1:100>العادیات</ref> 
 خمسين مَرَّة ، وَفي الثّالثة <ref=1:1>الفاتحة</ref>
 الكتاب و <ref=1:99>الزلزلة</ref>
 خمسين مَرَّة وَفي الرّابعة <ref=1:1>الفاتحة</ref>
 الكتاب وإِذا <ref=1:110>النصر</ref> 
  خمسين مَرَّة ، وَهذهِ سُورَة النَّصر وهِيَ آخر سُورَة نزلت فإذا فرغ منْها دعا فقال :

translation.en: O My God and Master,
whilst one prepares oneself, sets up,
arranges, or gets ready
for visiting a mortal
in the hope of attaining a gift, interests,

segments.transliteration: wa na'ilihee wa fawadhilihee wa jawa'izihee

translation.en: a souvenir, bequests, or presents from him,

segments.arabic: فَإلَيْكَ يَا إِلٰهِي كَانَتْ تَهْيِئَتِي وَتَعْبِئَتِي
segments.transliteration: fa-ilayka ya ilahee kanat tahyi'atee wa ta`bi'atee

translation.en: to You, O my God, have I prepared myself, set up,
arranged and got ready
in the hope of attaining Your interests, favors,
souvenirs, and presents.
Hence, (please) do not disappoint me of all these.

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ لاَ تَخِيبُ عَلَيْهِ مَسْاَلَةُ ٱلسَّائِلِ
segments.transliteration: ya man la takheebu `alayhi mas'alatu alssa'ili

translation.en: O You with Whom no asker is disappointed
and no present of an earner causes You reduction.

segments.arabic: فَإنِّي لَمْ آتِكَ بعَمَلٍ صَالِحٍ قَدَّمْتُهُ
segments.transliteration: fa'innee lam atika bi`amalin salihin qaddamtuhu

translation.en: In fact, I have not come to You with a righteous deed that I have done
nor with an intercession of a creature that I hope
to seek Your nearness through him
save Muhammad and his Household,
Your blessings be upon him and them.
I am coming to You hoping for Your munificent amnesty
that You have conferred upon the sinners
who confined themselves to the commitment to forbidden acts;

segments.arabic: فَلَمْ يَمْنَعْكَ طُولُ عُكُوفِهِمْ عَلَىٰ ٱلْمَحَارِمِ

translation.en: nevertheless, their long-lasting commitment to forbidden acts has not made You
stop conferring upon them with Your forgiveness.
You, O my Master, always confer upon me with Your graces
while I always recommit sins.

segments.transliteration: as'aluka bihaqqi muhammadin wa alihee alttahireena

translation.en: I thus ask You by the Right of Muhammad and his Household, the Immaculate,
to forgive my grand sins,

segments.arabic: فَإنَّهُ لاَ يَغْفِرُ ٱلْعَظِيمَ إِلاَّ ٱلْعَظِيمُ
segments.transliteration: fa'innahu la yaghfiru al`a¨eema illa al`a¨eemu

translation.en: for none forgives the grand sins but the All-great.

segments.arabic: يَا عَظِيمُ يَا عَظِيمُ يَا عَظِيمُ

translation.en: O All-great, O All-great, O All-great,

segments.arabic: يَا عَظِيمُ يَا عَظِيمُ يَا عَظِيمُ

translation.en: O All-great, O All-great, O All-great,
O All-great!

text.en:
This prayer consists of four units in each of which Surah <ref=1:1>Al-Fatehah</ref>
 is recited once and Surah <ref=1:112>al-Ekhlas</ref>
 is repeated twenty-five times.
text.ar:
صلاة لمولانا الحسن عليه‌السلام في يَوم الجُمعة وهي أربَع ركعات ، كُل ركعة <ref=1:1>الفاتحة</ref>
 مَرَّة ، و <ref=1:112>الإخلاص</ref>
 خمساً وعشرين مَرَّة.

text.en: Imam al-Hasan’s Supplication
text.ar: دُعاء الحسَن عليه‌السلام :

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي اَتَقَرَّبُ إِلَيْكَ بِجُودِكَ وَكَرَمِكَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma innee ataqarrabu ilayka bijudika wa karamika

translation.en: O Allah, I seek nearness to You in the name of Your magnanimity and nobility.

segments.transliteration: wa ataqarrabu ilayka bimuhammadin `abdika wa rasulika

translation.en: I seek nearness to You in the name of Muhammad, Your servant and messenger.
I seek nearness to You in the name of Your Favorite Angels
and Your prophets and messengers,
[and I beseech You] to send blessings to Muhammad,
Your servant and messenger,
and upon the Household of Muhammad,
overlook my slips,
cover my sins,
forgive them for me,
settle all my needs,

segments.transliteration: wa la tu`adhdhibnee biqabeehin kana minnee

translation.en: and not to punish me for the evildoings that I have committed.
Verily, Your pardon and magnanimity include me.
Verily, You have power over all things.

text.en:
This prayer consists of four units ( 2X2) in each of which Surah <ref=1:1>Al-Fatehah</ref>

 and Surah <ref=1:112>al-Ekhlas</ref>
 are repeated fifty times in each rakat
text.ar:
صلاة الحُسين عليه‌السلام أربَع ركعات ، تقرأ في كُلِّ ركعة كلاً مِنَ <ref=1:1>الفاتحة</ref>
 و <ref=1:112>الإخلاص</ref>
 خمسين مَرَّة

text.en:
Then when i)bowing ( Rukoo) , ii)standing erect from ruku, iii)while prostration ( sujood) & iv)after each sitting up recite , Surah <ref=1:1>Al-Fatehah</ref>
 and Surah <ref=1:112>al-Ekhlas</ref>
 ten times each
text.ar:
وإِذا ركعت في كُلِّ ركعة تقرأ <ref=1:1>الفاتحة</ref>
 عشراً و <ref=1:112>الإخلاص</ref>
 عشراً وكذلك إذا رَفعتَ رأسَكَ مِنَ الرُّكوع وكذلك في كُلِّ سجدة وبَينَ كُلِّ سَجدَتَين

text.en: Then recite the prayer below
text.ar: ، فإذا سَلَّمت فَادعُ بِهذا الدُّعاءِ :

text.en: Imam al-Husayn’s Supplication
text.ar: دعاؤه عليه‌السلام

text.en: SUPPLICATION AFTER IMAM AL-HUSAYN’S PRAYER
This supplication is recommended to be said after Imam al-Husayn’s prayer, which is mentioned in Volume One of this book, page 147:

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ اَنْتَ الَّذِي ٱسْتَجَبْتَ لآِدَمَ وَحَوَّاءَ إِذْ قَالاَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma anta alladhee istajabta li-adama wa hawwa'a idh qala

translation.en: O Allah, it is You who responded to Adam and Eve when they both said,
“Our Lord! We have been unjust to ourselves,
