segments.transliteration: wa in lam taghfir lana wa tarhamna

translation.en: and if You forgive us not and have not mercy on us,
we shall certainly be of the losers.”
And when Noah cried to You, You answered him

segments.transliteration: wa najjaytahu wa ahlalu mina al-karb al`a¨eemi

translation.en: and delivered him and his family from the great calamity.

segments.arabic: وَاَطْفَاْتَ نَارَ نُمْرُودَ عَنْ خَلِيلِكَ إِبْرَاهِيمَ
segments.transliteration: wa atfa'ta nara numruda `an khaleelika ibraheema

translation.en: And it is You who extinguished the fire of Nimrod for Your intimate friend Abraham
and thus changed it into coldness and peace.

segments.arabic: وَاَنْتَ ٱلَّذِي ٱسْتَجَبْتَ لاَيُّوبَ إِذْ نَادَىٰ
segments.transliteration: wa anta alladhee istajabta li-ayyuba idh nada

translation.en: And it is You Who responded to Job when he cried to You, saying,

segments.transliteration: innee massaniya aldhdhurru wa anta arhamu alrrahimeena

translation.en: “Harm has afflicted me, and You are the most Merciful of all those who show mercy.”
Therefore, You took off what harm he had,

segments.transliteration: wa ataytahu ahlahu wa mithlahum ma`ahum

translation.en: and You gave him his family and the like of them with them:

segments.arabic: رَحْمَةً مِنْ عِنْدِكَ وَذِكْرَىٰ لاُِوْلِي ٱلاَلْبَابِ

translation.en: a mercy from You and a reminder to the owners of sound intellects.
And it is You Who responded to Dhu’l-Nun (i.e. Prophet Jonah)
when he cried through the depths of darkness,

segments.arabic: اَنْ لاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ اَنْتَ سُبْحَانَكَ
segments.transliteration: an la ilaha illa anta subhanaka

translation.en: “There is no god but You. Glory be to You.
I was indeed of those who are wrong!”
So, You delivered him from distress.

segments.arabic: وَاَنْتَ ٱلَّذِي ٱسْتَجَبْتَ لِمُوسَىٰ وَهَارُونَ دَعْوَتَهُمَا
segments.transliteration: wa anta alladhee istajabta limusa wa haruna da`watahuma

translation.en: And it is You Who responded to the prayer of Moses and Aaron

segments.transliteration: heena qulta qad ujeebat da`watukuma fastaqeema

translation.en: when You said, “Accepted is your prayer! So, stand you straight.”
You thus drowned Pharaoh and his people.
You forgave the sin of David

segments.transliteration: wa tubta `alayhi rahmatan minka wa dhikra

translation.en: and accepted his repentance out of Your mercy and as a reminder.
You ransomed Ishmael with a momentous sacrifice

segments.transliteration: ba`da ma aslama wa tallahu lil-jabeeni

translation.en: after he had submitted his will and he had laid him prostrate on his forehead for sacrifice.
Hence, You called him with relief and comfort.

segments.arabic: وَاَنْتَ ٱلَّذِي نَادَاكَ زَكَرِيَّا نِدَاءً خَفِيّاً
segments.transliteration: wa anta alladhee nadaka zakariyya nida'an khafiyyan

translation.en: And it is You to Whom Zachariah cried in secret,

segments.transliteration: faqala rabbi innee wahana al`a¨mu minnee

translation.en: praying, “O my Lord! Infirm indeed are my bones,
and the hair of my head has glistened with grey,

segments.transliteration: wa lan akun bidu`a'ika rabbi shaqiyyan

translation.en: but never am I unblest, O my Lord, in my prayer to You.”

segments.transliteration: wa qulta yad`unana raghaban wa rahaban

translation.en: And You said, “They used to call on Us with love and reverence
and they humbled themselves before Us.”

segments.arabic: وَاَنْتَ ٱلَّذِي ٱسْتَجَبْتَ لِلَّذِينَ آمَنُوا وَعَمِلُوٱ ٱلصَّالِحَاتِ
segments.transliteration: wa anta alladhee istajabta lilladheena amanu wa `amilu alssalihati

translation.en: And it is You Who responded to those who had believed and done good deeds
so as to increase Your favor upon them.

segments.arabic: فَلاَ تَجْعَلْنِي مِنْ اَهْوَنِ ٱلدَّاعِينَ لَكَ وَٱلرَّاغِبِينَ إِلَيْكَ
segments.transliteration: fala taj`alnee min ahwani aldda`eena laka walrraghibeena ilayka

translation.en: So, (please) do not consider me the most debased suppliant and desirous to You.
And respond to me in the same way as You responded to them,
(I beseech to You) by their right (that is incumbent) on You.
Purify me with Your purification,

segments.transliteration: wa taqabbal salatee wa du`a'ee biqabulin hasanin

translation.en: accept my prayer and supplication in the best manner,
make the rest of my life good,
make my demise good,
be the supervisor of my inheritors,
safeguard me, O my Lord, through my supplication,
and make my offspring goodly
by encompassing them

segments.arabic: بِكُلِّ مَا حُطْتَ بِهِ ذُرِّيَّةَ اَحَدٍ مِنْ اَوْلِيَائِكَ وَاَهْلِ طَاعَتِكَ
segments.transliteration: bikulli ma hutta bihee dhurriyyata ahadin min awliya'ika wa ahli ta`atika

translation.en: with the same things with which You have encompassed the offspring of Your intimate saints and the people who obeyed You appropriately,
out of Your mercy, O most merciful of all those who show mercy.

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ رَقِيبٌ
segments.transliteration: ya man huwa `ala kulli shay'in raqeebun

translation.en: O You Who observes all things,

segments.transliteration: wa likulli da`in min khalqika mujeebun

translation.en: Who answers all those who supplicate to You amongst Your creatures,
and Who is close to all those who implore You!

segments.arabic: اَسْاَلُكَ يَا لاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ اَنْتَ
segments.transliteration: as'aluka ya la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: I thus implore You, O He save Whom there is no god,
O He Who is Ever-living, Self-Subsisting,
One and Only, Absolute,

segments.transliteration: alladhee lam yalid wa lam yulad

translation.en: You beget not nor are You begotten

segments.transliteration: wa lam yakun lahu kufuwan ahadun

translation.en: and there is none like unto You.

segments.transliteration: wa bikulli ismin rafa`ta bihee sama'aka

translation.en: And I implore You by all Names with which You raised Your heavens,
spread out Your earth,
firmly fixed the mountains,
made water flow,
made the clouds subservient,
as well as the sun, the moon, the stars,
the night, and the daylight,
and created all beings.
I implore You by the magnitude of Your Magnificent Face
to which the heavens and the earth shone
causing darkness to change into lights,

segments.arabic: إِلاَّ صَلَّيْتَ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: illa sallayta `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: (I implore You by all these) to send blessings to Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,

segments.transliteration: wa kafaytanee amra ma`ashee wa ma`adee

translation.en: save me from the troubles of my living and my other life,
amend all my affairs,

segments.arabic: وَلَمْ تَكِلْنِي إِلَىٰ نَفْسِي طَرْفَةَ عَيْنٍ
segments.transliteration: wa lan takilnee ila nafsee tarfata `aynin

translation.en: not to cause me to depend upon myself for even a winking of an eye,
manage the affairs of my household and me,
save me from their concerns,

segments.transliteration: wa aghnaytanee wa iyyahum min kanzika wa khaza'inika

translation.en: make them and me rich out of Your treasure, hoards,

segments.arabic: وَسَعَةِ فَضْلِكَ الَّذِي لاَ يَنْفَدُ اَبَداً
segments.transliteration: was a`ati fadhlika alladhee la yanfadu abadan

translation.en: and Your expansive grace that never runs out,

segments.transliteration: wa athbit fee qalbee yanabee`a alhikmati

translation.en: fix in my heart founts of sagacity
from which I may benefit

segments.arabic: وَتَنْفَعُ بِهَا مَنِ ٱرْتَضَيْتَ مِنْ عِبَادِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa tanfa`u biha man irtadhayta min `ibadika

translation.en: and from which You may benefit Your servants with whom You are pleased,
choose for me an imam (i.e. leader)
that is pious in the last of time
in the same way as You made Abraham Your intimate friend to be a leader.
Verily, only through Your guidance do the winners achieve prosperity,
the repentant declare repentance,
and the true worshippers worship You.
And only through Your supervision do the righteous,
the good-doers, those who humble themselves before You,
those who worship You sincerely, and those who fear You become righteous.

segments.transliteration: wa bi-irshadika naja alnnajuna min narika

translation.en: And only through Your direction will those who will be delivered from Your Hellfire be saved

segments.transliteration: wa ashfaqa minha almushfiquna min khalqika

translation.en: and those who fear You, from amongst Your creatures, stand in awe of it.
But through Your disappointing them will the wrong lose,
the unjust perish,
and those distracted from You be inattentive.
O Allah, grant my soul its piety
for You are its guardian and master
and You are the best to purify it.
O Allah, show it its true guidance,
inspire it with what is good for it,
carry to it the good news of Your mercy when You grasp it,
lodge it in the highest positions of the gardens of Paradise,
make good its death and life,
and honor its place and abode
and its dwelling and house,
for You are its guardian and master.

text.en: On accomplishment, the following prayer is said:
Alternate translation....

O My Allah! Thou art He Who heard the prayers of Adam and Hawwaa when they said: “O our Lord we did not listen to the voice of our conscience. Now if Thou does not take a lenient view, and have mercy on us, We shall always be among the losers.” And Nooh cried unto Thee, then Thou heard his prayer, and kept him and his companions safe From the terrible catastrophe. Thou put out the fire set burning by Namrood, for Ibraaheem, Thy friend, who came out from it hail and hearty. Thou art He Who heard the prayer of Ayyoob, when he cried unto his Lord: “Truly, I am hard-pressed and concerned by losses and damages, and Thou art Most Merciful of all who show mercy.” Then Thou dispersed hardships that were bothering him gave him back his family, And the like thereof along with them, a mercy from Thy store, and a remembrance for men of understanding. Thou art He Who heard the prayer of Noon (Younus). As soon as he cried unto Thee in the darkness: “There is no god save Thee. Be Thou glorified. Surely I have been a wrong-doer.” Then Thou saved him from anguish. Thou art He Who heard the prayers of Moosa and Haroon, When they called (unto Thee). Thou said, “Your prayer is heard. You two keep to the straight path.” Firawn (Pharoah) and his people were drowned. Thou had forgiven mistakes committed by Dawood, and relented towards him through Thy mercy and glory. Thou ransomed Ismaa-eel with a “Zibhin Azeem” (great sacrifice), when they had both surrendered (to Allah), and he had flung him down upon his face. Then he received the news of joy and relief. Thou art He unto Whom Zakariyya cried, A cry in secret. Saying: “My Lord! Surely my bones are weak and unsteady, my head is full of grey hair, And I have never been deprived of blessings whenever I prayed to Thee, O my Lord.” Thou said: “They cried unto Me in longing and in fear, and were submissive unto Me.” Thou art He Who hears the prayers of those who believe and do good deeds, Gives them more and more of Thy bounties. So count me not among the unimportant (people) who call on and turn to Thee (in vain). Give answer to my prayer just as Thou heard the prayers of those whom Thou found worthy of Thy attention So purify me with Thy purity, Listen to my prayer and supplication, And kindly accept them Make what is left in my life pure and pleasant, and make easy for me my death, Let me make amends and compensate for misdeeds. Protect me. O my Lord! I call upon Thee. Make my children pure and chaste. Surround them with Thy reliable protection, To save them from all that which degrade and humiliate; Children, every one of them to be among Thy close confidants and obedient servants, through Thy mercy. O the Most Merciful, O He who watches over all things, And gives answer to all those who cry unto Him; And is near to all those who make a request. I beseech Thee, O “There is no god save Thou, The Everliving, the Everlasting, One, Independent, Who begets not nor was begotten, and there is none comparable unto Him.” In the name of all (Thy) Names, Thou employed to raise the sky, To spread out the earth, To set up the mountains, To make water run its course, To keep in control the clouds, the sun, the moon, the stars, the nights, And the days, (so that they work as Thou wills); And thus Thou brought into existence all creations. I beseech Thee, In the name of Thy Sublime Glory which lighted up the heavens and the earth. Darkness spread far and wide over them, Unless “Durood” was recited for Muhammad and the children of Muhammad.

Free me from the worries of life in this world and spare me in the other world. Make better all my affairs. Do not let me rely upon my “Nafs” (source of vain desires and passions) for a flash of an eye. Set my affairs right, and affairs of my dependents. Keep away from me sorrows and poverty, Make me independent. Give them from Thy unknown treasures. Multiply Thy favours that do not ever run out. Let my mind know for certain. And stand firm so that it fills me with wisdom that makes me fit for the company of Thy servants. Put me among the God fearing when Thou will send the Last Imam, Just as Thou elected Ibraheem, the beloved one as the Imam, For certainly, with Thy consent and guidance, the chosen successful attain their end; Turn repentant to Thee the penitent; Worship Thee the devotees; With the help of Thy “True Path”, Remain upright the honest, praiseworthy and secluded worshippers, And take refuge with Thee. On account of the direction in the right way, (Thou shows) the relieved save themselves from the fire, and those who remain on guard against evil get mercy and forgiveness. When forsaken by Thee the triers suffer losses, The (transgressing) oppressors are cast into Hell, The careless are neglected.

O my Allah! Give me peace of mind (a restful soul), For Thou controls the soul, and refines him who keeps it pure. O my Allah! Render it clear and let it feel relieved, Overfill it with wisdom and piety, bless it with inner satisfaction, Through Thy mercy, when Thou stimulates it, And let it take quarters in the pleasant surroundings of the exalted sanctuary, Make it noble, Let it grow in substance, and develop, Be kind when its turn comes to depart, And when it reaches the permanent abode, To live there for ever, allow it to dwell in Paradise, Because Thou art its Friend, and its Master. O Allah! Send blessings on Muhammad and on the children of Muhammad.

This prayer consists of four units in each of which Surah <ref=1:1>Al-Fatehah</ref>
 is recited once while Surah <ref=1:112>al-Ekhlas</ref>
 is repeated one hundred times.
text.ar:
صلاة الإمام زين العابدين عليه‌السلام أربَع ركعات كُلّ ركعة <ref=1:1>الفاتحة</ref>
 مَرَّة و <ref=1:112>الإخلاص</ref>
 مائة مَرَّة.

text.en: Imam Zayn al-`Abideen’s Supplication
text.ar: دعاؤه عليه‌السلام :

translation.en: O He Who has shown only goodness
and concealed the evil (deeds of His servants)!
O He Who has not censured for the offenses
and has not exposed the hidden!
O He Who is Ample in pardoning!
O He Who is Excellent in overlooking!
O He Who is Liberal in forgiving!
O He Who opens His hands wide with mercy!
O He Who is present in all confidential talks!
O He Who is the ultimate objective of all complaints!
O He Who is Generous in condonation!
O He Who is greatly hoped!
O He Who takes the initiative in favoring before they are deserved!

segments.transliteration: ya rabbana wa sayyidana wa mawlana

translation.en: O our Lord, our Master, and our Chief!
O He Who is the ultimate of our desires!

segments.arabic: اَسْاَلُكَ ٱللَّهُمَّ اَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: as'aluka allahumma an tusalliya `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: I beseech You, O Allah, to send blessings to Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad.

text.en:
This prayer consists of two units in each of which Surah <ref=1:1>Al-Fatehah</ref>
 is recited once and the following litany is repeated one hundred times:
text.ar:
صلاة الباقِر عليه‌السلام ركعتان كُلّ ركعة <ref=1:1>الفاتحة</ref>
 مَرَّة وسُبْحانَ الله والحَمْدُ للهِ وَلا إِلهَ إِلاّ الله وَالله أكْبَرُ مائة مَرَّة.

translation.en: All glory be to Allah,
all praise be to Allah,
there is no god save Allah,
and Allah is the Greatest.

text.en: Imam al-Baqir’s(as) Supplication
text.ar: دُعاءُ الباقِر عليه‌السلام :

translation.en: O Allah, I beseech You,
O Indulgent, Forbearing,
Forgiving, and Loving-kind,

segments.arabic: اَنْ تَتَجَاوَزَ عَنْ سَيِّئَاتِي وَمَا عِنْدِي

translation.en: to overlook my sins and what I have had,
out of the excellence of what You have,

segments.arabic: وَاَنْ تُعْطِيَنِي مِنْ عَطَائِكَ مَا يَسَعُنِي
segments.transliteration: wa an tu`tiyanee min `ata'ika ma yasa`unee

translation.en: to give me, out of Your giving, that which suffices me,

segments.transliteration: wa tulhimanee feema a`taytanee al`amala feehi

translation.en: to inspire me to act upon what You have given me;
that is to obey You and to obey Your Messenger,
and to give me part of Your pardon
so much so that I ought to have Your honoring.
O Allah, (please) grant me that which befits You

segments.arabic: وَلاَ تَفْعَلْ بِي مَا اَنَا اَهْلُهُ
segments.transliteration: wa la taf`al bee ma ana ahluhu

translation.en: and do not do to me that which I deserve.
Verily, I exist through You

segments.arabic: وَلَمْ اُصِبْ خَيْراً قَطُّ إِلاَّ مِنْكَ
segments.transliteration: wa lam usib khayran qattu illa minka

translation.en: and I have never been given any good thing from any source except You.
O He Who is the best Seer of all those who can see!
O He Who is the best Hearer of all those who can hear!
O He Who is the Justest of all those who judge!
O He Who aids those who seek His aid!
O He Who responds to the prayer of the oppressed!
Send blessings upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad.
translation.fa: بر محمّد و خاندان محمّد درود فرست

text.en:
This prayer consists of two units in each of which Surah <ref=1:1>Al-Fatehah</ref>
 is recited once and ayat <ref=1:3:18>Shahida Allahu</ref>
one hundred times.
text.ar:
صلاة الصّادق عليه‌السلام : ركعتان ، كُلّ ركعةٍ <ref=1:1>الفاتحة</ref>
 مَرَّة و آية <ref=1:3:18>آية (شَهِدَ الله)</ref>
  مائة مَرَّة.

text.en: Imam al-Sadiq’s Supplication
text.ar: دُعاء الصّادق عليه‌السلام :

translation.en: O He Who Makes all made things!
O He Who splints all broken bones!
O He Who is present in all assemblages!
O He Who is the Witness of all confidential talks!
O He Who knows all hidden matters!
O He Who is always present and is never absent!
O He Who is always triumphant and is never defeated!
O He Who is always nigh and is never remote!
O He Who entertains all lonely ones!
O He Who is ever-living, raiser of the dead,
and causing the alive to die!

segments.arabic: ٱلْقَائِمُ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ نَفْسٍ بِمَا كَسَبَتْ

translation.en: O He Who watches every soul as to what it earns!

segments.transliteration: wa ya hayyan heena la hayya

translation.en: O He Who was living when there was nothing existent!
There is no god save You!
(please) send blessings to Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad.
translation.fa: بر محمّد و خاندان محمّد درود فرست

text.en:
This prayer consists of two units in each of which Surah <ref=1:1>Al-Fatehah</ref>
 is recited once and Surah <ref=1:112>al-Ekhlas</ref>
 is repeated twelve times.
text.ar:
صلاة الكاظِم عليه‌السلام ركعتان تقرأ في كُلِّ ركعة <ref=1:1>الفاتحة</ref>
 مَرَّة و <ref=1:112>الإخلاص</ref>
 اثنتي عشرة مَرَّة.

text.en: Imam al-Kazim’s Supplication
text.ar: دُعاؤه عليه‌السلام :

translation.en: O my God, all sounds are submissive to You,
all intellects are too short to recognize You [as exactly as You are],
all things are fearful of You,
all things flee to You,
all things are too tiny in comparison with You,
and Your light fills all things.
Therefore, You are the Exalted in Your majesty,
You are the Luminous in Your splendor,
You are the Great in Your omnipotence,

segments.transliteration: wa anta alladhee la ya'uduka shay'un

translation.en: and You are Whom nothing can tire.
O He Who sends down my bounties!
O He Who relieves my agonies!
O He Who settles my needs!
(please) Give answer to my request,
in the name of ‘There is no god save You’.
I believe in You and I am sincere to You in obedience.

segments.arabic: اَصْبَحْتُ عَلَىٰ عَهْدِكَ وَوَعْدِكَ مَا ٱسْتَطَعْتُ

translation.en: I begin my day keeping my covenant and promise to You as much as I can.
I confess of Your favor to me

segments.arabic: وَاَسْتَغْفِرُكَ مِنَ ٱلذُّنُوبِ الَّتِي لاَ يَغْفِرُهَا غَيْرُكَ
segments.transliteration: wa astaghfiruka mina aldhdhunubi allatee la yaghfiruha ghayruka

translation.en: and I beseech You to forgive my sins that none else can forgive.

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ فِي عُلُوِّهِ دَانٍ

translation.en: O He Who is nigh in His sublimity,
Sublime in His nearness,
Brilliant in His glow,
and Powerful in His [absolute] authority!
(please) Send blessings upon Muhammad and his Household.
translation.fa: درود فرست بر محمد و آلش

text.en:
This prayer consists of six units in each of which Surah <ref=1:1>Al-Fatehah</ref>
 is recited once and Surah <ref=1:76>Al-Insan</ref> 
 is repeated ten times.
text.ar:
صلاة الرِّضا عليه‌السلام : ستّ ركعات كُلّ ركعة <ref=1:1>الفاتحة</ref> 
 مَرَّة و <ref=1:76>الإنسان</ref> 
 عشر مرَّات.

text.en: Imam al-Ridha’s Supplication
text.ar: دُعاؤه عليه‌السلام :

translation.en: O My Companion in my distress!
O My Patron in my bounties!

segments.transliteration: wa ya ilahee wa ilaha ibraheema wa isma`eela

translation.en: O My God and the God of Abraham, Ishmael,
Isaac, and Jacob!

segments.arabic: يَا رَبَّ كٰهٰيٰعصٰ وَيٰس وَٱلْقُرْآنِ ٱلْحَكِيمِ
segments.transliteration: ya rabba kaf-ha'-ya'-`ayn-sad wa ya-seen walqur'ani alhakeemi

translation.en: O Lord of kaf-ha'-ya'-`ayn-sad, ya'-seen, and the Qur'an full of wisdom!
I beseech You—O Most Excellent of all those who may be besought!
O Most Favorite of all those who may be prayed!
O Most Magnanimous of all those who may give!
O Most Preferred of all those who may be hoped!

segments.arabic: اَسْاَلُكَ اَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: as'aluka an tusalliya `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: I beseech You to send blessings to Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad.

text.en:
This prayer consists of two units in each of which Surah <ref=1:1>Al-Fatehah</ref>
 is recited once and Surah <ref=1:112>al-Ekhlas</ref>
 is repeated seventy times.
text.ar:
صلاة الجواد عليه‌السلام ركعتان كُلّ ركعة بِ<ref=1:1>الفاتحة</ref مَرَّة و <ref=1:112>الإخلاص</ref>
 سبعين مَرَّة.

text.en: Imam al-Jawad’s Supplication
text.ar: دُعاؤُه عليه‌السلام :

translation.en: O Allah, Lord of the souls passing away
and the rotten corpses!

segments.arabic: اَسْاَلُكَ بِطَاعَةِ ٱلاَرْوَاحِ ٱلرَّاجِعَةِ إِلَىٰ اَجْسَادِهَا
segments.transliteration: as'aluka bita`ati al-arwahi alrraji`ati ila ajsadiha

translation.en: I beseech You in the name of the obedience of the souls that are restored to their bodies
and the obedience of the corpses that join their veins
and in the name of Your Word that is effective on them
and in the name of Your judging justly among them;
while the [other] creatures are standing before You
awaiting the decisions of Your judgment,
hoping for Your mercy, and fearing Your punishment;
(please do) send blessings to Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,
translation.fa: بر محمّد و خاندان محمّد درود فرست

translation.en: place light in my sight,
strong belief in my heart,
and reference to You night and day on my tongue,
and provide me with a righteous deed.

text.en:
This prayer consists of two units in the first of which Surahs <ref=1:1>Al-Fatehah</ref>
 and <ref=1:36>Yasin</ref>
 are recited and in the second of which Surahs <ref=1:1>Al-Fatehah</ref>
 and <ref=1:55>Al-Rahman</ref>
 are recited.
text.ar:
صلاة الهادي عليه‌السلام ركعتان تقرأ في الأولى <ref=1:1>الفاتحة</ref>
 و <ref=1:36>یس</ref>
 وفي الثّانية <ref=1:1>الفاتحة</ref>
 و <ref=1:55>الرحمن</ref>
.

text.en: Imam al-Hadi’s Ali Naqi as Supplication
text.ar: دُعاؤُهُ عليه‌السلام :

translation.en: O Foremost Beneficent! O Object of Love!
O He Who is the Witness of all unseen things!
O He Who is Nigh without being away (from any other thing)!
O He Who (always) prevails (but) is never overpowered!

segments.arabic: وَيَا مَنْ لاَ يَعْلَمُ كَيْفَ هُوَ إِلاَّ هُوَ
segments.transliteration: wa ya man la ya`lamu kayfa huwa illa huwa

translation.en: O He Whom no one knows how He is except He!
O He Whose authority no one can challenge!
I beseech You, O Allah, in Your name: the Well-Guarded, the Treasured,
the Concealed from whom You will,
the Pure, the Purified, the Holy,
the utter Light,
the Ever-living, the Everlasting, the Greatest,
the Light of the heavens and the Light of the [layers of the] earth,
the Knower of the unseen and the seen
the Highest, the Sublime, the Glorious!
Send blessings upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad.
translation.fa: بر محمّد و خاندان محمّد درود فرست

text.en:
This prayer consists of four units in the first two of which Surah al-Fatihah is recited once and Surah <ref=1:99>Al-Zalzalah</ref>
 is repeated fifteen times, and the last two of which Surah <ref=1:1>Al-Fatehah</ref>
 is recited once and Surah <ref=1:112>al-Ekhlas</ref>
 is repeated fifteen times.
text.ar:
صلاة الحسَن العَسكري عليه‌السلام أربَع ركعات الرّكعتان الأوليان <ref=1:1>الفاتحة</ref>
 مَرَّة و <ref=1:99>الزلزلة</ref>
 خمس عشرة مَرَّة ، والأخيرتان كُلّ ركعة <ref=1:1>الفاتحة</ref>
 مَرَّة و <ref=1:112>الإخلاص</ref>
 خمس عشرة مَرَّة.

text.en: Imam al-`Askari’s Supplication
text.ar: دُعاؤُهُ عليه‌السلام :

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي اَسْاَلُكَ بِاَنَّ لَكَ ٱلْحَمْدَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma innee as'aluka bi-anna laka alhamda

translation.en: O Allah, I beseech You in the name of all praise being to You;
there is no god save You,
[You are] the Premier before all things;
and You are the Ever-living, the Self-Subsistent;
and there is no god save You,
nothing can humiliate You;

segments.transliteration: wa anta kulla yawmin fee sha'nin

translation.en: and You, every moment, are in a state (of glory).
There is no god save You,

segments.arabic: خَالِقُ مَا يُرَىٰ وَمَا لاَ يُرَىٰ
segments.transliteration: khaliqu ma yura wa ma la yura

translation.en: the Creator of what is seen and what cannot be seen,
the Knower of all things without learning;
I beseech You in the name of Your bounties and gratuities
and in the name of Your being Allah, the One Lord,
there is no god save You,
the All-beneficent, the All-merciful;
and I beseech You in the name of Your being Allah;
there is no god save You,
the Unique, the Single,
the One, and the eternally Besought of all,

segments.transliteration: alladhee lam yalid wa lam yulad

translation.en: Who begets not, nor is he begotten,

segments.transliteration: wa lam yakun lahu kufuwan ahadun

translation.en: and none is like Him.
And I beseech You in the name of Your being Allah,
there is no god save You;
the Knower of subtleties, the All-aware,

segments.arabic: ٱلْقَائِمُ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ نَفْسٍ بِمَا كَسَبَتْ

translation.en: Who watches every soul as to what it earns,
the Watcher, the Preserver.
And I beseech You in the name of Your being Allah,
the First before all things,
the Last after all things,
the Knower of all hidden things,
the source of both harm [for those who deserve harm] and benefit,
the All-wise, and All-knowing.
And I beseech You in the name of Your being Allah,
there is no god save You,
the Ever-living, the Self-Subsistent,
the Resurrector, the Inheritor,
the All-tender, the All-favorer,
the Fashioner of the heavens and the earth,
the Lord of majesty and honor,

segments.arabic: وَذُو ٱلطَّوْلِ وَذُو ٱلْعِزَّةِ وَذُو ٱلسُّلْطَانِ
segments.transliteration: wa dhulttawli wa dhul`izzati wa dhulssultani

translation.en: and the Lord of bounty, dignity, and absolute authority.
There is no god save You;
You encompass all things with knowledge,
and You record the number of all things;
(please) send blessings to Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad.
translation.fa: بر محمّد و خاندان محمّد درود فرست

text.en:
This prayer consists of two units in each of which Surah <ref=1:1>Al-Fatehah</ref>
 is recited once but the following ayah (verse) is repeated one hundred times:
text.ar:
صلاة الحُجّة القائِم عجَّلَ الله تعالى فَرجَهُ الشريف ودعاؤه : ركعتان تقرأ في كُلِّ ركعة <ref=1:1>الفاتحة</ref>
 الكتاب إلى

translation.en: You do we worship, and Yours aid we seek.

text.en: Then, Surah al-Tawheed is recited once.
text.ar: وتقرأ بعدها الاخلاص

text.en: Imam al-Mahdi’s Supplication
text.ar: ودعاؤه :

translation.en: O Allah, unbearable is our tribulation!
The hidden has been disclosed!
The cover has been exposed!

segments.transliteration: wa dhaqat al-ardhu bima wasa`at alssama'u

translation.en: The earth has become too narrow to carry that which could be embraced by the sky.
To You, my Lord, is the complaint
and in You is the trust in sorrow and in joy.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: O Allah, send blessings to Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad
translation.fa: خدایا درود فرست بر محمد و آل محمد

translation.en: whom You have commanded us to obey,
and hasten their Relief through the Rising Imam among them;
and make manifest Your fortifying him.
O Muhammad! O `Ali!
O `Ali! O Muhammad!
Save me, for you both are true saviors of me.
O Muhammad! O `Ali!
O `Ali! O Muhammad!
Aid me, for you both are true aides of me.
O Muhammad! O `Ali!
O `Ali! O Muhammad!
Protect me, for you both are true protectors of me.
O my master, the Patron of the Age!
O my master, the Patron of the Age!
O my master, the Patron of the Age!
Help, help, help!
[come to] succor me, [come to] succor me, [come to] succor me!
[grant me] security, [grant me] security, [grant me] security!

text.en: Within the recommended rites on Fridays, Shaykh al-Tusi, in his book of Misbah al-Mutahajjid, has mentioned the following from Imam Hasan Askari (peace be upon him):
text.ar: قال الطوسي في المصباح في خلال أعمال يوم الجمعة : أخبرنا جماعة من أصحابنا عن أبي المفضل الشيباني قال : حدثنا أبو محمد عبد الله بن محمد العابد بالدالية لفظا قال : سألت مولاي الإمام الحسن العسكري عليه‌السلام في منزله بسر من رأى سنة خمس وخمسين ومائتين يملي عليّ الصَّلاة على النبي وأوصيائه عليه وعليهم السلام وأحضرت معي قرطاساً كَبِيراً ، فأملى عليّ لفظا من غير كتاب وقال : أكتب.

text.en: Salawaat Upon the Holy Prophet(peace and blessings be upon him and his family)
text.ar: الصَّلاة على النبي صلى‌الله‌عليه‌وآله

translation.en: O Allah, (please) bless Muhammad
translation.fa: خدایا درود فرست بر محمّد

translation.en: as he bore Your revelations
and conveyed Your messages.
And (please) bless Muhammad
as he declared lawful that which You deemed lawful,
forbade that which You deemed unlawful,
and taught Your Book (to people).
And (please) bless Muhammad
as he performed the prayers,
defrayed the poor-rate,
and called to Your religion.
And (please) bless Muhammad
for he gave credence to Your promise
and feared Your threat.
And (please) bless Muhammad
as You, for his sake, forgave sins,
concealed defects,
and relieved agonies.
And (please) bless Muhammad
as You, for his sake, warded off misery,
relieved grievances,
responded to prayers,
and saved from misfortunes.
And (please) bless Muhammad
as You, for his sake, had mercy on the servants,
restored lands into life,
trashed the tyrants,
and obliterated the despots.
And (please) bless Muhammad
as You, for his sake, multiplied fortunes,
protected against terrors,
broke the idols,
and had mercy upon the human beings.
And (please) bless Muhammad
as You sent him with the best of all religions,
strengthened the faith through him,
broke into pieces the idols though him,
and poured tribute on the Holy House.
And (please) bless Muhammad
and his Household the immaculate and virtuous
and send thorough benedictions on them.

text.en: Within the recommended rites on Fridays, Shaykh al-Tusi, in his book of Misbah al-Mutahajjid, has mentioned the following from Imam Hasan Askari (peace be upon him):
text.ar: قال الطوسي في المصباح في خلال أعمال يوم الجمعة : أخبرنا جماعة من أصحابنا عن أبي المفضل الشيباني قال : حدثنا أبو محمد عبد الله بن محمد العابد بالدالية لفظا قال : سألت مولاي الإمام الحسن العسكري عليه‌السلام في منزله بسر من رأى سنة خمس وخمسين ومائتين يملي عليّ الصَّلاة على النبي وأوصيائه عليه وعليهم السلام وأحضرت معي قرطاساً كَبِيراً ، فأملى عليّ لفظا من غير كتاب وقال : أكتب.

text.en: Salawaat Upon Imam Ali(peace be upon him)
text.ar: الصَّلاة على أمير المؤمنين عليه‌السلام :

translation.en: O Allah, (please do) send blessings upon the Commander of the Faithful
`Ali the son of Abu-Talib,
the brother, ally,
choice, and patron of Your Prophet,
the store of his knowledge,
the depot of his secrets,
the door to his wisdom,
the spokesman with his arguments,
the caller to his code of law,
his viceroy in his community,
the reliever of agonies from his face,
the terminator of the infidels,
and the conqueror on the wicked ones;
You have made him, with regard to his position to Your Prophet,
occupy the same position that (Prophet) Aaron enjoyed with (Prophet) Moses.
O Allah, (please do) give support to any one who supports him,
be the enemy of every one who antagonizes him,
give victory to any one who gives him his victory,
disappoint every one who disappoints him,
and lay curse on any one who incurs the hostility of him
from the past and the coming generations.
And (please do) bless him with the best blessings
that You have ever poured on any of Your Prophet’s successors.
O Lord of the worlds!

text.en: Within the recommended rites on Fridays, Shaykh al-Tusi, in his book of Misbah al-Mutahajjid, has mentioned the following from Imam Hasan Askari (peace be upon him):
text.ar: قال الطوسي في المصباح في خلال أعمال يوم الجمعة : أخبرنا جماعة من أصحابنا عن أبي المفضل الشيباني قال : حدثنا أبو محمد عبد الله بن محمد العابد بالدالية لفظا قال : سألت مولاي الإمام الحسن العسكري عليه‌السلام في منزله بسر من رأى سنة خمس وخمسين ومائتين يملي عليّ الصَّلاة على النبي وأوصيائه عليه وعليهم السلام وأحضرت معي قرطاساً كَبِيراً ، فأملى عليّ لفظا من غير كتاب وقال : أكتب.

text.en: Salawaat Upon Lady Fatima(peace be upon her)
text.ar: الصَّلاة على سيدة النساء فاطمة عليه‌السلام :

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ ٱلصِّدِّيقَةِ فَاطِمَةَ ٱلزَّكِيَّةِ

translation.en: O Allah, (please) send blessings upon the veracious and immaculate lady Fatimah
the most beloved by Your dearest and Prophet
and the mother of Your dearest and choice ones.
You have selected, given preference to,
and chosen her from among the women of the worlds (i.e. ages).

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ كُنِ ٱلطَّالِبَ لَهَا مِمَّنْ ظَلَمَهَا
segments.transliteration: allahumma kun alttaliba laha mimman zalamaha

translation.en: O Allah, be her representative against those who wronged her
and belittled her right.

segments.transliteration: wa kun alththa'ira allahumma bidami awladiha

translation.en: Be, O Allah, the One Who shall  revenge upon those who shed the blood of her descendants.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ وَكَمَا جَعَلْتَهَا أُمَّ أَئِمَّةِ ٱلْهُدَىٰ
segments.transliteration: allahumma wa kama ja`altaha umma a'immati alhuda

translation.en: O Allah, just as You have chosen her to be the mother of the Leaders of Guidance,
the wife of the Bearer of the Pennon,
and the most honored lady with the Highest Group,
so (please) do endow her and her mother
with such blessings that confer honor upon her father
Muhammad, Allah's blessings be upon him,
and delight the eyes of her offspring.
And (please) convey to them, at this very hour,
the most excellent greeting and salutation from me.

name: Salwaat on Imam Hassan(as) & Imam Hussain(as)

text.en: Within the recommended rites on Fridays, Shaykh al-Tusi, in his book of Misbah al-Mutahajjid, has mentioned the following from Imam Hasan Askari (peace be upon him):
text.ar: قال الطوسي في المصباح في خلال أعمال يوم الجمعة : أخبرنا جماعة من أصحابنا عن أبي المفضل الشيباني قال : حدثنا أبو محمد عبد الله بن محمد العابد بالدالية لفظا قال : سألت مولاي الإمام الحسن العسكري عليه‌السلام في منزله بسر من رأى سنة خمس وخمسين ومائتين يملي عليّ الصَّلاة على النبي وأوصيائه عليه وعليهم السلام وأحضرت معي قرطاساً كَبِيراً ، فأملى عليّ لفظا من غير كتاب وقال : أكتب.

text.en: Salawaat Upon Imam Hasan and Imam Husain(peace be upon them)
text.ar: الصَّلاة على الحسن والحسين عليهما‌السلام :

translation.en: O Allah, (please) send blessings upon al-Hasan and al-Husayn,
Your two servants and friends,
the two sons of Your Messengers, the two grandsons of Mercy,
and the two chiefs of the youth of Paradise,

segments.arabic: أَفْضَلَ مَا صَلَّيْتَ عَلَىٰ أَحَدٍ مِنْ أَوْلاَدِ ٱلنَّبِيِّينَ وَٱلْمُرْسَلِينَ
segments.transliteration: afdala ma sallayta `ala ahadin min awladi alnnabiyyina walmursalina

translation.en: with the most excellent blessings that You have ever sent upon any of the sons of the Prophets and the Messengers.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ ٱلْحَسَنِ ٱبْنِ سَيِّدِ ٱلنَّبِيِّينَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala alhasani ibni sayyidi alnnabiyyina

translation.en: O Allah, (please) send blessings upon al-Hasan the son of the chief of the Prophets
and the successor of the Commander of the Faithful.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ رَسُولِ ٱللَّهِ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O son of Allah's Messenger.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ سَيِّدِ ٱلْوَصِيِّينَ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O son of the chief of the Prophets’ successors.

segments.arabic: أَشْهَدُ أَنَّكَ يَا بْنَ أَمِيرِ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ

translation.en: I bear witness that you are verily the son of the Commander of the Faithful,
the trustee of Allah, and the son of His trustee.
You lived upright and persecuted
and passed away as martyr.
And I bear witness that you are verily the pure,
guiding, and well-guided leader.
O Allah, (please) send blessings upon him
and convey to his soul and body

segments.arabic: فِي هٰذِهِ ٱلسَّاعَةِ أَفْضَلَ ٱلتَّحِيَّةِ وَٱلسَّلاَمِ
segments.transliteration: fi hadhihi alssa`ati afdala alttahiyyati walssalami

translation.en: at this hour the best greeting and salutation from me.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ ٱلْحُسَيْنِ بْنِ عَلِيٍّ

translation.en: O Allah, (please) send blessings upon al-Husayn the son of `Ali,
the oppressed, the martyr,
the slain by the unbelievers, and the thrown down by the sinful people.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا أَبَا عَبْدِ ٱللَّهِ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O Abu-`Abdullah.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ رَسُولِ ٱللَّهِ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O son of Allah's Messenger.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ أَمِيرِ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O son of the Commander of the Faithful.

segments.arabic: أَشْهَدُ مُوقِناً أَنَّكَ أَمِينُ ٱللَّهِ وَٱبْنُ أَمِينِهِ
segments.transliteration: ashhadu muqinan annaka aminu allahi wabnu aminihi

translation.en: I bear witness with full conviction that you are verily the trustee of Allah and the son of His trustee.
You were killed wrongly and you passed away as martyr.

segments.arabic: وَأَشْهَدُ أَنَّ ٱللَّهَ تَعَالَىٰ ٱلطَّالِبُ بِثَأْرِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa ashhadu anna allaha ta`ala alttalibu bitha'rika

translation.en: I also bear witness that Allah the All-exalted is the One Who shall avenge You

segments.arabic: وَمُنْجِزٌ مَا وَعَدَكَ مِنَ ٱلنَّصْرِ وَٱلتَّأْيِيدِ
segments.transliteration: wa munjizun ma wa`adaka min alnnasri waltta'yidi

translation.en: and shall fulfill His promise to You of support and victory
through exterminating your enemies and demonstrating your call (to the true guidance).

segments.transliteration: wa ashhadu annaka wafayta bi`ahdi allahi

translation.en: I also bear witness that you fulfilled your covenant with Allah,
strove hard for His sake,

segments.arabic: وَعَبَدْتَ ٱللَّهَ مُخْلِصاً حَتَّىٰ أَتَاكَ ٱلْيَقِينُ
segments.transliteration: wa `abadta allaha mukhlisan hatta ataka alyaqinu

translation.en: and served Allah sincerely until death came upon you.
May Allah curse the people who killed you.
May Allah curse the people who disappointed you.
May Allah curse the people who incited people against you.

segments.arabic: وَأَبْرَأُ إِلَىٰ ٱللَّهِ تَعَالَىٰ مَمَّنْ كَذَّبَكَ
segments.transliteration: wa abra'u ila allahi ta`ala mamman kadhdhabaka

translation.en: I release myself before Allah the All-exalted from those who belied you,

segments.transliteration: wa istakhaffa bihaqqika wa istahalla damaka

translation.en: belittled your right, and allowed themselves to shed your blood.

segments.arabic: بِأَبِي أَنْتَ وَأُمِّي يَا أَبَا عَبْدِ ٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: bi'abi anta wa ummi ya aba `abdi allahi

translation.en: May my father and mother be ransoms for you.
Allah's curse be on those who killed you.
Allah's curse be on those who let you down.

segments.arabic: وَلَعَنَ ٱللَّهُ مَنْ سَمِعَ وَاعِيَتَكَ فَلَمْ يُجِبْكَ وَلَمْ يَنْصُرْكَ
segments.transliteration: wa la`ana allahu man sami`a wa`iyataka falam yujibka wa lam yansurka

translation.en: Allah's curse be on those who heard your call (for help), but they refrained from responding to you or supporting you.

segments.transliteration: wa la`ana allahu man saba nisa'aka

translation.en: Allah's curse be on those who captured your women.

segments.arabic: أَنَا إِلَىٰ ٱللَّهِ مِنْهُمْ بَرِيءٌ وَمِمَّنْ وَالاَهُمْ
segments.transliteration: ana ila allahi minhum bari'un wa mimman walahum

translation.en: I disavow them all before Allah and disavow those who adhered to them,
those who kept up with them, and those who helped them against you.

segments.arabic: وَأَشْهَدُ أَنَّكَ وَٱلأَئِمَّةَ مِنْ وُلْدِكَ كَلِمَةُ ٱلتَّقْوَىٰ
segments.transliteration: wa ashhadu annaka wal-a'immata min wuldika kalimatu alttaqwai

translation.en: I also bear witness that you and the Imams from your descendants are the word of piety,
the door to true guidance, the firmest handle,
and the argument against the inhabitants of this world.
I also bear witness that I have full faith in you,
I have conviction in your standing,
and I always follow you in myself,
in the laws of my religion, in my sealing deeds,

segments.transliteration: wa munqalabi wa mathwaya fi dunyaya wa akhirati

translation.en: in my tour, and in my settlement in this worldly life and the Hereafter.

text.en: Within the recommended rites on Fridays, Shaykh al-Tusi, in his book of Misbah al-Mutahajjid, has mentioned the following from Imam Hasan Askari (peace be upon him):
text.ar: قال الطوسي في المصباح في خلال أعمال يوم الجمعة : أخبرنا جماعة من أصحابنا عن أبي المفضل الشيباني قال : حدثنا أبو محمد عبد الله بن محمد العابد بالدالية لفظا قال : سألت مولاي الإمام الحسن العسكري عليه‌السلام في منزله بسر من رأى سنة خمس وخمسين ومائتين يملي عليّ الصَّلاة على النبي وأوصيائه عليه وعليهم السلام وأحضرت معي قرطاساً كَبِيراً ، فأملى عليّ لفظا من غير كتاب وقال : أكتب.

text.en: Salawaat Upon Imam Ali ibn Husain Zayn-ul-Abideen
text.ar: الصَّلاة على علي بن الحسين عليهما‌السلام :

text.en: the Ornament of the Worshippers (peace be upon him)
text.ar: زین العابدین

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ عَلِيِّ بْنِ ٱلْحُسَيْنِ

translation.en: O Allah, (please) send blessings upon `Ali the son of al-Husayn
the chief of worshippers
whom You have purely dedicated to Yourself
and brought forth from him the Leaders of True Guidance

segments.transliteration: alladhina yahduna bilhaqqi wa bihi ya`diluna

translation.en: who guide to the truth and judge with it.
You have chosen him for Yourself,
purified him against filth,
selected him, and made him guide and well-guided.
O Allah, send blessings upon him
with the most excellent blessings that You have ever sent upon any
of Your Prophets' offspring

segments.arabic: حَتَّىٰ تَبْلُغَ بِهِ مَا تَقَرُّ بِهِ عَيْنُهُ فِي ٱلدُّنْيَا وَٱلآخِرَةِ
segments.transliteration: hatta tablugha bihi ma taqarru bihi `aynuhu fi alddunya wal-akhirati

translation.en: so that these blessings raise him to what delights his eye in this world and the Hereafter.
You are verily Almighty and Wise.

text.en: Within the recommended rites on Fridays, Shaykh al-Tusi, in his book of Misbah al-Mutahajjid, has mentioned the following from Imam Hasan Askari (peace be upon him):
text.ar: قال الطوسي في المصباح في خلال أعمال يوم الجمعة : أخبرنا جماعة من أصحابنا عن أبي المفضل الشيباني قال : حدثنا أبو محمد عبد الله بن محمد العابد بالدالية لفظا قال : سألت مولاي الإمام الحسن العسكري عليه‌السلام في منزله بسر من رأى سنة خمس وخمسين ومائتين يملي عليّ الصَّلاة على النبي وأوصيائه عليه وعليهم السلام وأحضرت معي قرطاساً كَبِيراً ، فأملى عليّ لفظا من غير كتاب وقال : أكتب.

text.en: Salawaat Upon Imam Mohammed ibn Ali al-Baqir
text.ar: الصَّلاة على محمد بن علي عليه‌السلام :

text.en: the Cleaver of Knowledge (peace be upon him)
text.ar: باقر العلوم

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عَلِيٍّ

translation.en: O Allah, (please) send blessings upon Muhammad the son of `Ali
the splitter of knowledge, the leader to true guidance,
the chief of the people of piety,
and the superbly selected from among Your servants.
O Allah, as You have made him sign for Your servants,
lantern in Your lands,
depot of Your wisdom,
and interpreter of Your revelations,
and You ordered (us) to obey him,
warned (us) against disobeying him;
so also (please), O Lord, send blessings upon him
with the most excellent blessings that You have ever sent upon any
of the offspring of Your Prophets, Elite Ones,
Messengers, and trustees.
O Lord of the worlds!

text.en: Within the recommended rites on Fridays, Shaykh al-Tusi, in his book of Misbah al-Mutahajjid, has mentioned the following from Imam Hasan Askari (peace be upon him):
text.ar: قال الطوسي في المصباح في خلال أعمال يوم الجمعة : أخبرنا جماعة من أصحابنا عن أبي المفضل الشيباني قال : حدثنا أبو محمد عبد الله بن محمد العابد بالدالية لفظا قال : سألت مولاي الإمام الحسن العسكري عليه‌السلام في منزله بسر من رأى سنة خمس وخمسين ومائتين يملي عليّ الصَّلاة على النبي وأوصيائه عليه وعليهم السلام وأحضرت معي قرطاساً كَبِيراً ، فأملى عليّ لفظا من غير كتاب وقال : أكتب.

text.en: Salawaat on Imam Jafar ibn Mohammed A.S.
text.ar: الصَّلاة على جعفر بن محمد عليه‌السلام :

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ جَعْفَرِ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ ٱلصَّادِقِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala ja`fari bni muhammadin alssadiqi

translation.en: O Allah, (please) send blessings upon Ja`far the son of Muhammad the veracious,
the treasure of knowledge,
the caller to You with the truth,
and the manifest light.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ وَكَمَا جَعَلْتَهُ مَعْدِنَ كَلاَمِكَ وَوَحْيِكَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma wa kama ja`altahu ma`dina kalamika wa wahyika

translation.en: O Allah, as You have made him the core of Your words and revelations,
the treasure of Your knowledge,
the spokesman of the profession of Your Oneness,
the authorized to undertake Your mission,
and the keeper of Your religion,
so also (please) send blessings upon him
with the most excellent blessings that You have ever sent upon any
of Your elite people and arguments.
Verily, You are full of praise, full or glory.

name: Salwaat on Imam Musa Al Kadhim(as)

text.en: Within the recommended rites on Fridays, Shaykh al-Tusi, in his book of Misbah al-Mutahajjid, has mentioned the following from Imam Hasan Askari (peace be upon him):
text.ar: قال الطوسي في المصباح في خلال أعمال يوم الجمعة : أخبرنا جماعة من أصحابنا عن أبي المفضل الشيباني قال : حدثنا أبو محمد عبد الله بن محمد العابد بالدالية لفظا قال : سألت مولاي الإمام الحسن العسكري عليه‌السلام في منزله بسر من رأى سنة خمس وخمسين ومائتين يملي عليّ الصَّلاة على النبي وأوصيائه عليه وعليهم السلام وأحضرت معي قرطاساً كَبِيراً ، فأملى عليّ لفظا من غير كتاب وقال : أكتب.

text.en: Salawaat Upon Imam Musa ibn Jafar al-Kadhim
text.ar: الصَّلاة على موسى بن جعفر عليه‌السلام :

text.en: the Tranquil One (peace be upon him)
text.ar: الکاظم علیه السلام

translation.en: O Allah, (please) send blessings upon the honest and trusted
Musa the son of Ja`far,
the dutiful, the faithful,
the pure, the bright,
the clear light,
the striver, the seeker of Your rewards,
and the bearer of harm for Your sake.
O Allah, as he conveyed on the authority of his fathers

segments.transliteration: ma istudi`a min amrika wa nahyika

translation.en: all Your orders and prohibitions that were deposited with him,
directed (people) to the clear course,
and had to encounter the people of authority and persecution

segments.arabic: فِيمَا كَانَ يَلْقَىٰ مِنْ جُهَّالِ قَوْمِهِ
segments.transliteration: fima kana yalqa min juhhali qawmihi

translation.en: while he was facing troubles from the ignorant people,
so, O Lord, bless him
with the most favorite and most perfect
blessings that You have ever conferred
upon any one who obeyed You and wished well for Your servants.
You are verily All-forgiving, All-merciful.

text.en: Within the recommended rites on Fridays, Shaykh al-Tusi, in his book of Misbah al-Mutahajjid, has mentioned the following from Imam Hasan Askari (peace be upon him):
text.ar: قال الطوسي في المصباح في خلال أعمال يوم الجمعة : أخبرنا جماعة من أصحابنا عن أبي المفضل الشيباني قال : حدثنا أبو محمد عبد الله بن محمد العابد بالدالية لفظا قال : سألت مولاي الإمام الحسن العسكري عليه‌السلام في منزله بسر من رأى سنة خمس وخمسين ومائتين يملي عليّ الصَّلاة على النبي وأوصيائه عليه وعليهم السلام وأحضرت معي قرطاساً كَبِيراً ، فأملى عليّ لفظا من غير كتاب وقال : أكتب.

text.en: Salawaat on Imam Ali ibn Musa Al Ridha A.S.
text.ar: الصلاة على علي بن موسى عليه‌السلام :

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ عَلِيِّ بْنِ مُوسَىٰ

translation.en: O Allah, (please) send blessings upon `Ali the son of Musa

segments.arabic: ٱلَّذِي ٱرْتَضَيْتَهُ وَرَضَّيْتَ بِهِ مَنْ شِئْتَ مِنْ خَلْقِكَ
segments.transliteration: alladhi irtadaytahu wa raddayta bihi man shi'ta min khalqika

translation.en: whom You have accepted and through whom You have satisfied whomever of Your creatures that You wish.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ وَكَمَا جَعَلْتَهُ حُجَّةً عَلَىٰ خَلْقِكَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma wa kama ja`altahu hujjatan `ala khalqika

translation.en: O Allah, as You have made him act as argument against Your creatures,
undertake the mission by Your command,
support Your religion,
witness against Your servants,

segments.arabic: وَكَمَا نَصَحَ لَهُمْ فِي ٱلسِّرِ وَٱلْعَلاَنِيَةِ
segments.transliteration: wa kama nasaha lahum fi alssirri wal`alaniyati

translation.en: and as he acted sincerely towards them in secret and in open
and called to Your way
with wisdom and excellent exhortation,
so also (please) bless him
with the most favorite blessings that You have ever bestowed

segments.transliteration: min awliya'ika wa khiyaratika min khalqika

translation.en: upon any of Your intimate servants and Your choice ones over Your creatures.
Verily, You are All-magnanimous, All-generous.

text.en: Within the recommended rites on Fridays, Shaykh al-Tusi, in his book of Misbah al-Mutahajjid, has mentioned the following from Imam Hasan Askari (peace be upon him):
text.ar: قال الطوسي في المصباح في خلال أعمال يوم الجمعة : أخبرنا جماعة من أصحابنا عن أبي المفضل الشيباني قال : حدثنا أبو محمد عبد الله بن محمد العابد بالدالية لفظا قال : سألت مولاي الإمام الحسن العسكري عليه‌السلام في منزله بسر من رأى سنة خمس وخمسين ومائتين يملي عليّ الصَّلاة على النبي وأوصيائه عليه وعليهم السلام وأحضرت معي قرطاساً كَبِيراً ، فأملى عليّ لفظا من غير كتاب وقال : أكتب.

text.en: Salawaat Upon Imam Mohammed ibn Ali al-Jawad
text.ar: الصَّلاة على محمد بن علي بن موسى عليه‌السلام :

text.en: the Generous One (peace be upon him)
text.ar: الجواد علیه السلام

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عَلِيِّ بْنِ مُوسَىٰ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala muhammadi bni `aliyyi bni musa

translation.en: O Allah, (please) send blessings upon Muhammad the son of `Ali the son of Musa,
the epitome of piety,
the illumination of true guidance,
the essence of faithfulness,
the branch of the bright ones,
the vicegerent of the Successors,
and Your trustee on Your revelations.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ فَكَمَا هَدَيْتَ بِهِ مِنَ ٱلضَّلاَلَةِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma fakama hadayta bihi min alddalalati

translation.en: O Allah, as You have guided through him against straying off,
saved against confusion,
directed those who were rightly guided,
and purified those who were purified,
so also (please) bless him
with the most favorite blessings that You have ever conferred
upon any of Your intimate servants and agents of Your Successors.
Verily, You are Almighty, All-wise.

text.en: Within the recommended rites on Fridays, Shaykh al-Tusi, in his book of Misbah al-Mutahajjid, has mentioned the following from Imam Hasan Askari (peace be upon him):
text.ar: قال الطوسي في المصباح في خلال أعمال يوم الجمعة : أخبرنا جماعة من أصحابنا عن أبي المفضل الشيباني قال : حدثنا أبو محمد عبد الله بن محمد العابد بالدالية لفظا قال : سألت مولاي الإمام الحسن العسكري عليه‌السلام في منزله بسر من رأى سنة خمس وخمسين ومائتين يملي عليّ الصَّلاة على النبي وأوصيائه عليه وعليهم السلام وأحضرت معي قرطاساً كَبِيراً ، فأملى عليّ لفظا من غير كتاب وقال : أكتب.

text.en: Salawaat Upon Imam Ali ibn Mohammed al-Hadi
text.ar: الصَّلاة على علي بن محمد عليه‌السلام :

text.en: the Guide (peace be upon him)
text.ar: النقی علیه السلام

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ عَلِيِّ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ

translation.en: O Allah, (please) send blessings upon `Ali the son of Muhammad,
the successor of the Successors,
the leader of the pious,
the descendant of the leaders of the religion,
and the argument against all of the creatures.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ كَمَا جَعَلْتَهُ نُوراً يَسْتَضِيءُ بِهِ ٱلْمُؤْمِنُونَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma kama ja`altahu nuran yastadi'u bihi almu'minuna

translation.en: O Allah, as You have made him the source of light from which the believers derive light,
and so he conveyed the good tidings of Your abundant reward,
warned against Your painful punishment,
notified against Your prowess,
reminded of Your sings,
rendered legal that which You have deemed legal,
rendered illegal that which You have deemed illegal,
explained Your laws and the duties towards You,
encouraged on servitude to You,
enjoined obedience to You,
and forbade disobedience to You,
so also (please) bless him
with the most favorite blessings that You have ever bestowed
upon any of Your intimate servants and descendants of Your Prophets.
O God of the Worlds!

text.en: Within the recommended rites on Fridays, Shaykh al-Tusi, in his book of Misbah al-Mutahajjid, has mentioned the following from Imam Hasan Askari (peace be upon him):
text.ar: قال الطوسي في المصباح في خلال أعمال يوم الجمعة : أخبرنا جماعة من أصحابنا عن أبي المفضل الشيباني قال : حدثنا أبو محمد عبد الله بن محمد العابد بالدالية لفظا قال : سألت مولاي الإمام الحسن العسكري عليه‌السلام في منزله بسر من رأى سنة خمس وخمسين ومائتين يملي عليّ الصَّلاة على النبي وأوصيائه عليه وعليهم السلام وأحضرت معي قرطاساً كَبِيراً ، فأملى عليّ لفظا من غير كتاب وقال : أكتب.

text.en: Salawaat Upon Imam Hasan ibn Ali al-Askari(peace be upon him)
text.ar: الصَّلاة على الحسن بن علي بن محمد عليه‌السلام :

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ ٱلْحَسَنِ بْنِ عَلِيِّ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala alhasani bni `aliyyi bni muhammadin

translation.en: O Allah, (please) send blessings upon al-Hasan the son of `Ali the son of Muhammad,
the dutiful, the pious,
the honest, the faithful,
the shining light,
the hoarder of Your knowledge,
the reminder of the profession of Your Oneness,
the authorized to undertake Your mission,
the descendant of the leaders of the religion
who are rightly guiding and rightly directing,
and the argument against the inhabitants of this world.
So, bless him, O my Lord,
with the most favorite blessings that You have ever bestowed

segments.transliteration: min asfiya'ika wa hujajika wa awladi rusulika

translation.en: upon any of Your elite persons, argument-persons, and descendants of Your Messengers.
O God of the worlds!

text.en: Within the recommended rites on Fridays, Shaykh al-Tusi, in his book of Misbah al-Mutahajjid, has mentioned the following from Imam Hasan Askari (peace be upon him):
text.ar: قال الطوسي في المصباح في خلال أعمال يوم الجمعة : أخبرنا جماعة من أصحابنا عن أبي المفضل الشيباني قال : حدثنا أبو محمد عبد الله بن محمد العابد بالدالية لفظا قال : سألت مولاي الإمام الحسن العسكري عليه‌السلام في منزله بسر من رأى سنة خمس وخمسين ومائتين يملي عليّ الصَّلاة على النبي وأوصيائه عليه وعليهم السلام وأحضرت معي قرطاساً كَبِيراً ، فأملى عليّ لفظا من غير كتاب وقال : أكتب.

text.en: Salawaat Upon Imam Mahdi
text.ar: الصَّلاة على ولي الأمر المنتظر عليه‌السلام :

text.en: the Awaited One (peace be upon him)
text.ar: المهدی علیه السلام

translation.en: O Allah, bless Your vicegerent
and the son of Your vicegerents the obedience to whom You have made incumbent upon us,
the observance of whose right You have made obligatory,
from whom You have removed filth,
and whom You have purified with thorough purifying.
O Allah, give him victory and make him the supporter of Your religion
and through him, give victory to Your and his adherents,
followers, and backers,
and include us with them.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ أَعِذْهُ مِنْ شَرِّ كُلِّ بَاغٍ وَطَاغٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma a`idhhu min sharri kulli baghin wa taghin

translation.en: O Allah, protect him against the evil of every transgressor and tyrant
and against the evils of all Your creatures.

segments.arabic: وَٱحْفَظْهُ مِنْ بَيْنَ يَدَيْهِ وَمِنْ خَلْفِهِ
segments.transliteration: wahfazhu min bayni yadayhi wa min khalfihi

translation.en: Guard him from ahead of him, behind him,
his right side, and his left side.

segments.arabic: وَٱحْرُسْهُ وَٱمْنَعْهُ مِنْ أَنْ يوُصَلَ إِلَيْهِ بِسُوءٍ
segments.transliteration: wahrus-hu wamna`hu min an yusala ilayhi bisu'in

translation.en: Watch him and defend him against anything that may cause evil to him.

segments.transliteration: wahfaz fihi rasulaka wa ala rasulika

translation.en: Save through him Your Messenger and the family of Your Messenger.
Manifest justice through him.
Aid him with victory.
Help his backers.
Frustrate those who intend to disappoint him.
And, through him, terminate the tyrants of unbelief,
kill the disbelievers, hypocrites,
and all atheists,

segments.arabic: حَيْثُ كَانُوٱ مِنْ مَشَارِقِ ٱلأَرْضِ وَمَغَارِبِهَا
segments.transliteration: haythu kanu min mashariqi al-ardi wa magharibiha

translation.en: wherever they are; in the east or the west of the earth,
on the lands or in the oceans,
and, through him, fill in the earth with justice,
manifest the religion of Your Prophet,
peace be upon him and his Household,

segments.transliteration: waj`alni allahumma min ansarihi wa a`wanihi

translation.en: make me, O Allah, of his supporters, helpers,
followers, and adherents,

segments.arabic: وَأَرِنِي فِي آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ مَا يَأْمُلُونَ
segments.transliteration: wa arini fi ali muhammadin ma ya'muluna

translation.en: allow me to see what the family of Muhammad hope come true
and what their enemies anticipate come true.
O God of Truth, respond.

name: Friday Salwaat and ziarat on Ahlulbayt(as)

text.en: Friday- Ziyarat/ Salwat Ahlulbayt(as)
text.ar: زيارة النبي صلى‌الله‌عليه‌وآله والائمّة عليهم‌السلام يوم الجمعة

text.en: Shaykh al-Tusi, in Misbah al-Mutahajjid, and Sayyid Ibn Tawus, in Jamal al-Usbu`, have mentioned within the recommended acts on Fridays that it is recommended to visit the Holy Prophet (peace and blessing on him and his family) and the Holy Imams (peace be upon them) on Fridays.
text.ar: قال الشيخ في (المصباح) والسيد في (جمال الأسبوع) في ضمن أعمال يوم الجمعة : إعلم أنّه يستحب في يوم الجمعة زيارة النبي صلى‌الله‌عليه‌وآله والأئمة عليهم‌السلام.

text.en: Imam Ja`far al-Sadiq (peace be upon him) is reported to have said that one who intends to visit the tombs of the Holy Prophet, Imam `Ali Amir al-Mu'minin, Lady Fatimah al-Zahra', Imam al-Hasan, Imam al-Husayn, and the Holy Imams (peace be upon them all) while he is in a remote place may bathe himself on Friday, put on two clean garbs, go to a desert, -or go up to a housetop, according to another narration- and then offer a four unit prayer reciting any Surah he can recite.
text.ar: وروي عن الصادق عليه‌السلام أن من أراد أن يزور قبر رسول الله وقبر أمير المؤمنين وفاطمة والحسن والحسين وقبور الحجج عليهم‌السلام وهو في بلدة فليغتسل في يوم الجمعة وليلبس ثوبين نظيفين وليخرج إلى الفلاة من الأَرض. وعلى رواية أخرى : وليصعد سطحا ثم يصلّي أربع ركعات يقرأ فيهن ماتيسّر من السّور.

text.en: When he finishes the prayer, he may stand up, face the kiblah direction, and say the following:
text.ar: فإذا تشهد وسلم فليقم مستقبل القبلة وليقل :

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O Prophet
and be upon you Allah’s mercy and blessings.
Peace be upon you, O missioned Prophet,
(and peace be upon you) O well-pleased successor (of the Prophet),
(and peace be upon you) O grand lady,
(and peace be upon you) O Luminous lady,
(and peace be upon you) O two elite grandsons (of the Prophet),
(and peace be upon you) O descendants—the elite signs
and the well-selected trustees.
Here I am devoting myself to you,

segments.transliteration: wa ila aba'ikum wa waladikum alkhalafi

translation.en: to your fathers, and to your son, the Successor
on the blessing of the truth.
My heart is thus subservient to you
and my support is prepared for you
until Allah will judge about His religion.
I am with you, verily with you
but not with your enemy.
I am one of them who believe in your superiority
and I acknowledge your Return.
I never deny the all-powerfulness of Allah

segments.arabic: وَلاَ أَزْعُمُ إِلاَّ مَا شَاءَ ٱللَّهُ
segments.transliteration: wa la az`umu illa ma sha'a allahu

translation.en: and I do not claim but that which Allah wills.
Glory be to Allah, Lord of kingdom and realm.
All His creatures glorify Allah by His Names.
Peace be upon your souls and your bodies.

segments.transliteration: wa alssalamu `alaykum wa rahmatu allahi wa barakatuhu

translation.en: Peace and Allah’s mercy and blessings be upon you all.

text.en: Salawaat (Invocation of Blessings) Upon the Holy Infallibles (peace be upon them) on Fridays

It is also advisable to repeat the following words that Imam `Ali (peace be upon him) mentioned in one of his sermons on Friday, as is cited in the book of al-Rawdah min al-Kafi, representing an invocation of Allah’s blessings upon the Holy Prophet (peace nad blessings upon him and his family):
text.ar: في روايات عديدة أن النبي صلى‌الله‌عليه‌وآله يبلغه سلام المُسَلِّمِينَ عليه وصلوات المصلين عليه حيثما كانوا. وفي الحديث أن ملكا من الملائكة قد وكّل على أن يرد على من قال من المؤمنين : صَلّى الله عَلى مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِهِ وَسَلَّمَ ، فيقول في جوابه : وعليك. ثم يقول الملك : يا رسول الله إن فلانا يقرأك السلام. فيقول رسول الله صلى‌الله‌عليه‌وآله : وعليه السلام . وفي رواية معتبرة أن النبي صلى‌الله‌عليه‌وآله قال : من زار قبري بعد وفاتي كان كمن هاجر إلى في حياتي فإن لم تستطيعوا أن تزوروا قبري فابعثوا إلى السلام فإنَّه يبلغني . وقد وردت لهذا المعنى أخبار جمّة ونحن قد أثبتنا له صلوات الله عليه زيارتين اثنتين في يوم الاثنين عند ذكر زيارات الحجج الطاهرة في أيام الأسبوع فراجعها إن شئت وفز بفضل الزيارة بهما وينبغي أن يصلى عليه بما صلّى به أمير المؤمنين عليه‌السلام في بعض خطبه في يوم الجمعة كما في كتاب الروضة من الكافي :

segments.transliteration: inna allaha wa mala'ikatahu yusalluna `ala alnnabiyyi

translation.en: “Lo! Allah and His angels shower blessings on the Prophet.

segments.arabic: يَا أَيُّهَا ٱلَّذينَ آمَنُوٱ صَلُّوٱ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلِّمُوٱ تَسْليماً.»
segments.transliteration: ya ayyuha alladhina amanu sallu `alayhi wa sallimu tasliman

translation.en: O you who believe, ask blessings on him and salute him with a worthy salutation.”

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: O Allah, send peace upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,
translation.fa: خدایا درود فرست بر محمد و آل محمد

segments.transliteration: wa barik `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: send blessings upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,

segments.transliteration: wa tahannan `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: have compassion upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,

segments.transliteration: wa sallim `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: and send benedictions upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad
as much as You have sent peace, blessings,
mercy, compassion,

segments.transliteration: wa sallamta `ala ibrahima wa ali ibrahima

translation.en: and benedictions upon (Prophet) Abraham and the Household of Abraham.
You are verily Owner of praise, Owner of glory.
O Allah, give Muhammad [the right of] mediation,
honor, virtue,
and noble rank.

segments.transliteration: allahumma ij`al muhammadan wa ala muhammadin

translation.en: O Allah, make Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad

segments.arabic: أَعْظَمَ ٱلْخَلاَئِقِ كُلِّهِمْ شَرَفاً يَوْمَ ٱلْقِيَامَةِ
segments.transliteration: a`zama alkhala'iqi kullihim sharafan yawma alqiyamati

translation.en: to be the most honored of all Your creatures on the Resurrection Day,
the closest to You in position,
the most notable with You on the Resurrection Day,
and the most favorable in title and status.
O Allah, give Muhammad the most honorable position,
the most abundant salutation,
and the intercession of Islam.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ وَأَلْحِقْنَا بِهِ غَيْرَ خَزَايَا وَلاَ نَاكِثِينَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma wa alhiqna bihi ghayra khazaya wa la nakithina

translation.en: O Allah, join us to him while we are neither disgraced, nor violating,

segments.transliteration: wa la nadimina wa la mubaddilina

translation.en: nor regretful, nor distorting.
O God of all worlds, respond to us.

text.en:
First: In the first unit of the Dawn Prayer, it is recommended to recite  <ref=1:62>Surah Al-Jumu'ah</ref> 
 and, in the second unit, <ref=1:112>Surah Al-Ikhlas</ref>
text.ar: الأول : أن يقرأ في‌الركعة الأولى من صلاة الفجر سُورَة <ref=1:62>الجمعة</ref> وَفي الثانية سُورَة التَوحيد

text.en: Second: Before opening the mouth with any word, it is recommended to say the following supplicatory prayer after the Dawn Prayer so that all sins committed throughout the week will be forgiven:
text.ar: الثاني : أن يدعو بهذا الدعاء بعد صلاة الغداة قَبلَ أنْ يتكلم ليكون ذلكَ كفارة ذنوبه من جمعةٍ إلى جمعة :

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ مَا قُلْتُ فِي جُمُعَتِي هٰذِهِ مِنْ قَوْلٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma ma qultu fi jumu`ati hadhihi min qawlin

translation.en: O Allah, whatever saying I have uttered this week,
whatever oath I have taken during it,
and whatever vow I have made during it,
verily, it is Your will that is before all that.

segments.arabic: فَمَا شِئْتَ مِنْهُ أَنْ يَكُونَ كَانَ
segments.transliteration: fama shi'ta minhu an yakuna kana

translation.en: Hence, only that which You will to have effect will come to pass

segments.arabic: وَمَا لَمْ تَشَأْ مِنْهُ لَمْ يَكُنْ
segments.transliteration: wa ma lam tasha' minhu lam yakun

translation.en: and whatever You do not will to have effect will never come to pass.
O Allah, (please) forgive me and overlook my offenses.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ مَنْ صَلَّيْتَ عَلَيْهِ فَصَلاَتِي عَلَيْهِ

translation.en: O Allah, whosoever You bless, then I invoke Your blessings upon him
and whosoever You curse, then I invoke Your curse upon him.

text.en: This act should be done once a month at least.
text.ar: وليؤدّ هذا العمل لا أقلّ من مَرَّة في كُلِّ شهر

text.en: It has been also narrated that one who, after the accomplishment of the Dawn Prayer on Fridays, does devotional acts and says supplications and invocations until sunrise will be raised seventy ranks to the Supreme Paradise.
text.ar: وروي أنّ من جَلسَ يَوم الجُمعة يعقب إلى طلوع الشمس رفع لهُ سبعون درجة في الفردوس الاَعلى

text.en: Shaykh al-Tusi has recorded that it is highly recommended to say the following supplicatory prayer after the Dawn Prayer on Fridays:
text.ar: وروى الشَّيخ الطوسي أنّ من المسنون هذا الدعاء في تعقيب فَريضَة الفجر يَوم الجُمعة :

translation.en: O Allah, I am resorting to You with my needs,
and I am putting in Your presence my poverty,
my indigence, and my deprivation.
Verily, I hope for Your forgiveness more than I rely on my deeds.

segments.transliteration: wa lamaghfiratuka wa rahmatuka awsa`u min dhunubi

translation.en: Indeed, Your forgiveness and Your mercy are more inclusive than my sins are.

segments.arabic: فَتَوَلَّ قَضَاءَ كُلِّ حَاجَةٍ لِي بِقُدْرَتِكَ عَلَيْهَا
segments.transliteration: fatawalla qada'a kulli hajatin li biqudratika `alayha

translation.en: So, (please) embark on settling all my needs out of Your power over them,
out of the easiness for You to do that,
and out of my urgent need for that.

segments.arabic: فَإنِّي لَمْ أُصِبْ خَيْراً قَطُّ إِلاَّ مِنَكَ
segments.transliteration: fa'inni lam usib khayran qattu illa minka

translation.en: Verily, I have not gained any good thing save from You

segments.arabic: وَلَمْ يَصْرِفْ عَنِّي سُوءاً قَطُّ أَحَدٌ سِوَاكَ
segments.transliteration: wa lam yasrif `anni su'an qattu ahadun siwaka

translation.en: and none could ever repel evil from me save You.

segments.transliteration: wa lastu arju li-akhirati wa dunyaya wa

translation.en: I hope for none to stand for me in my affairs of this world and the Next World
and on the day of my poverty,
when people will leave me alone in my hole (i.e. grave)
and I will then confess of my sins before You, except You.

text.en: Third: It has been narrated that one who says the following invocation after the Zohr and Fajr Prayers on Fridays, as well as other days, will catch Imam al-Mahdi(a.s.) before he dies:
text.ar: الثّالث : روي أنَّ مَن قالَ بعد فَريضَة الظّهر وفريضة الفجر في يَوم الجُمعة وغيره من الاَيّام :

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ وَعَجِّلْ فَرَجَهُمْ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin wa `ajjil farajahum

translation.en: O Allah, bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad and hasten their Reappearance

text.en: In addition, it has been narrated that one who repeats the aforesaid invocation one hundred times will have sixty of his requests granted for him - thirty in this worldly life and thirty on the Resurrection Day.
text.ar: لَمْ يَمُتْ حتّى يدرك القائم عليه‌السلام وان قالَهُ مائة مَرَّة قضى الله لَهُ ستِّين حاجة ثلاثين من حاجات الدّنيا وثلاثين مِن حاجات الآخرة.

text.en:
Fourth: It is recommended to recite <ref=1:55>Surah Al-Rahman</ref>
 after the Fajr Prayer on Fridays and to say “None of Your favors do I deny,”wherever the verses, “Then which of the favors of your Lord will ye deny?” are recited.
text.ar:
الرّابع : أنْ يقرأ سُورَة <ref=1:55>الرحمن</ref>
 بعد فَريضَة الصبح فيقول بعد : الرّابع : أنْ يقرأ سُورَة الرّحمن بعد فَريضَة الصبح فيقول بعد : (فَبِأَيِّ آلاِ رَبِّكُما تُكَذِّبانِ) : لا بِشَيٍْ مِنْ آلائِكَ رَبِّ أُكَذِّبُ

text.en:
Fifth: Shaykh al-Tusi has recorded that it is highly recommended to recite Surah al-Tawheed, to invoke Almighty Allah’s blessings upon Muhammad and his Household, and to pray Him for forgiveness each one hundred times after the Fajr Prayer on Fridays. It is also highly recommended to recite <ref=1:4>Surah Al-Nisa</ref>
, <ref=1:11>Surah Hud</ref>
, <ref=1:18>Surah Al-Kahf</ref> , <ref=1:37>Surah Al-Saffat</ref>
, and <ref=1:55>Surah Al-Rahman</ref>
 during that time.
text.ar:
الخامس : قالَ الشيخ الطّوسي رض : من المسنون بعد فَريضَة الصبح يَوم الجُمعة أنْ يقرأ التَّوحيد مائة مَرَّة ويُصلِّي على مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ مائة مَرَّة ويستغفر مائة مَرَّة ويقرأ سُورَة <ref=1:4>النساء</ref>
 و <ref=1:11>هود</ref>
 و <ref=1:18>الکهف</ref>
 و <ref=1:37>الصافّات</ref>
 و <ref=1:55>الرحمن</ref>

text.en: Sixth: It is recommended to recite <ref=1:46>Surah Al-Ahqaf</ref> and <ref=1:23>Surah Al-Mu'minun</ref>. Imam al-Sadiq(a.s.) is reported as saying that anyone who recites Surah al-Ahqaf at Friday nights or on Fridays will not be inflicted by dismays in his worldly life and will be saved from the horrors on the Resurrection Day. The Imam (a.s.) is also reported as saying that anyone who recites Surah al-Mu’minun regularly each Friday will come upon a happy end and will be granted an abode in the Supreme Paradise with the Prophets and Messengers of Almighty Allah.
text.ar:
السّادس : أَنْ يقرأ سُورَة <ref=1:46>الأَحقاف</ref>
 و <ref=1:23>المؤمنون</ref>
. فَعَنْ الصّادق عليه‌السلام قالَ : مَنْ قرأ كُلّ لَيلة مِنْ لَيالي الجُمعة أو كُلّ يَوم من أيَّامها سُورَة الاَحقاف لَمْ يَصبْهُ الله بروعة في الحياة الدُنيا وآمنهُ مِنْ فَزَع يَومِ القيّامة إن شاء الله. وقالَ أيضاً : مَنْ قرأ سُورَة المؤمنون خَتَم الله لَهُ بِالسّعادة إِذا كانَ يُدمِن قِراءتَها في كُلِّ جُمعة ، وَكانَ مَنزلهُ في‌الفِردوس الاَعلى مع النّبيّينَ والمرسلينَ

text.en:
Seventh: It is recommended to repeat <ref=1:109>Surah Al-Kafirun</ref>
 ten times before sunrise and then pray Almighty Allah so that all prayers will be answered. It has been narrated that Imam Ali ibn al-Husayn Zayn al-’Abidin (a.s.) used to repeat reciting <ref=1:2:255-257>Ayat Al-Kursi</ref>
 from early morning up to midday on Fridays. When he accomplished the obligatory prayers, he would recite Surah al-Qadr (No. 97) frequently. It is worth mentioning that to recite <ref=1:2:255-257>Ayat Al-Kursi</ref>
 in the form of revelationon Fridays achieves a great reward.
text.ar:
السّابع : أَن يقرأ سُورَة <ref=1:109>الکافرون</ref>
 قَبلَ طلوع الشّمس عشرة مرّات ثمّ يَدعو لِيستجابَ دعاؤهُ وروي أنَّ الإمام زَينُ العابِدينُ عليه‌السلام كانَ إِذا أصبحَ الصّباح يَوم الجُمعة أخذ في قِراءة <ref=1:2:255-257>آیة الکُرسي</ref> 
 إلى الظّهر ، ثُم إِذا فرغَ مِنَ الصلاة أخذَ في قِراءة سُورَة <ref=1:97>القدر</ref> . واعلم أنّ لِقراءة <ref=1:2:255-257>آیة الکرسي</ref>  على التّنزيل في يَوم الجُمعة فضلاً كَثِيراً

text.en: Eighth: It is highly recommended to bathe oneself. In fact, this is one of the most confirmed rituals of Fridays. The Holy Prophet (s.a.w.a.) is reported to have instructed Imam Ali(a.s.) by saying, “O Ali; wash yourself every Friday even if you have to purchase water with your Daily provisions and have nothing to eat. Verily, no voluntary act is better than this.” Imam al-Sadiq(a.s.) is also reported to have said: Whoever washes himself on Fridays and, meanwhile, says the following supplicatory prayer will be pure all through that week:
text.ar: الثّامن : أَنْ يغتسلَ وَذلكَ مِنْ وَكيد السّنن. وروي عَن النّبّي صلى‌الله‌عليه‌وآله أنّهُ قالَ لِعليّ عليه‌السلام : يا عليّ إغتسل في كُلِّ جُمعة وَلو انّك تشتري الماء بِقوت يَومِكَ وَتطويهِ ، فانّه لَيسَ شي مَنَ التطوّع أعظم مِنهُ. وَعَن الصّادق (صَلواتُ الله وسلامهُ عَليهِ) قالَ : مَنْ اغتسلَ يَوم الجُمعة فَقال :

segments.arabic: أَشْهَدُ أَنْ لاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ ٱللَّهُ
segments.transliteration: ash-hadu an la ilaha illa allahu

translation.en: I bear witness that there is no god except Allah,
the One, (there is) no associate with Him;

segments.transliteration: wa ash-hadu anna muhammadan `abduhu wa rasuluhu

translation.en: and I testify that Muhammad is His servant and His Messenger.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin waj`alni mina alttawwabina

translation.en: O Allah, send blessings to Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,
translation.fa: خدایا درود فرست بر محمد و آل محمد

translation.en: and make me of those who turn to You constantly

segments.transliteration: ash-hadu an la ilaha illa allahu

translation.en: and those who keep themselves pure and clean.

text.en: “Pure” in the aforesaid Hadith stands for purification from sins or acceptance of the deeds, which is thus moral purification. In any case, it is important not to neglect bathing oneself on Fridays when possible. The recommended time of this bathing is between sunrise and midday. In addition, the nearer to midday the better.
text.ar: كانَ طهراً من الجُمعة إلى الجُمعة ، أي طهراً مِنْ ذُنوبهِ أو أنَّ أعمالَهُ وقعت على طهر معنوي وقبلت ، والاَحوط ان لا يدع غُسل الجُمعة ماتمكّن مِنهُ ، ووقتِه من بعد طلوع الفجر إلى زوال الشّمس ، وكلّما قرب الوقت إلى الزّوال كانَ أفضل.

text.en: Ninth: It is recommended to dye with hibiscus, for it saves from leprosy and insanity.
text.ar: التّاسع : أَن يغسل الرأس بالخطميِّ فإنّه أمان من البرص والجنون

text.en: Tenth: It is also recommended to cut the mustache neatly and trim the nails so as not to miss the great merits of doing these acts. As has been mentioned in narrations, these acts bring about expansion in sustenance, cancellation of sins up to the next Friday, and security from insanity and leprosy. On doing that, it is recommended to say the following litany:
text.ar: العاشر : أَن يقصَّ شاربَهُ ويُقلّم أظفاره فَلذلكَ فضل كثير يزيد في الرّزق ويَمحو الذّنوب إلى الجُمعة القادمة ويوجب الاَمن من الجنون والجذام والبرص وَلْيَقُل حينئِذ :

translation.en: In the Name of Allah (I begin);and by (the command of) Allah

segments.transliteration: wa `ala sunnati muhammadin wa ali muhammad

translation.en: and according to the tradition of Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad (I do this).

text.en: It is also recommended, on cutting the nails, to start with the little finger of the left hand and end with that of the right hand. The same thing is applicable to the nails of the feet. Then, the cut nails should be buried.
text.ar: وَليَبْدَأ في تقليم الاَظفار بِالخنصر من اليد اليسرى ، ويَختم بِالخنصر من اليد اليمنى ، وكذا في تقليم أظفار الرِّجل ثمَّ لِيدفنَ فضُول الأظافير.

text.en: Eleventh: It is recommended to apply perfume and put on the best of one’s clothes.
text.ar: الحادي عشر : أَن يتطيَّب ، ويلبس صالح ثيابهِ

text.en: Twelfth: It is recommended to give alms, for the rewards are doubled up on Fridays and at Friday nights, as is confirmed by narrations, as one thousand folds as giving alms on other days.
text.ar: الثّاني عشر : أَن يتصدَّق ، فالصَّدقة تُضاعف على بعض الروايات في لَيلة الجُمعة ونهارها ألف ضعفها في سائر الاَوقات

text.en: Thirteenth: It is recommended to arrange fruits and wholesome meals to the family members so that Fridays will be their days of pleasure.
text.ar: الثّالث عشر : أَن يطرف أهله في كلِ جمعة بشي من الفاكهة واللّحم حتّى يفرحوا بالجمعة.

text.en: Fourteenth: It is recommended to eat pomegranate before breakfast and to eat seven leaves of endive before midday. In this connection, Imam Musa al-Kazim (a.s.) is reported to have said, “The heart of him who eats a pomegranate before breakfast on Fridays will be enlightened for forty days. To eat two pomegranates increases the period of enlightenment to eighty days, and so on. It also dismisses the evil suggestions. Of course, to get rid of Satan’s suggestions is to stop acting disobediently to Almighty Allah; and to stop acting disobediently to Him allows entrance to Paradise.” In al-Misbah, the author has said that to eat pomegranates on Fridays and at Friday nights achieves great merits.
text.ar: الرّابع عشر : أكُل الرّمّان على الرّيق وأكُل سبعة أوراق من الهندباءِ قَبلَ الزّوال. وَعَن مُوسى بن جعفر عليه‌السلام قالَ : من أكل رُمّانة يَوم الجُمعة على الرّيق نوّرت قلبه أربعين صباحا فإن أكل رُمّانتين فثمانين يوما فإن أكلَ ثلاثاً فَمائة وعشرين يوماً وطردت عنه وسْوَسَة الشّيطان وَمَن طُردت عنه وسوسة الشّيطان لَمْ يعصِ الله وَمَن لَمْ يعصِ الله أدخله الله الجنّة. وقالَ الشّيخ في (المصباح) : وروي في أكلِ الرمان في يوم الجُمعة ولَيلتها فضلٌ كثير
